Name: Kopi Kenangan
Description:
Kopi Kenangan is a coffee chain with more than 1000 stores globally. We are in Indonesia, Malaysia, Singapore, Philippines, India and Australia.  We became the 1st F&B Unicorn in SE Asia in December 2021.  We are Halal Certified and was named Brand of The Year winner in the Café Chain Category Indonesia by The World Branding Awards 2025 – 2026. 

Our mission is to serve high quality coffee, made with the freshest Indonesia sourced ingredients to customers in Indonesia and the rest of the world. 

Other brands under our umbrella are Kenangan Coffee (@kenangancoffee.my; @kenangancoffee.sg and @kenangancoffee.in), Chigo (@chigo.id) and Kenangan Hanyauntukmu (@kenangan.hanyauntukmu).

We have a culture that rewards results and impact.  We work as a team and move fast to respond to market and consumer needs.  Our people are agile, result driven, and passionate in delivering quality products and services to our customers.

For a full listing of career opportunities with us, visit http://www.kopikenangan.com/careers or follow us @insidekopikenangan

Name: Jollibee Group
Description:
Jollibee Foods Corporation (PSE: JFC) (the "Company") is one of the world’s fastest-growing restaurant companies, driven by its purpose of spreading joy through superior taste. It manages and operates a portfolio which includes 19 brands (the "Jollibee Group") with over 10,000 stores and cafés across 33 countries.

Learn more about the Jollibee Group at www.jollibeegroup.com.

Name: Arcos Dorados
Description:
ESPAÑOL:

Arcos Dorados es el mayor franquiciado independiente de McDonald’s del mundo en términos de ventas en todo el sistema y en número de locales. La compañía es la cadena de restaurantes de servicio rápido ("QSR") más grande en América Latina y el Caribe. Tiene el derecho exclusivo a poseer, operar y otorgar franquicias de locales McDonald’s en 21 países y territorios de América Latina y el Caribe, incluyendo Argentina, Aruba, Brasil, Chile, Colombia, Costa Rica, Curaçao, Ecuador, Guyana Francesa, Guadalupe, Martinica, México, Panamá, Perú, Puerto Rico, St. Croix, St. Martin, St. Thomas, Trinidad y Tobago, Uruguay y Venezuela. La compañía opera o franquicia 2500 restaurantes McDonald’s con más de 100.000 empleados y es conocida una de las mejores empresas para trabajar en América Latina. Arcos Dorados cotiza en la Bolsa de Valores de Nueva York (NYSE: ARCO). 


PORTUGUÊS: 

A Arcos Dorados é a maior franquia independente do McDonald’s do mundo, tanto em vendas totais do sistema como em número de restaurantes. A Companhia é a maior rede de serviço rápido de alimentação da América Latina e Caribe, com direitos exclusivos de possuir, operar e conceder franquias de restaurantes McDonald’s em 21 países e territórios, incluindo Argentina, Aruba, Brasil, Chile, Colômbia, Costa Rica, Curaçao, Equador, Guiana Francesa, Guadalupe, Martinica, México, Panamá, Peru, Porto Rico, St. Croix, St. Martin, St. Thomas, Trinidad & Tobago, Uruguai e Venezuela. A Companhia opera ou franqueia mais de 2.400 restaurantes McDonald’s com mais de 100.000 funcionários e é reconhecida como uma das melhores empresas para se trabalhar no América Latina. A Arcos Dorados está listada na Bolsa de Valores de Nova York (NYSE: ARCO).

Name: CELSIUS
Description:
Celsius Holdings, Inc. is a global beverage company and maker of premium, lifestyle energy drink CELSIUS – the better-for-you, zero-sugar alternative to traditional energy drinks. CELSIUS inspires global communities of fitness enthusiasts and promotes active lifestyles by disrupting the rapidly growing performance energy space.

CELSIUS inspires people to LIVE FIT by empowering them to achieve their daily goals and maintain an active lifestyle. Living fit is about more than just fitness, it’s a mindset and a lifestyle embodied by those who push their limits and hustle every day. Every drop is Essential, and every fruit-forward flavor is refreshing, functional and balanced. With an expansive portfolio of flavors and formats, from CELSIUS to Fizz-Free to On The Go powders, CELSIUS is the perfect pick-me-up to help individuals LIVE FIT every day.

Name: Liquid Death
Description: As one of the fastest growing non-alcoholic beverage brands, Liquid Death uses comedy and entertainment to make health and sustainability 50 times more fun. We take low-calorie beverages and package them into infinitely recyclable cans that compete with the fun marketing of unhealthy brands across energy drinks, beer, and junk food. Our product lines include mountain water, soda-flavored sparkling water, iced tea, better-for-you energy, and more. A portion of Liquid Death’s proceeds goes to nonprofits who are helping fight plastic pollution and further our death to plastic bottles sustainability mission.

Name: OTTO
Description:
OTTO is the largest german online shop and one of the largest employers in Hamburg. For over 75 years, we have been constantly evolving to offer our customers the best shopping experience possible.
 
Our channel is all about jobs, career tips, and insights into our working world. We also keep you up to date on topics that matter to us—such as tech, diversity, and sustainability.
 
What makes OTTO special? With over 18 million items from more than 34,000 brands, over 12.2 million customers, and over 6,200 partners, OTTO is the largest german online shop. With courage, passion, and openness to change, we invest in new technologies. Always at the center: our customers and the positive shopping experience in the app and on otto.de.
 
How do we work at OTTO? With around 6,000 employees, we are one of Hamburg's largest employers. New Work is part of our work culture. We work hybrid, i.e., both on our campus in Bramfeld and remotely from home or another mobile location, depending on the job and task.
 
Work-life balance is important to us at OTTO. To this end, we offer various benefits such as flexitime, workation, sabbaticals, and part-time work – even in all management positions. You can find all this here on LinkedIn or on Instagram https://www.instagram.com/otto_inside/
 
You can find more information about tech on our tech blog: https://otto.de/techblog
 
If you have any questions about our job postings or your application, please contact the relevant person in OTTO's recruitment department. You can contact them directly here: otto.me/2nfQU8d
 
Legal notice: https://www.otto.de/unternehmen/de/impressum/

Name: Super Food Holding
Description:
Somos Super Food Holding , el equipo administrativo que impulsa el crecimiento y expansión de todos nuestros formatos: plazaVea, Vivanda, tiendas Mass, Makro, Oslo Logistics y Merkao. Síguenos en nuestro IG Oficial @ViveSuperFoodHolding y conoce mucho más de nosotr@s. 

Somos parte del grupo Intercorp y estamos comprometidos con nuestro propósito: que nuestros clientes sean prioridad en todo lo que hacemos.

POLITICA DE CALIDAD
El equipo de calidad de Super Food Holding se compromete a normar, estandarizar y controlar el sistema de gestión de calidad de las diferentes empresas a las cuales brinda servicio, de acuerdo con sus requisitos establecidos y normas legales aplicables a la calidad, higiene e inocuidad alimentaria; con un enfoque sistémico, disciplinado, sostenible, basado en riesgos y de mejora continua, buscando superar las expectativas de sus clientes y demás partes interesadas.

Name: Book of the Month
Description:
Our mission is to bring the best new fiction forward. Celebrating and championing emerging authors and the distinctively fresh work they are uniquely capable of writing. Providing our readers with books they might not have found elsewhere. Since our founding in 1926, we’ve chosen many unknown books that later became iconic works of American fiction.

Want to join the club? We’re always looking to hire new teammates, so check out our job posting.

Name: ORGANIC INDIA
Description:
At the heart of ORGANIC INDIA is our commitment to be a living embodiment of love and consciousness in action. We work with thousands of small family farmers in India to cultivate tens of thousands of acres of sustainable organic farmland.

All ORGANIC INDIA products support health and True Wellness and are made with loving care. Each product is one link in a chain of connectedness between Mother Nature, our farmers and you. By choosing ORGANIC INDIA you are completing this chain, actively participating in our mission to create a sustainable environment of True Wellness, providing training and a life of dignity to our farmers, and bringing health, happiness and True Wellness to you.

All of our farmers and tribal wildcrafters are educated in organic and biodynamic agricultural practices. We pay all the fees associated with acquiring the necessary organic certifications for them, and then we purchase the harvested crops and herbs at a premium market price. The farmers also rotate between growing crops on their land for ORGANIC INDIA with food crops for themselves. This means farming families are supported by a sustainable income, while at the same time improving and preserving their own health and natural environment.

ORGANIC INDIA is committed to being a trustworthy and innovative global leader by providing genuine True Wellness products. Our advanced processing methods and dehydration technologies ensure that our herbs retain their maximum level of potency for the highest quality, most effective, pure and natural True Wellness products available in the market today. Our success serves as living proof that shared abundance can be created with an uncompromising commitment to environmental and social responsibility. In living this vision, we are inspired to introduce a new standard for new paradigm companies:

ORGANIC INDIA is proud to announce its partnership with FabIndia, India's largest private retail platform for craft-based products.

Name: Javvy Coffee
Description: Forward thinking coffee with a focus on flavor. Reimagine your daily grind

Name: Gerber
Description: Gerber Products Company was founded in 1928 in Fremont, Michigan. Gerber joined the Nestlé family on September 1, 2007. Gerber is a leader in early childhood nutrition. At Gerber, research informs everything we do – from the products we make, the nutrition education we deliver and the services we offer. Gerber provides resources from the Feeding Infants and Toddlers Study (FITS) for health care professionals at Medical.Gerber.com/FITS and for parents at Gerber.com.

Name: Awesome Earthmovers
Description: The largest social media heavy equipment focused online platform with a combined following of over 3.3 million on Facebook, YouTube, Instagram and TikTok. All content is produced in house.

Name: APAS - Associação Paulista de Supermercados
Description:
A Associação Paulista de Supermercados (APAS) é a maior entidade de classe do setor supermercadista brasileiro. Com uma Sede e 3 Distritais na cidade de São Paulo, a APAS possui 13 Sedes Regionais estrategicamente distribuídas por todo o Estado de São Paulo.

Agente promotor da modernização institucional do País, a APAS atua de forma construtiva, ao lado do poder público, na consolidação de um ambiente de negócios favorável ao crescimento do setor supermercadista, da geração de empregos e do desenvolvimento sustentável do estado de São Paulo e do Brasil. 

Em nossa premissa, conferimos a todos os nossos associados, às autoridades nacionais e internacionais, bem como aos diferentes stakeholders das várias cadeias produtivas que compõem o mix de produtos comercializados no varejo de alimentos e bebidas, um tratamento homogêneo.

Name: Nestle
Description: We unlock the power of food to enhance quality of life for everyone, today and for generations to come.

Name: TenderCuts.in
Description:
TenderCuts is India’s first omnichannel clean protein brand — reshaping a fragmented meat & seafood trade into a fresh, traceable, and trusted category at scale. Founded in 2015, the brand combines omnichannel reach, direct sourcing, decentralised processing, full-stack integration, proprietary technology, and a skilled, formalised workforce to deliver affordable, high-quality protein across the consumption pyramid. The model blends online convenience with offline trust, supported by SOP-led operations, asset-light retail formats, and industry-best unit economics.

From high-burn beginnings to EBITDA-positive growth, TenderCuts has demonstrated that raising standards works for customers, for the industry, and livelihoods. Positioned to serve over 10 million households and skill 5,000+ meat professionals by 2030, the brand is building a future where clean protein is universally accessible, nutrition equity is achieved, and the meat & seafood trade is dignified, efficient, and sustainable.

Name: epigamia
Description:
A new-age FMCG company, Epigamia is one of India's leading health snack brands. Catering to a wide consumer demographic owing to our unique and diverse  product offerings - we believe we are contemporizing traditional dairy.

From Greek Yogurt to Artisanal Curd, Smoothies to Milkshakes, Lactose-free ranges to Plant-based ranges - we constantly push boundaries in the most creative manner to make sure you never have to choose between health and taste.

A brand that is by the people, of the people and for the people who love food. A love so deep that it made us think of ourselves as Activists of Taste and Advocates of Health! We push boundaries to make food yummier and ensure some, if not all, health boxes are ticked! For our very first creation, we added the best of Indian and Greek cultures to a cup and let the magic loose. And the rest? History. We love thinking outside the cup - oops, we mean box. With plenty of creative elbow room and a passion for pushing boundaries, we experiment with unique flavours, create new products and bring innovation to life!

Name: Savoria
Description:
SAVORIA (FMCG Djarum Group) is well-known as the market leader for consumer goods. The aggressive growing companies that provide career's opportunity to all professionals. 

All our companies are certified with the international standard and halal products:
- PT Global Dairi Alami, the integrated farm and factory with premium dairy product of "Milk Life".
- PT Prima Top Boga is specialized for pastry with premium brand "5 Days Croissants and Bon Chef".
- PT Sumber Kopi Prima, the international factory producing premium coffee with the brand of "Kopi Tubruk Gadjah and Caffino".
- PT Savoria Kreasi Rasa, for premium snacks, confectionaries, and beverages of "FOXS, Krizzi, Hydro Plus and Shot".
- PT Gonusa Prima Distribusi, the sales arm as the distributor for all principals that spread into 151 sales offices from Papua to Aceh also cover global market in 42 countries.

Having a strong culture of INCREDIBLE and TRUE Leader to bond all employees to grow together beyond boundaries to success.

Name: Naked Wines
Description:
Discover great wine, your way. We directly support world-class, independent winemakers for a fairer price all round. No tie-ins. No time-limits. You choose how to shop and we’ll credit you back for a wine you didn’t love. 

You’ll get tailored recommendations to suit your taste buds, get to know the faces behind the bottles and have your say on every sip. This is the world of wine, on your doorstep.

Name: Little Spoon
Description:
Little Spoon is on a mission to make parents' lives easier and kids healthier. Pioneering a new era of kids food, Little Spoon was built to meet the needs and standards of the modern parent by delivering uncompromising quality and time-saving convenience. 

From first bites to big kid years, Little Spoon’s rigorous ingredient sourcing, product testing, and format innovation take the stress away from fueling your kids without sacrificing peace of mind. 

Since launching nationally with the first fresh baby food in 2017, Little Spoon has quickly become America’s #1 online baby and kids food company, having delivered more than 70 million meals to families across the US. 

Their award-winning product lineup, which consists of 100+ products available exclusively at LittleSpoon.com,  includes their signature Babyblends, Biteables, Plates, Lunchers, Smoothies, and YoGos, along with a range of snacks and other products. Learn more at LittleSpoon.com.

Name: Van Leeuwen Ice Cream
Description:
We started Van Leeuwen Ice Cream in a yellow truck on the streets of NYC in 2008 with a mission to make good ice cream that makes you feel good.

Nowadays, people can spend so much time on what’s “healthy” they don’t stop to consider what’s healthy. As far as we’re concerned, happiness is healthiness. What could be happier than that magic combination of milk, cream, eggs, and cane sugar (or coconuts, cashews and oats for our vegan friends)? Yes, our ice cream has fat. And that’s okay. It’s good-good, not good-bad.

Good is choice ingredients. Even if we have to go to Mount Etna to get them.

Good is simple ingredients. If it’s tough to pronounce, it’s probably tough to digest.
Good is harmonious ingredients. We seek to satisfy omnivores and vegans alike.

This is our way. The good way. The Van Leeuwen way. Not just the best way to make ice cream, but to live.

BECAUSE A LIFE WITHOUT ANYTHING GOOD IS BAD.

Name: Nutrabolt
Description:
Nutrabolt is a fast-growing, global active health and wellness company with a portfolio of market-leading, performance-oriented brands that energize and fuel active lifestyles. The company’s disruptive and innovative products compete in the Functional Beverage and Active Nutrition categories under four consumer-loved brands: C4 (one of the fastest-growing energy drink brands in the United States and the #1 global pre-workout brand), XTEND (America’s #1 BCAA brand), Cellucor (an award-winning sports nutrition brand created in 2002), and Bloom (a leading wellness brand offering approachable, high-quality supplements and functional beverages for everyday consumers). Since its founding over 20 years ago, Nutrabolt’s mission has been to meet the discerning needs of performance athletes and fitness enthusiasts—while empowering a broader community of consumers around the world who are making healthy, active living a daily priority.

Nutrabolt’s portfolio is distributed in more than 125 countries and available through company-owned DTC platforms, Amazon, and other leading online marketplaces, as well as top U.S. retailers including Walmart, Target, 7-Eleven, Albertson’s/Safeway, Walgreens, Kroger, H-E-B, Wawa, Publix, GNC, and The Vitamin Shoppe. For more information, please visit nutrabolt.com and follow @C4Energy, @Cellucor, @Xtend, and @Bloomsupps on social media.

Name: UnidaSul Distribuidora Alimentícia S/A.
Description:
A UnidaSul, fundada em 2006, é a quarta maior empresa do setor supermercadista do Rio Grande do Sul. A empresa nasceu da fusão entre a Comercial Unida e Comercial Rissul, que trazem consigo mais de 50 anos de expertise em varejo, atacado, atacarejo, distribuição, fabricação, transporte e logística de alimentos. Destacam-se entre os negócios administrados pela holding as 33 lojas do Rissul e as 13 do Macromix Atacado, que atendem 24 cidades dos Vales do Sinos e do Paranhana, Litoral Norte, Serra e Região Metropolitana, incluindo a capital, Porto Alegre.


Além disso, a UnidaSul administra outras 10 marcas: CBS Alimentos, Valore Alimentos, No Ponto Carnes, Estância Rissul, Caldo Nobre, Caldo Grosso, Amigo Pet, Supercau, Mistercau e Num Instante; e detém as bandeiras de distribuição DecSul, Disbem e Supri Certo, CBS, Valore, Frimix e o canal de distribuição online Mr. Estoque.


Também constituem a UnidaSul outros sete negócios que fornecem tanto para as lojas Rissul e Macromix quanto para as demais empresas da holding: a Indústria de Beneficiamento de Grãos, Farinhas, Temperos e Achocolatados e as Centrais de Fatiamento de Cárneos e Lácteos; de Padaria; Frigorífica de Bovinos e Suínos; de Hortifruti; de Perecíveis e de Minimamente Processados. 


Embora números e conquistas sejam importantes, o que mais orgulha a empresa são os mais de 7,5 mil colaboradores. Independente do negócio e área de atuação, todos trabalham unidos sob uma diretriz: a paixão por servir. Essa paixão aparece quando diariamente são oferecidos os melhores produtos e serviços para clientes e parceiros, em todas as unidades e em cada novo projeto.


NEGÓCIO 

Servir Pessoas.


MISSÃO

Servir pessoas com produtos e serviços adequados às suas necessidades, surpreendendo-as com nossa paixão.


PRINCÍPIOS

Integridade e ética nas nossas relações pessoais e comerciais. Eficiência e eficácia permanente em todos os processos. Organização competente focada em resultados. Pessoas talentosas e comprometidas

Name: flaconi
Description:
With over 5 million active customers, flaconi is Germany's leading online retailer for beauty and perfume. The online shop’s extensive portfolio consists of around 1,000 national and international brands and 50,000 products. With categories such as perfume, skincare, makeup, haircare, natural cosmetics, beauty tools, and accessories, the online shop covers all product segments and offers a diverse selection of products for individual and daily beauty routines. Founded in 2011 as one of the first online perfumeries, flaconi is now successfully continuing its history as one of the largest, holistic beauty online pure players in Germany  flaconi is proud to work with around 700 employees from 60 different nations at its headquarters in Berlin-Charlottenburg and in its logistics center in Halle. 

The flaconi online shop has won numerous awards and is present not only in Germany but also in Austria, France, Poland, Switzerland, Belgium, the Netherlands, Denmark, Sweden, Finland, Czechia, and Italy.

Name: Little Spoon
Description:
Little Spoon is on a mission to make parents' lives easier and kids healthier. Pioneering a new era of kids food, Little Spoon was built to meet the needs and standards of the modern parent by delivering uncompromising quality and time-saving convenience. 

From first bites to big kid years, Little Spoon’s rigorous ingredient sourcing, product testing, and format innovation take the stress away from fueling your kids without sacrificing peace of mind. 

Since launching nationally with the first fresh baby food in 2017, Little Spoon has quickly become America’s #1 online baby and kids food company, having delivered more than 70 million meals to families across the US. 

Their award-winning product lineup, which consists of 100+ products available exclusively at LittleSpoon.com,  includes their signature Babyblends, Biteables, Plates, Lunchers, Smoothies, and YoGos, along with a range of snacks and other products. Learn more at LittleSpoon.com.

Name: TOMORO COFFEE
Description:
The founder of TOMORO has travelled across the world for years and has been to over 30 countries including Southeast Asia, South Asia, the Middle East, North Africa, and the Americas. This enabled him to deeply feel people’s passion for coffee culture from different countries, races, and occupations. 

The founder strives to pursue the ultimate passion for coffee and quality living by creating unique coffee humanities for TOMORO, ultimately introducing the ‘coffee culture’ to every corner of the world, and letting every customer enjoys a worthy cup of good coffee. 

TOMORO refers to “tomorrow“ and it means “embrace the goodness and yearn for tomorrow”. This is the original aspiration of TOMORO, strive to make every good cup of coffee with heart and encourage everyone to follow their heart bravely, feel the life with heart while yearning for tomorrow.

Name: waterdrop
Description:
We inspire consumers to live healthier, more sustainable lives by drinking more water.

waterdrop is a global company dedicated to changing the way people hydrate. Our innovative, tasty, sugar-free hydration cubes are made from natural fruit and plant extracts, providing a unique flavor experience wherever you are, whenever you want.

Daily hydration, made simple.

Name: Kaufland e-commerce
Description:
++ WHO WE ARE ++
We at Kaufland e-commerce are an independent tech company within Schwarz Digits, responsible for operating and developing Kaufland’s international online marketplaces. 
Our company is comprised of over 850 talents hailing from more than 60 nations. We unite this diversity of perspectives and strengths in interdisciplinary teams to help us find the best solutions for various projects. For projects like the Kaufland-App and the Kaufland Card, we work in close cooperation with our colleagues from Kaufland, combining online and branch stores into one shopping experience for our customers. 

++WHAT WE DO ++
The international Kaufland marketplaces are the beating heart of our day-to-day work. Together as a team, we make sure our customers have an outstanding and safe shopping experience. More than 13,000 online sellers offer a wide range of products in over 6,400 categories.
The success of the Kaufland marketplaces is based on our Kaufland Global Marketplace brand – a comprehensive all-in-one solution that allows sellers to use just one registration to sell on all five online marketplaces.

++ WHAT SETS US APART ++
We have a dynamic company culture which is marked by flat hierarchies, a strong team spirit and an open culture based on learning and making mistakes. One of the foundational elements of our culture are our Company Principles, which we actively live and which are integrated in various processes from onboarding onward.

++ OUR VISION AND MISSION ++
We firmly believe that our success is based on a forward-thinking mindset, guided by a clear vision. Our goal is to offer added value to our customers, our partners and our society. #FromEuropeForEurope
Learn more about our Vision & Mission: https://kaufland-ecommerce.com/en/culture/

We offer flexibility. You can work in any of our offices in Cologne, Darmstadt, Düsseldorf or remotely from anywhere inside of Germany.

Imprint: https://kaufland-ecommerce.com/impressum/

Name: Four Sigmatic
Description:
We’re Four Sigmatic, the #1 mushroom coffee and protein brand. We infuse functional mushrooms into everyday products you love, to enrich your mind and your well-being. Think lion’s mane for focus, cordyceps for energy, or reishi for a sense of calm. Our brews, blends, and powders get you in a good headspace so you can focus on what matters most. Some people call it magic. It’s our secret to Nordic wisdom for a fulfilling life.

Read more here:
https://us.foursigmatic.com/pages/about
https://international.foursigmatic.com/pages/about

Name: Le Fourgon
Description:
Le Fourgon vous permet de vous faire livrer vos produits consignés gratuitement dans la journée.

 La commande se passe sur lefourgon.com : plus de 500 références de produits (Boisson, épicerie, maison).
 On vous livre chez vous en fourgon électrique sur le créneau choisi
 Et au passage suivant on récupère vos contenants vides qu’on renvoie lavés au producteur pour ré-emploi #zerodechet

Alors, vous montez à bord du Fourgon ?

Name: Espresso Americano
Description: Espresso Americano is the #1 coffee retail company in Central America and one of Honduras' leading food and beverage companies.

Name: Vegalsa-Eroski
Description:
Vegalsa-Eroski, empresa líder de la distribución comercial en Galicia, está participada al 50% por la familia de Ventura González y Eroski.

Los orígenes de la compañía se remontan a los años cuarenta del pasado siglo XX, cuando el fundador y actual presidente de honor instala en Vigo su primer negocio de alimentación. En un largo recorrido, siempre en vanguardia de los formatos comerciales en Galicia, la compañía opera como mayorista de alimentación, crea las primeras tiendas, inaugura y expande el modelo de franquicia, hasta la creación de una red de supermercados propios que se extiende por toda Galicia con distintas enseñas.

En 1998, con la alianza con Eroski la compañía se fortalece para abordar los retos del liderazgo comercial en Galicia, lo que consigue con una política de compromiso con la Comunidad, con presencia en todo el territorio y apuesta por los productos gallegos.

Vegalsa-Eroski, con más de 4.300 trabajadores, es la sexta empresa de Galicia por facturación y empleo.

Name: TipTop Things Limited
Description: Our mission is to leverage technology to enhance everyday items, while making a positive impact on the planet.

Name: Enhance Group- WJ Towell Group company
Description:
As the FMCG and Retail Business cluster of the WJ Towell Group, Enhance is the leading provider of Brand Distribution and Retail Management Solutions in Oman with expanding management responsibilities in other GCC Markets.

Enhance Group, Oman comprises of 4 companies – Enhance Oman ( Matrah Cold Stores LLC ), Fairtrade LLC, Majan Distribution Company, and CSTC.  

In Oman, Enhance Group provides Distribution and Sales Management Solutions for global, international, and regional brands such as Reckitt,  Kenvue, L'Oreal, California Garden, Afia, Mars-Wrigley’s, Ulker, Bahlsen, Nestle, Unilever, Weetabix, Al Rifai, Ooredoo, NAPCO, Al Safi Danone, SC Johnson, Energizer, NFIC, and many others. 

The Enhance retail operations manage the majority of  Al Maha forecourt convenience stores and our Supermarket stores named Noor Shopping and convenience stores named Noor Express shops present across the Sultanate of Oman.
Enhance Group, Oman is present in all categories and services all distribution channels including hotels and ships through the Food Service Division making Enhance the largest FMCG distributor in the Sultanate.
Enhance Group also operates in UAE  in the Manufacturing and Distribution business as Enhance UAE and Gulf seafood.

Name: Yandex Market
Description: Яндекс Маркет — сервис для покупок, который продаёт более 75 миллионов товаров. Он помогает заказать всё нужное: от смартфона новой модели до детского конструктора. На Маркете удобно торговать — к нему подключились уже более 52 тыс. магазинов-партнёров. Сервис берёт на себя обработку, доставку заказов и общение с покупателями. Купить товары на маркетплейсе можно на его сайте и в приложении для Android или iOS, а ещё в приложении Яндекс Go — в разделе «Маркет».

Name: Tim Hortons Pakistan
Description:
Tim Hortons is more than a coffee shop – it’s one of the largest restaurant chains in North America and the largest in Canada. Its diverse menu appeals to a broad range of tastes, solidifying its place as one of Canada’s most iconic brands in the process. The company operates in the highly competitive quick-service restaurant sector, part of the broad multi-billion dollar food-service business. Its powerful scale and reach in Canada creates unmatched opportunities, but also the dynamic challenge of leading the industry. 

Tim Hortons is more than a place to work – it’s a chance to be a part of the driving force behind a company and culture so many people love. Find your role in this growing company and help us serve the neighbourhoods we call home.

Name: Theka Coffee
Description:
Theka Coffee is a new generation coffee chain that sources 100% Arabica coffee beans from a single estate and attempts to offer it to the end consumer in competitive prices. The coffee is also cold-brewed which is a superior brewing method as it is high in caffeine and low on acidity.

Unser Geschäftsmodell ist bisher einzigartig in Deutschland. Wesentliche Elemente der Dienstleistung der flaschenpost sind: 
 
•	Keine Liefergebühr 
•	Lieferung innerhalb von 120 Minuten nach Bestellung 
•	Günstige Preise wie im Supermarkt 
•	Kostenlose Leergutmitnahme und sofortige Verrechnung mit dem 
        Bestellwert 
•	Alle Bestellungen werden kostenfrei bis an die Wohnungs- oder 
        Haustür geliefert - egal in welchem Stockwerk sich diese befindet. 
•	Bezahlung einfach und sicher per PayPal oder Lastschrift 

2016 in Münster gegründet, sorgen mittlerweile über 500 flaschenpostler dafür, dass unsere 80 Auslieferungsfahrzeuge tagtäglich auf den Straßen der Fahrradmetropole unterwegs sind und unsere Kunden schnell und unkompliziert Ihre Bestellungen erhalten.

Du möchtest Teil dieses Teams werden und unsere Expansion in andere Städte mit vorantreiben? Dann schau jetzt vorbei auf www.wirsindflaschenpost.de !

Name: James Gin
Description:
James Gin is a premium craft gin brand - ‘The Gin of the People’. Unusual, award-winning gin flavours, created by James May in a shed in Wiltshire, not just another generic celebrity-endorsed product. 

“Any reasonably conceited TV presenter or Hollywood actor will eventually have a go at making a gin. It’s easier than whisky and more interesting than vodka (which has no flavour, and is pointless). I was conceited enough to try it. But, in my defence, my gin really is mine, not a cynical branding exercise. I came up with the idea of blending the flavour of parsnip (because it reminds me of England and its dampness) with Asian spices (because they add excitement). We put it up for sale and amazingly, it sold out within a few days, rather than the few years I’d anticipated. None of it made it to the pub. 

Since then he has added Navy Strength Asian Parsnip, American Mustard (the ideal accompaniment to burgers and hot-dogs) and London Drizzle (everyone else has a London Dry and London generally isn’t, so this gin is designed to recreate the smell of a wet London pavement on a hot day).

To date, UK sales have been mainly via jamesgin.com and Amazon. We have recently secured a nationwide listing with LWC distributors, the UK’s largest independent drinks wholesaler.

In the US, we have a successful online presence and are now building relationships with retail distributors – initially in California, Oregon and Tennessee.

Globally we currently supply customers in 40 countries via our German distributor. We have additional relationships with wholesalers in Norway Sweden and Canada as well as local manufacturing under license in Australia. In 2025 we aim to start DTC sales in Mexico via our own website, Mercado Libre and Amazon.

Awards to date include: Great Taste Award, World Gin Awards, London Spirits Awards and IWSC Awards.

As James observes, "Our experiment has turned into a gin-fuelled monster. Like most things involving gin, it’s all got a bit out of hand.”

Our journey began with a simple idea: to make healthier choices more accessible, no matter the setting. From round-the-clock snack options in high-stress environments to thoughtfully curated essentials in luxury apartment complexes, we’re here to redefine how convenience can enhance daily life.

We know that no two locations are the same. That’s why every micro market we create is designed to meet the unique needs of our clients. And the best part? We handle it all. From installation to stocking and maintenance, our turnkey service model ensures you can focus on your mission while we take care of everything behind the scenes.

We’re proud to support local vendors to provide fresh, organic, and sustainable products. By collaborating with partners who share our values, we’re not just offering convenience—we’re making an impact on the communities we serve.

For us, it’s about more than snacks and beverages. It’s about improving lives. By promoting healthier lifestyle choices, we help businesses and communities boost productivity, morale, and overall satisfaction.

And because giving back matters to us, a portion of our profits are donated, reinforcing our commitment to making a difference.

Whether you’re looking to upgrade your workplace wellness, enhance resident satisfaction, or streamline access to essentials, we’re here to help. At Power Fix Solutions, we make convenience a priority.

Name: La Panetière
Description:
C’est en 1936, qu’est né notre pain au goût inimitable. Le grand-père, Fernand Moly, artisan boulanger dans le petit village aveyronnais de Drulhe créa ce pain dont la réputation s’exporta rapidement au-delà des frontières de la commune, puis du département. 

Fort de cet héritage, la famille Moly s’investit en 1971, dans la création d’une unité de production plus moderne à Villefranche-de-Rouergue. 
De cette union entre tradition et modernité, est né un succès inégalé à travers une large gamme de produits, fruit du savoir-faire de nos collaborateurs qui perpétuent l’histoire de la famille de boulangers.

Aujourd'hui, avec plus de 200 points de vente, La Panetière & Secrets de Pains vous accueillent dans un univers où la tradition côtoie le plaisir et la qualité. En centre-ville, en périphérie ou en zones commerciales, nos boutiques traditionnelles sont des lieux de convivialité où la restauration boulangère prend tout son sens.

Chez La Panetière, notre engagement est de vous offrir une expérience authentique, empreinte de passion et de qualité, où chaque bouchée raconte une histoire riche en saveurs et en émotions. 
Bienvenue dans notre univers, où le pain est une véritable tradition familiale.

Name: Geedup Co
Description:
From West Sydney Australia to the world, Geedup represents the go-getters, hustlers and underdogs who don't take no for an answer. Since 2010, Geedup has been synonymous with street and hip-hop culture, and by putting community at the forefront, they are fuelled by a relentless determination to redefine what it means to be a successful brand. Geedup uses premium streetwear as the vehicle for this central ethos, with all of our drops gratefully selling out at times within minutes online. Geedup is for those who have faced closed doors and dead ends, only to break their way into the building and take over. More than just clothing, Geedup is a collective for those who have taken the road less traveled, or better yet, those who are carving their own path unapologetically - whether that be in music, the arts, sports, or anything in between. People not only purchase clothes and subscribe to the Geedup mentality, but many have since gotten the brand's logo permanently tattooed on them - a testament to the fiercely loyal community that has developed over the past decade.

We began in a garage in West Sydney back in 2010, printing shirts for the wider community that were inspired by gangster rap, graffiti, and crime families of decades past. A brick and mortar store was soon opened in the heart of West Sydney to great success, but the rapidly changing retail space directed us to change strategy and shut our doors. The brand took a year off to realign our focus and draw up a clear strategy on the whiteboard, before relaunching assertively in 2019. Two major changes defined the new era of Geedup: Everything would be sold online; and all items would be limited to one drop, never be restocked again. It worked. We quickly expanded exponentially, while products became highly sought after and consistently sold out.

Name: BEEUP
Description:
In 2025, BEEUP was founded to bring the natural power of honey to the kids’ snack aisle. The brand is co-founded by David Beckham, former athlete, entrepreneur, and Shaun Neff, the serial entrepreneur, together with Authentic Brands Group (ABG), one of the world’s largest brand development and entertainment platforms.

The idea was inspired by David’s well-documented passion for beekeeping. As a father and former pro athlete, he saw firsthand the power of honey as a nutritious, natural source of energy. That spark became BEEUP, a new kind of snack brand created to fuel kids and families through busy mornings, after-school sports, and everything in between.

BEEUP snacks harness honey’s superfood power with bold flavors, simple ingredients, and no synthetic dyes or artificial flavors. Made with real honey as the number-one ingredient, they are non-GMO, gluten-free, and an excellent source of Vitamins A, C, and E. The reimagined fruit snack line is now available nationwide at Target, Target.com, and beeupsnacks.com.

BEEUP is proud to be the Official Fruit Snack Partner of AYSO and Inter Miami CF Academy, and to partner with the Bee Health Collective, furthering our commitment to the development of youth sports and to protecting the bees behind our favorite ingredient.

Name: Patang
Description:
In every corner of India, there’s a breeze that rises come January. A kite climbs. A thread tightens. Someone shouts “Kai po che!” And just like that — a quiet ritual becomes a celebration.

Patang is born from that very spirit.
Of flight, of freedom, and of flavours passed down, not mass-produced.
We’re not just here to sell snacks. We’re here to tell stories.
Stories of faraway kitchens, of whispered recipes, of dusty towns and bustling melas. Stories of taste that stayed with us — long after the moment had passed.

What is Patang?
Patang is a journey through India’s most iconic snacks — made in the places they come from, with ingredients you’d find in your own kitchen. No artificial colour, no preservatives, and no bad oils — just honest food that remembers where it came from.
We source directly from local makers, staying true to the roots of every recipe. Each pack is like a flavour postcard — carrying the scent of a place, the soul of a region, the pride of its people.
We travel to Sattur for that perfect golden Seeval.
To Thoothukudi for pepper-kissed cashews.
To Kolhapur for Bhadang that bites back.
And to Pune for Bhakarwadi that tastes like memory.
These aren’t just SKUs. They’re rituals wrapped in paper.

How We Fly
We’re a young company with an old-school heart.
No mass factories. No shortcuts. No algorithms telling us what nostalgia should taste like.
Just clean ingredients, regional wisdom, and makers who still believe that food should be slow, sacred, and stubborn.
We do things the long way — not because it’s trendy, but because it’s right.

Why Now? Why Patang?
Because something’s missing in the world of snacking.
A sense of place. A sense of pride. A sense of home.
Today’s India wants more than just crunch and salt.
It wants culture. It wants clarity. It wants to feel something.
Patang is for those who crave more than food.
For those who want to open a packet and find a memory.
A tiffin box. A monsoon train. A rooftop full of cousins.

Name: BEUNOSH ORGANICS
Description:
BEUNOSH is a contemporary ‘Wellness Food Brand’ inspired by traditional food wisdom and the incredible healing power of ancient Indian superfoods & super grains. Each product at BEUNOSH is a reflection of our enthusiasm and love for our homegrown MILLETS & SUPERFOODS.
During our extensive 3 years research on modern eating habits and effect of processed foods on body; we learnt that mindful eating is all the more relevant in today’s time given that lifestyle diseases are cropping up due to highly processed foods which have zero nutrition and are loaded with chemicals & additives. Our busy lifestyle, lack of time has gotten instant; highly processed foods prominent space on retail shelves & in our kitchens. The way our ancestors ate & cooked is replaced with modern convenient food practices.
Our challenge was to incorporate ancient healing grains and superfoods into daily diet and yet keep it incredibly easy & modern. The aim was to make sure that every product of Beunosh has a benefit to the body and mind. Beunosh was thus incorporated with product line designed around main aggregators responsible for clustering of lifestyle risk factors. We offer an array of products from single to multi-ingredient superfood blends to convenient breakfast mixes and wholefood flours all nutritionally dense in profile.

Handcrafted at our state of art manufacturing kitchen in Pune, we follow German Cyclone Cold Milling Technology for milling. We use only best quality hand-sorted super grains, solar dry our superfoods, and use hand-pounding techniques to craft our products and retain its nutrition to the fullest.

Sourcing local wherever possible, we work in partnership with local farmers to grow and mill quality foods into award-winning products. All our products are 100% VEGAN, Synthetic Sugar-Free, NON-GMO, Unbleached, Zero fillers and free from nasty ingredients.

We’re committed to keeping it simple, the way nature intended.

Description:

The farm features fruit orchards, ancient grains like Khapli wheat and millet, and seasonal vegetables. It is also home to livestock, including cows, chickens, ducks, geese, and bees. Over 80,000 trees on the farm support a diverse ecosystem of wildlife, such as peacocks and the occasional Neelgai.

ProfumeriaWeb è la profumeria solo online N.1 nel mercato Beauty italiano. Fondata nel 2010, grazie alla collaborazione di professionisti di lunga esperienza nelle aree dell’e-commerce e del web marketing, in meno di 10 anni è diventata il sito e-commerce di riferimento per qualità, soddisfazione Cliente, servizio e convenienza.

ProfumeriaWeb è ampiamente riconosciuta fra i Leader di settore, tanto che nel 2018 si è aggiudicata il prestigioso premio Panorama come Miglior sito per Servizio al Cliente, nel 2019 ha ottenuto il premio TopShop di Repubblica Affari&Finanza e nel 2020 il premio "Le Stelle dell'eCommerce" del Corriere della Sera. 
Dal 2018 ProfumeriaWeb ha lanciato sul mercato il proprio marchio di skincare: Cobea, disponibile in esclusiva sul sito e creato in collaborazione con i propri Clienti coinvolti direttamente nella fase di test e selezione dei prodotti che meglio rispondono alle loro esigenze.
Il successo di ProfumeriaWeb è tale anche grazie ad un Team profondamente appassionato al settore beauty, che non fa della bellezza solo un mestiere, ma una vera e propria missione: regalare un’esperienza unica alle persone che amano sentirsi belle con semplicità, attraverso un sito web intuitivo, smart, ricco e che fa dell’innovazione il suo punto di forza.

Name: Zuivelhoeve Winkels
Description:
De oorsprong van de Zuivelhoeve winkels voert terug naar 1981. Op het erf van opa en oma, begon Diane samen met Gerjhan met de verkoop van boerderijproducten van melk van eigen koeien.

De filosofie van toen is de basis van nu, de lekkerste producten direct van de bron. Nu ruim 40 jaar later zijn wij vanuit deze boerderijwinkel uitgegroeid naar een franchise organisatie met meer dan 90 winkels verspreid door Nederland. In onze winkels bieden wij naast onze Noord-Hollandse kazen en de meest smaakvolle boerenkazen ook een ruim assortiment aan buitenlandse kazen. Net zoals kaas vers van het mes, worden onze noten in de winkel dagvers gebrand. Ook verkopen wij andere delicatessen zoals olijven, tapenades, verschillende worst soorten en natuurlijk onze eigen Zuivelhoeve zuivel.

Wij geloven er in dat eten alleen lekker en gezond is als het met liefde en kunde is gemaakt, met een directe verbinding tot de bron.

Eerlijk smaakt het lekkerst!

Name: RAIN Pure Mountain Spring Water
Description:
Better For You, Better For The Planet

RAIN Pure Mountain Spring Water is bottled at the source in resealable aluminum bottles. These bottles are infinitely recyclable and recycled most often. Our natural spring water has been filtered through ancient underground rock formations collecting natural electrolytes and minerals for a light, crisp, easy-to-drink flavor.

RAIN is proud to bottle at the source in Tiger, GA, deep in the Appalachian Mountains. Sourced in a true temperate rainforest with over 65" of rainfall a year, not only is our packaging sustainable - So is the water!

Founded in 2018, RAIN Bottling Company is on a mission to end our dependance on single use plastics. While convenient bottled water is one of the largest contributors to our plastic waste problem, we aim to change that. 

www.responsiblyrain.com
www.rainbottlingcompany.com

Name: LAFRETO
Description:
We own the brands Glisshop.com, monsieurgolf.com, lunettes-de-soleil.fr et glisse-proshop.com. Based out of France, our headquarters is in Auvergne, and we are fortunate to have other locations in Annecy, Villard-de-Lans and Montpellier. Our business is international as well, 35% of our turnover being made abroad.  
Our adventure started with Glisshop in 1996, when Laurence and Frédéric Morel opened a ski and snowboard store in Clermont-Ferrand. They launched Glisshop.com in 1999, becoming a pioneer in winter sports e-commerce. Today, our success story keeps unfolding and growing strongly.  
Monsieurgolf joined our adventure in 2014, allowing to deseasonalise our activity. The brand focuses on the French market and enjoys a strong growth as well. 
In June 2021, Glisse Proshop and its entire team of water sport experts joined our ecosystem. This acquisition is the result of the acceleration of our diversification strategy.

Name: AndyMark Inc.
Description:
AndyMark develops, manufactures, and distributes mechanical and electrical parts for the mobile and competitive robotics market, focusing on robotics education. The AndyMark staff strives to support the FIRST Community and the robotics education market by developing and distributing essential components to robot builders and mobile robotics. 

In 2004, Andy Baker and Mark Koors formed AndyMark, Inc. working from their homes to grow the business, while continuing to work their day jobs as engineers at Delphi Automotive. In 2007, AndyMark became a tenant within the Inventrek technology park in Kokomo. In 2011, AndyMark moved to a 24,000 sq ft facility that was home until 2018. In May 2018 AndyMark moved operations to 1900 E. North St. in Kokomo, more than doubling their warehouse space. 

AndyMark was named "Business of the Year" in 2011 by the Kokomo Chamber of Commerce. In 2018, Senator Todd Young recognized AndyMark as Small Business of the Day during National Small Business Week. Currently, AndyMark is one of the leading distributors and makers of robotics parts within the robotics mobility and competition market. 

AndyMark's staff has over 200 years of FIRST team experience and provides staffing services to many robot competition events throughout the year. Our Kokomo, Indiana home offers a central location for quick distribution across North America, as well as international shipping to over 70+ countries.

Name: Kids' Food and Drink Collective
Description:
The Kids' Food & Drink Collective - Challenging and Changing our Children's Food Culture

Founded in September 2024, the KFDC is the first UK membership association for healthier children’s food and drink brands. We hope to bring together businesses, brands and parents in a common goal to drive up the standard of children’s food and drink and encourage a change in the general culture that often pervades this category. We have developed a unique accreditation system, which will help both industry and consumers to quickly and easily discern which products represent a healthier choice for children.

Currently our joining criteria are designed to consider aspects such as HFSS compliance, levels of processing and artificial ingredients and sugar content (including free sugars from fruit juice, concentrates and purees) in accordance with current NHS and government guidelines. 

Our long-term goal is to establish a set of criteria that consumers will expect products to meet, giving brands an incentive to innovate and improve and in turn driving up overall standards across the children’s food sector. 

Find out more about the work we're doing and how to join the KFDC by visiting our website.

Name: Bennati Srl Società Benefit
Description:
Da 3 generazioni siamo leader in Italia nella fornitura di cesti, natalizi e pasquali, specialisti nell’aiutare le aziende a trovare il regalo perfetto per i propri collaboratori.   

Noi di Bennati selezioniamo con cura i migliori prodotti per realizzare doni che fanno davvero la differenza e che regalano momenti di gioia e condivisione durante le festività.  
La nostra mission è offrire qualità, abbondanza e il miglior rapporto qualità-prezzo ai nostri clienti che ogni anno ci scelgono e diventano parte della nostra grande famiglia.  

Siamo una famiglia che si preoccupa della nostra comunità e del benessere delle persone che la compongono e desideriamo accogliere iniziative sociali per garantire un impatto positivo sulla comunità in cui viviamo e lavoriamo. 

Siamo coraggiosi promotori di un cambiamento reale e tangibile: qui in Bennati favoriamo l’integrazione delle persone diversamente abili anche e soprattutto sul lavoro. Questo per noi significa restituire loro un’indipendenza economica, ma soprattutto dare loro la possibilità di esercitare ciò che, a tutti gli effetti, è un loro diritto come esseri umani.  

Nel 2018 nasce inoltre la collaborazione con Banco Alimentare e oggi siamo entusiasti di aver contribuito alla donazione di oltre 1.900.000 pasti a coloro che ne hanno più bisogno, dimostrando il nostro impegno costante nel sostenere e aiutare la comunità, un impegno che si rinnova e cresce proprio grazie ai nostri fedeli clienti che ci permettono di raggiungere ogni anno un obiettivo concreto.  

Scegliendo Bennati hai la possibilità di fare un magnifico regalo ai tuoi collaboratori, ma anche un dono alla società in cui viviamo.

Description:
Seasonal Nitrogen-made Ice Cream Experience 

At Four Winters, we're revolutionizing the ice cream world with our innovative, freshly made, and ultra-smooth nitro ice cream. Description:

At our very core, we believe in challenging the status quo by giving a second chance to products that would otherwise be thrown out or, worse, be buried or incinerated. We believe in a world where there is no such thing as waste, only pre-repurposed products. To rephrase the famous idiom, one business’ trash is another person’s treasure.

The world of consumer goods and retail, with their rules and regulations around expiry dates, shape and size requirements, promotions, etc. only encourage wasteful consumption. It’s this attitude that leads to unnecessary waste.

The only thing better than a win-win, is a win-win-win, right? Time to reset our throwaway society, empower businesses to do better and give consumers their purchasing power back.

Seit 2022 haben wir bereits über 100 Startups auf ihrem Weg begleitet – von den ersten Entwicklungsschritten bis hin zur Listung im Einzelhandel, Auftritten bei der Höhle der Löwe, uvm.

Mit unserem REWE-Projekt ermöglichen wir Startups seit 2024 erstmals echte Erfahrungen im Lebensmitteleinzelhandel zu sammeln – risikofrei & inklusive wertvollem Feedback am Point of Sale.

Auch für Unternehmen und Agenturen sind unsere Startup-Produkte spannend – zum Beispiel als besondere Mitarbeiter- oder Kundengeschenke, als Eventausstattung oder in kreativen Co-Brandings.

Name: BEZI
Description:
We found ourselves entering social gatherings, snacks scattered recklessly around the table. Strawberries and carrots askew, we’d timidly ask, “Excuse me, where’s the labneh?” 

Horrified—or worse—confused looks would turn our way. “Well, I don’t know about labneh, but we have some hummus,” these so-called friends would answer. We were appalled. Time and time again, we entered parties, grocery stores, picnics, bowling clubs, period-drama nights, even our own fridges in search of this dippable goodness. Only to be met with a labneh-hole in our heart (and stomach). 

So, we took it upon ourselves to create Bezi: the labneh that labnehs better than any other labneh out there. High in protein, low in tang, and ready to party.

Name: Ginsiders
Description:
C’est en 2016, lors d’une soirée cocktails, que deux amis de longue date, Maxime Eberhardt et Pierre Yves Kielwasser, décident de créer ensemble une page Instagram : Ginsiders. 
 
Bien plus qu’une simple collaboration amicale, ce compte éponyme aux milliers d’abonnés résulte d’une passion commune pour l’univers des spiritueux, -en particulier le gin-, et d’un certain goût pour l’esthétisme, où se mêlent photographie et créativité.
 
Leur but ? Créer et alimenter des contenus originaux autour du gin, et mettre en avant leurs créations cocktails au travers de nombreux posts Instagram.  

C’est notamment par ce biais que Ginsiders s’est forgé une solide réputation et a vu naître un réel engouement sur les réseaux sociaux ; après quelques années d’existence seulement, la page affichait presque 100 000 abonnés ! Par la suite, de nombreuses marques de gins ont sollicité des collaborations, en vue de promouvoir leur marque et leurs produits, profitant ainsi d'une large visibilité. En effet, Ginsiders se révèle être une véritable vitrine en ligne incontournable ; bénéficiant d’un rayonnement international, certaines vidéos culminent à plusieurs millions de vues ! 
 
Leader mondialement reconnu pour sa communication ambitieuse et originale, Ginsiders compte aujourd’hui parmi les plus gros influenceurs dans l’univers du gin, avec plus de 300 000 abonnés sur les réseaux sociaux (Instagram, Facebook, etc.) 
 
Au fil du temps, Ginsiders a donc beaucoup évolué et s’est professionnalisé en créant, en parallèle, la première plateforme en ligne dédiée à cet univers inspirant: 
- Un site web 100% gin, qui recense un large éventail de plus de 200 références de Gin & Tonic
- Une mappemonde interactive qui référence plus de 1 200 distilleries
- L’histoire du Gin, du Tonic
- De nombreuses recettes cocktails

Depuis fin 2021, Ginsiders ajoute à ses activités un concept de salon encore inédit en France : Ginsiders Festival, le grand salon du gin.

Name: Arden Fine Wines
Description:
Arden Fine Wines was founded by Stuart George in 2019 to offer fine and rare wines and spirits to private and corporate clients. 

Stuart began his wine career 27 years ago working alongside the distinguished Master of Wine and Burgundy expert Anthony Hanson. Five years in client-facing fine wine retail sales were followed by winemaking experience in Friuli, Italy, and Provence, France, and extensive travel across the world’s wine regions. 

A holder of the prestigious Wine & Spirit Education Trust Diploma in Wine and Spirits since 2000, Stuart has tasted vintages back to 1780. He was UK Young Wine Writer of the Year in 2003 before working with Hugh Johnson OBE at "The World of Fine Wine" magazine, which won several awards during his time there. Stuart was Image Editor and lead contributor to the best-selling "1001 Wines You Must Try Before You Die" and Editor of the award-winning "The Finest Wines of Tuscany" and "The Finest Wines of Champagne".

He is a sought-after wine show judge: Stuart has been the sole UK representative at the Shanghai International Wine Challenge; the Concours Mondial de Bruxelles in Chile; the Austrian Wine Challenge; and the 21st Concorso Enologico Internazionale in Italy.

“ARDEN”

Our company’s name comes from the Forest of Arden, which once covered a large area of the English Midlands from Stratford-upon-Avon in Warwickshire to Tamworth in Staffordshire. 

Arden Wines’ founder Stuart George was born and grew up on the Worcestershire-Warwickshire border in “Shakespeare Country”. The Forest of Arden is the setting of Shakespeare’s play As You Like It. 

“Arden” also evokes the former Champagne-Ardenne region in France, known for the eponymous sparkling wine. 

The Wayside Cross at Coughton, Warwickshire, was said to be the place where travellers would pray for safe passage through the Forest of Arden. 

In the same spirit, we wish all our customers an enjoyable and rewarding experience with our fine wines.

Name: Doce Magia
Description:
A Doce Magia nasceu primeiro no coração da Tô. É assim que ela é conhecida pelos mais chegados. Ela amava preparar receitas especiais para a família. O sorriso de todos era a inspiração para aprimorar o talento que surgia em cada nova criação. 

O nosso propósito é produzir sabores que ficam guardados na memória de nossos clientes, colaboradores e fornecedores, despertando os melhores sentimentos através de uma comida que te abraça. Afinal, a vida é feita de doces momentos. Por isso, mantemos a essência de quando começamos 30 anos atrás. 

Atualmente, com três lojas e um time de quase 100 colaboradores, nós vamos espalhar a magia de todo o afeto presente em cada receita com uma visão de longo prazo. Queremos ganhar o coração das pessoas com a qualidade incomparável que oferecemos e, dessa forma, alçar voos cada vez maiores, sendo autoridade quando o assunto é confeitaria artesanal. 

A Doce Magia almeja ser referência para os momentos especiais, sejam eles uma grande festa, ou um momento mais íntimo com a família ou amigos. Estaremos presentes nas mais doces lembranças, fazendo parte de memórias afetivas com o gostinho de quero mais.

Name: Avanta Book Centre
Description:
Avanta Book Centre (Avanta) is Kenya's leading bookshop specializing in selling of international curriculum books (IGCSE), higher education books, and stationery. Name: Van den Berg Gewürze & Spirituosen
Description:
Die Vision: Als erste Wahl für anspruchsvolle Gaumen will Van den Berg Genuss-Enthusiasten weltweit inspirieren und so elementarer Teil intensiver kulinarischer Momente sein.

Van den Berg ist eine Gewürzmanufaktur in Graz, die sich auf hochwertige Premium-Gewürze spezialisiert hat, die an Intensität nicht zu überbieten sind. Mit viel Leidenschaft werden die exzellentesten Gewürze aus der ganzen Welt ausgewählt und gelangen zur Veredelung in das Gewürzhaus Graz. Hier werden daraus Delikatessen kreiert, die gänzlich von Hand gemischt und abgefüllt werden.

Die Mission: Grob oder fein, pur oder gemischt, fest oder gelöst: Mit unseren herausragenden Produkten bringt Van den Berg einfach mehr Geschmack in jedes Gericht und trägt so zur Kreation kulinarischer Meisterwerke bei.

Das Sortiment hierfür ist extrem breit gefächert und umfasst neben besonderen puren Gewürzen wie dem fermentierten Kampot-Pfeffer, Sizilianisches Zitronensalz oder der in Österreich kultivierten Bio Aji Charapita (die teuerste Chili der Welt) auch die Kombination dieser: nämlich in Form der nach eigenen Rezepturen hergestellten Gewürzmischungen. 

Abgerundet wird das Sortiment durch eine besondere Auswahl an Premium-Spirituosen: denn Alkohol hilft erlesenen Gewürzen ganz speziell bei der Entfaltung Ihres außergewöhnlich intensiven Geschmacks. 

Mittlerweile werden nicht nur Privat-Gourmets beliefert sondern auch viele hoch-dekorierte Küchen, wie etwa die von
Sterne-Koch Wolfgang Zankl-Sertl (Pramerl & the Wolf, 1090 Wien), der sagt: 
"Was uns und Van den Berg verbindet ist das hartnäckige Streben nach der besten Produktqualität. Diesen positiven Wahnsinn schmeckt man".

Für anspruchsvolle Unternehmen werden außerdem nachhaltig in Erinnerung bleibende Lösungen in den Bereichen Mitarbeiter-Zufriedenheit, Fringe Benefits, Kunden-Bindung, Corporate Gifting und Event-Management angeboten.

Son idée : une pâtisserie contemporaine, innovante, rock’n’roll, qui casse les codes de la pâtisserie traditionnelle. Ses best-sellers : l’éclair vanille-pécan et l’éclair caramel beurre salé. La recette du Succès Adam ? De la fantaisie, du naturel, de la finesse, de la fraîcheur, de l’esthétique, et surtout de la créativité ! 

La société n’a cessé de se développer depuis l’ouverture de la première boutique dans le quartier mythique du Marais. Name: Goody Goody Liquor
Description:
Whether you are searching for the finest wine, newest micro-brew, or limited-edition spirit, Goody Goody has established itself as an institution.

The highest volume liquor store chain in North Texas began in Dallas when Joe Jansen purchased Goo Goo Liquors in 1964. At the time, the store, located on Lower Greenville Avenue, was a meager 15-by-50 feet wide. To save $600 on new signage, Jansen was able to change the name of the store by simply adding “dy” to the original name.

Over the past five decades, Goody Goody has established an excellent reputation based on grand selection, low pricing, and old-fashioned customer service. In fact, by the time Goody Goody opened its second location in 1974, it was noted as the largest liquor store in the state.

“We don’t serve the public to make a profit, we make a profit because we serve the public,” says Jansen. “That philosophy still holds true today as we place an emphasis on helping our customers select the right product.”

The focus on customer service has remained critical to the chain’s success. With 24 stores across Dallas-Fort Worth, Longview, and Houston, every associate is trained on core pillars that continue to set Goody Goody apart in a competitive environment.

When it comes to selection, Goody Goody has it all. With more than 8,200 wines from around the world; 1,600 domestic, foreign, and craft beers; and 5,900 spirits; you’re almost certain to find whatever you’re searching for. On the rare occasion the item is not stocked by the store, special orders can be made at no additional charge if it is something that is distributed in Texas.

Whether you’re looking for fine wine, craft beer, or premium liquor, remember that Goody Goody is around the corner with folks who are ready to help you find the right drink for any occasion.

Depuis toujours, nous défendons le fait maison, le bien manger et la créativité.

Name: Casa Rica
Description:
Mercado gourmet

Una cultura de trabajo familiar
La historia de Casa Rica comienza con el arribo desde Alemania de Don Walter Lange (comerciante) y Benedikto Hiebl (panadero) en Asunción, Paraguay, en los años veinte. Don Benedikto empezó como albañil y luego de varias labores por la zona de Villarrica empezó su modesta producción de panes y venta a domicilio. Don Walter se dedicó al comercio internacional. Con ellos se iniciaba una cultura de trabajo.
 
Sus hijos se conocieron y se casaron en la ciudad de Asunción. Con el transcurrir de los años, la hija de Don Walter y nuera de Don Benedikto, la Sra. Hertha Lange de Hiebl, abrió en 1.989 su propio local de cocina alemana, ubicado en el entonces tranquilo barrio de Villa Morra. Desde ahí, deleitaba al público con recetas tradicionales como el apfelstrudel, milanesas, stollen y bretzels.
 
A modo de poder elaborar las recetas auténticamente alemanas, y lograr la calidad acostumbrada, comenzaron a importar desde el país europeo ingredientes especiales que necesitaban como materia prima.
 Con el tiempo, Hertha decidió hacer crecer su negocio, y respondiendo al entusiasmo del público con esta oferta diferenciada, fue ampliando su variedad de productos, importándolos primero de Europa, y luego del resto del mundo. A éstos, sumó también algunos de producción propia y otros de suministro local.
 
Con los años, Casa Rica fue creciendo hasta contar con una de las bodegas más completas del Paraguay, un bazar exclusivo, las mejores selecciones productos y delikatessen.  En los años 90, el local original de Casa Rica sobre la Avenida Aviadores del Chaco tuvo dos ampliaciones para poder cumplir con la creciente demanda de sus clientes, expandiendo su cocina, salón, línea de caja y estacionamiento. Todo ésto, exhibido en un ambiente diferenciado, sumado a su atención personalizada, permitió a Casa Rica se posicionase en el mercado.

Name: BRUNO MARINI
Description:
Bruno começou a trabalhar muito cedo com seu pai. Aos 12 anos era entregador no Mercado Municipal de Barra Mansa. Já aos 16 anos, o pai de Bruno resolveu mudar de ramo e abriu sua primeira loja de móveis, a Momar Móveis. Nesta loja, ele começou como vendedor, passou para o cargo de gerente e se tornou um dos maiores compradores das lojas, que de uma passou para oito lojas no total.
No ano de 1996, Bruno quis ser dono do seu próprio negócio e montou sua primeira loja, a Brumar Móveis. O primeiro empreendimento foi na Avenida Amaral Peixoto na cidade de Volta Redonda, em seguida no Centro de Barra Mansa. Ele chegou a abrir um total de oito lojas de móveis, também nas cidades de Resende, Angra dos Reis, Três Rios, Cruzeiro, São José dos Campos e Pindamonhangaba, onde gerou emprego para mais de 150 pessoas.
Em 2002, ainda com todas as lojas, Bruno quis seguir para o ramo de água mineral e inaugurou no ano de 2002 o Grupo Attiva. Já em 2004 ele entendeu a necessidade de dar mais atenção ao grupo e que esse era um caminho promissor, devido a isso vendeu todas as lojas para investir e se dedicar com exclusividade a Attiva.
O grupo Atiiva fica na estrada Barra Mansa/Bananal e a empresa possui cerca de 200 funcionários. A empresa é responsável por engarrafar água mineral com e sem gás, sucos e energéticos.
Sempre envolvido e interessado nas questões do município, Bruno faz parte da diretoria da CDL – Câmara de Dirigentes Lojistas de Barra Mansa - desde o ano de 1994. Bruno também faz parte da diretoria do Sindicato do Comércio Varejista de Barra Mansa, Quatis e Rio Claro desde o ano 2000, Bruno tem orgulho de fazer parte de instituições que representam o comércio, que é o ramo que mais gera emprego no país.

Name: Alphafood
Description:
Alphafood è un'azienda innovativa che si è posta l'obiettivo di ampliare l'industria alimentare attraverso l'allevamento e la trasformazione dei Grilli Acheta Domesticus. Siamo pionieri in questo settore emergente, guidati dalla passione per la sostenibilità e la salute globale. Con sede nella splendida Sicilia, siamo un team dinamico di esperti dedicati a fornire alternative proteiche ecologiche e nutrienti. 
La Nostra Missione:
Il mondo affronta una crescente crisi alimentare con la crescente popolazione mondiale e l'inevitabile esaurimento delle risorse alimentari tradizionali. In Alphafood, crediamo che la soluzione giaccia nella natura stessa, e i grilli Acheta Domesticus rappresentano una risorsa ecologica straordinaria. La nostra missione è contribuire a ridurre l'impatto ambientale dell'industria alimentare fornendo una fonte di proteine sostenibili e nutrienti.Cosa Facciamo:
Alleviamo e coltiviamo Grilli Acheta Domesticus in un ambiente controllato e sicuro, seguendo rigorosi standard di qualità e benessere animale. La nostra avanzata tecnologia ci consente di ottenere grilli di alta qualità, ricchi di proteine e con un impatto minimo sull'ambiente. Successivamente, trasformiamo questi insetti in prodotti alimentari innovativi, come farine proteiche, snack, e integratori, destinati a migliorare la dieta umana
Alphafood è impegnata nella lotta alla sostenibilità ambientale, riducendo l'impatto delle attività agricole tradizionali e promuovendo la biodiversità.
Siamo all'avanguardia nella ricerca e nello sviluppo di nuovi prodotti a base di grilli, offrendo soluzioni creative e deliziose per soddisfare le esigenze alimentari del futuro.
Garantiamo la massima qualità in ogni fase della produzione, dall'allevamento alla trasformazione, per offrire prodotti sicuri e nutrienti ai nostri clienti.

Name: Garrafeira Nacional
Description:
A Garrafeira Nacional foi fundada em 1927 e, desde então, tornou-se um dos especialistas de maior renome em vinhos e bebidas espirituosas.

Com quase 100 anos de experiência comercial em Portugal, é um importante abastecedor de vinhos, recorrendo a uma ampla seleção de grossistas, retalhistas e colecionadores.

Nas décadas que se seguiram à sua fundação, o empreendimento recolheu uma espantosa quantidade de bebidas espirituosas e vinhos premium vintage que encheriam o olho de qualquer garrafeira. A seleção da Garrafeira Nacional representa uma das mais extensas e valiosas coletâneas de raros Vinhos do Porto Vintage, Vinhos da Madeira, Whiskies, Cognacs, Aguardentes, Champanhe e bebidas diversas, todos criteriosamente selecionados de acordo com a autenticidade e relevância da sua origem.

Gerida por Jaime Vaz, a Garrafeira Nacional tem uma estrutura empresarial com mais de 60 funcionários, através da qual tem investido continuadamente na aquisição de vinhos e espirituosos de forma a sulcar mercados nacionais e internacionais. Todos os produtos são cuidadosamente armazenados, ao abrigo de um rigoroso controlo de humidade e temperatura. Assim, voltados para um futuro solidamente alicerçado no mais nobre passado enológico, temos como apaixonada missão estimar, partilhar e difundir o prazer inigualável da apreciação de vinhos e espirituosos.

roastmarket – Wir lieben Kaffee.
Bei roastmarket dreht sich alles um mehr als nur Kaffee – es geht um dein ganz persönliches Genusserlebnis. Unser Purpose: Coffee is Passion
Bei roastmarket ist Kaffee nicht nur unser Beruf, sondern unsere Leidenschaft. Über 110 Mitarbeiter*innen setzen sich jeden Tag mit Hingabe dafür ein, deinen Kaffeegenuss auf das nächste Level zu heben. Wir sind dein Begleiter auf deiner persönlichen Kaffee-Journey – von der Bohne bis zur Tasse, von der Entdeckung neuer Aromen bis hin zu deinem täglichen Ritual.

Unsere Kultur
Unsere Kultur ist geprägt von Teamgeist, Offenheit, Kollaboration und dem Mut, Neues auszuprobieren. Wir schätzen eine vertrauensvolle und authentische Zusammenarbeit. Von der Idee bis zur Umsetzung - bei uns kann sich jeder einbringen, denn jede Stimme ist wertvoll und zählt. Unser Ziel ist es, gemeinsam stetig zu wachsen und dabei echte, greifbare Ergebnisse zu erzielen. Vielfalt und Eigeninitiative werden bei uns großgeschrieben – wir schaffen Raum für kreative Ideen und innovative Ansätze, um gemeinsam unsere Vision zu verwirklichen.

Warum roastmarket?
 Alles, was das Kaffeeherz begehrt: Unser umfangreiches Sortiment lässt keine Wünsche offen.
 Versandkostenfrei ab 39 €: Genieße deinen Lieblingskaffee ganz ohne zusätzliche Versandkosten.
 Kaffee ist unsere Leidenschaft: Mit über 3 Millionen Bestellungen haben wir ebenso viele individuelle Genussmomente geschaffen – & die Reise geht weiter.
 Mehr als 1 Million zufriedene Kunden: Die Zufriedenheit unserer Kunden steht im Mittelpunkt unseres Handelns.
 Vielfalt und Qualität: Entdecke preisgekrönte Kaffees aus Italien und Deutschland – Spitzenprodukte zu fairen Preisen.
 Unsere Kund*innen täuschen sich nicht: Top-Bewertungen auf Trustpilot

Over the years, PACE has strategically grown its portfolio, adding Homepost in 2020 to meet the rising demand for stylish home decor, followed by the introduction of Ostilos in 2023, marking a bold entry into the premium fashion market.

Recognising new opportunities, PACE rapidly diversified in 2024 by launching Zwankee, a global fashion platform; Zwankee Global, catering to B2B clothing needs; Pace Print Innovations, offering advanced printing and packaging solutions; and Wishrows, a print-on-demand brand. Each of these brands was introduced with careful planning, aimed at specific market segments with high growth potential.

Today, PACE has firmly established itself across multiple domains, demonstrating a deep understanding of market dynamics and consumer needs. With a resolute commitment to innovation and quality, PACE continues to drive growth and is well-positioned to expand further, strengthening its presence and influence in both existing and emerging domains.

 Une vitrine qui relie l’Afrique, la diaspora et le reste du monde autour de la littérature.
 Une ressource pour les élèves, enseignants et lecteurs passionnés, avec un focus sur le “livre au programme” des deux systèmes éducatifs camerounais (anglophone et francophone).
 Une alternative responsable et spécialisée face aux géants de la distribution, centrée sur l’identité, la mémoire et la résilience.

Notre ambition :
 Offrir une plateforme de référence pour la découverte et la diffusion des littératures africaines et afrodescendantes.
 Rendre visibles les voix oubliées et engagées, au service du dialogue interculturel et du développement durable humain.

For every unhealthy person who aspires to stage a health comeback and take control of their life, adopting BTS, a superfood which also sweetens, is the first and the easiest step they can take without compromising on taste and
truth.


Sugar promised joy. It gave us diabetes, guilt, and a lifetime of crashes.
Artificial sweeteners came along and said, “We’re better.”
But they were just lab coats with different side effects.
We got tired of being lied to.
Tired of pretending sweet had to mean toxic.
Tired of nutrition labels that hid more than they revealed.
So we created a new kind of sweet.
Made from monk fruit. Zero calories. Zero spikes. Zero games.
The kind of sweet that lets you win - without the crash, the guilt, or the compromise.
This isn’t just a product.
It’s a revolt.
And you’re invited.

Name: Chithriya
Description:
Chithriya Origins is a purpose-driven food brand from Thanjavur, Tamil Nadu, reimagining how the world experiences authentic Indian ingredients.
We bring food back to its roots — sourcing directly from farmers, reviving traditional cultivation methods, and celebrating the stories that make each ingredient unique.

Our promise is simple: real taste, real people, real impact.
Every jar of spice, every scoop of tea, and every blend we create carries the essence of its true origin — from GI-tagged turmeric in Erode to filter coffee nurtured in the fields of Thanjavur.

At Chithriya, we partner directly with farmers and women’s collectives, paying them 3× fairer prices to ensure dignity, sustainability, and transparency across every step.
We believe food made with integrity nourishes more than the body — it nurtures the earth, empowers people, and preserves culture.

Through Chithriya Makers — our growing community of farmers, cooks, and creators — we’re building a world where food is not just consumed but celebrated.

 What We Stand For:

Fair farmer pay & ethical sourcing

Women-led employment in Thanjavur

Authentic, origin-based ingredients

Sustainable, refillable packaging

Transparent supply chains powered by people

Join us in our journey to bring back the real taste of India — one honest harvest at a time.

Serving global markets with traceable, sustainable Indian food

Name: Acker
Description:
Now in its third century of business, established in 1820, Acker is the oldest and most respected wine shop in America, the largest global wine auction house, and the preeminent destination for fine wine and spirits worldwide. A true one-stop-shop for expert wine services in every form, Acker’s culture is deeply rooted in customer service, upholding a commitment to the highest standards, applied across a vast array of amenities including a world-class wine club, fine wine retail inventory, a wine concierge service, advisement on wine as an investment, cellar consultations and appraisals, first-class wine education programs, bespoke events and tastings, corporate business services, and its crown jewel, global fine and rare wine and spirits auctions.

In 2008, only ten years after its first auction in New York City, Acker became the first auction house to recognize the growing thirst for wine in Asia and held its first Asia sale on May 31st, 2008 in Hong Kong. In 2011, Acker cemented its position at the top of the wine auction market by being the first wine auction firm to exceed US$100 million in revenue between all of its affiliates, setting hundreds of world records for wine throughout the year in the process. It crossed the $1 billion mark in auction revenue in 2018. With affiliated companies in Hong Kong, New York City, Tokyo, London, and further expansion on the horizon, Acker hosts “live” auctions every month, and has a constantly running internet auction, providing its clients constant access to the world’s best wines and spirits.

Today, it is the world’s largest wine auction house, atop the wine auction market in revenue earnings for the majority of the past decade. Its name is synonymous with personalized, polished, and expert services in all areas of wine and spirits.
