Description:
Khushali Kisan Sewa is a leading Agri-Tech start-up, dedicated to provide agricultural solutions to farmers in India with timely and appropriate agricultural inputs. Our mission is to transform the farming landscape by addressing the challenges faced by farmers and promoting improved cultivation practices for optimal crop growth. 

We have developed an accessible platform that offers consultations, online and offline agrochemical stores, equipment rentals, and warehouses. Our goal is to eliminate confusion, raise awareness about correct agro-product usage, and enhance crop protection.

Currently, our services have made a substantial impact, benefiting over 100,000 farmers across India. We have achieved this through our expansive network of 25+ agricultural stores and our Agri-enabled e-commerce platform. Our reach extends to more than 70,000 acres of agricultural land, bringing about meaningful changes in the lives of numerous farmers.

With 25 operational agriculture retail stores and ambitious plans to establish hundreds more, we are expanding our physical presence to serve farmers across the nation. Additionally, we have launched an innovative agriculture-focused e-commerce platform, offering a comprehensive range of high-quality seeds, fertilizers, pesticides, and expert advice.

At Khushali Kisan Sewa, we pride ourselves on our extensive expertise in Agriscience, enabling us to provide holistic assistance to farmers throughout their journey, from farm to market. We are dedicated to supporting farmers in making informed decisions and enhancing their productivity and profitability.

Visit our Online Store www.khushalikisan.in

Name: Brar's
Description:
Three decades ago, Brar’s started as a small sweets (mithai) shop in Toronto’s Little India. Our brand has always stood for the highest quality products crafted with care. Over time, our delicious products gained popularity, and their demand grew across various cities in Canada and the U.S. To meet this increasing demand, we set up a dedicated kitchen for producing sweets and samosas. From there, we expanded into a wide range of products, including dairy, desserts, samosas, and snacks. Fast forward to today, Brar’s has become a leading Canadian ethnic food brand. We operate out of a state-of-the-art facility approved by the Canadian Food Inspection Agency (CFIA). Many of our retail products are also certified by the Halal Monitoring Authority (HMA).

In addition to our retail products, Brar’s is celebrated for its pure vegetarian restaurants across the GTA. With five restaurants serving three different cities, we continue to create exquisite vegetarian Indian cuisine.

Our Purpose

Since 1986, we've been at the forefront of incredible flavour, the guiding light for those who crave more than the ordinary. Our journey doesn't just stop at crafting exquisite vegetarian Indian cuisine; it's a way into the heart of your gatherings – connecting generations and infusing every bite with a sense of celebration. With us, food becomes a conduit to your occasions, where the more vibrant the flavours, the more unforgettable the memories. At Brar's, we believe that food should be filled with energy, colour, and connection. Each bite is a burst of pure, unadulterated dedication– from the farmers who grew the ingredients to the chefs who prepared the recipes. Our homestyle cuisine and family focus encourages a feeling of always being welcomed, cared for, and nourished. At Brar's, above all else, we embrace the vibrant way – because life should always be this flavourful.

For more information about our retail products and restaurants, please visit brars.com

From the moment you reach out, we handle everything: sourcing the right chef, confirming dietary needs, managing delivery and setup, providing staff, and coordinating rentals or presentation — so your event runs smoothly from start to finish.

But The BRDGE is more than just catering. We exist to uplift small culinary businesses — especially those without storefronts or big marketing budgets — by giving them access to larger orders, new audiences, and professional support. Our platform is built to help these talented chefs grow and thrive, while giving clients access to the global flavors they love.

Booking with The BRDGE means more than great food. It means helping small chefs succeed, supporting cultural diversity, and making your event truly memorable.

Muumi, Mauri Kunnas ja Peppi Pitkätossu. Vuonna 2021 sen palveluksessa oli 75 henkilöä ja sen tuotteita vietiin yli 50 maahan. 

Martinex  - kvalitetsvarumärken sedan 1986

Martinex Group är en finsk, familjeägd koncern, som tillverkar och importerar present- och hushållsartiklar, leksaker, spel, textilier och väskor. Därtill fungerar företaget som grossist och representant för utvalda varumärken, samtidigt som det driver en av Finlands bredaste nätbutiker. 
 
Företaget utvecklar egna varumärken som Aarikka, Baking by Martinex, Ma-ia Family och Peliko (Afrikas stjärna, Smart 10). Det är även licensinnehavare för många välkända varumärken som Mumin, Mauri Kunnas och Pippi Långstrump. År 2021 hade Martinex koncernen 75 anställda och dess produkter exporterades till över 50 länder. 

Martinex - quality brands since 1986

Martinex is a Finnish family-owned group of companies that manufactures and imports high-quality design and household goods, toys, games, textiles and bags. Additionally, it provides wholesale services, and it is one of the most versatile e-commerce operators in Finland. 
 
Martinex develops its brands such as Aarikka, Baking by Martinex, Ma-ia Family, and Peliko (Afrikan Tähti, Smart10). It also holds licences for many renowned trademarks, e.g. Moomin, Mauri Kunnas and Pippi Longstocking. In 2021, it employed 75 people and exported to over 50 countries.

Name: Issues Magazine Shop
Description:
Issues is a haven for magazine lovers in Toronto, Canada: A magazine shop, stocking a curated selection of hard-to-find, independent titles from around the world. We think about our space, both physical and digital, as a clubhouse for magazine makers, contributors and admirers. We aim to become a catalyst for innovation, collaboration, and a new generation of independent media in Canada.

Issues was founded by Nicola Hamilton, an award-winning editorial designer and art director.

Why this? Why now? Because despite shrinking magazine stands and the ascendency of digital everything, Issues is here to prove that reports of print’s death are greatly exaggerated. A tactile medium that offers an entirely unique interplay of words and visuals, magazines can’t easily be replicated online. Around the corner and around the globe, editors, writers, artists, and designers are producing vital magazines that mine stories and visual inspiration from the worlds of art, fashion, food, sports, politics, pop culture, and beyond — they’ve just become a little harder to find.

Description:
Hotchpot is a physical Books sharing platform for sharing books among users. This app helps create a vast public library where users can get unlimited access to books around us at no cost. The use of this app is absolutely free. 

Benefits of Hotchpot community:
Earn credits every time you lend:

Use these credit points to borrow more books.
Bond over Books:
Sneak into your neighbor's library, ping & meet up to borrow your favorite ones.

Less strain on eyes, more joy to hands:
Why grumble staring & zooming on the screen when you can easily share real physical books.
No real money spent on transactions:
We don't charge money for any of your transactions. You just spend or earn points.

Name: Readings
Description: Readings is an independent bookseller with several branches located around Melbourne, plus an online shop. The flagship Readings Carlton shop was established in 1969 and has since been joined by stores in Hawthorn, Malvern, St Kilda, Doncaster, the State Library of Victoria, and – most recently – a shop in Emporium Melbourne.

Name: Southern Baked Pie Company
Description:
We started Southern Baked Pie Company in 2012 with a melt-in-your-mouth all-butter pie crust recipe, $400, and a dream to share the joy of fresh-baked pie with the world.

Today, that dream is a reality, with 4 locations across metro Atlanta, and thousands of pies shipped nationwide daily. We’ve even attracted the attention of Oprah’s Favorite Things, The Today Show, USA Today, Southern Living Magazine, Hallmark Channel, Food Network, and more! 

Named one of the best pie shops in America by Thrillist and Mashed, we proudly ship elegant, handmade sweet and savory pies nationwide, so whether you’re catering an event, exploring corporate gifting options, or simply enjoying a meal with your family, let us help you celebrate life with pie.

Name: Chums Ltd
Description:
Chums is a privately owned home shopping company with the head offices based in Knowsley Business Park, Liverpool. Our founder Graham Rubin established the company in 1981 after gaining years of experience working within the trouser manufacturing industry that supplied other large mail order catalogue businesses at the time. Having realised the UK manufacturing industry was in decline, Graham spotted a gap in the market and decided to set up Chums.

Chums initially focused on selling Mens trousers, but overtime expanded the Menswear range to include suits, coats & jackets, shirts & tops, knitwear, leisurewear, nightwear, underwear and footwear. Over the years Chums have diversified and developed ranges within Ladieswear, Homeware, Gifts and Mobility.

Chums continue to operate as a family run company with Graham's sons Adam and Josh working within the business, which employs approximately 200 staff based in an 80,000 square foot unit.

Name: Brabants streekgoed
Description:
Brabants Streekgoed is een samenwerking van boeren uit de Kempen, die het beste van de boerderij rechtstreeks naar jou brengt. Via ons platform kun je eenvoudig online lokaal geproduceerde producten bestellen, zonder tussenpersonen. Dit zorgt voor een korte, eerlijke en transparante voedselketen waarin consumenten en boeren samen bouwen aan een duurzame toekomst.

Met Brabants Streekgoed geniet je elke week van verse, lokale producten van hoge kwaliteit. Bestellingen kunnen tot dinsdagavond 23.00 uur geplaatst worden, waarna de producten bij de boeren worden opgehaald en klaargezet. Vanaf vrijdag liggen ze klaar bij het afhaalpunt, zodat je snel en gemakkelijk toegang hebt tot heerlijke, verse boodschappen, direct van het land.

Wij streven naar een wereld waarin iedereen precies weet waar hun voedsel vandaan komt en waarin eerlijke beloning en duurzaamheid centraal staan. Samen maken we de voedselketen eerlijker, transparanter en vooral lekkerder!

Name: Vintagewine.dk
Description:
Vintagewine er startet af Brian og Morten. Vi er begge vinelskere og vil gerne skabe en shop hvor det er muligt at købe ældre vine til fornuftige priser. De fleste af vores vine er partier med få flasker af hver - når de er væk, får vi ikke nye. Vi sammensætter også smagekasser til private, firmaer og til vinklubber hvor det er muligt at prøve forskelige vine af. 

Vi har et udvalg af vintage vin, hvor du hos os finder unikke flasker der ellers kan være svære at købe i fri handel. Vi har derudover et nøje udvalgt sortiment af ny produceret vine af god kvalitet.

Name: GUATAVITA de COLOMBIA
Description:
GUATAVITA de COLOMBIA brings the treasures of beautiful Colombia to the world. 
In addition to the their signature product PANELA – the golden whole cane sugar, the company also has Café de Colombia and fine chocolate products in its delicatessen range.

GUATAVITA de COLOMBIA by Meisel Fine Goods has been founded by Anna Elisabeth Segovia in 2016. Her mission is to offer a natural alternative to industrial sugar and at the same time spread the tradition of Colombia, her parent's home country. Thanks to GUATAVITA PANELA, you can easily substitute refined white and brown sugar with a an organic product, which owing to its gentle processing by hand still contains valuable minerals as well as Vitamin B6. 

GUATAVITA de COLOMBIA bringt die Schätze des wunderschönen Kolumbiens in die Welt. 
Neben deren bekannten Signature Produkt PANELA – der goldene Bio-Vollrohrzucker, hat das Unternehmen auch Café de Colombia und feine Schokoladenprodukte im Feinkost-Sortiment.

GUATAVITA de COLOMBIA by Meisel Fine Goods wurde im Jahr 2016 von Anna Elisabeth Segovia gegründet – mit der Mission, eine natürlich Alternative zu Industriezucker anzubieten und gleichzeitig die Tradition aus Kolumbien, der Heimat ihrer Eltern, in der Welt zu verbreiten. Mit GUATAVITA PANELA lässt sich weißer und brauner Zucker im Haushalt ganz einfach durch ein naturbelassenes Produkt ersetzen, das aufgrund der handwerklichen und schonenden Verarbeitung noch wertvolle Mineralstoffe und Vitamin B6 enthält.

https://www.instagram.com/guatavita.official/

Name: Starbucks Thailand
Description:
The first Starbucks coffeehouse in Thailand opened in July 1998. Today, Starbucks has expanded to over 500 retail locations across the country. The company is dedicated to making the Starbucks Experience a rewarding part of the day for all its customers in Thailand, while contributing positively to the community through its sponsorship of sustainable coffee production with Thai hill tribes under the name Muan Jai (Thai blended coffee).

Starbucks always initiates handcrafted beverages one at a time and invites customers to personalize their beverages. Starbucks partners strive to provide the best coffee experience and are always ready to share with customers the background of Starbucks coffee heritage.

Name: Food A'Fair
Description:
Food A'Fair 2024

Calling all foodies and industry leaders! Hyderabad's food scene is getting a delicious shakeup with Food A'Fair 2024, a three-day extravaganza happening from June 13th to 15th at the Hyderabad International Trade Expositions Limited (HITEX).

Why attend?

Food A'Fair connects everyone in the food and beverage world, from producers to retailers and wholesalers. Build lasting relationships and watch your business flourish in this dynamic event.

Dive into the future of food! Explore the latest trends, innovations, and market forces shaping the industry. Whether you're interested in farm-to-table concepts or sustainable practices, Food A'Fair covers it all.

Learn from industry experts with insightful sessions on shared economy models, food safety, and ever-evolving consumer preferences. Gain valuable knowledge, exchange ideas, and stay ahead of the curve.

Indulge your senses with exquisite wine-tasting experiences and master the art of food and beverage pairing. Food A'Fair is a delightful treat for your taste buds!

Experience Hyderabad's rich culinary heritage as the enchanting "City of Pearls" sets the perfect backdrop for the event. Savor a blend of South Asian, Mughlai, Turkish, Arabic, and Indian flavors for an unforgettable journey.

Join the Food Revolution!

Ready to be part of this exciting gastronomic adventure? Register for tickets or book your booth at the official Food A'Fair website. Let's shape the future of food and beverages together!

Name: Home Deluxe GmbH
Description:
Home Deluxe ist ein mit Ostwestfalen verbundenes Unternehmen. Unser Kerngeschäft liegt im Online-Vertrieb von Artikeln rund um Haus und Garten.
Wir möchten zeigen, dass Qualität nicht gleich teuer sein muss!
Sie möchten sich davon und von der Vielfalt unserer Produkte überzeugen? Dann besuchen Sie gerne unseren Online-Shop (https://www.home-deluxe-gmbh.de) oder unseren Flagship Store in Minden. 

Unsere Geschichte
Geschäftsführer Alexander Thoss gründete das Unternehmen im Jahr 2009 mit der Idee, Deluxe-Produkte für jeden zugänglich zu machen. Der erste Arbeitsplatz war der Schreibtisch im Haus seiner Eltern und das Ursprungsteam bestand neben Ihm aus fünf Personen aus dem engsten Familien- und Freundeskreis. Aus der Idee ist eine Vision geworden, die wir bei der Weiterentwicklung unseres Unternehmens verfolgen.
Mittlerweile verzeichnet Home Deluxe ein kontinuierliches Wachstum in allen Bereichen: aus einer Handvoll Mitarbeitender wurde ein mittelständisches Unternehmen, das aktuell einen Jahresumsatz von ca. 80 Mio. € und mehr als 180 Mitarbeitende an vier Standorten, verteilt auf über 100.000 m² Areal im Unternehmen zählt. 

Unsere Visionen
Wir begleiten unsere Kundschaft von der Kaufberatung bis zur Auslieferung des Produkts und bieten somit einen lückenlosen „Rund-um-Service“ von der Beratung bis hin zur Auslieferung an.
Um unserer Kundschaft immer das passende Produkt anbieten zu können, erweitern wir jährlich unsere Produktpalette. Alle Mitarbeitende haben ein Stück dazu beigetragen, uns als Online-Anbieter zu einer etablierten und bekannten Marke im Bereich Wohnen und Garten zu machen. In Zukunft soll der Bekanntheitsgrad europaweit stetig erweitert und die Marke Home Deluxe in weiteren Bereichen fest etabliert werden.
Als hervorragender Arbeitgeber schaffen wir eine angenehme Arbeitsatmosphäre und erhalten trotz rasantem Wachstum ein familiäres und lebendiges Arbeitsumfeld mit flachen Hierarchien und kurzen Entscheidungswegen.

Name: Books & Toys Brasil
Description:
Somos a Books R Toys!
Fundada em 2012 por dois professores de inglês, a empresa foi inicialmente batizada de Saco de Brinquedos. O objetivo da nova empresa era ampliar a oferta de material que pudesse qualificar o ensino da língua inglesa dentro da sala de aula. “Flash cards”, “posters”, bem como jogos e livros para “storytelling” fizeram muito sucesso nos primeiros anos. A empresa logo caiu no gosto dos “teachers”. A partir de 2014, a empresa passou a focar também em livros didáticos, os “course books”, bem como em “readers”. Com o tempo, os didáticos das mais importantes editoras passaram então a ser comercializados e a frase “Books R Toys” foi incorporada ao nome da empresa. Até 2017, os livros e jogos comercializados chegavam através de importadoras especializadas, mas a partir do final de 2018, e, principalmente 2019, a Books R Toys assumiu esta responsabilidade.
Em 2018, a empresa firma um importante parceria com a Express Publishing. O trabalho desenvolvido nos primeiros 12 meses fortalece a relação entre as empresas e em 2019 é selado um acordo para distribuição exclusiva dos materiais da Express Publishing em todo o Brasil. Ainda em 2019, a Books R Toys passa também a importar os materiais da Scholastic de forma direta.
Além do comércio de jogos, livros e literatura, a Books R Toys oferece cursos, treinamentos e organiza eventos voltados para a qualificação de profissionais e educadores especializados em inglês como língua adicional e bilinguismo. 
Desde o início, a Books R Toys busca ser referência na área de materiais para ensino e aprendizagem de língua inglesa e em atendimento ao cliente. Com honestidade, ética, transparência, competência e eficiência, vem crescendo de forma gradual e sustentável e almeja contribuir na construção de conhecimento, fornecendo conteúdo educacional de qualidade e atendendo nossos clientes e colaboradores com excelência.
Location: Porto Alegre, Rio Grande do Sul

Name: SAIT Coop – Consorzio delle Cooperative di Consumo Trentine
Description:
SAIT Coop è il Consorzio delle Cooperative di Consumo Trentine: ci occupiamo di gestire supermercati e di fornire beni e servizi alle Famiglie Cooperative associate e ai loro punti vendita.

SAIT nasce nel 1899 da un’idea dell'ingegnere Emanuele Lanzerotti che decide di fondare una centrale di rifornimento e smistamento per riunire le Cooperative di consumo locali che gestiscono piccoli negozi al dettaglio. Oggi quell’idea si è trasformata in un gruppo di oltre 400 persone attive nei reparti Acquisti, IT, Risorse Umane, Logistica, Marketing e Vendite che gestiscono direttamente più di 20 supermercati con insegna Coop e Famiglia Cooperativa oltre al Coop Superstore di Trento.

Oggi come ieri al Consorzio spetta anche il compito di fornire beni e servizi alle Cooperative associate composte da 110.000 soci di Cooperativa, 98 Cooperative di cui 77 sul territorio trentino e 21 fuori dalla provincia con oltre 400 punti vendita.

Quel che ci distingue più di ogni altra cosa sono i valori su cui è fondato il Consorzio. I supermercati delle Cooperative sono infatti punti di riferimento, luoghi d'incontro e di relazione, presidi di socialità prima ancora che esercizio commerciale. Abbiamo a cuore le nostre comunità che sono il fondamento della nostra identità sociale: per questo ci impegniamo a farne parte per sostenerle e migliorarle, mettendo in campo iniziative economiche e di sostegno.

Al centro dei nostri progetti c’è il benessere e la cura delle persone. Perché per noi cooperare significa operare assieme, nell’attività e nei servizi, per raggiungere obiettivi comuni.

Name: Molini Valente S.p.A.
Description:
Fondata nel 1854, Molini Valente è una realtà storica nel settore della produzione di farine di grano tenero di alta qualità. Grazie a un processo continuo di crescita e innovazione, l'azienda oggi opera con successo. Tecnologie avanzate e grandi capacità di stoccaggio garantiscono costanza qualitativa del prodotto nel tempo. La qualità e la sicurezza delle farine è garantita da un'attenta selezione delle materie prime e dai rigorosi controlli di qualità di tecnici altamente specializzati. Il raccordo ferroviario interno consente una riduzione del traffico e dell’inquinamento provocato dal trasporto su strada con grandi benefici in termini di sostenibilità ambientale. 
Molini Valente fornisce alcune delle principali industrie dolciarie, panifici industriali, il settore artigianale, pasticceria e ho.re.ca.  L’azienda è strutturata per assistere i Clienti sotto l’aspetto tecnologico e formativo su loro specifiche esigenze. 
Certificazioni aziendali: UNI EN ISO 9001 per il Sistema Qualità, UNI EN ISO 45001 per Salute e Sicurezza sul Lavoro, FSSC 22000 per la Sicurezza Alimentare, UNI EN ISO 14001 per la Gestione Ambientale, ISCC per il Sistema di Agricoltura Sostenibile e disponiamo di Certificazione KOSCHER.
Impegno, passione e continua ricerca sono i pilastri che ci guidano. Scopri di più sul nostro sito: www.molinivalente.it.

Name: Carlino's
Description:
The Carlino Family began to cultivate the finest fruits and vegetables and raise the healthiest game and livestock on the family farm in the sunny hills of Abruzzo, Italy over six generations ago. Many of Carlino’s Olde World recipes were developed in those kitchens and are still enjoyed today. Cured meats like prosciutto and soppresatta, sausages, sun-dried tomatoes, crusty breads, oil-cured olives, dried figs and olive oils, handmade pasta, sauces and sweets have outlasted the test of time and remain virtually unchanged.

Grandfather Pasquale came to America in the early 1900’s and was later followed by his family, including his daughter-in-law, Angela Carlino, who was known and loved as the famous “Mama Carlino”. Carlino’s opened its first family store in Ardmore, Pa., in the 1980’s offering homemade pastas, sauces and the freshest pastries and cookies. The business flourished and grew over the years to become one of the best-known specialty food stores in the Philadelphia area with two gourmet markets and a full catering service.

Today, in our third generation of ownership, Carlino’s Specialty Foods continues as purveyors of artisan cheeses, homemade desserts, signature pasta and sauces, handmade fresh bread, prepared gourmet take away foods, an authentic deli, house made sausages, hand- roasted meats, a collection of over 40 hand-selected olive oils and balsamic vinegars on tap from around the globe, gelati, an impressive selection of Italian groceries, many of which are imported exclusively by Carlino’s.

Our commitment to Olde World techniques, treasured family recipes, the finest ingredients and an enduring hospitality has not changed. Our family invites you to celebrate with us the art of cooking, the joy of family and the value of tradition…from our kitchen to yours.

Name: Wine Enterprises Private Limited
Description:

Established in 1970 in Amritsar, Punjab, and now flourishing in Western India, Wine Enterprises Private Limited has evolved into a diversified conglomerate in the Alcobev industry. Our company boasts a strong presence in manufacturing, wholesale, retail, distribution, warehousing, and sales across Pune, Ahilyanagar, and beyond.

- Restaurants : We proudly own over 10 of Pune's top-rated, award-winning restaurants, including Prem's, Swig, The Flour Works, and Soy Como Soy.
- Sports and Fitness: We operate the prestigious AthElite Sports and Fitness Academy and Club in Pune's premium locality.

With over five decades of experience, Wine Enterprises Private Limited has built a reputation for excellence, innovation, and customer satisfaction. We continue to push boundaries, expand our horizons, and explore new opportunities for growth and success.

Name: Scala Assistance SRL
Description:
SCALA ASSISTANCE este o companie de tehnologie care facilitează distribuirea și colectarea taxelor, deservind milioane de șoferi și peste 10.000 de companii.

Compania beneficiază de o prezenta multinațională, investește continuu in dezvoltarea rețelei sale de vânzări, retail si corporate, urmărind diversificarea gamei de servicii în funcție de nevoile clienților săi corporate și retail. În prezent, compania are peste 30.000 de puncte de vânzare autorizate în România și își consolidează prezența multinațională în Ungaria, Bulgaria și Republica Moldova.

SCALA ASSISTANCE a intrat pe piața în anul 2007, aducând - în premieră pentru România - conceptul de vânzare online de viniete.

Deși activitatea principală a SCALA este emiterea și distribuirea de viniete pentru utilizarea rețelei de drumuri și autostrăzi naționale, începând cu anul 2021, compania a intrat pe piața asigurărilor auto și a serviciilor de asistență auto.

Activitatea de distribuire a vinietelor este autorizata de către Societatea Națională de Administrare a Infrastructurii Rutiere (C.N.A.I.R. S.A.) prin Contract 93/17339 / 27.08.2007 (actualizat) iar distribuirea asigurărilor auto obligatorii RCA este autorizată de Autoritatea de Supraveghere Financiară (ASF).

Name: baaboo.com
Description:
The baaboo shop is an online marketplace where merchants can offer their goods. We prioritize top products at affordable prices, always striving to offer our customers the best price. It’s a paradise for bargain hunters across many parts of the EU, as well as in the USA and Mexico.

Our product range includes well-known brands, selected products from startups, and affordable private labels in the drugstore sector.

We can offer many products at significantly lower prices than retail or other online shops. Occasionally, these are overstock items, making the offers only available in limited quantities. However, some brand products are also permanently available at low prices.

In addition to our focus on offering products at the lowest possible price, we place great importance on baaboo's customer service. Thanks to cooperations and partnerships, our warehouses and logistics are located in Europe, enabling us to guarantee fast and uncomplicated shipping. Typically, baaboo delivery times are 1-3 business days, and we cover the shipping costs for orders over €49.

Moreover, our support center offers all customers the possibility to reach us around the clock. Alongside transparent communication, there are other helpful tools available, such as parcel tracking or checking the current order status. Cancellations or returns can also be easily handled through the customer center. With our 30-day return policy and free return shipping, you're in safe hands with baaboo!

Name: BetterBE Health
Description:
Fundamos a BetterBE com um propósito claro: transformar os avanços científicos mais recentes sobre longevidade saudável em produtos que realmente façam a diferença. Fórmulas exclusivas, simples de entender, fáceis de consumir e, acima de tudo, que funcionam.

O corpo humano tem cerca de 37,2 trilhões de células. Convenhamos, é muita coisa para cuidar sozinho, né?

É aí que a gente entra: uma empresa criada para te ajudar nessa missão e dar às suas células o cuidado e a atenção que elas merecem. A nossa meta vai além de aumentar a sua expectativa de vida. Queremos que cada minuto seja vivido com saúde, vitalidade e qualidade – porque essa é a nossa paixão, o nosso compromisso.

A BetterBE é muito mais do que uma empresa de tecnologia, longevidade e nutrição. Somos uma comunidade, feita de pessoas como você: que buscam uma vida mais ativa, jovem e saudável. Porque viver bem é uma escolha, e nós estamos aqui para te ajudar a fazer a melhor delas...Junte-se ao time. Vamos juntos construir a maior comunidade de longevidade do Brasil.

Name: Mama Nourish

Name: Our Cow
Description:
Our Cow is the leading and fastest-growing direct-to-consumer meat subscription company in Australia, and is redefining the future of food and farming in Australia.

Paddock to Plate - Direct to Consumers:
Offering a flexible, convenient and fully customizable home delivered meat subscription service to thousands of customers throughout Australia, sourcing the very best grass-fed and organic meat products directly from farmers. Our Cow is the link between farmers and consumers, connecting consumers to the provenance of their food, making healthy, ethical and sustainable meat products accessible to family households and stabilising pricing for hard-working farmers.

They Almost Lost Everything:
Founders Dave McGiveron & Bianca Tarrant were so excited to purchase their first farm, only to find out the hard way that farming isn’t all it’s cracked up to be. Shortly after purchasing their farm in 2017, they were faced with a series of horrific bushfires and the worst drought in Australia’s history, which all but wiped out their home and livelihood. From necessity comes invention, with their novel idea of selling their own beef on social media spawning a $15million (and growing) eCommerce business.

Supporting Aussie Farmers:
They believe the 200-year-old Australian livestock industry format is prime for change, and they’re happy to help disrupt the old practices. Working directly with over 100 top notch Aussie farmers, they pay them a higher price than the supermarkets because their produce is better, and they raise their animals ethically with respect for the environment.

Crowdfunding the Future of Food:
In 2022 Our Cow successfully raised $2.4million from thousands of Australian investors to continue the company’s extraordinary growth trajectory.

Name: Garrafeira Grande Reserva
Description:
A Garrafeira Grande Reserva é um novo projecto criado por uma equipa de wine lovers com vasta experiência a trabalhar a estratégia de inúmeras marcas de vinhos.

Odak noktası insan, sanat ve yaşam olan 42 Maslak, kat maliklerine ve ofis çalışanlarına renkli bir hayat sunuyor. Rezidans ve ofis sahiplerinin dinlenebileceği, kiralanabilir seminer ve toplantı odalarının bulunduğu 42 Lounge, A Kule ve B Kule’nin 25.katlarında yer alan iki ayrı sosyal tesis 42 Fitness - Pool & SPA ise bu anlayışın en güçlü tezahürlerindendir. 42 Maslak, alışveriş ve yeme-içmeye de yeni bir bakış açısı getiriyor ve hizmet noktalarında mimari açıdan gün ışığını maksimum kullanarak, gelenlerin adeta caddede alışveriş yapıyor hissini yaşayacağı bir alan sunuyor. Özenle seçilen her bir marka kendi alanında tek ve öncü olması ile biliniyor. Bu konsept ile oluşturulan 30,000 m²’lik 42 Shopping Mall; gastronomi, sanat, alışveriş ve eğlenceyi bir araya getiren benzersiz bir alışveriş ve yaşam merkezi olma vizyonuyla, Ocak 2018’den beri hizmet veriyor. 42 Shopping Mall‘de yer alan mağazalar ve Türkiye’de ilk defa geleneksel Türk yemeklerinin özgün bir konseptle aynı çatı altında toplandığı 1.800 kişilik oturma kapasitesiyle Türk Lezzet Müzesi, 42 Maslak’ın ayrışan yaşam stilinin önemli unsurlarını oluşturuyor.

Maine is home to some of the world’s best natural resources, and as 12th-generation Mainers, we wanted to build a company that shines a light on them.

Our water flows from Sebago Lake, surrounded by deep forest that acts as a natural filter. We work with Maine brewers to package mainelove in 100% recyclable cans, which helps keep our waters crisp and clean while supporting the local economy.

Name: Sajeevan Life
Description:
Sajeevan Organics is committed to revolutionizing the sourcing and distribution model for herbs and medicinal plants in India. 

Our mission is to bring about transformative changes in the production, processing, logistics and consumption of herbs, medicinal plants and food.

Our primary focus lies in ensuring the profitability of farmers, the sustainability of crops, and the nutrition of communities. By collaborating with like-minded Farmer Producer Organizations (FPOs) and Farmer Collectives, we aim to create replicable and scalable models that drive positive disruption across India. Currently, Sajeevan Organics is actively working with 60,000 farmers across 100 Farmer Producer Companies (FPCs) in Gujarat. However, our vision extends beyond a single state. We are determined to scale our operations nationwide by partnering with FPOs and Farmer Collectives from different states in India.

To achieve our goals, Sajeevan Organics will focus on the following key areas:

•	Innovative Sales and Distribution Models: We aim to build innovative sales and distribution models that cater to both B2B and B2C clientele. For B2B clients, we offer opportunities for white labelling and raw material sourcing, ensuring high-quality products for their own Ayurvedic formulations. For B2C clientele, we plan to utilize e-commerce platforms and establish physical distribution models through franchisee and entrepreneur-owned Sajeevan branded outlets across India.
•	Farmer Profitability: Sajeevan Organics is dedicated to enhancing the profitability of farmers by providing fair prices for their products and establishing long-term partnerships. 
•	Crop Sustainability: Sustainability is at the core of our operations. We encourage farmers to adopt organic farming techniques, promoting biodiversity, soil health, and ecological balance.
•	Community Nutrition: We firmly believe that access to high high-quality herbs and medicinal plants is essential for promoting community health and nutrition.

Name: asx.eu
Description:
Arbeitsschutz-Express! Die Profis für Berufskleidung mit der größten Markenvielfalt im Bereich Workwear. Hier wird Mode und Sicherheit groß geschrieben. Seit der Firmengründung im Jahr 1983 und der Gründung der Marke Arbeitsschutz-Express im Jahr 2006 stehen wir unseren Kunden und Kundinnen verschiedener Branchen als kompetenter Ansprechpartner im Bereich Arbeitsschutz zur Seite. Seit 2009 ist als weiterer Gesellschafter Philipp Wiedemann mit im Unternehmen. So basiert die Vertriebs- und Herstellerkompetenz des Familienunternehmens auf jahrzehntelanger Erfahrung. Unsere Kunden kommen aus den unterschiedlichsten Branchen wie zum Beispiel Industrie, Logistik, Bau oder Handwerk. 

Es ist unser Ziel, unsere Kunden und Kundinnen mithilfe hochwertiger Arbeitskleidung und Schutzutensilien vor den Risiken des Arbeitsalltages zu schützen. Unser Sortiment an Berufsbekleidung umfasst unter anderem Arbeitsjacken, Arbeitshosen, Handschuhe, Arbeitsschuhe und Helme. Dabei ist es unser Anspruch, Sicherheitsanforderungen mit einer ansprechenden Optik zu vereinen. Wir arbeiten stets nach aktuellen Sicherheitsvorschriften, sodass jeder für seinen Arbeitsbereich hochwertige Workwear findet – von klassisch bis locker.

Neben dem Schwerpunkt Arbeitskleidung umfasst unser Angebot weitere Produkte, die für sicheres Arbeiten notwendig sind. Von Atemschutzmasken über Schutzbrillen bis hin zum Chemikalienschutz erhalten unsere Kunden und Kundinnen bei Arbeitsschutz-Express qualitativ hochwertige Produkte, denn dessen Gesundheit ist unsere Mission. Ergänzt wird unser Angebot durch unseren Logoservice, der Berufsbekleidung mit individuellen Logos veredelt!

Sie sind an einer Mitarbeit interessiert und möchten Teil des Arbeitsschutz-Express Teams werden? Dann freuen wir uns auf Ihre Bewerbung! 
Informieren Sie sich auf: https://www.arbeitsschutz-express.de/karriere

Name: Wild Idea Buffalo Co.
Description:
Wild Idea was founded in 1997 by Dan O’Brien. Through partnerships with likeminded ranchers, Indigenous communities, and conservation organizations, Wild Idea is repairing a broken ecosystem and food system by returning buffalo to the Great Plains.

We are committed to large-landscape grazing. The American bison is a keystone species of the grassland ecosystem. When buffalo are allowed to move freely across great swaths of landscape as they did for millennia, they can feed on native grasses without overgrazing. They gently disturb the earth with their hooves without damaging soil structure essential to native grasses. 

We use only humane field harvest. Just as we give our buffalo the room to roam that they require, we believe in honoring their dignity at harvest. Our humane field-harvest means we only harvest our buffalo on the prairie where they graze. They never see the inside of a trailer or a feedlot, unlike 90% of the buffalo raised for meat in the US. 

Our meat is always 100% grass-fed and grass-finished. Wild Idea’s commitment to large-landscape grazing and a humane field harvest means that our buffalo are never fed grain and are never given antibiotics or hormones. From birth to death, 365 days a year, they know only the openness of the plains and the taste of prairie grasses, free of GMOs, herbicides, and pesticides.  And because they are never subjected to the stress of transport and confinement, their meat is unaffected by a surge of stress hormones. 

The health of our planet depends on changing the way we feed ourselves. A food system that relies on chemical intervention, monocropping, and animal confinement is a broken one. We believe in empowering people to make better choices about their food, and we provide meat that not only unparalleled in taste but truly nourishing—for people and for the planet. And that impact reaches beyond the buffalo and the grasses of the Great Plains, to strengthen the connection between us and all living things.

Die ZWILLING Beauty Group bietet ein international starkes Markenportfolio mit den Kernmarken ZWILLING, TWEEZERMAN und TruYu by QVS und unterstützt darüber hinaus Vertriebskunden weltweit in ihrer Eigenmarkenstrategie. Unsere Leidenschaft ist es, Konsumenten mit unseren innovativen Produkten und starken Marken zu begeistern. Unsere Stärke ist unser Team. Werde Teil dieses Teams und gestalte die Zukunft der individuellen Schönheit mit.

Name: Kinderbuchlesen.de

Name: Da Nord a Food
Description:
Da Nord a Food crea esperienze enogastronomiche italiane uniche, grazie alle valigette gourmet personalizzabili, contenenti le migliori eccellenze agroalimentari regionali. Combiniamo la qualità artigianale con il design innovativo e la sostenibilità, offrendo un regalo aziendale che va oltre le aspettative.

Cosa facciamo:

Selezioniamo i migliori prodotti provenienti da piccole realtà locali italiane, che vanno dalle Dolomiti alla Sicilia, per offrirti una vera e propria esperienza gastronomica. Le nostre valigette gourmet sono un viaggio sensoriale tra i sapori più autentici d’Italia.

Come lo facciamo:

Le nostre valigette sono personalizzabili con il logo aziendale e sono ideali per eventi, regali aziendali, o semplicemente per sorprendere chi ami. Ogni prodotto è scelto personalmente per garantire la massima qualità e freschezza, con un packaging esclusivo, realizzato in cartone riciclato.

Perché scegliere Da Nord a Food:

- Qualità Artigianale: Selezioniamo solo il meglio delle produzioni locali, da piccoli produttori che raccontano storie di passione e tradizione.

- Personalizzazione: Ogni valigetta è unica, personalizzabile con il logo aziendale o i tuoi colori, per un tocco esclusivo e personalizzato.

- Convenienza Fiscale: Deducibile al 100%, rendendo il regalo non solo esclusivo, ma anche conveniente per la tua azienda.

- Sostenibilità e Innovazione: Il nostro packaging è realizzato in cartone riciclato, unendo tradizione e innovazione nel rispetto dell’ambiente.

Contattaci:

Scopri di più e crea il regalo perfetto per la tua azienda su www.danordafood.it

Name: IG WINES
Description: IG Wines is a modern fine wine merchant whose expert team are dedicated to providing an ultra-personalised service to our clients. By taking a wine-driven, people-focused approach, our knowledgeable team leverage their deep expertise of the fine wine and cask whisky industry to deliver tailored guidance to help clients build strategic collections and cellars. Our bespoke managed portfolio services are catered to each individual client’s needs and are accompanied by our comprehensive storage solutions. We are committed to transparency and accessibility, and therefore offer our clients exclusive access to incredible allocations, new releases, and unique wine experiences without imposing restrictive spending requirements or management fees.

Name: Duck Donuts EG
Description:
Duck Donuts has enjoyed tremendous success
and has built a strong following over the past 14 years
with our “Warm, Delicious & Made-to-Order” concept.
Duck Donuts first opened in Duck and Kitty Hawk, NC on the Outer Banks in the
United States. What started as a fun concept has now turned into a world
known, award-winning brand and a product that has everyone smiling!

Name: Buenos Aires Bakery
Description:
Con una trayectoria que nos respalda desde 2008, Buenos Aires Bakery cuenta con una cadena de 40 sucursales ubicados en la Ciudad de Buenos Aires y el Gran Buenos Aires, cada uno con una atmósfera cálida y acogedora que combina los sabores clásicos con deliciosas innovaciones.

Buscamos crear experiencias memorables a través de cada uno de nuestros más de 200 productos, que incluyen, desde panes recién horneados y facturas, hasta el tradicional chipá, sándwiches de miga y otras delicias argentinas como tortas, tartas, budines y galletitas, además de opciones de almuerzo, cafetería y servicios de catering para eventos y empresas.

La calidad comienza con la selección de ingredientes y continúa con la atención de nuestro personal, siempre listo para recibirte con una sonrisa.

Buenos Aires Bakery sigue creciendo gracias a un modelo de negocio sólido basado en franquicias, ofreciendo una oportunidad única para aquellos emprendedores que deseen llevar la tradición panadera a nuevos destinos.

Nos llena de orgullo honrar el legado cultural de la panificación argentina, preservando las recetas de siempre e innovando para deleitar al paladar moderno. Buscamos la excelencia diaria para nuestros clientes y colaboradores.

Visitanos y sé parte de una historia de pasión, calidad y comunidad.

Name: Onlifarma - Health & Beauty
Description: A Onlifarma nasce em 2010, iniciando a sua atividade em 2011, com a implementação de vários projetos ligados à saúde, beleza e cuidados de higiene. A entrada nos meios digitais fez parte da sua estratégia desde a fundação.

Name: Numedia

Name: Anmasa
Description:
Anmasa: Eat Better

Anmasa is a D2C omnichannel grocery startup on a mission to make pure, freshly milled staples the everyday choice for every household. We are not building a commodity. We are building a daily ritual people can trust.

Founded in 2024 by Yatish Talvadia (Founder & CEO of Milkbasket, acquired by Reliance Retail) and Shailendra Upadhyay (Founder of Veggie India, acquired by Milkbasket in 2019), Anmasa has raised $1.1 million in pre-seed funding from Snow Leopard Technology Ventures, Veltis Capital, Blume Ventures, Indigram Labs, and a group of angel investors.

At Anmasa, our goal is to restore transparency and trust in food through experiential stores featuring live milling. Our mills are custom designed for natural, slow stone grinding at 50 rotations per minute (RPM). The process is slow enough to retain maximum micronutrients and flavour in the flour.

We believe people should never have to compromise freshness for convenience. That is why we began offline with our first experience store in Gurgaon, where customers can see, taste, and believe what true freshness means.

Our flours, including MP premium, khapli, sharbati, and multigrain, are milled only after customers place an order. They can get them delivered within 90 minutes or visit one of our experience stores to watch them being milled live.

Today, Anmasa serves households across Gurgaon, Noida, and Ghaziabad. With 10 stores already operating across NCR, we are expanding quickly to bring freshness closer to more families. Along with atta, we now offer freshly ground spices, wood-pressed oils, and dry fruits, all minimally processed to preserve nutrients.

Freshness starts here → about.anmasa.com
Find your nearest store → store.anmasa.com

Name: Zing Bars
Description: Unlike any bar on the mIntroducing Zing Bars – the ultimate snack bar crafted by Professional Nutritionists for your family's well-being. Unlike other bars on the market, Zing Bars are plant-based, utilizing a unique protein blend of almonds and rice protein. Packed with heart-healthy fats from nuts and nut butters, Zing Bars are Certified Gluten-Free & Wheat-Free, Non-GMO, Soy-Free, Vegan, and Kosher.

Name: Supermercados Guarapari

A rede de Supermercados Guarapari é uma empresa do ramo supermercadista iniciada em 1983, na cidade de Viamão - RS.
Hoje, com operações nas cidades gaúchas de Porto Alegre, Viamão e Alvorada, a empresa busca atender seus clientes com qualidade e preços competitivos.

Name: Bonefrog Coffee Company
Description: Bonefrog Coffees Company was founded in 2019 by Tim Cruickshank after serving 25 years in the US Navy. This company is a tribute to his teammates, who lost their lives defending our freedom and American way of life. This company honors their memories and gives back to the foundations that support the Naval Special Warfare community. We hope you join us in honoring the memories of these great Americans!

Name: Feisty
Description:
Meet Feisty: the world’s first plant-powered protein soda.

Hate chalky protein shakes? Imagine if your favourite fruity soda had the protein of 2 eggs (no friggin’ whey). Founded by a scientist mother–daughter team, Feisty is fizzing up the $30B protein RTD industry with the world’s first soda powered by complete plant-based protein and a patent-pending formula. Just like a soda, clear, refreshing, and made for everyone (not just gym bros). Top up your protein whenever, wherever. 

 What makes us different:
• First to market with protein soda, the next wave in better-for-you soda
• Scientist-backed, developed in-house with years of R&D
• Patent-pending formula ensuring clarity, stability & taste
• Clean label: complete plant-based protein, allergen-free, no added sugar, low calorie, caffeine free.

Founded in 2024, Feisty is available in leading UK retailers including Selfridges, Harrods, Whole Foods Market, Soho House, and many more.

Name: Yroyak Supermercados
Description:
No ano de 1995, começava a história do Varejão, fruto de um olhar empreendedor do fundador da empresa, Francisco Hiroiaque, e com ajuda dos seus familiares.
Como produto do amadurecimento da empresa o VAREJÃO passou a viver um novo momento a partir de 24 de novembro de 2017, em que passa-se a se chamar YROYAK SUPERMERCADOS.
O que antes era uma simples e acolhedora loja de hortifruti, transformou-se em duas grandes lojas.
Suas duas lojas estão situadas nos bairros Vieiralves e Ponta Negra, que empregam mais de 230 colaboradores, beneficiando assim muitas famílias. 
Em meados de 2022, iremos inaugurar mais um novo projeto, uma nova loja, que será situada na Avenida Mário Ypiranga, n°1600, bairro Adrianópolis. Uma grande nova loja com mais 1.000 m2 que trará mais conforto e comodidade aos nossos clientes além de ser um espaço para que outros empreendimentos possam também expor seus produtos e serviços.
Desde o seu nascimento, até os dias de hoje, a empresa vem se reinventando, mantendo o foco em sua Missão: “Atuar no mercado de varejo de supermercados oferecendo aos seus clientes comodidade, agilidade, mix de produtos de boa qualidade, com um atendimento humanizado”. E tem como Propósito é criar uma experiência de compra prazerosa e com acolhimento e confiança.
Sua nova marca surge agregando nossos Valores: “Respeito, Postura Empreendedora, Humor e Alegria, Honestidade e Espírito de Equipe”.  
O Yroyak Supermercados se orgulha da sua trajetória trilhada até o momento, buscando oferecer serviços e produtos de qualidade aos seus clientes e se tornando uma marca com a cara de Manaus.

Name: MIRACLE Home and Accessories
Description:
Miracle LLC demek yenilik ve kalite demektir.

Miracle LLC ailesi olarak, size  en yenilikçi ve kaliteli ürünlerini sunmaktan gurur duyuyoruz. Müşteri memnuniyeti ve sadakati her zaman önceliğimiz olmuştur ve bu doğrultuda size en iyi alışveriş deneyimini sunmak için sürekli çaba gösteriyoruz.
Miracle LLC olarak, geniş ürün yelpazemizde herkesin tarzına ve ihtiyacına uygun ürünler bulunmaktadır. Moda dünyasının en güncel trendlerini takip ediyor ve bunları sizinle buluşturuyoruz. Tarzınızı yansıtan makyaj orgazirenden, şık aksesuarlara kadar her zevke hitap eden ürünleri sizin için bir araya getiriyoruz.
Bizimle alışveriş yapmanın ayrıcalıklarından biri de sunduğumuz uygun fiyatlar ve avantajlı kampanyalardır. Miracle LLC'de kaliteli ürünleri uygun fiyatlarla bulabileceğinizi garanti ediyoruz. Ayrıca düzenlediğimiz özel indirimler ve kampanyalarla siz değerli müşterilerimize ekstra avantajlar sunuyoruz.
Müşteri memnuniyetini sağlamak için çalışan deneyimli ve profesyonel bir ekip olarak, sizin her türlü soru, görüş ve önerinizi önemsiyoruz. Herhangi bir konuda yardıma ihtiyacınız olduğunda, size en iyi hizmeti sunmak için buradayız. Bize her zaman ulaşabileceğinizi unutmayın.
Miracle LLC olarak, siz değerli müşterilerimizin güvenini kazanmak ve kaliteli alışveriş deneyimleri sunmak için çalışmaya devam edeceğiz. Sizleri Miracle LLC ailesine katılmaya ve en yeni trendleri keşfetmeye davet ediyoruz.

Name: Ryefield Books
Description: Ryefield Books is an online bookstore based in Greater London, part of Ryefield Investments Limited. The founder, Rakesh Luchmun, has been selling books for more than a decade and therefore understands the needs and requirements of the book buyers. You name your genre, the title or any information about a book, and we will find it for you. The company is dedicated to offering as much knowledge as possible to everybody across the globe. We have a diverse collection of bestseller books on our website to suit readers of all ages- from a three-year-old kid who just started reading to those who like spending some quality time with books.

Name: VéloCertifié Créateur de Confiance
Description:
Aujourd’hui, lorsqu’un particulier souhaite acquérir un vélo d’occasion, il s’adresse :
- Soit à un PRO et il est complètement sécurisé sur la propriété et l’usage
- Soit à un PARTICULIER pour minimiser le coût d’achat mais la contrepartie est qu’il n’existe aucune garantie minimale !

Nous entendons par garantie minimale, une preuve de propriété préalablement à l’acquisition, un transfert de propriété postérieurement à l’acquisition, un marquage pour faciliter la recherche en cas de vol et enfin d’être assuré que le vélo est en état de fonctionnement pour la sécurité de l’usager acheteur.

C’est précisément pour sécuriser les transactions entre particuliers que VeloCertifie.com existe en alliant 2 types de relation :
- La relation digitale, avec une plateforme qui met en relation, qui trace la propriété, qui stimule l’acte d’achat et qui gère les parcours utilisateurs
- La relation physique, en positionnant nos artisans du vélo au centre du jeu, sur le marché de la seconde main.

Nous offrons 3 propositions de valeurs :
- Avoir une estimation du vélo en relation avec le marché
- Lutter contre la fraude et Promouvoir une utilisation sécurisée 
- Favoriser l’artisanat local
 
D’une situation actuelle où il n’existe aucune obligation, VeloCertifie.com permet aujourd’hui :
- Une transparence sur la propriété initiale
- Un Contrôle Technique réalisé par un artisan de proximité
- Un marquage du vélo
- Et enfin la généralisation d’un acte de cession pour le transfert de propriété

Name: Hallmark Consumer Services
Description:
Established in 1992, Hallmark Consumer Services is an award-winning family-owned business specialising in fulfilment services and innovative direct mail, based in Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire. 
Our key aim is to deliver a level of commitment that’s second-to-none through our core principles of Flexibility, Reliability and Transparency. 
To reflect the growing importance of e-fulfilment we have created a dedicated business unit that specialises in providing these services to a growing client base.
After a lot of hard work from everyone in the company we have recently achieved ISO9001 and ISO14001 standards in quality and environmental management. We are a multi-award winning company, having won:
* The “Increased productivity through the use of IT” East Midlands Family eBusiness Award
* National Training Award
* The Best Small Business in Melton Mowbray
* The BSS Supplier of the Year award
* Royal Mail Mailing House Scheme (RMMHS)
* Best Development of Talent Category Winner - Midlands Family Business Awards
* Runners up in the Service Excellence Category 2011- Midlands Family Business Awards
* Member of UK Warehousing Association (UKWA)

Name: INOKEY
Description:
Inokey est la solution digitale pour reproduire vos clés de véhicule. 
Nous vous proposons de refaire votre clé de voiture plus rapidement et à moindre coût qu’en concession automobile. Toutes nos clés sont taillées et programmées chez nos partenaires soigneusement choisis. Fort d'un réseau de plus de 310 professionnels de la serrurerie automobile à travers la France, confiez la reproduction de votre clé de voiture à des experts reconnus.
Avec plus de 15 000 clés en stock, découvrez nos gammes de clés de voiture répondant à toutes les marques de véhicule du parc automobile français. 
Avec Inokey, assurez vous d’avoir des clés de voiture plus vite et moins cher

Name: BabyTunes
Description:
Empresa fundada em 2016 com sede em Miami FL, A Babytunes se tornou umas das maiores referências em produtos infanto-juvenil do mercado.

Com uma curadoria especializada a Babytunes hoje conta com mais de mais de 4000 mil  produtos diversos das maiores e mais exclusivas marcas americanas e nacionais.

Name: BottlesXO
Description:
BottlesXO disrupts the value chain of the beverage industry by offering an on-demand, ready-to-drink, and mobile-first solution and by vertically connecting consumers with quality producers of quality wine, craft beers and premium spirits.

Our service is currently available in Shanghai and Mainland China.

We deliver chilled bottles ready-to-drink and selected gourmet food in an average delivery time of 30 minutes. Our selection offers a range of boutique wines, craft beers and artisanal spirits. These are bottles you can trust: delicious, crafted and never mass-produced, plus carefully curated to make your choice effortless.

We take the time to get to know each producer behind our bottles, so we can select only the finest products and offer them at competitive prices. All the people behind our selection are passionate in their craft, mindful of their environment and have an awesome story to tell.

Our cutting-edge app means that ordering is simple. Customers can follow their order with GPS tracking, access exclusive flash sales and promotions, and even find food-pairing suggestions for your bottles. We combine our tech-savvy operations with a people-to-people approach, fostering community and connecting drinkers directly to our producers. 

Find our app on your mobile store (iOS & Android) by searching for BottlesXO and start your experience!

Name: Pawstruck
Description: Pets are our passion! Here at Pawstruck.com we provide a premier e-commerce website with the best in bully sticks, dog treats, dog bones, and more. We are a company of likeminded individuals with one goal—providing our fellow dog lovers a website with high quality, safe and reasonably priced dog products. Above all else, we strive to keep your dog happy and healthy while supplying a fun and intuitive shopping experience.

Name: MeQuedoUno
Description:
MeQuedoUno es un e-commerce que conecta a una amplia comunidad de internautas. Vende una oferta de productos diferente cada día y el trato es: tienes que comprar en 24 horas y a cambio consigues el mejor precio del mercado.

MeQuedoUno está formada por 7 tiendas online: tech.mequedouno (Tecnología y electrónica), vino.mequedouno (Vinos, licores, destilados y gourmet), hogar.mequedouno (Electrodomésticos, artículos de cocina y decoración), kids.mequedouno (Juguetes, puericultura y artículos infantiles), chic.mequedouno (Moda, perfumes, belleza y cuidado personal), deporte.mequedouno (Productos deportivos de las mejores marcas) y mequedosuper (Productos de supermercado con descuentos que asustan).

Desde mayo de 2011 MeQuedoUno comenzó un proceso de Internacionalización y ya ha aterrizado en México.

MeQuedoUno is an online group of stores and community. We sell every day a diferent product and the deal is: if you buy in 24 hours, you'll get the best price in the market.

MeQuedoUno has 7 online stores: tech.mequedouno (Technology and electronics), vino.mequedouno (wine, liquor, spirits and gourmet), hogar.mequedouno (appliances, kitchenware and decorative), kids.mequedouno (toys and child care), chic.mequedouno (Fashion, beauty and personal care), deporte.mequedouno (Sporting goods from top brands) and mequedosuper (Crazy supermarket prices).

In 2011 MeQuedoUno started an internationalization process and has offices in Mexico.

Name: Maravilha Comércio de Livros
Description:
de vendedores diretos, atacadistas, feirantes, livrarias, papelarias e pontos alternativos. Com o passar dos anos, o universo livreiro evoluiu e expandimos nossa presença para setor de varejo. Hoje, contamos também com atendimento personalizado às instituições e profissionais de ensino e temos uma presença fortemente consolidada no e-commerce.  Nossa sede encontra-se na região central de Curitiba, com um ambiente amplo e confortável de 1400m², estacionamento privado e uma equipe especializada para oferecer um excelente atendimento.  Os produtos que compõe nosso catálogo atendem uma extensa faixa etária e trazem assuntos relevantes para o desenvolvimento e entretenimento do cidadão consciente. Acreditamos que a família e a escola devem estimular de forma criativa o contato com o universo da leitura desde os anos iniciais e essa atividade deve ser reforçada constantemente ao longo da vida. 

 

Nossa missão é contribuir no processo de ensino e aprendizagem com excelência e qualidade, distribuindo obras bem acabadas, modernas e inovadoras.

 

Nossa visão consiste em ser uma empresa reconhecida como referência nacional em atendimento qualificado e comercialização de livros relevantes para diferentes clientes.

 

Valores 

A satisfação do cliente em primeiro lugar

Transparência e honestidade

Equipe proativa, capacitada e motivada

Veicular cultura é nossa responsabilidade social

A leitura deve ser incentivada sempre

Respeito é requisito inegociável em todas as instâncias

Name: Pennguin
Description:
Pennguin is actively supporting equal opportunities for everyone to achieve more at work as well as their personal lives. Our experience in the FMCG industry and determination to deliver excellent customer and employee service is a driven force for constant improvement. 
Our passion, expertise and professionalism have been the foundation to form long-lasting relationships with valuable customers and other organisations.

Name: Plenitude Distribuidora
Description:
A Plenitude Distribuidora é uma empresa missionária dedicada à expansão do Reino de Deus por meio da literatura cristã. Com um amplo catálogo de Bíblias, livros cristãos e materiais devocionais, atendemos desde igrejas e livrarias até revendedores e leitores individuais, garantindo acesso a conteúdos transformadores.

Nosso diferencial está na variedade e na qualidade dos produtos que oferecemos, incluindo Bíblias em diversas versões e acabamentos, livros de teologia, crescimento espiritual, devocionais, estudos bíblicos, além de materiais para discipulado e evangelismo. Além disso, contamos com um modelo de distribuição em atacado e varejo, facilitando o acesso de igrejas e revendedores aos melhores produtos do mercado cristão.

Com um grande estoque e um galpão de 4.000m², conseguimos atender pedidos com rapidez e eficiência para todo o Brasil e também para o exterior. Nosso compromisso é fornecer materiais que edificam a fé e fortalecem a caminhada cristã, sempre com preços competitivos e condições especiais para parceiros e revendedores.

Na Plenitude Distribuidora, acreditamos que a Palavra de Deus deve chegar ao maior número de pessoas possível, e é por isso que trabalhamos incansavelmente para levar a melhor literatura cristã a todos.

Name: THE CO.
Description:
THE CO.; kahve, topluluk ve konforu bir araya getirerek kahve sektöründe yeni bir soluk yaratma amacıyla yola çıktı. Bugün, 20’den fazla şubemizle kahveyi sevenleriyle buluşturmaya devam ediyoruz.

Kahvemizi doğrudan çiftçilerden temin ediyor, kendi kavurma tesisimizde özenle hazırlıyoruz. Sürdürülebilir tarımı, geri dönüşümü ve topluluk oluşturan her teması destekliyor; baristalarımızı da kendimiz yetiştiriyoruz.

Bulunduğumuz şehirlerde yalnızca iyi kahve değil, aynı zamanda konforlu bir ortam ve paylaşılmaya değer bir kültür sunuyoruz.

Description: La EURL HCI est une société algérienne créée en 2018  spécialiste dans la distribution et la vente des matériaux de protection industrielle (EPI), la distribution de mortier et d'enduit, matériel électrique courant fort et courant faible (CFA & CFO).

Name: Jungle Gym
Description:
International e-commerce brand of quality, sustainable wooden outdoor toys. 

With our in-house design and innovation, 3D Customize technology, dedicated factories and warehouses worldwide, we pride ourselves on our agile, data-driven, learning-by-doing mindset.

The Amsterdam head office is spacious, light, full of plants, with air conditioning and a sunny roof terrace.

Name: ichlesdirwasvor UG
Description: Die Entwicklung von Kindern hängt im Wesentlichen vom Elternhaus und der frühkindlichen Förderung ab. Hierbei spielt das lesen, bzw. vorlesen eine elementare Rolle, da zum einen die Kinder in Phantasiewelten abtauchen können, aber auch mit der heutigen Vielzahl an Büchern die Welt und all die Zusammenhänge darin zu erklären.

Name: Kübler Sport GmbH
Description:
Kübler Sport is a medium-sized family business based in Backnang near Stuttgart, which employs around 60 people. With more than 35 years of experience in the industry, we have established ourselves as a reliable supplier of sports equipment as well as a technical service partner for sports facilities. Our customers range from sports clubs, municipalities and schools to fitness studios and therapists throughout Germany and internationally. As a well-coordinated team of dedicated employees, we live the spirit of sports in our daily activities.

In addition to worldwide sales and online shipping, Kübler Sportservices round off the service package. Sports facility planning, including installation work, inspection and maintenance work, as well as the safety inspection of sports facilities, are carried out professionally and with certified quality assurance by our in-house installation and service team. Outdoor sports facilities are also planned and equipped by Kübler Sport.

Kübler Sport offers international sales of sports equipment with worldwide references as well as local sales partners in selected markets. Multilingual staff with many years of experience in transports as well as customs and export documents are available to provide advice.

Regular external as well as internal controls guarantee a continuously high quality of our products and services. These include external inspectors from the RAL Quality Association, internal tests for harmful substances, the requirements of the Federal Association of the German Sporting Goods Industry (Bundesverband der Deutschen Sportartikelindustrie e.V.) as well as the EHI Retail Institute and Trusted Shops to ensure a reliable shopping experience in the online store.

Name: The Balanced Company
Description:
The Balanced Company is a woman-owned business offering wellness gift boxes curated with better-for-you products to companies looking to gift their teams and employees appreciation/event gifts to promote wellbeing and mental health. We also offer subscription boxes of healthy snacks, pantry staples, and lifestyle products through our direct-to-consumer website. 

The Balanced Company is committed to connecting you with high quality products to nourish your body, mind and soul. Our mission is to help you make healthier choices that lead to a more healthful, balanced life. Ships across the USA and Canada. 

Our founder, Evie Levitin went from a corporate job as a CA,CPA to a Registered Holistic Nutritionist. Through her personal health journey, she found her passion in helping people live their best life through making healthier lifestyle choices. Evie's mission branched further than just ensuring her family was living as healthfully as possible. She wanted to share her passion and knowledge with everyone, and that's how the dream of a Toronto mom of 3 was born. The launch of The Balanced Snack Box was the first of its kind in Canada and the first offering from The Balanced Company, with a focus on high quality, healthful ingredients. Scanning the aisles of each grocery store made Evie realize how difficult it is to weed out certain ingredients and choose the best quality products. Through discovering mindfully made products from conscious brands, Evie saw that making healthier choices to maintain lasting healthy habits meant taking care of your mind, body and soul. It was then that The Balanced Company was born.

We want to bring healthy products into every household, so you can live more healthfully and happy. Whether it's a craving for chocolate chip cookies, a big salad, or some much need relaxation, we carefully select products to support your mind, body and soul.

We source responsibly and sustainably, building direct relationships with trusted farmers whenever possible. Each batch is roasted in-house with care, honoring the people and places behind every bean.

Our coffeehouses are built on hospitality and warmth, inviting people into spaces where community happens. They’re places to pause, to connect, and to be part of something bigger than a cup.

As a nonprofit, all profits fund clean water projects, providing lasting access to safe drinking water around the globe. Every cup served helps bring health, dignity, and hope to those who need it most.

At The Well, coffee can do more. It can change lives — from farm to faucet, from our hands to theirs.

Description:

If you’ve ever found yourself absorbed in a story while the city rushes past, this space is for you. Let’s talk books, travel, and the magic of reading in motion.


 Want to share your story with us? Connect with us for business purposes at booksindelhimetro@gmail.com

#BooksInDelhiMetro #ReadingBetweenStations #MetroTales

We nurture over 70 outlets and 4 growing brands — Salad MOI, Hola Jus, KopiBuah, and EatFit — across Java, Bali, and Sumatra. Many are led by women, bringing heart, character, and passion into every step.

We build growth with purpose: 16 clear career paths, peer-to-peer internal learning, and even fully sponsored international experiences. This is not just about job titles, but about the courage to grow together.

At Langkah Kecil, appreciation means action: above-average wages, profit-linked bonuses, insurance, and healthcare — rewards worthy of those who contribute.

Our workplace is a warm ecosystem: a private gym, aviary, mini zoo, rice field views, and weekly gatherings. These moments fuel energy and belonging.

Together, these #LangkahKecil (Small Steps) shape a healthier, stronger, and happier future. 

"Langkah Kecil is the shared identity in F&B, distribution, HR, logistics, and innovation. All employment and legal contracts are carried out through the respective legal entities."

Buy wines in our online shop, nominate your club/charity at checkout and we will deliver the wine to you AND the funds raised directly to your club or rugby related charity.   It really is that easy!

£6 PER CASE OF 6 BOTTLES GOES DIRECTLY TO YOUR RUGBY CLUB. YOU CAN ORDER WHATEVER WINE YOU NEED OR SET UP A SUBSCRIPTION AT www.therugbywineclub.com/shop.

We host innovative wine events and charity auctions with our partner clubs and corporates with the now infamous Van du Vin, free wine tastings, rugby stars, wine experts, competitions and touchline tastings. Our events page has details of where you can catch us next for a free tasting!  We also support club events such as dinners, lunches, balls with our wholesale proposition and signed auction items.

We partner with companies to raise funds for their nominated charities with staff offers and also to entertain their clients by hosting innovative events either in person or online with rugby stars and wine experts.

Please email jason@therugbywineclub.com to get in touch and raise funds for your club…no investment is needed, just a little of your time!

Name: Pakka AG
Description:
Pakka distributes high quality, organically grown and fairly traded nuts, dried fruit and chocolate. A variety of finishes, packaging solutions and sizes result in an attractive and flexible product range. The customer base includes retailers and wholesalers, the food service industry as well as private and corporate customers in Switzerland and Europe. Thanks to the Pakka Group’s various business units, which cover the entire value chain from cultivation to distribution, Pakka stands for products from guaranteed responsible sources.

Our partners and suppliers
Pakka invests a great deal of time and energy in developing and maintaining partnerships in the countries of origin of our raw materials and products. The resulting relationships and partnerships go far beyond traditional commercial contracts. Working with Pakka means a stable and, above all, higher income for the farming families who belong to the cooperatives. Smallholder farmers in particular benefit from these partnerships, as meeting daily expenses and health and safety costs is one of their biggest challenges. Through this type of collaboration, Pakka is currently helping around 20,000 families in Asia, Africa and Latin America to improve their livelihoods.
Over the past 17 years, Pakka has developed strong supplier relationships based on partnership. This enables us to reliably supply our customers in Europe with high quality, organically certified and fairly traded products.

Name: Panificadora Cepam Ltda

Hoje a Cepam é mais do que uma panificadora, é um ponto de encontro de pessoas de todas as regiões da cidade, das mais variadas classes, origens, profissões e costumes, que vão em busca de qualidade, inovação e, principalmente, respeito ao cliente. São 4 estacionamentos próprios, para garantir o conforto e a segurança que você merece! Faça uma visita e conheça uma dos mais saborosos locais de São Paulo. Esperamos você!

Name: KİM GRUP
Description:
Kim Grup olarak bizler, perakende sektöründe bir marka olmayı, inanarak ve çok çalışarak gerçekleştirdik.Prensibimiz dürüst, çalışkan, ahlaklı ve ilkeli olmaktır. İlk kurulduğumuz 1987 yılından bu yana onlarca mağaza açmanın ve hizmet vermenin haklı gururunu yaşıyoruz.. Bizler, bugün yeni açmaya hazırlandığımız mağazalarımızda hala daha ilk günkü heyecanı yaşıyoruz. Küreselleşen dünyada ve Uluslararası rekabette kaliteden ödün vermeden çalışmanın sorumluluğunu çok iyi biliyoruz. Büyük başarılar tesadüf değildir.  Başarıların ortak özelliği; araştırma, geliştirme, kalite ve daha çok çalışmaktır. 3000 e yakın çalışanımızla istihdama katkımızın olmasından gurur duyuyoruz.

Başarımızda; girişim ruhumuz, teknoloji, kalite, yönetim kadromuz, tecrübeli çalışanlarımız, müşteri memnuniyeti, hizmet anlayışımızı sektörde bilgi ve deneyimle birleştirerek şirketimizin amaç ve kurumsal kimliğini en güzel şekilde yansıtmaktadır.

Kim Grup olarak insanlar için güven üzerine kurulu daha iyi bir hizmet kalitesi sağlamak ve ülkemizin gelişmesinde üstümüze düşen görevi yapmaktır.

Name: HOAC FOODS INDIA LIMITED
Description:

Since then, we worked constantly and made this dream their mission. Within a span of 12 years, they now have 4 company operating retail units, 6 Franchises, and 1 manufacturing & processing unit in Northern and Central India.

Since our inception, we always believed in providing our customers nothing but the best and this strong belief took us to new heights. Our quality consciousness helped us to pioneer in the FMCG sector and today we stand among one the top leaders in the industry.

We started our big journey with a small start. We introduced MP Desi Atta, which was rich in natural ingredients and minerals. Demand for quality produce kept on increasing and based on our market study, we decided to introduce variants like MP Sharbati and Multigrain Atta. Our customers were delighted to see the variety and customization we offered in our products.

Later on, we included 100% pure and premium quality Herbs & Spices and unpolished grains & pulses in our product range. Now we have become a preferred One-Stop destination for our valued customers for their grocery needs.

Our customer-centric approach helped us reach new heights. Today we have a strong team of 50+ members at the service of our 60K+ delighted customers. We also have a centralized contact center to process online orders and address customer grievances, if any.

Name: 02n Growth Enablers Private Limited
Description:
0-to-1 is a vertical growth process (doing new things) whereas 1-to-n is a horizontal growth process (doing things that work, better). We have the experience to navigate the challenges of both the environments. (Inspired by Peter Thiel).

Plan. Execute. Succeed.

02n is here to provide a unique platform for budding businesses in the e-commerce, Modern and General trade domains.

Ideas are important to make an impact. If you have an idea, we have the real-world experience to help you succeed. If you have passion and a great product, we help you in taking the brand where it should belong.

We provide a 360-degree approach in business building across all verticals like, Sales & Distribution, e-commerce, Branding, Customer Insights, Organisation Building, Digital Marketing.

In a way, our business model is similar to a venture capitalist with the modification that we mainly invest our knowledge and skill sets instead of capital. In exchange for equity or sales-based tie up, we form medium to long term partnerships with companies. Our deals evolve with the business, matching the offering to the company’s requirement.

Our expertise lies in consumer-focused businesses be it FMCG (Food or Personal Care), Home and Fashion.

Our founders have a combined experience of over 80 years in the FMCG, Fashion, Retail and e-commerce industries. They have held leadership positions at various organizations and have helped these businesses from inception to profitability.

Description:
Medizone este o companie ce dispune de o gama de peste 5.000 de produse medicale. Conceptul ce sta la baza intregii noastre activitati se bazeaza pe incredere si sustenabilitate. 
Sistemele si tehnologiile integrate in echipamentele medicale pe care Medizone le propune pot facilita o serie cat mai completa si complexa de proceduri si analize medicale. 

	Cu o experienta pe piata de peste 16 ani, Medizone si-a atins obiectivul de a oferi produse inovative si de mare performanta, ce corespund celor mai inalte standarde. 

	Echipa noastra se asigura in permanenta ca salile de tratament si cabinetele medicale in care produsele noastre ajung sa se bucure de cele mai bune conditii de lucru. 

De la aparate complexe precum videocolposcoape, aparate de anestezie si ecografe ce incorporeaza tehnologii de ultima generatie, la instrumentare si consumabile, dorim sa acoperim toate nevoile pe care un spatiu medical le poate avea. Idealul nostru este sa intalnim si cele mai inalte asteptari.

Découvrez un monde parallèle insoupçonné  à travers une sélection de plus de 350 boissons sans alcool : vins, bières, « spiritueux » et autres boissons alternatives. 

Nous croyons en un monde où chacun peut choisir de consommer ou non de l'alcool sans se sentir exclu(e) ou limité(e) dans ses choix. Encore faut-il savoir que d’autres alternatives de qualité existent, et où les trouver facilement… 

La Cave Parallèle • Aix-en-Provence est là pour vous offrir cette liberté.  Nous proposons des alternatives complémentaires aux boissons alcoolisées pour toujours plus d’inclusion, de partage et de plaisir.

Découvrez une nouvelle façon de savourer la vie !
Sans alcool et surtout… Sans modération

Name: WB D2C Group
Description:
„Customer first“ – an dieser Maxime richten wir unsere Wachstumstrategie aus und orientieren uns als eine der führenden Direct-to-Consumer-Plattformen (D2C) an den großen gesellschaftlichen Megatrends. 

Starke Marken unter einem Dach: Wir schaffen eigene Direct-to-Consumer-Brands in den Kategorien Bücher & Medien, Home & Living, Garten/ Nachhaltigkeit, Gesundheit und Kinder/Familie. Dafür stehen unsere Marken und Firmen Weltbild, teNeues, tausendkind, Fitz& Huxley, Paul Valentine, Groundies, Vamos, MySWOOOP, Gärtner Pötschke, Orbisana, Jokers, bücher.de, D2C Digital. D2C Logistics und die D2C ReCommerce. 
Produktkompetenz, Markenaufbau und Marketing im Zusammenspiel mit eigener, moderner Logistik-Facility und die Expertise in IT/Technologie sind die Säulen unseres Erfolgs.

Die Weltbild D2C Group hat sich in den letzten Jahren vom Multikanal-Händler zum Hersteller mit starken Eigenmarken entwickelt. Damit kommen alle Produkte und Services auf dem kürzesten Weg zum Kunden. Dafür steht der Begriff D2C – "direct to consumer".
Gestartet als einer der größten Buchhändler verbindet die WB D2C Group heute ihre Media- und Non-Media-Produkte durch die Ratgeberfunktion. Der Kunde findet kuratierte Themenwelten, die auf seine Bedürfnisse und Wünsche antworten. 

Unsere Marken haben einen starken Kundenfokus und bieten ein inspirierendes Einkaufserlebnis über Online-Shops, Direktmarketing, eigene Filialen und Social Commerce. Die WB D2C Group setzt im Zuge der digitalen Transformation verstärkt auf digitale Produkte & Services – von Audiobüchern über E-Learning-Angebote bis zu Social Commerce Shopping Erlebnissen.

Seit dem Frühjahr 2022 befindet sich unsere Zentrale im Campus Augsburg Offices. Dort arbeiten wir an modernen Büroarbeitsplätzen mit Community / Collaboration Spaces und aus dem Homeoffice.

Die WB D2C Group plant im Rahmen ihrer Build & Buy-Strategie weitere Zukäufe sowohl im Media- als auch im Non-Media-Bereich.
