Name: FIND A BOTTLE
Description:
FIND A BOTTLE est un site de vente en ligne de vins, de bières artisanales et de spiritueux 100% Made In France 

Notre ambition est de vous donner accès à des produits français de qualité, élaborés par les meilleurs producteurs de chaque région, en s’intéressant avant tout aux hommes et aux femmes qui les conçoivent.

Amitié, passion, proximité, confiance, respect…
Autant de valeurs qui nous animent au quotidien, et qui sont au cœur de Find A Bottle.

# Amitié :
Find A Bottle, c’est l’histoire de deux copains bourguignons, David et Samy, qui ont décidé de tout plaquer pour vivre de leur passion. Et comme tout bourguignon qui se respecte, nous ne sommes jamais aussi bien qu’assis à une table, entourés de nos amis et de belles quilles.

# Passion :
Depuis plus de 15 ans, nous parcourons nos belles régions pour dénicher de petites pépites, animés par la passion des hommes et des femmes que nous rencontrons.

# Proximité :
Tous nos produits sont 100% Made In France. Pourquoi irions-nous voir ailleurs alors que nos régions regorgent de producteurs de talent ? A un moment clé de notre histoire où chacun s'interroge sur sa façon de consommer, nous avons fait dès le début le choix du 100% français.

Cette proximité, nous la voulons aussi avec nos clients. Sur Find A Bottle, vous ne parlerez jamais à un robot et nous ne ferons d’algorithme pour sélectionner vos cuvées préférées, c’est promis !

# Sélection :
Nous avons ainsi tissé un lien de confiance avec les producteurs qui nous permet de vous proposer des produits rares, méconnus, parfois exclusifs et souvent peu disponibles dans les réseaux traditionnels, sur des allocations relativement réduites. Tous nos produits sont sélectionnés directement chez nos producteurs, sans intermédiaire.
Nous sélectionnons uniquement ce que nous aimons, pour votre plaisir et le nôtre !

# Respect :

Name: Fluffy Fluffy UK
Description:
Fuwa Fuwa, meaning “fluffy fluffy” is North America’s largest soufflé pancake and dessert café, and now it’s come to the UK as fluffy fluffy. Fluffy Fluffy first launched its signature souffle pancakes in 2018, taking Toronto, Canada by storm. They now have 32 sites across North America, plus multiple sites in Europe. The brand, known for its light and fluffy Japanese souffle-style pancakes, opened its debut UK site in Manchester in October 2022 with an estate of 9 stores and more coming soon. Fluffy Fluffy is hoping to open further sites in 2025 with more franchisees signing in other cities.

The carefully crafted Fluffy Fluffy pancakes are served in the Japanese soufflé style and have become a viral sensation with fans queuing along the street to be the first to get a taste. Each of the fluffy pancakes begins with egg whites whipped to soft peaks, essential to their finally airy quality, and is then cooked very slowly at low temperature. Tasting like a delicate balance between a soufflé and a traditional pancake, soufflé pancakes are soft, bouncy, and light.

With a vision to become Africa's biggest burger brand by 2025, Jazzy's Burger is embarking on a journey that goes beyond growth; it's about creating a legacy. It's about sharing the love for burgers, fostering entrepreneurship, and contributing to the local economies of the regions they enter. Name: Catalano Companies | RT 65 Management, LLC
Description:
Catalano Companies | Route 65 Management is a proud Dunkin’ franchisee with more than 60 locations across Central Massachusetts and Middle Tennessee, including several Dunkin’ Baskin Robbins combos.

Our story began in the mid-1980s, when Owner and Managing Partner Steve Catalano opened his first Dunkin’ restaurant. Over three decades later, the Catalano network has grown steadily, building strong roots in Massachusetts and expanding into Middle Tennessee in partnership with Matt Campobasso, Managing Partner & Chief Legal Counsel.

Together, Steve and Matt have led the company’s rapid growth, including the opening of 17 new Dunkin’ restaurants in Tennessee over the past decade. Today, Catalano Companies continues to invest in Next Generation remodels and new store development, ensuring every guest experience reflects Dunkin’s modern, welcoming brand.

At our core, we believe in more than coffee and donuts. We’re committed to supporting our employees, building lasting community partnerships, and keeping our guests running on Dunkin’.

Name: SUPERMERCADO PADRÃO
Description:
Com duas lojas localizadas nos bairros de Pinheiros e Butantã na Capital Paulista, além de oferecer vendas também pela internet, o Padrão Supermercados tem uma história que começa nos idos dos anos 90.

30 ANOS: Vindo da cidade de Panelas, interior de Pernambuco, o Sr. Antônio chega a São Paulo aos 17 anos de idade. Batalhando muito para realizar o sonho de tantos outros e ter uma vida melhor, trabalhou desde o início no ramo alimentício, e junto com seu irmão, abriu em 1991 seu primeiro comércio, uma quitanda, inicialmente com 40m², com apenas 1 funcionário e 80 produtos de hortifrúti.

Com o passar do tempo, com a sugestão dos clientes, o comércio foi se adaptando às necessidades da região e com isso foi crescendo e hoje se tornou uma das principais referências em supermercados, contando com um time de mais de 400 funcionários.

Name: Coopérative Sherpa
Description:
Depuis 1988, la Coopérative Sherpa propose du choix et de la qualité dans ses super marchés de montagne. 
Chaque magasin est un acteur engagé dans sa station, souvent partenaire de l’office du tourisme ou de l’école de ski et en liaison avec les producteurs locaux.
Chaque Sherpa est une personnalité de la communauté montagnarde, hiver comme été, et parfois même toute l’année.

Ce nom Sherpa est emprunté aux célèbres porteurs d’altitude au Népal qui, par leur résistance, leur ténacité et leur courage assurent l’approvisionnement et la survie des équipes d’alpinistes engagés sur les pentes himalayennes.

Ainsi, le nom Sherpa marque notre originalité et notre personnalité pour vous permettre de nous différencier des autres enseignes alimentaires. 
Il témoigne de notre intuition depuis presque 40 ans, que l’alimentation est un besoin essentiel en montagne et résume notre mission : apporter le ravitaillement en territoires de montagne !

Notre ADN et nos valeurs de coopérative alimentaire privilégient l’humain avec le fonctionnement en collectif : un homme/ une femme = une voix. 

Devenir Sherpa, ça se travaille au quotidien ! 
Pour rester leader de l’alimentation en station, les 120 magasins de notre réseau s’engagent sur la même Charte de qualité et de services. 
Répartis dans 100 stations des Alpes, du Jura et des Pyrénées françaises, chacun apporte son approche de la montagne, ses goûts et ses spécialités selon son terroir local.

Rejoindre la coopérative Sherpa, c’est avoir la chance de vivre au rythme de la montagne et de prendre à coeur de répondre aux besoins quotidiens de ses habitants permanents ou occasionnels, au rythme des saisons : un véritable équilibre et choix de vie.

Découvrez nos services 100% dédiés à nos clients : https://www.sherpa.net/nos-services 
courses en ligne, retrait en magasin ou livraison à domicile, 
prêt de pelle à neige, prêt d’appareils à raclette, fondue ou pierre à griller, etc.

Name: Guizhou Guitianxia Tea Co., Ltd.
Description:
Guizhou Guitianxia Tea Co., Ltd (known as Guitianxia) is a state-owned enterprise founded in 2012, which is the leading and biggest manufacturer and exporter of tea in Guizhou province, China. Guitianxia has integrated tea plantations, production, processing, packing, retail and wholesale, and import and export trading.

Guitianxia owns 12000 acres of tea gardens, including 4000 acres of organic tea gardens, the annual production is approximately 36000MT. Thanks to the average altitude of 1200 meters of the tea gardens, the prominent ecosystem ensures high-quality tea from Guitianxia.

Guitianxia is always executing the strict standard on quality control and performs on the standard of “pollution-free and additive-free” and is certified with “SC”, “HACCP”, “ISO9001”, and “ISO14001”. Guitianxia has a professional production and sales team, and the work tenet of excellence has made the products sold by Guitianxia unanimously highly praised.

With export ranges to North Africa, including Morocco, Lybia, Senegal, Algeria, Mauritania, and Mali, Guitianxia is attempting to bring the flavor, character, and culture of tea from Guizhou to the global world.

Name: BellyCare
Description:
En France, 1 français sur 2 se sent concerné par les troubles digestifs : gaz, ballonnements, transit irrégulier...plein de symptômes très sexy dont on ne parle pas assez ! 

15% de la population souffrirait chroniquement de ces symptômes "bénins" ce qui nuit considérablement à la qualité de vie du quotidien. C'est une pathologie qui s'appelle "le syndrome de l'intestin irritable" qui est aujourd'hui sous-diagnostiquée car seul 5% de la population aurait posé des mots sur leurs maux.

Malgré le diagnostic, le suivi et les solutions ne sont pas toujours au rendez-vous... 

BellyCare a la vocation de libérer la parole autour des troubles du bidou, faire connaitre et comprendre ces maux du quotidien mais surtout d'apporter une solution clé en main avec des plats préparés adaptés qui permettraient de réduire ces troubles grâce à une formulation pauvre en "FODMAP" - des petits sucres qui irriteraient les intestins.  Des plats équilibrés, sans gluten, sans lactose mais avec saveurs - fabriqués à partir de produits français et de saison.

En complément de ces plats, BellyCare c'est aussi un accompagnement personnalisé avec des professionnels de santé compétents, bienveillants et à l'écoute disponibles sur une application mobile qui comporterait un espace de partage pour la BellyCare.

Viele Jahre Erfahrung im Sanitärhandel haben Vertrauen geschaffen, welches MEGABAD gerne zurückzahlt – mit schnellen Lieferzeiten und einem Top-Service. Ob es um Ihr Bad, die Küche oder Ihre Heizung geht – MEGABAD ist die richtige Adresse. Das zeigen auch die Prüf- und Qualitätssiegel, mit denen unser Webshop ausgezeichnet wurde. MEGABAD trägt das TÜV Süd „Safer Shopping“-Zertifikat und das renommierte Trusted Shops-Siegel, das für Online-Shopping mit Fairness und Transparenz steht.

Notre jus de poires Nashi, 100% naturel et produit dans le nord de l'Italie, est conçu pour adoucir les effets de la "Gueule de bois", sans réduire le plaisir de faire la fête.

C'est aussi une démarche engagée : proximité de la production pour réduire notre impact environnemental, soutien aux agriculteurs locaux dans une logique d'agriculture raisonnée, et engagement en faveur de l'inclusion en employant des personnes en situation de handicap.
Noon vous accompagne partout, dans un format pratique de 120 ml. Parce que chez Noon, nous croyons que chaque moment mérite d'être vécu pleinement, même après une soirée bien arrosée.
Rejoignez l'aventure Noon et découvrez comment un fruit peut changer vos lendemains de fêtes !
Retrouvez-nous sur wearenoon.fr

Name: Caats
Description:
NOUS AVONS LES PIRES CLIENTS.

Non, pas vous qui lisez ces lignes.
Sauf si vous êtes un chat, mais c'est peu probable. Car les chats ne savent pas encore lire. 

Cela ne nous déplairait pas, ceci dit. Car s'ils savaient lire, ils liraient les étiquettes de leurs croquettes et nous aurions quelques concurrents en moins.

C'est exactement à ça qu'on pense quand on conçoit nos produits: et si les chats savaient lire ? 

Pire, et si les chats pouvaient sortir un téléphone de leur poche pour scanner le code barre de nos paquets afin d'en savoir plus sur les valeurs nutritionnelles de leur alimentation ?

Ils verraient que nous fabriquons des produits à haute valeur nutritionnelle, sans céréales, forts en protéines de qualité et entièrement fabriqués en France. Que nos croquettes et nos pâtées se combinent idéalement dans leur menu personnalisé pour leur apporter exactement ce dont ils ont besoin.

Nous n'avons pas les clients les plus simples, c'est vrai. Car le chat est exigeant. On aurait donc pu en chercher d'autres, des clients. On aurait pu fabriquer des produits pour poissons rouges. Ou pour hamsters . 
Voir même, soyons fous, pour chiens . 
Mais si vous aimez les sushis, auriez-vous confiance dans un restaurant qui vous servirait aussi des pizzas, du canard laqué et du boeuf bourguignon ? 
Voilà. 
Nous pensons que les chats pensent comme nous. 
Ils nous obligent à être aussi exigeants qu'eux, et à concevoir des produits qui ne les décevront jamais. C'est une mission difficile ? Oui. Et tant mieux. 

C'est pour ça que si nos clients sont les pires pour certains, ils sont pour nous les meilleurs.

Description:
Le Livre Vert est une entreprise d'insertion par l'activité économique bordelaise, spécialisée dans la deuxième vie du livre, fondée en 2013 par Nicolas Fesquet et Vera DaCunha.

Le Livre Vert collecte, tri, revend, donne et recycle les livres dont les particuliers, entreprises et collectivités n'ont plus l'usage. Cet ensemble d'activité permet de créer des emplois pour les personnes qui en sont éloignées.

La création d’emplois et la question environnementale sont au coeur du projet du LivreVert. L’entreprise est engagée dans une approche territorialisée de son activité, en s’appuyant sur un tissu de partenaires solide et varié (public, privé, associatif), permettant ainsi la mise en place de véritables chaînes de valeur.

LeLivreVert, vend des livres mais également des vinyles, CD, DVD et jeux de société d'occasion avec pour but de favoriser un modèle économique basé  sur le réemploi et sur une consommation plus responsable, plus écologique.

Dirigée par Nicolas Heintz, elle employait 6 personnes, qui s'occupaient de la récolte, du pressage, de la mise en bouteille et de la distribution.

 La société Heintz fournissait les épiceries et les particuliers. Edmond Heintz succéda à son père au déut des années 70, et devant le vieillissement des machines, il décida de créer une société de distribution de vin, baptisée Sommellerie de France.

 Ne vendant que du vin blanc à ses débuts, Sommellerie de France offre désormais à ses clients les meilleurs vins de toutes les origines, des vins de pays de qualité aux plus grandes appellations de renommée mondiale.

Name: AKOUA GmbH
Description:
Ausgezeichnet als „Most Innovative Sustainable Solution“ – Gewinner der Food Ingredients Europe Startup Challenge 2024!

AKOUA revolutioniert die Nutzung des Cashewapfels – einer Frucht, die bislang ungenutzt blieb und bei der Cashewkern-Produktion als Abfall galt. Wir verwandeln diesen wertvollen Rohstoff in hochwertiges Cashewsaft-Konzentrat, das als natürliches Süßungsmittel eine nachhaltige Alternative für Eiscreme, Getränke und Lebensmittel bietet.

Wusstest du, dass bei der Herstellung von 1 kg Cashewkernen rund 10 kg Cashewäpfel weggeworfen werden? 

 Nachhaltig für die Umwelt – Weniger Lebensmittelverschwendung, mehr Ressourceneffizienz.
 Fair für die Cashewbauern in Benin – Zusätzliche Einkommensquellen sorgen für mehr wirtschaftliche Stabilität.
 Innovativ für die cashewproduzierenden Länder – Neue Wertschöpfungsketten fördern wirtschaftliches Wachstum und lokale Entwicklung.

####

Winner of the Food Ingredients Europe Startup Challenge 2024 – Awarded “Most Innovative Sustainable Solution”!

AKOUA is revolutionizing the use of the cashew apple – a fruit that has long been discarded as waste during cashew nut production. We transform this valuable resource into premium cashew juice concentrate, offering a natural and sustainable sweetening alternative for ice cream, beverages, and food products.

Did you know that for every 1 kg of cashew nuts produced, approximately 10 kg of cashew apples are thrown away?

 Better for the environment – Less food waste, more efficient use of natural resources.
 Empowering cashew farmers in Benin – Providing additional income and improving economic stability.
 Driving innovation in cashew-producing countries – Creating new value chains that promote economic growth and regional development.

Name: Ghetto Gastro
Description:
We’re Ghetto Gastro—a culinary collective born in the Bronx, by Jon Gray, Pierre Serrao, and Lester Walker.

We specialize in creative cultural collision through cooking, using food as a tool to tell stories about where we come from and open borders to the cultures that inspire us. We create experiences around the world, making delicious food and collaborating with the best-in-class partners across fashion, art, design, and music. As Ghetto Gastro, we big-up the Bronx as a driver of global culture, with food as our primary means to connect and make an impact in our community. 

Break bread to break the mold. Let's cook.

Name: Dona do Doce Bolacharia Gourmet
Description:
A Dona do Doce é a primeira bolacharia gourmet artesanal do Brasil, fundada em 2012, especializada em transformar momentos em doces memórias por meio de receitas autorais, artesanais e afetivas. Com unidades em São Caetano, Santo André, Oscar Freire e Morumbi, a marca oferece um portfólio de delícias artesanais que podem ser personalizadas com identidade visual, embalagens exclusivas e sabores pensados para encantar convidados ou funcionários em eventos corporativos e celebrações especiais.

Para empresas, a Dona do Doce desenvolve lembranças personalizadas sob medida, desde pequenas lembranças até grandes volumes para eventos, sempre com atenção aos detalhes e ao sabor insubstituível que é sua marca registrada. 

Mais do que produtos, a Dona do Doce oferece experiências afetivas que fortalecem conexões e celebram vínculos importantes, tornando-se uma escolha ideal para ações de endomarketing, brindes corporativos e eventos que buscam encantar com autenticidade e sabor.

Na Dona do Doce, o "doce" inspira amor, de todos os jeitos, para todos. O "dona" não é sobre mando, é sobre dom: o dom de insistir até acertar. Somos feitos para presentear, celebrar e, acima de tudo, compartilhar. Com café, com conversa, com afeto. Mais do que explicar, é sentir.
Location: São Caetano do Sul, São Paulo

Name: ARTUKBEY Coffee
Description:
We are independently owned and operated, and we believe in giving our franchisees all the support they deserve to protect their investment and help them make money by becoming the center of the community anywhere they are.
Our elders have been in the retail business since 1910, and then we used and multiplied that experience to open our first retail coffee branch in 1988 in Mardin / Turkey. We hope to build long-term relationships with our customers through our customer-focused approach. This includes providing high-quality products at competitive prices. 
Mr. Tacettin Yertum is the founder and CEO of Artukbey coffee (1981 Merdin, Turkey), and he is an experienced businessman in the retail market. Mr. Tacettin branded the company as Artuk Bey Kahve in 2011, creating a sustainable and efficient coffee franchise model. The brand successfully expanded, reaching 75 branches in Turkey, 7 in Iraq and 1 in Dubai by 2020.      
We reached 83 locations in 2022 and developing 47 locations this year to reach a total of 130 locations by the end of 2023.

Name: Eat Hybrids
Description:
Eat Hybrids: For a tasteful future!

At Eat Hybrids, we're all about amazing burgers that are good for you and the planet! 

Our mission: combine mouthwatering meat taste and plant-based health benefits. 

Our Belief: Flavorful Sustainability
We believe burgers should be a treat without guilt. That's why we're flipping the script, crafting burgers that are delicious and eco-friendly. Everyone, from meat lovers to health-conscious flexitarians, can relish our guilt-free burgers.

Our Vision: Hybrid Food Revolution
Meat production harms the Earth with emissions, water waste, and deforestation. We're on a mission to lead a food revolution for flexitarians – those balancing their diets. Meat demand is soaring, harming our planet's resources. 

Challenges: Netherlands & Beyond
We're tackling crises like the Netherlands' nitrogen problem by creating middle ground solutions. For the 48% of Dutch flexitarians, our hybrid burgers nail taste and values. We're committed to taste without compromise.

The Hybrid Edge: Taste, Health, Green
Eat Hybrids burgers bring it all – flavor, health, and eco-consciousness. Ideal for flexitarians and those cutting back on meat, we're your go-to for sustainable and scrumptious burgers. As flexitarianism grows, we're here to satisfy evolving palates.

Join the Movement: Flavor & Sustainability 
Get onboard the sustainability train without ditching your burger fix. Eat Hybrids offers a tasty solution, appealing to both carnivores and plant-based enthusiasts. We're all about flavor and responsibility!

Connect with Us
Let's transform eating habits together! 
Follow us for updates, insights, and a taste of the ultimate hybrid burger experience. One burger at a time, we're changing how the world dines.

Contact us: admin@eat-hybrids.com
Instagram: https://instagram.com/eat_hybrids?igshid=YmMyMTA2M2Y
TikTok: https://vm.tiktok.com/ZMLbWGvsa/

Name: JobDo: Il tuo CV merita di essere notato.
Description:
JobDo, una piattaforma digitale innovativa che aiuta i professionisti a valorizzare il proprio profilo lavorativo e aumentare le possibilità di essere assunti. Il servizio si basa su quattro pilastri principali:

Analisi e riscrittura del CV ottimizzato per i sistemi ATS (Applicant Tracking Systems) e per i recruiter.

Generazione di lettere motivazionali personalizzate e revisione strategica del profilo LinkedIn, capaci di mettere in evidenza competenze e risultati.

Invio automatico del CV a recruiter e HR in target, riducendo drasticamente i tempi di contatto e aumentando le possibilità di colloquio.

Percorsi di accompagnamento formativo, che includono sessioni di coaching individuale one-to-one e masterclass pratiche sull’uso dell’IA per creare e ottimizzare CV e lettere motivazionali, così da fornire al candidato strumenti concreti e competenze spendibili anche in futuro.

L’idea nasce per rispondere all’inefficienza dei canali tradizionali (Centri per l’Impiego, piattaforme generaliste) e alla difficoltà crescente dei candidati — in particolare over 40, donne in rientro lavorativo e profili digitali — di posizionarsi in un mercato sempre più competitivo e automatizzato.

Name: Homemade Cuisine Gluten Free
Description:
Homemade Cuisine is a company based in Lahore providing a range of gluten-free products prepared in dedicated facilities across Pakistan. We have branches in Lahore, Islamabad, and Faisalabad; additionally stocking at premium stores across the country. Our product range includes gluten free flours, fast food, bakery, mithai, desserts, additives, and much more.

We also additionally cater to alternative diets such as Dairy Free, Egg Free, Keto, Low FODMAP, and low sugar.

For the future, we are working on becoming FSSC 22000 compliant through establishing an effective food safety management system that our clients can trust globally.

Name: Lunys
Description: Sme slovenská spoločnosť špecializujúca sa na dovoz a distribúciu čerstvého ovocia, zeleniny, potravinárskeho sortimentu a drogérie na celom území Slovenska priamo k vašim dverám, či už máte vlastný penzión, hotel, reštauráciu, závodnú či školskú jedáleň, potraviny alebo rovno k vám domov. Vďaka spolupráci s viac než 500 obchodnými partnermi z celej Európy dovážame a vyrábame pre našich klientov viac než 7 000 produktov, medzi ktoré patria aj čerstvé bylinky, huby, exotické druhy ovocia, široký potravinársky sortiment, ako aj balená a čistená zelenina, ovocie a čerstvé šťavy z vlastnej produkcie. S ročnou prepravou viac ako 28 000 ton tovaru, vlastnou flotilou viac ako 150 chladiarenských vozidiel a špedičnou prepravou, modernými vychystávacími a baliacimi linkami a vyše 400 zamestnancami patríme medzi najbonitnejšie, najzodpovednejšie a najrýchlejšie reagujúce spoločnosti v oblasti distribúcie potravín všetkého druhu na Slovensku a Morave.

Name: Chudleigh's Brand
Description:
We first invited people to visit our family’s apple farm in Milton, Ontario, in 1967. We were inspired to see how families from nearby cities loved this taste of country life and how a sunny fall day on the farm seemed to turn everybody into a kid. 
Since then, our commitment to high-quality products and exceptional customer service has earned us a reputation as a Canadian success story. We take pride in fostering a sense of community and bringing people together through the taste of our products and the memories made at our family farm and blossom cafés.
Interested in joining the Chudleigh's team?  We want to hear from you!

Name: DIVVINO
Description:
Le vin ne doit pas être uniquement le produit de l’industrie, mais le résultat d’une alchimie entre l’homme et la nature. Divvino partage sa passion dans le respect des terroirs, en proposant des vins de vignerons artisans en bio, biodynamie et nature ainsi que des vignerons mythiques de Bourgogne, Champagne, Jura et d’ailleurs.
Les deux ‘V’ de Divvino signifient in vino veritas. Nous avons environ 1 200 références dont 200 vins italiens, quelques précieux flacons brésiliens, un vaste choix de spiritueux et un espace épicerie fine.
Divvino  offre une large sélection de vins au verre, des cours de dégustation et privatise l'espace pour vos événements, dans un lieu unique et historique du XVI siècle.

Name: Love Biryani
Description:
About Us – Love Biryani

At Love Biryani, we believe food is more than just a meal – it’s an experience. Our mission is to bring the magic of authentic biryani to your plate, with every grain of rice infused with love, passion, and bold flavors. From the heart of Lahore, we offer a dining experience that blends traditional recipes with a modern touch, creating a biryani that is both comforting and unforgettable.

Whether you’re enjoying a meal at one of our welcoming dine-in locations or grabbing a quick bite from our vibrant food trucks, Love Biryani promises to deliver the perfect balance of spices, freshness, and warmth in every bite.

Our signature dishes are crafted using only the finest ingredients, because we believe in quality that speaks for itself. We aim to not just serve food but to create moments – moments of joy, connection, and love. With every dish, we invite you to experience the richness of flavor and the heart behind our biryani.

Join us, and let’s make every meal a celebration of taste, passion, and love.

Name: SCOP Librairie les Volcans
Description: La SCOP Librairie les Volcans est une librairie généraliste située au cœur de Clermont-Ferrand. Nous offrons une vaste sélection d'articles répartis sur plus de 2000 m², tout en mettant en avant une riche programmation d'événements littéraires, musicaux et culturels.

Name: Noka Matcha
Description:
En 2022, je pars à l'aventure pour la première fois de ma vie à l'autre bout du monde, seule, pour prendre le temps de me recentrer sur moi-même. Un voyage mouvementé et riche d'expériences qui m'a fait grandir. Mais surtout, il a fait naître un rêve : créer ma marque de Matcha.

Une marque qui mélangerait une identité visuelle forte et pétillante à l'excellence du savoir-faire traditionnel japonais.Nōka Matcha c'est donc un rêve, une magnifique aventure, pour vous proposer une sélection de matcha d'exception à travers une marque pleine de fraîcheur.

J'ai sélectionné pour vous des matchas d'exceptions récoltés en famille, au Japon, entre Nagasaki et Kagoshima. Le terroir de ces deux régions est réputé pour l’excellence de son matcha.

C'est le savoir-faire ancestral japonais au service de votre bien-être quotidien. Découvrez une expérience gustative unique qui vous fera voyager.

Name: Akali
Description:
2014 yılında Maçka’da küçük bir restoran olarak yola çıkan Akali, kısa sürede kendine özgü lezzetleriyle dikkat çekti. Menüye eklenen burgerler, misafirlerden büyük ilgi gördü ve bu ilgi Akali’yi bugün bildiğimiz butik burger markasına dönüştürdü.

Zaman içinde Etiler, Karaköy, Marmaris ve Bodrum gibi lokasyonlarda yeni şubeler açarak büyümeye devam etti. Her yeni adım, markanın hem yerel kimliğini hem de kalite anlayışını daha geniş bir kitleye ulaştırdı.

Bugün İstanbul’un farklı bölgelerinde hizmet veren Akali, 2025’in başında Mall of Istanbul şubesiyle bu yolculuğa yeni bir halka daha ekledi.

Bizim için her tabak, sadece bir yemek değil; emeğin, özenin ve sadeliğin birleşimidir. Misafirlerimize her zaman kaliteli, samimi ve özgün bir deneyim sunmak için buradayız.

Name: I Am Grounded
Description:
I Am Grounded is a social enterprise focused on adding value to coffee by-products, through upcycling the coffee fruit into nutritious and impactful snacks.

Every year, over 20 Billion KG of coffee fruit is discarded, resulting in significant environmental and social degradation. 

IAG is committed to solving this crisis through adding value to a currently discarded resource and educating and empowering by-product innovation. 

Our sustainable snacks are Antioxidant packed, have no added nasties, showcase only natural ingredients and are of course…delicious! 

Grab your box of impact snacks today! 
#Coffeeisafruit

Unsere Unternehmenskultur ist von Teamgeist und einer Hands-on Mentalität geprägt. Wir legen Wert auf klare Ziele und geben unseren MitarbeiterInnen Spielraum für eigene Ideen. Eine kollegiale motivierende Arbeitsatmosphäre, flache Hierarchien und fachliche Weiterentwicklungsmöglichkeiten spielen eine große Rolle für uns.

Wir als Teil der europäisch agierenden Atida-Gruppe sind eine der führenden Plattformen für digitale Gesundheitslösungen in Europa. Wir vereinen technologische Innovation mit pharmazeutischer Expertise, um das Wohlbefinden unserer Kunden in den Mittelpunkt zu stellen.

Name: Road Dog Coffee Company
Description:
At Road Dog Coffee Company, we're more than coffee roasters; we're revolutionaries of the road. Founded with a mission to honor the unsung heroes of America's highways, RDCC crafts its coffee blends that fuel truckers and anyone who supports and loves our trucking industry.

RDCC is steeped in the trucking culture. Our blends are designed to meet the unique needs of those who keep America moving. From long-haul truckers to logistics experts, our coffee is a salute to their relentless drive.

Our hand-picked beans from renowned global growers undergo meticulous roasting to achieve the perfect balance of robust flavor and caffeine kick. Whether it's a dark, medium, or light roast, each cup is a masterpiece of taste.

In an industry filled with overpriced and underwhelming options, RDCC stands out with its commitment to authenticity and quality. We're for those who crave a coffee that's as hardworking as they are. Our range includes signature blends like Black Dog, Long Haul, and Expedite, each tailored to suit different moments on the road. 

Whether you're a coffee aficionado or a road warrior, RDCC invites you to join our community. Experience a coffee brand that understands and celebrates your lifestyle.

Follow us to stay updated on our latest blends, initiatives, and stories from the road. Join us and be a part of something that's brewing a difference, one cup at a time.

Name: DotDot.Direct
Description:
DotDot is an ecommerce enablement business specifically created to help retailers of all sizes compete online as a supplement to their physical store and/or as an additional online offering to their current online presence.

DotDot enables loyal shoppers and trusted retailers to meet online, within the same community, but also across communities. 

We’ve put together an E-commerce hub to connect buyers and sellers who might not have crossed paths in the offline world.

Shoppers get to shop from local malls AND from malls in other parts of the country. 

What’s more interesting, they get to discover independent retailers at the same time. 

DotDot therefore expands consumers’ shopping baskets to include goods and services from trusted stores and service providers that were previously unavailable online.

Retailers get to expand their markets beyond their local catchment area and thanks to DotDot, they don’t need to be E-commerce experts. 

DotDot takes care of everything E-commerce and allows the retailer to focus on making high quality products available to their existing and expanding customer base.

Description:
Bestelbijdeauteur.nl is een online platform voor boeken die je als lezer rechtstreeks bij de auteur kunt bestellen. 

Lezers vinden hier bijzondere boeken en hebben rechtstreeks contact met de auteur. Boeken worden zichtbaarder en vindbaarder en auteurs verdienen meer aan hun eigen boek.

Op het online platform vind je ‘gewone’ boeken van uitgeverijen, zoals romans en informatieve boeken,  maar ook zelf uitgegeven boeken, e-books door bedrijven en kleinschalige uitgaven zoals scripties, onderzoeksverslagen en familiegeschiedenissen. Het zijn allemaal boeken die door de auteur zelf worden verkocht en verzonden.

Lezers bestellen het boek rechtstreeks bij de auteur.
Auteurs kunnen hun boek(en) zelf plaatsen en betalen daarvoor een eenmalige bijdrage.

Name: My Fair Book
Description:
My Fair Book est un site prescripteur et responsable de vente en ligne de livres neufs qui s’adresse aux lecteurs curieux et aux entreprises sensibles aux valeurs RSE. 
Parce qu’un livre n’a pas de date de péremption, My Fair Book déniche des pépites dans les stocks des éditeurs sans se soucier de l'actualité littéraire. Dans une logique d’économie circulaire et de réemploi, My Fair Book remet ainsi un coup de projecteur sur des titres afin de prolonger leur visibilité au nom de la bibliodiversité.

Tous les livres sont lus et finement sélectionnés puis remis en avant via une plateforme web éditorialisée ; via des animations en entreprises (cafés littéraires, interventions, bibliothèques d’entreprise personnalisées, pop up…) pour promouvoir la lecture en entreprise et sensibiliser sur le gaspillage dans le secteur de l’édition.

Face à une société de zapping, My Fair Book propose un projet engagé dans l'économie circulaire :
- Faire une pause, revenir sur des titres toujours disponibles et prendre le temps de partager ces découvertes littéraires via un contenu dynamique et thématique
- Vendre plus d’exemplaires par titre et favoriser ainsi les droits d'auteur
- Réduire le pilon

Pour nous suivre via la newsletter : https://urlr.me/8pYVg

Name: AGAuctionGallery
Description:
La nostra passione è anche la vostra, per questo abbiamo ideato il sito www.auctiongallery.it
La A.G. Auction Gallery è un’azienda giovane ma legata ad un lungo passato filatelico della famiglia Gazzi. Tutto ha avuto inzio nel lontano 1942 con la Filatelica Trentina per poi, con il passare degli anni, lasciare il posto alla Filasta che ben presto diventò un punto di riferimento tra le case d'asta filateliche italiane. Sul finire degli anni '70 poi nasceva la casa d'aste filatelica Alberto Gazzi con sede a Firenze e infine nei primi anni del 2000 venne acquisita l'Anonima Francobolli con sede a Milano.

Questo passato, con all’attivo più di 80 anni di commercio filatelico, ci ha permesso di approfondire l’esperienza e la conoscenza nel settore, consentendoci di acquisire quelle competenze necessarie per soddisfare le esigenze più diverse dei nostri affezionati Clienti.
Negli anni abbiamo selezionato centinaia di migliaia di lotti in più di 400 cataloghi d’asta, vere e proprie rarità ma anche francobolli e storia postale di minor pregio ma non per questo meno importanti per chi come voi è sempre alla ricerca del pezzo che completa la collezione.

Oggi, con questa nuova veste, vogliamo proseguire la tradizione in quello che per noi non solo è un lavoro, ma anche una grande passione.

Name: LoveReading
Description:
Reading books changes lives. Now buying books through the LoveReading online bookstore can change lives, too.

LoveReading, the UK’s leading book recommendation website, has launched an online bookshop with social purpose, in response to the book funding crisis in schools – in a move that’s been praised by the New Children’s Laureate.

Launched 17 years ago, LoveReading and LoveReading4Kids have since become a staple for readers looking for their next book.

Now, they have relaunched, enabling readers the ability to purchase books directly from the site, with 25% of the cover price being donated to a school, delivering better outcomes for the UK’s children. Readers will also receive 10% off the RRP on a huge selection of titles.

Recent research by the Centre for Literacy in Primary Education found that the school funding crisis means that 60% of classrooms have no access to a budget for new books.

Studies also show that reading and writing are key to unlocking a child’s learning potential and allows them to overcome a disadvantaged background.

Offering a socially conscious way to buy books online, LoveReading’s new venture will allow book buyers to actively support their local school. For books ordered and directly allocated to a particular school, the school will receive 25% of the cover price from each sale. When a sale is made and not attributed to a specific school, 10% of the cover price will go into a pot that will then be split between LoveReading’s school members, prioritising a percentage for schools in particular need and supporting pupils in deprived areas.

Go on, buy a book, support a school  and make a difference. 
Because books change lives.

www.lovereading.co.uk 
www.lovereading4kids.co.uk

Name: Klarsicht.online
Description:
„Klarsicht.online bietet eine komplett neues Modell. Partner-OptikerInnen können hier ihr Sortiment online anbieten und so allen KundInnen zugänglich machen. Was sonst nur im eigenen Store möglich ist, kann so im gesamten DACH-Raum angeboten und verkauft werden. Aktuell umfasst Klarsicht.online das Sortiment von mehr als 30 eigentümergeführten Optikerbetrieben. KundInnen können dadurch aus über 5.000 Modellen ihre Wunschbrille(n) auswählen. Diese bekommen sie dann von jenem Meisteroptikerbetrieb geliefert, der sie auf Klarsicht.online anbietet. So werden regionale Optikerbetriebe bei der Digitalisierung ihres Geschäfts unterstützt. Klarsicht.online bietet nicht nur die Plattform, sondern übernimmt ebenso das Shooting der Brillen, das Einpflegen des Sortiments in die Plattform, erstellt nötiges Werbematerial und bietet nachhaltige Mehrweg-Versandboxen für die Zusendung der Brillen an.

Name: Abogados Café
Description:
Welcome to the Twin Cities’ first Latina-owned coffee shop—and first law-themed in the US.
América Latina is here for you. Enjoy!

Our Story
Wife and husband team Ofelia & Inti are proud to bring you Abogados Café. As both abogados (lawyers) and native Hondurans with a passion for coffee and law, they wish to warmly invite you to the Latin American coffee experience. They decided to open Abogados Café in the beloved Como Park area because there is no coffee shop here. Their neighbors had been longing for a coffee shop for ages. 

One door after another opened up, making Ofelia & Inti realize that this wouldn’t be muy loco. Ofelia dreamed of opening a coffee shop when she lived in Honduras. Perhaps it was now a sign from God. But they didn’t want to open just another mainstream coffee shop. Blah. It needed to be an extension of themselves. Being unauthentic is not cool. Why not a law-themed, Latin American coffee shop?! 

So, after seventeen months of plans, applications, designs, construction, and inspections… cha cha cha! Here is Abogados Café for you. We are starting with a to-go espresso bar & mercadito. If there is customer demand we could expand to sit-down. Come check us out and tell us what you think!

Name: POT GANG
Description:
I set up Pot Gang back in 2020, delivering gardening kits across London during lockdown weekends in a rent-a-van. 5 years later, we've got gang members in all corners of the UK, delivering 10,000+ of our fruit, veg and herb growing boxes to customers each month.

We do this direct-to-consumer, largely on a subscription basis, and business-to-business, working with corporate wellbeing teams and also children via the public sector. 

Our sole aim is to help anyone successfully grow fruit, veg and herbs from home. Our monthly boxes contain absolutely everything beginners need to grow seasonal produce, with step-by-step instruction guides and personal support on WhatsApp. Done in a way that's the total opposite to what you expect from the gardening industry.

It's led to us being named The Sunday Times Best Gardening Subscription, having one of our boxes presented to King Charles, plus even collabing with Nike for Air Max Day.

I'm mega proud of how this has been achieved by a few twenty-somethings with no investment, external support, nor experience in the gardening industry. On we go.

Drop a follow on insta: @pot.gang or find us at: www.potgang.co.uk

Díky nadstandardním vztahům, které snimi máme, můžeme z jejich vín vybírat individuálně a podle našich vlastních kritérií ty nejzajímavější příběhy, chutě i vůně. Pro nás za každou lahví vždy stojí konkrétní vinař, jeho vinice, rodina. Jejich životní cesty se otiskují do zkvašených moštů vinné révy. Jsme garanty kvality vín vnašem portfoliu. Každé znich jsme osobně ve spolupráci se sommeliery ochutnali a v průběhu času také přechutnáváme, abychom si byli naprosto jistí, že je vtakové kondici, kterou požadujeme. Vína uchováváme a dovážíme videálních podmínkách z našeho pražského sklepa, kde je máme všechna skladem, doručujeme je již vden objednání a prodáváme za cenu stejnou jako vinař. Pořádáme tematické degustace, umělecká setkání a dodáváme do restaurací či společností. A zkušeně poradíme svýběrem, protože… kvalita je pro nás otázkou správného výběru. Více na www.umenivina.cz

Our founders have accumulated over 70 years of experience in e-commerce and digital solutions since 1998.

We pride ourselves on our unique problem-solving approach, inspired by Albert Einstein's philosophy. He once said that if he had only one hour to solve a problem, he would spend 55 minutes understanding the problem and reserve just 5 minutes for finding a solution. We've adopted a similar mindset in our CLAIN approach.

With CLAIN, we first deeply understand your short-term and long-term needs. Then, we explore if we can address those needs using the tools within the CLAIN approach, which stands for Copilot, Low code, AI-tools, and No code. This approach often allows us to solve problems 10 to 100 times faster than traditional methods.

In addition, we embrace a complementary strategy we refer to as 'Ghosts.' This strategy combines elements of outsourcing and nearsourcing, amplified for efficiency. Why limit yourself to a small team when we collaborate with the world's LARGEST network of freelancers, each specializing in various skills? Through our approach and network, we operate as a limitless, borderless organization, reducing unnecessary costs that would otherwise be passed on to the customer. This not only results in more cost-effective solutions but also faster delivery without bureaucratic hurdles.

Our services are available in both English and Swedish, and in the near future, we'll be able to accommodate any language with the assistance of AI. 

We also offer AI consultants on site that can help you with innovation inside your company, that helps you boost your intrapreneurial capital, organisational change and unleash their full potential with CLAIN method in their hands, boosting your innovation speed and giving competition hard times.

Name: The Scottish Bee Company
Description:
Passionate about pollinators.

We founded The Scottish Bee Company back in 2017 after long discussions about what we could do to help the environment. We always wanted to run a business that was socially and environmentally responsible and the more we read about the decline in bee numbers, the more we felt we needed to do something.

We started off by giving bees to beefarmers across Scotland in order to help them as there was no funding available to beefarmers. We increased bee numbers by 23 million but quickly learned that there many more types of pollinators that needed our help.

This led us to starting our sister charity, Repollinate.org.uk. 10p from every unit sold goes to this charity that aims to increase pollination through education programmes and wildflower projects.

Since then we have achieved multiple awards for our honey and are currently working hard to tackle the problem of honey fraud around the world.

We will always be a business with the environment and people in mind. We pay a living wage and have flexible working hours. We only use recycled or recyclable packaging. We source ethical honey, beeswax and scents and we always strive to learn more and be our best in all of these areas.

We are progressing to be much more of a Scottish Larder focusing on slow food and regenerative farming. The ingredients we use at The Scottish Bee Company are deeply connected to the soil, climate and environment that create them.

Description:

Bei uns findest du keine Massenware, sondern sorgfältig ausgewählte Stücke von Brands, die genauso ticken wie wir: Bio-Baumwolle, recycelte Materialien, vegan und fair gehandelt. Das ist Mode, die nicht nur dir, sondern auch den Menschen, die sie herstellen, und unserem Planeten guttut.

Unser Motto? "change the industry -save the planet". Wir glauben, dass weniger mehr ist. Deshalb setzen wir auf langlebige und hochwertige Kleidung, die nicht nach einer Saison im Müll landet.

Also, worauf wartest du noch? Stöber durch unser Sortiment und finde dein neues Lieblingsteil, das nicht nur stylisch ist, sondern auch ein Statement setzt. Für einen besseren Planeten, Stück für Stück.

Name: TurmaTube
Description:
Babytube é mais do que uma loja ou marca de brinquedos para bebês, é a realização de um sonho, na verdade… do meu sonho. Estou falando “MEU” porque quem está escrevendo esse texto sou mesma, a Viih e vocês já sabem que eu sempre quis ser mãe e eu criei essa marca, junto como Eli, pensando em oferecer o melhor pra minha filha. A ideia veio assim que descobrimos o sexo da Lua, mergulhamos de cabeça no mundo dos bebês para fazer o enxoval perfeito pra nossa pequena, pesquisamos e estudamos todos os itens, peças e brinquedos indispensáveis para cada fase dela. Algumas vezes tivemos uns momentos frustrantes porque, as vezes, era difícil encontrar  uma peça que reunia todas as características que queríamos e que julgávamos importante pra “tal” fase dela, então decidimos “vamos fazer o nosso brinquedo pra nossa Lua” e depois da ideia amadurecida, pensamos “por que não dividir isso com o nosso público?”

O nome Babytube foram vocês mesmos que deram (sem saber rsrs) Lembra quando ainda não sabíamos o sexo da Lua e todos se referiam a nossa filha como “Babytube”? E isso tão especial pra gente pois é isso que queremos, que vocês estejam presentes em todos os nossos momentos e agora com nossos “Babytubes” queremos estar presentes nos momentos mais especiais com os filhotes de vocês, dividindo a maternidade nas horas do banho, de sono, dos primeiros dentinhos, da introdução alimentar, do engatinhar…  

Toda a linha de brinquedos foi criada, pensada, escolhida a dedo por nós e vai ser lançada de acordo com as fases da nossa Lua (porque os brinquedos são pra ela também) 
Espero que vocês se apaixonem pelos nossos Babytubes, que eles proporcione para vocês (família) momentos de diversão, carinho e muito amor. Criamos tudo com todo amor então Babytube é de Mãe pra Mãe, de Pai pra Pai, de nossa família pra sua família.

Hierbei beantworten wir online alle verbleibenden Fragen der Kunden - auch Fragen, die nach dem Kauf aufkommen. 

Unsere Vision sieht das Fahrrad als bevorzugtes Fortbewegungsmittel und gleichberechtigten Verkehrsteilnehmer auf unseren Straßen neben Autos sowie Fußgängern. Um diese Vision in die Tat umzusetzen, sind wir stetig auf der Suche nach Talenten, die nicht nur das Thema Fahrrad leben und unsere Werte teilen, sondern uns auch auf der Reise zur ersten Anlaufstelle für Fahrräder in der Online-Welt begleiten möchten.

Name: The Meals Collective
Description:
Every week, over 1.4 billion meals are consumed in the UK — yet too many of these are shaped by short-term profits, not long-term value. 

The result? Poor-quality food, wasteful packaging, limited healthy options, and a resistance to change.

At The Meals Collective, we believe this can and needs to change.

Founded by Olly Pinder in 2022, our mission is simple but urgent: to create better meal occasions for both people and the planet.

We're here to challenge the status quo — to shift away from inertia and towards innovation that puts consumers and sustainability at the centre. By sharing insights, ideas, and experiences across the food system, we believe we can inspire meaningful, lasting impact.

The collective has now grown into a vibrant community of 100+ businesses who believe in our purpose and are striving to deliver change.

At the core of The Meals Collective is a consultancy — helping food businesses unlock smarter, faster innovation and growth.

Led by Olly, we work with retailers, brands, and startups to shape better product strategies, improve commercial performance, and respond to changing consumer needs.

Olly has been working at the forefront of the food industry since 2010, building a uniquely diverse career across innovation, commercial strategy, retail buying, and eCommerce.

He’s led transformation at start-ups, scale-ups and national retailers, including:

Scaling Gousto 10x in 3 years, helping the UK’s #1 recipe kit grow to 70,000 orders a week

Leading the Meals Mission at Co-op, transforming Meals across 2,500+ convenience stores and their quick-commerce channels

Managing major categories at Ocado, including Dairy, Produce, and Frozen

Whether you need hands-on delivery or strategic guidance, our approach is informed by real-time conversations and deep industry connectivity.

Name: LitJoy Crate
Description:
LitJoy Crate is a simple, creative, and easy way to read more and more often! We work with authors and publishers to create collector’s edition books and licensed merchandise. At our core we seek to cultivate connection and joy through stories. The growth that we have experienced over the years we attribute to our focus on creating amazing products that people want to buy.

LitJoy Crate was founded in 2016 by two women who love to read. It remains to this day a 100% female owned business. Our LitJoy employee family includes individuals from varied backgrounds who each thrive in our culture: an environment of creative thinking, communication, extreme ownership, and heart. 

Product and Community

LitJoy believes in helping readers build their personal library with beautiful books. Our book offerings often come with new artwork, signatures from the author, and LitJoy-exclusive content. In addition to books, we work with authors to create licensed merchandise that readers adore. 

LitJoy has worked with over 50 authors to bring their books to life. Some of our most successful partnerships include: 
•	Holly Black, author of The Cruel Prince
•	Cassandra Clare, author of The Mortal Instruments
•	Jay Kristoff, author of Nevernight
•	Sabaa Tahir, author of Ember in the Ashes
•	Laini Taylor, author of Strange the Dreamer
•	Victoria Aveyard, author of Red Queen

Other product offerings include special edition classic books and a quarterly fiction book box subscription called To Bee Read for fantasy and sci-fi readers. We strive for products that are useful and beautiful.

Ours is a community of readers. We embrace our collective enthusiasm for fictional worlds and characters! Readers can connect with us at #LitJoyCrate and @LitJoyCrate.

"Food is our common ground, a universal experience"

We believe that brands should be based around quality ingredients, attention to detail, consistency - as well as convenience. The formula for success in a delivery business is delivering high quality food, consistently, in the fastest and most convenient manner.

Name: A&W (Malaysia) Sdn Bhd
Description:
A&W was started by Frank Wright who partnered with Roy Allen in June 1919, to help Wright with the root beer business he started that year. The company became famous in the United States for its “frosty mugs,” where the mug would be kept in the freezer prior to being filled with RB and served to the customer.

In 1963, A&W made Malaysian history when it became the first fast food restaurant to open in the country.

This was followed in 1965 with the first Drive-in restaurant in Petaling Jaya.

For more than half a century, the brand has etched itself into the hearts of Malaysians with its famed and distinguished root beer, floats, burgers, ice cream waffles and its beloved mascot, Rooty the Bear. It would go on to be a brand with which Malaysians from all walks of life would grow to love, creating deeply rooted memories with friends and loved ones.

A pioneer in the Malaysian fast food industry, the brand now has conceptualized plans to leverage on its rich heritage and legacy in Malaysia to make a big comeback to relive its glory days, reclaiming the hearts and minds of a new generation of discerning consumers.

A&W Malaysia was bought over by Eng Food Group, with an aggressive expansion drive to revamp and expand its reach. Currently, A&W operates a total of 104 outlets around the country. 

Join Our Flavorful Family!

Are you a seasoned leader with a passion for delectable food and the ability to inspire and lead a dynamic team? If you believe that good food truly starts with great people, then you're the perfect fit for our A&W family!

In Canada, No Days Wasted sells DHM Blend (NHP capsules) and Hydration Replenisher (Food Product - drink mix).

DHM Detox (USA) is the better way to celebrate. It helps consumers bounce back after socializing and celebrating the moment so they can get back to doing what they love the next day. This product is for high-performers and helps them achieve balance. 

Hydration Replenisher (USA) is an electrolyte drink mix that helps rehydrate and provides a source of sodium, potassium, Vitamin C, D, zinc and B-Complex.

Sleep Assist (USA) is a magnesium-based supplement that helps promote relaxation and manage your circadian rhythm with the use of Magnesium L-Threonate, Magnesium Bisglycinate, Apigenin and L-Theanine.

No Days Wasted products are distributed by NDW Labs Inc.

Name: Drink Dong
Description:
La consigne va sonner à votre porte !

𝗗𝗿𝗶𝗻𝗸 𝗗𝗼𝗻𝗴 = 𝘀𝗲𝗿𝘃𝗶𝗰𝗲 𝗕𝘁𝗼𝗖 𝗱𝗲 𝗹𝗶𝘃𝗿𝗮𝗶𝘀𝗼𝗻 𝗲𝘁 𝗱𝗲 𝗿𝗲́𝗰𝘂𝗽𝗲́𝗿𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻 𝗱𝗲 𝗯𝗼𝗶𝘀𝘀𝗼𝗻𝘀 𝗲𝗻 𝗲𝗺𝗯𝗮𝗹𝗹𝗮𝗴𝗲𝘀 𝗰𝗼𝗻𝘀𝗶𝗴𝗻𝗲́𝘀 > 𝘣𝘰𝘶𝘵𝘦𝘪𝘭𝘭𝘦𝘴 𝘦𝘯 𝘷𝘦𝘳𝘳𝘦 + 𝘧𝘶̂𝘵𝘴 𝘳𝘦́𝘶𝘵𝘪𝘭𝘪𝘴𝘢𝘣𝘭𝘦𝘴

 𝗨𝗻 𝗠𝗔𝗫 𝗱𝗲 𝗯𝗼𝗻 𝘀𝗲𝗻𝘀 𝗽𝗼𝘂𝗿 𝗱𝗶𝗿𝗲 𝗦𝗧𝗢𝗣 𝗮𝘂 𝗽𝗹𝗮𝘀𝘁𝗶𝗾𝘂𝗲 !

Description:
Ackerherz ist Deutschlands schnellst wachsender Online Bio-Supermarkt für Mitglieder. Ähnlich zu einer Einkaufs-Genossenschaft bieten wir unseren Mitgliedern leckere Bio-Lebensmittel wesentlich günstiger an. Dadurch ermöglichen wir, dass sich mehr Menschen Bio-Lebensmittel leisten können  

Ackerherz ist die deutsche Expansion vom französischem Scaleup La Fourche. Mit über 100,000 Mitgliedern und 300 Mitarbeitenden ist La Fourche Marktführer im Online Bio-Segment in Frankreich. La Fourche wurde vor über 5 Jahre gegründet, hat eine gesicherte Finanzierung und wächst weiterhin stetig. Mit Ackerherz wird das Erfolgsmodell nun nach Deutschland gebracht 

Wir bieten dir somit die Chance, bei uns die Dynamik eines Startups mit der Erfahrung eines erfolgreichen Scaleups zu kombinieren. Wir sind auf der Suche nach hungrigen Teamplayern, die Lust haben, gemeinsam etwas aufzubauen. Wenn du Lust hast, viel Verantwortung zu übernehmen und mit deiner Arbeit einen merkbaren Impact zu haben, freuen wir uns riesig über deine Bewerbung

Name: Nutrimaster
YouBeDo.com
Description:
YouBeDo stands for: YOU can make a difference, BE the change, DO it now!

Our dream:
We are dreaming of a world that is fair and righteous. At times, this seems impossible to achieve but we are trying to accomplish this dream by creating new flows of money. This money -we like to look at it as 'oxygen'- will end up with charity organisations that work hard to increase the quality of human lives and the stability of our environment.

How we do it?
We create new flows of money by donating 10% of every purchase to charity. Our customers have the freedom to select the cause to which they wish to donate. Its actually very simple.

Books that 'do good':
YouBeDo.com sells the same books and e-books for the same price and with the same terms and conditions as other retailers. Our customers do not pay anything extra and can decide which charity organisation they want to support. Buy a book and give to charity at the same time.

This way we create new flows of money that move into the right direction.

Name: LASCANA
Description:
True to our credo 'It's a woman's world', we have created a unique world of our own for women to feel comfortable in right from the start - not only when wearing fashionable swimwear, but also when in need of a “second skin” in everyday situations, during workouts or for those special moments in a woman's life. 

Since its launch in 2006, the LASCANA philosophy has been to respond to the individual needs of women and to give them every reason to feel as comfortable in their bodies as they should. Our aim is to bring today’s fashion spirit and the many requirements to be met by lingerie and swimwear in line by offering perfect fit and support as well as a wide range of cuts and styles to choose from. Our customers should not just feel good in their own bodies, they should feel amazing. This is why LASCANA offers a large selection of styles to fit any body shape and taste preference, ensuring to meet all customer needs. 

Since being launched, the brand has adopted a consistent, award-winning multi-channel strategy featuring four interconnected sales channels: the LASCANA online shop, over-the-counter LASCANA stores and LASCANA shop-in-shops as well as LASCANA catalogues. LASCANA stands for top quality and perfect fit. Next to the own brand LASCANA, well-known licensed brands such as Marie Claire, s.Oliver, Venice Beach, Bench, Buffalo or Jette add an exclusive note, thus complementing the product range. 

LASCANA continues global expansion. The company is present on the German market with more than 30 own-brand stores, outlets, 1000 shop-in-shop areas and an online shop. Expansion into Scandinavia, France, the Benelux countries, Great Britain, China, Russia and the US has begun – other countries are to follow. 

Want to know more about LASCANA?

Description: Two Chicks brings innovative, convenient, healthier, egg-based products to market. Name: Kube
Description:
Kube est LA start-up livre innovante ! 
Box littéraire personnalisée sur mesure, Kube a pour mission de (re)donner le plaisir de lire et rend les conseils des libraires indépendants disponibles n'importe où et n'importe quand. 

Notre marque de fabrique est la box mensuelle Kube : renseignez chaque mois une envie lecture et vous recevrez un livre conseillé sur mesure par un libraire, avec plein de surprises !
Nous proposons également des Coffrets Livres en édition limitée, axés autour d'une thématique (Feel Good, Polar, Grèce, Contes et Légendes du monde entier...). Le cadeau parfait pour ses proches, pour soi-même, ou pour ses collaborateurs·ices. 

Travailler chez Kube c’est participer au développement d’une start-up en pleine croissance et rejoindre une équipe dynamique, ambitieuse et passionnée. Suivez notre page pour ne pas manquer nos prochains recrutements ! 

Vous êtes éditeur ou entreprise ? Kube s'adapte à vos envies et à vos besoins ! Contactez notre responsable des partenariats  estelle@lakube.com

Name: Refriango RDC
Description:
Refriango RDC est une filiale de la firme portugaise Nuvi Group spécialisée dans la production et la distribution de boissons gazeuses, jus, eaux, boissons énergisantes et boissons alcoolisées.

Établie en RDC depuis 2023, la société y construit son usine de fabrication de boissons à Kinshasa, dans la zone économique de Maluku, sur une étendue de 15 hectares afin d'offrir des boissons de meilleure qualité pour le bien être des consommateurs Congolais.

Refriango RDC s'introduit avec un portefeuille de 16 marques, dont certaines sont déja leaders sur le marché angolais dans leurs segments respectifs, les boissons gazeuses BLUE & RED, la boisson énergisante SPEED, les jus NUTRY et TUTTI, les bières TIGRA, les vins GAIVOTA, la sangria TROPICANA, et enfin le cidre JADE.

Leader sur le marché des boissons en Angola, Refriango y possède l'une des plus grandes unités industrielles du continent africain, avec 42 hectares, 3000 travailleurs et une technologie de pointe aux normes des meilleures usines de boissons du monde. Avec une capacité de production de 1,9 milliards de litres par an, l'usine de production en Angola dispose de 27 lignes de remplissage pour tous types de conditionnements répondant à plus de 160 produits.

L’expansion de Refriango en RDC témoigne de son engagement à soutenir la croissance économique, à contribuer au développement durable de la RDC et à répondre aux besoins des consommateurs dans la région.

Name: Casa Rio Verde
Description:
RIO VERDE: Paixão pelo Vinho

NOSSA MISSÃO Há mais de 20 anos no mercado, a Casa Rio Verde tem como missão divulgar a cultura do vinho. Transformar o maior número possível de consumidores de vinhos em “conhecedores de vinhos”.

GARANTIA DE PROCEDÊNCIA E CONFIABILIDADE Nossos produtos têm a garantia da Casa Rio Verde: uma empresa que conquistou a confiança do público consumidor de Minas Gerais, pela procedência e qualidade dos produtos, assim como pela conduta ética na condução dos negócios ao longo dos anos.

A MAIOR PROPORÇÃO DE VINHOS PONTUADOS DE TODO O MERCADO Grande parte dos vinhos de trabalho da Casa Rio Verde recebem pontuação superior a 81 pontos em 100, pelas publicações estrangeiras “Wine Spectator” e “Wine Advocate”, esta dirigida pelo crítico de vinhos Robert Parker. Confira na ficha técnica de cada vinho, quais já foram avaliados e aprovados por essas duas famosas publicações internacionais.

PREÇOS BAIXOS Temos um princípio que deve ser obedecido: toda vez que colocamos uma garrafa de vinho à venda, ela deverá valer mais, às vezes muito mais, do que o seu preço de venda. A isso chamamos relação preço/qualidade.

GARANTIA DE PROCEDÊNCIA E CONFIABILIDADE Nossos produtos têm a garantia da Casa Rio Verde: uma empresa que conquistou a confiança do público consumidor de Minas Gerais, pela procedência e qualidade dos produtos, assim como pela ética na condução dos negócios ao longo dos anos.

Name: HERE-O
Description:
WHAT MAKES OUR DONUTS SUPER?

 HEROICALLY HANDMADE 
There's love in our donuts!

One of the things that makes our donuts so good is the love that goes into them. Love only possible through the attentive nature of our entirely handmade process. The attention we put into ensuring our sourdough starter yeast is fermented to perfection, through to making all our glazes and fillings from scratch, all lead to a donut you can’t help but love.

 EXTRAORIDNARILY ORIGINAL
Iconic. Bold. Like all heroes!

We aim for originality and perfection in the execution of our iconic donuts. The signature donuts on our menu are the result of graft and craft. Our chief bakers possess donut making superpowers and pour every ounce of their creativity into delivering the goods when it comes to daring donut perfection.

 INCREDIBLE INGREDIENTS
Jaw dropping! Mouth watering!

We take as much pride in the originality of our donut flavours, as we do in the selection of our ingredients. Simply put, they are the finest and freshest you'll find in a donut! With an emphasis on working with local suppliers we've an opulent array of luxurious ingredients at our disposal - utilised to deliver the freshest, most iconic, delectable donuts.

 OH! AND THE... DOUGH
Putting the Oh! in the sourdough

Our sourdough and the process in its creation is what puts the oh! in our donuts. Everything about our heroic donuts stand against the nemesis of pre-mixed commercial doughs dispensed straight into the fryer.

The slow fermentation process of the sour dough ‘starter’ gives our donuts a spectacular flavour and texture.

Airy but chewy – not only do they taste GOOD, but they are good for you too! Just like other fermented foods, sourdough is a gut-healing food, because it provides the body with beneficial bacteria. It is also more easily digested due to the fermented grain’s nutrients being more readily available for digestion. Super!

Name: Raiz
Description:
At Raiz, we believe another way of growing food is possible. Welcome to the urban farming evolution. 

We're building a network of vertical farms in city centres with a hybrid energy and a decentralized funding model.

Focusing on the principles of circularity and sustainability, our vertical farms produce a wide variety of flavourful fresh herbs & veggies.

We are creating a climate-resilient, decentralized food system.

Name: Sweet Creme Pakistan
Description:
Every dessert trip with his kids left a father — a LUMS grad and devoted dad — thinking, why is it so hard to find soft serve that’s actually good?

Too many artificial flavors. Cones too bright to be natural. Hygiene that raised more questions than comfort.

In 2018, driven by love for his son and a deep sense of care, he decided to change that. What started as a mission to find real, clean, and delicious soft serve for his own child quickly grew into something greater — a purpose to bring premium, quality soft serve to all the children of Pakistan.

That’s how Sweet Creme was born — a brand built on 100% real dairy, thoughtfully chosen ingredients, and a family-friendly space where parents could feel at ease.

We started small: one outlet, five people, and a dream rooted in love.

Our Blizzards — rich, creamy soft serve swirled with cookies, brownies, and chocolate chunks — quickly became a fan favorite. A treat that felt exciting, satisfying, and above all, real.

This wasn’t just about dessert anymore. It became about giving kids across Pakistan the experience they deserve — something crafted with care, made in clean environments, and full of real goodness.

It began with a dad’s love for his son. Today, it’s a brand trusted by families across the country.

Sweet Creme —
Real ingredients. Real care. Real good.
Made for our kids — and yours.

Description:
The number 1 shopping platform in Swiss off-price e-commerce

Name: EASURE SCRUBS
Description:
Designed by healthcare providers, we understand the importance of comfort and style in our daily work attire. That's why we created EASURE Scrubs. Our team understands the unique needs of healthcare professionals like you. We believe that your work attire should not only meet the highest standards of quality but also reflect your personal style and provide unmatched comfort like women scrub pants throughout your demanding day.
OUR MISSION
At EASURE Scrubs, we bring modern and innovative technology solutions to the forefront of our designs. We are committed to revolutionizing healthcare fashion. EASURE Scrubs is more than just a brand; it's a commitment to providing healthcare professionals with the highest quality, stylish, and comfortable scrubs. We don’t just offer quality products; we also strive to empower underprivileged individuals by equipping them with the resources needed to enhance their lives and contribute to their families and communities
Woven With Care And Innovation
We made a simple observation: the Men's scrubs top uniforms worn by those on the frontlines of healthcare often fell short of their needs. Discomfort, limited mobility, and a lack of style seemed to be the norm. We knew there had to be a better way. Created by healthcare professionals, our founders saw firsthand the challenges faced by medical professionals. Long shifts in ill-fitting scrubs led to fatigue and discomfort, impacting performance and morale. There was a gap just waiting to be filled, and thus, Easure was
created.
FABRIC INNOVATION
EASURE Scrubs revolutionizes healthcare fashion. Our scrubs are designed with modern technology for unparalleled comfort during long shifts. Our scrubs are crafted with anti-wrinkle properties, ensuring that you always look polished and professional, no matter how busy your schedule gets. We also prioritize your safety and well-being.

Name: Les Toques Blanches du Monde

LES TOQUES BLANCHES DU MONDE

Nous sommes une marque lyonnaise spécialisée dans l’alimentaire gourmet de terroir. 
Notre ambition est de vous faire découvrir des références signatures d’une région emblématique et d’un savoir-faire artisanal. 

Nous avons à cœur de redonner du sens et de l’authenticité au bien manger tout en préservant le patrimoine culinaire français et européen. Pour ce faire, nous accompagnons des producteurs et des artisans passionnés, valorisons leur histoire et leurs produits pour les rendre accessibles au plus grand monde.

Acheter les Toques Blanches du monde, c’est soutenir nos maîtres artisans, préserver des terroirs authentiques, et valoriser le goût !

Sélectionné #Saveurdel'année 2024

Name: Running Warehouse
Description:
Running Warehouse is America’s Finest Running Specialty Store. Our customers are dedicated runners who care about the sport and are looking for the latest products to help them perform at peak levels. We carefully select every product we carry, with the goal of offering only those products that will benefit athletes, competitors, and people who are serious about the sport of running.

We carry running shoes from Nike, adidas, Altra, Asics, Brooks, INOV8, La Sportiva, Merrell, Mizuno, Montrail, New Balance, Newton, The North Face, Pearl Izumi, Salomon, Saucony and Zoot. We also carry running apparel from most of these brands along with BOA, Craft, CWX, GORE Running, Moving Comfort, Sugoi, Under Armour and 2XU. In the running accessories category, look to us for the latest in GPS watches, run watches, heart rate monitors, nutrition, hats and gloves, socks, and many other items to improve your running experience.

We are committed to selecting educated, engaged staff members with a passion for running. If you are interested in a career with us, please get in touch online or apply in person in our retail store located at 181 Suburban Road in San Luis Obispo.

Name: bluu
Description:
Es begann mit einem Waschstreifen - die plastikfreie, nachhaltige und kompakte Lösung beim Wäschewaschen.

Zum Glück waren nicht nur wir von dieser Idee begeistert. Somit haben wir neben unseren Waschstreifen mittlerweile eine Vielzahl weiterer nachhaltiger Produkte zum Waschen und Reinigen in unserem Sortiment.

Man erkennt uns leicht an den funky Namen, denn wir sind davon überzeugt, dass es viel mehr Spass macht mit einem "silvertrooper" oder mit "calcbusters" den Haushalt zu erledigen, als mit einem "Hygienetuch" oder "Entkalker".

Wer sich für bluu entscheidet, entscheidet sich auch für einen gesünderen und plastikfreien Planeten. Und unterstützt zusätzlich mit jeder Bestellung unseren Partner "Viva con Agua", der sich unter anderem für weltweit sauberes Trinkwasser einsetzt.

Du möchtest auch unkompliziert und mit gutem Gewissen deine Wäsche und deinen Haushalt sauber halten?
Dann freuen wir uns, dich in der #bluucommunity willkommen zu heissen!

Name: Tập đoàn Hải Sản Hoàng Gia
Description:
VỀ HẢI SẢN HOÀNG GIA (HSHG):
HSHG tiền thân là một doanh nghiệp xuất nhập khẩu thủy hải sản ra đời năm 2002. Sau 22 năm hoạt động, HSHG đang đồng hành cùng hơn 2.000 nhà hàng khách sạn trên khắp cả nước. Từ năm 2020, HSHG phát triển thành chuỗi siêu thị hải sản và nhà hàng ẩm thực nhằm phục vụ tốt hơn nữa nhu cầu thưởng thức hải sản của người dân.
Với khẩu hiệu “Tươi ngon từ nguồn”, HSHG mang những con hải sản tươi ngon nhất từ mọi vùng biển trên thế giới về phục vụ người Việt cùng trải nghiệm thưởng thức hải sản tốt nhất. HSHG đang trên hành trình cải tiến, nâng tầm chất lượng mỗi ngày để trở thành thương hiệu hải sản tươi sống số 1 Đông Nam Á, góp phần nâng tầm ẩm thực biển Việt Nam và Thế giới.
Mỗi thành viên của HSHG là một đại sứ ẩm thực biển Việt Nam và thế giới, mang lại bữa ăn hạnh phúc, sum vầy cho mọi gia đình, mang lại cuộc sống chất lượng hơn, thịnh vượng hơn cho khách hàng, đội ngũ và đối tác. 
6 giá trị cốt lõi: Học hỏi | Cam kết | Chia sẻ | Tiên phong | Tận tâm | Trung thực
5 tính cách thương hiệu: Năng động | Thân thiện | Tiên phong | Tin cậy | Quốc tế

HÃY ĐẾN VỚI HSHG NẾU BẠN ĐANG TÌM KIẾM:
- Một công việc không chỉ để có thu nhập, mà còn là hành trình trưởng thành mỗi ngày.
- Một doanh nghiệp không chỉ cung cấp sản phẩm và dịch vụ, mà còn thực hiện sứ mệnh nâng tầm ẩm thực biển.
- Một đội ngũ không chỉ gắn kết và chuyên nghiệp, mà còn sống cùng hoài bão vươn tầm khu vực.
Location: Tân Phong, Ho Chi Minh City

Name: Italian Wine Merchants
Description:
Italian Wine Merchants (IWM) is a premier wine retailer and collector resource based in New York City, specializing in rare and hard-to-source wines with a focus on Italy. Founded and led by renowned wine authority Sergio Esposito, IWM offers curated wine collections, expert portfolio management, and tailored tasting experiences.

Whether you’re a seasoned collector or a curious enthusiast, IWM provides personalized guidance—from palate analysis to cellar planning—helping clients build balanced portfolios of everyday wines, age-worthy collectibles, and show-stopping bottles. Every wine is guaranteed for provenance and condition, and stored in optimal, temperature-controlled conditions.

With a retail store and private event space in NYC, and services extending across the U.S., IWM is dedicated to wine education, discovery, and appreciation.

Name: HERE-O
Description:
WHAT MAKES OUR DONUTS SUPER?

 HEROICALLY HANDMADE 
There's love in our donuts!

One of the things that makes our donuts so good is the love that goes into them. Love only possible through the attentive nature of our entirely handmade process. The attention we put into ensuring our sourdough starter yeast is fermented to perfection, through to making all our glazes and fillings from scratch, all lead to a donut you can’t help but love.

 EXTRAORIDNARILY ORIGINAL
Iconic. Bold. Like all heroes!

We aim for originality and perfection in the execution of our iconic donuts. The signature donuts on our menu are the result of graft and craft. Our chief bakers possess donut making superpowers and pour every ounce of their creativity into delivering the goods when it comes to daring donut perfection.

 INCREDIBLE INGREDIENTS
Jaw dropping! Mouth watering!

We take as much pride in the originality of our donut flavours, as we do in the selection of our ingredients. Simply put, they are the finest and freshest you'll find in a donut! With an emphasis on working with local suppliers we've an opulent array of luxurious ingredients at our disposal - utilised to deliver the freshest, most iconic, delectable donuts.

 OH! AND THE... DOUGH
Putting the Oh! in the sourdough

Our sourdough and the process in its creation is what puts the oh! in our donuts. Everything about our heroic donuts stand against the nemesis of pre-mixed commercial doughs dispensed straight into the fryer.

The slow fermentation process of the sour dough ‘starter’ gives our donuts a spectacular flavour and texture.

Airy but chewy – not only do they taste GOOD, but they are good for you too! Just like other fermented foods, sourdough is a gut-healing food, because it provides the body with beneficial bacteria. It is also more easily digested due to the fermented grain’s nutrients being more readily available for digestion. Super!

Name: MAY & CO.
Description:
MAY & CO. crafts a range of essential bar quality syrups & shrubs in small batches using real ingredients to help you enjoy a world of better drinks. We aim to simplify the art of making cocktails, so you can enjoy delicious cocktails easily at home! Our syrups are made using only real ingredients that are fresh & locally sourced, so you get the most authentic flavour. No artificial flavours - ever.

CREATIVITY MEETS TRANSPARENCY
With MAY & CO., you know exactly what you’re getting- authentic cocktail syrups & shrubs that are never over processed or artificially flavoured. Handcrafted only from real ingredients.

HOW WE CAME ABOUT
Cocktails today are no longer Plain Janes. Right from Generation Y to the millennials, theres a growing need & appreciation for high quality, fuss free, experimental cocktails.

So we went about on a journey - that of concocting a product that is perfectly balanced, honest, no nonsense & straight forward. After extensive research, recipe creations, taste tests, endless discussions, we finally arrived at a concoction that is a perfect balance. A concoction that gives you a high quality cocktail. Every. Single. Time.

REAL. HONEST. AUTHENTIC.
All of our ingredients are carefully sourced from local farms and then handcrafted into custom-blended syrups & shrubs. All in small batches. Our ingredients come from farms that have been passed down for generations & are masterfully grown & harvested with labour of love. Each of these ingredients are carefully chosen & procured after endless tastings of the abundant species available across the country, giving you a product that is honest, real and as close as it can get to tasting a real fruit.

Name: Sip Tequila
Description:
SIP TEQUILA - ULTRA-PREMIUM TEQUILAS DELIVERED DIRECT TO YOUR DOOR

At Sip Tequila we have set out to redefine the online tequila purchasing experience with the launch of siptequila.com, a direct-to-consumer (DTC) platform focused on bringing hand-curated, super-premium, and boutique tequilas to market in the U.S.

Name: Doctibike
Description:
Doctibike is a French start-up with a team of enthusiasts, specialising in electric batteries for active, gentle and sustainable mobility. Our core business ? The repair and reconditioning of lithium-ion batteries, which equip the majority of electrically assisted vehicles such as scooters, bicycles, scooters and electric motorbikes. Thanks to our expertise, we save around 20,000 electric bikes and scooters from the scrap heap every year! Because while cyclists keep their bikes for an average of 13 years, the life of a battery is only about 4 years... Every day, our technicians check the general state of health of the batteries, carry out the minor repairs necessary for them to function properly or refurbish them by replacing the energy cells contained inside.

When repair or reconditioning is not possible, Doctibike offers two-wheeler users the opportunity to replace their battery with a new one, to buy a new charger or bike accessories. More than 2,500 products are available on our online shop, selected from the biggest brands: Impulse, Bosch, Yamaha, Panasonic, Shimano ... And many more !
