Name: Grupo Supernorte
Description: A história do SUPERNORTE começou com um sonho, e deste sonho nasceu um grande projeto que se tornou realidade com muito trabalho e determinação.  Foram anos de muita dedicação e empenho de todos que participaram do projeto, principalmente dos sócios que investiram e acreditaram. E finalmente, depois de alguns anos, a cidade de TUCURUÍ foi prestigiada com um novo empreendimento varejista, surgindo então o Supermercados do Norte do Brasil, o SUPERNORTE, com sua inauguração realizada em 15 de Setembro de 2005.  Focado em oferecer aos clientes de TUCURUÍ atendimento diferenciado, mix de produtos e serviços de alta qualidade, aliado ao conforto, preços competitivos e formado por uma equipe com experiência de vários anos de mercado, que juntos decidiram mergulhar de corpo de alma nesse novo desafio, com ousadia para cumprir os objetivos e metas propostas pelos seus idealizadores.

Name: Catavento Distribuidora de Livros
Description:
A Catavento foi criada há 59 anos com a missão clara de ser uma organização a serviço do livro.

Uma missão como essa não se restringe apenas ao papel de intermediador entre editoras e livreiros, mas se estende ao compromisso de enxergar em cada editora e autor o valor inestimável que é conceber um livro, e premia-los buscando em cada ponto de venda existente, uma oportunidade, um espaço para leva-lo até o leitor. E por esse compromisso, a essa empresa tem hoje em seu acervo, mais de 500 editoras e uma operação ampla que cobre mais de 1.100 pontos de venda entre livrarias e pontos alternativos.
A Catavento Distribuidora de Livros busca acompanhar as novas realidades mantendo as bases que propiciaram seus mais de 50 anos de existência: seriedade, transparência e a crença no livro como produto e instrumento de transformação do ser humano.

Name: mtc commerce GmbH
Description:
Wir sind ein digitales Startup im spannenden Direct-to-Consumer Bereich. Sagt Dir nichts? Macht nichts! Wir entwerfen, prototypen und produzieren Interior-Produkte nach unseren individuellen Vorstellungen, und geben ihnen anschließend ein Zuhause in einer unserer eigenen Markenkreationen! Kein langweiliger E-Commerce Handel also, sondern alles, was das Produkt- und Markenherz im Interior und Dekobereich begehrt!

Seit unserer Gründung im Jahr 2018 haben wir bereits zwei eigene Marken entwickelt und erfolgreich in über 6 Ländern etabliert. Mit der gesamten Wertschöpfungskette in unseren eigenen Händen - von der Idee über die Produktentwicklung bis hin zum Vertrieb, der Vermarktung und dem Kundenservice - sind wir in der Lage, einzigartige Produkterlebnisse zu schaffen. Und jetzt brauchen wir deine Hilfe, um unser Geschäft auf das nächste Level zu bringen!

Vom Hauptsitz in Berlin aus steuern wir so den Markenaufbau und die Sortimentserweiterung von mehr als 35 Produkten in aktuell 6 Länder in der EU. Bei unser Expansion in die USA und und dem weiteren Ausbau benötigen wir jetzt deine Unterstützung!

Name: Zorbas Group
Description:
Ο Όμιλος Ζορπάς είναι ένας από τους ταχύτερα αναπτυσσόμενους ομίλους στην Κύπρο με παρουσία και στην Αμερική. Ξεκίνησε ως ένας μικρός οικογενειακός φούρνος στο χωριό Αθηένου, στη Λάρνακα το 1975 και μέχρι σήμερα, σχεδόν 50 χρόνια μετά, ανέπτυξε διαφορετικά brands που επεκτείνονται σε όλη την Κύπρο και το εξωτερικό, παρέχοντας ποιοτικές επιλογές και τοποθετώντας πάντα στο επίκεντρο τον άνθρωπο.
 
Ο Όμιλος Ζορπάς συμπεριλαμβάνει τους Φούρνους Ζορπάς, τα ζαχαροπλαστεία Pralina Confectioneries, τα πολυβραβευμένα εστιατόρια Pralina Experience, το ιταλικό εστιατόριο Pinolo, τις καφετέριες Coffee Berry, τα παγωτά Κayak, τα καταστήματα The French Workshop στη Νέα Υόρκη και το Ίδρυμα ΜΑΖΙ.

The Zorbas Group is one of the fastest-growing groups in Cyprus, with a presence in the USA. It started as a small family bakery in the village of Athienou in Larnaca in 1975 and, almost 50 years later, it has successfully developed different brands that have expanded throughout Cyprus and abroad, providing quality choices and always putting people at the center. 
Zorbas Group is mainly based on growth and innovation, has a people-oriented character with more than 3.000 employees, and has cultivated a family culture of mutual respect and equal opportunities. 

Members of the Zorbas Group are the brands Zorbas Bakeries, Pralina Confectioneries & Experience, Pinolo, Coffee Berry, The French Workshop, Kayak, and the MAZI Foundation.

Description:
شركة الكمان العالمية المحدودة:
شركة رائدة في مجال تصدير التمور منذ عام 2014
والموزع الحصري والشريك لعدة شركات أوروبية داخل المملكة العربية السعودية لمنتجات المواد الغذائية الصحية
مقرها الرئيسي في مدينة الرياض ولديها فروع متعددة في أرجاء المملكة العربية السعودية
شركة الكمان العالمية المحدودة:
خبرة واسعة في مجال تصدير التمور:
 تأسست الشركة عام 2014، ولديها خبرة واسعة في مجال تصدير التمور إلى مختلف أنحاء العالم.
جودة عالية: 
تلتزم الشركة بأعلى معايير الجودة في جميع مراحل الإنتاج والتغليف.
تنوع المنتجات: 
تقدم الشركة مجموعة واسعة من أنواع التمور، بما في ذلك التمور الطازجة والمجففة والمعلبة.
أسعار تنافسية:
 تقدم الشركة أسعارًا تنافسية لمنتجاتها عالية الجودة.
خدمة عملاء ممتازة: 
تقدم الشركة خدمة عملاء ممتازة لضمان رضا العملاء.
المنتجات:
التمور: تقدم الشركة مجموعة واسعة من أنواع التمور، بما في ذلك التمور الطازجة والمجففة والمعلبة.
منتجات المواد الغذائية الصحية: 
توزع الشركة منتجات المواد الغذائية الصحية من عدة شركات أوروبية رائدة.
الفروع:
المقر الرئيسي: مدينة الرياض
فروع متعددة في أرجاء المملكة العربية السعودية
شركة الكمان العالمية المحدودة هي الخيار الأمثل لتصدير التمور والحصول على منتجات المواد الغذائية الصحية عالية الجودة.
إضافات:
الشريك لعدة شركات أوروبية: تُعد شركة الكمان العالمية المحدودة شريكًا موثوقًا به لعدة شركات أوروبية رائدة في مجال المواد الغذائية الصحية.
التزام بالمسؤولية الاجتماعية: تلتزم الشركة بالمسؤولية الاجتماعية من خلال دعم العديد من المبادرات والجمعيات الخيرية.
الابتكار: تسعى الشركة دائمًا إلى الابتكار وتطوير منتجاتها وخدماتها لتلبية احتياجات العملاء بشكل أفضل.
شركة الكمان العالمية المحدودة هي شركة رائدة في مجالها وتسعى دائمًا إلى التميز في جميع مجالات عملها.

Name: GORGIE
Description:
Meet your new best friend! GORGIE, an energy drink with benefits from a brand with benefits.


A Community, a brand, a platform on a mission to make wellness fun! We believe that wellness, energy, supplements and good for you products should no longer be a sacrifice in taste, vibe or aesthetic.  We are a brand with benefits creating beverages with benefits, and we are starting with ENERGY.

What started out as a product for intense fitness performance is now evolving to become a go-to want and need for all day, everyday life - growing into a $40B industry.  Energy drinks are now for Monday morning motivation, pre workout boosts, 3pm pick me ups, and Saturday night dance parties.


It has women's wants and needs written all over it, yet there is not a single brand focused on building with a truly women-first lens. We want products that give us energy, yes, but with added benefits we love for health, wellness and mindfulness.  

We want products that are good for you and look good with you! We want communities and brands that speak to us visually and show up reliably, with digital moments and IRL experiences we care about.  And we want a brand that is built by women for women, yet inclusive for the whole household!


GORGIE started community first.  We crowdsourced every moment of this journey thus far, and we plan to do so every step of the way.  We’re a brand built by followers and friends, driven by community. We're talking IG surveys, Tiktok competitions, and Geneva conversations for input on products, flavors, visuals, compelling names! Our community has chosen it all, and we’re just getting started…

GORGIE is launching January of 2023 and already the community is building and bursting. 

We are inviting you to join this mission, this journey, and this brand that is about to change the world

Name: Boba Bhai
Description:
Boba Bhai - India's Premier Bubble Tea Brand

Boba Bhai is a pioneering bubble tea brand that has captured the hearts of tea enthusiasts across India. With a commitment to quality, innovation, and flavor, we offer a unique and exciting bubble tea experience that is unmatched in the market.

At Boba Bhai, we believe that bubble tea is not just a beverage; it's an art form. Our team of passionate tea experts and mixologists tirelessly curate a diverse range of flavors, blending traditional Indian tea with modern twists and international influences. From classic milk teas to refreshing fruit infusions, our menu boasts a tantalizing array of options to suit every palate.

What sets Boba Bhai apart is our dedication to using only the finest, locally-sourced ingredients. We prioritize quality, ensuring that every sip of our bubble tea is a burst of pure delight. Our tapioca pearls are cooked to perfection, offering a delightful chewy texture that harmonizes with the rich flavors of our teas. Additionally, we use premium tea leaves, fresh fruits, and natural syrups, ensuring an authentic and unforgettable taste experience.

Beyond our exceptional beverages, Boba Bhai strives to create an atmosphere that exudes warmth, joy, and creativity. Our vibrant and welcoming stores provide a haven for tea lovers to connect, unwind, and indulge in the magic of bubble tea. Whether you're a student seeking a refreshing study break or a group of friends in search of a delightful hangout spot, Boba Bhai offers an inviting ambiance that enhances your overall experience.

We are also committed to sustainability and environmental consciousness. Our packaging is eco-friendly, minimizing our ecological footprint and promoting a greener future. We believe in responsible business practices and giving back to the communities we serve.

As Boba Bhai continues to expand its presence, we invite you to join us on this exciting journey.

Name: Sweet Creme Pakistan
Description:
Every dessert trip with his kids left a father — a LUMS grad and devoted dad — thinking, why is it so hard to find soft serve that’s actually good?

Too many artificial flavors. Cones too bright to be natural. Hygiene that raised more questions than comfort.

In 2018, driven by love for his son and a deep sense of care, he decided to change that. What started as a mission to find real, clean, and delicious soft serve for his own child quickly grew into something greater — a purpose to bring premium, quality soft serve to all the children of Pakistan.

That’s how Sweet Creme was born — a brand built on 100% real dairy, thoughtfully chosen ingredients, and a family-friendly space where parents could feel at ease.

We started small: one outlet, five people, and a dream rooted in love.

Our Blizzards — rich, creamy soft serve swirled with cookies, brownies, and chocolate chunks — quickly became a fan favorite. A treat that felt exciting, satisfying, and above all, real.

This wasn’t just about dessert anymore. It became about giving kids across Pakistan the experience they deserve — something crafted with care, made in clean environments, and full of real goodness.

It began with a dad’s love for his son. Today, it’s a brand trusted by families across the country.

Sweet Creme —
Real ingredients. Real care. Real good.
Made for our kids — and yours.

Name: CoopCircuits
Description:
CoopCircuits est une société coopérative d'intérêt collectif (SCIC) qui soutient le développement des circuits courts, en fournissant à prix juste des outils et des services pour faciliter la gestion des activités de distribution en circuit court.

Activités :

    Mise à disposition d’une plateforme e-commerce sous licence libre, permettant la création de boutiques en ligne adaptées à tout type d’organisateur de circuit court, et la gestion des ventes du champ à l’assiette
    Accompagnement, conseil, formation à destination des organisateurs de circuits courts, au démarrage ou en cours d’activité, pour les faire gagner en efficacité par le partage de connaissances et d’expériences
    Prestation d’intégration d’outils sur mesure (connexion à outil comptable, outil de mailing, etc.)
    Édition de solutions numériques open source pour les circuits courts : par exemple, création de sites web, cartographies, création de plateforme dédiée pour un collectif / une institution.

Un commun numérique :

    La coopérative déploie sa plateforme de vente en France à partir d’un logiciel libre développé à une échelle internationale par le réseau Open Food Network et s’appuie sur une communauté d’utilisateurs pour faire évoluer les outils de gestion selon les besoins des organisateurs de circuits courts.
    La coopérative appartient et est gouvernée par les circuits courts qui utilisent ses services : producteurs, artisans, épiceries, groupements d'achat...

Une coopérative engagée :

    En procurant des services et outils de gestion accessibles, faciles à utiliser et efficaces, l’objectif poursuivi par CoopCircuits est que les circuits courts deviennent la norme du commerce et de la distribution, pour une économie respectueuse du vivant et de la dignité humaine.
    CoopCircuits est une des coopératives fondatrices des Licoornes, alliance de coopératives pour transformer radicalement l'économie et la mettre au service de l'intérêt général.

BE PART OF OUR FAMILY!

Geschiedenis

Familie Bhojwani
23 januari 1966

In 1966 kwamen Harish en Naina Bhojwani vanuit India naar Suriname. Na gewerkt te hebben als administratief en financieel manager bij twee grote warenhuizen richtte de familie Bhojwani in december 1996 ‘Bargain Buster’ op, gevestigd aan de Knuffelsgracht in Paramaribo.

Name: Lenstore
Description:
Lenstore is an innovative online retailer of contact lenses that was founded in London in 2008. Headquartered in Wimbledon, South West London, Lenstore’s annual turnover has continually grown year on year. The company has also expanded internationally and is looking to double the number of its employees in the next two years. 

Lenstore was acquired in 2013 by GrandVision, a global leader in optical retail with over 7,000 stores across 43 countries, including almost 600 Vision Express stores in the UK. Although Lenstore now operates with the backing of a global group, it retains its entrepreneurial spirit and family feel. In the UK, Lenstore is unique in combining its online offering with access to Vision Express services.

Lenstore’s ambitious strategic plan sees the company continuing to grow its core businesses in the UK and Germany while launching in three international territories in the next two years.  

Contributing factors to Lenstore’s sustained, rapid growth are its robust business model, its premium service led proposition, its long-tenured team and its strength in technology and core digital marketing channels.

Name: Aliive, pour une alimentation positive
Description:
Aliive est une entreprise de la foodtech 100% digitale, fondée en 2009 par le chef 3* Michelin Mauro Colagreco et Vincent Guillet.

Pionnière sur la livraison à domicile de repas frais à vocation santé, la mission d'Aliive (contraction de "Alimentation" et "Positive") est d'aider ses clients à se sentir bien au quotidien grâce à une alimentation personnalisée aux besoins de chacun, centrée autour du plaisir et de la naturalité des produits, et pratique grâce à la livraison à domicile.
Pour cela, Aliive s’appuie sur les meilleurs:
- Les recettes sont élaborées par le chef 3* Michelin Mauro Colagreco, nommé meilleur restaurant du monde en 2020.
- La société collabore avec des sociétés scientifiques et des médecins experts en nutrition pour développer des innovations à impact sur la qualité de vie des clients

5 marques pour des objectifs personnalisés :
- DietBon : des programmes de rééquilibrage alimentaire sur mesure, intégrant le suivi par des diététiciennes et livrés à température ambiante. Dietbon Optimum est le premier programme à optimiser le choix des repas au profil microbiote du client pour améliorer ses résultats et sa qualité de vie.
- KitchenDiet : des programmes de rééquilibrage alimentaire, livrés en frais, intégrant le suivi par des diététiciennes.
- KitchenDaily : des repas équilibrés livrés en frais dans le cadre d'une formule d'abonnement hebdomadaire : bien pratique pour le quotidien.
- KitchenDetox : des cures detox de jus et/ou de plats frais de 3 à 7 jours
- GoodSanté : des repas enrichis en protéines et aux textures et portions adaptées destinés aux patients opérés d'une chirurgie bariatrique (sleeve, bypass ou anneau) ; Goodsanté a été élue innovation de l'année au congrès des médecins en chirurgie bariatrique en 2019.

1993 wurde mit der Eröffnung der ersten WEIN & CO Filiale ein wichtiger Meilenstein im österreichischen Weinhandel gelegt. Mittlerweile ist WEIN & CO mit insgesamt 24 Filialen und rund 250 Mitarbeiter:innen in ganz Österreich vertreten.

Dank der hybriden Vertriebsstrategie entwickelte sich WEIN & CO zum österreichischen Marktführer im Weinsegment. Seit 2018 gehört WEIN & CO der Hawesko Holding AG, der führenden Weinhandelsgruppe Deutschlands, an. 

Die Liebe und Leidenschaft zum Genuss wird bei uns mit Herz & Seele gelebt und verbindet uns. Das wird sowohl in der Fachberatung bei Kund:innen als auch in der Zusammenarbeit im Team täglich deutlich. In unserer WEIN & CO Familie legen wir Wert auf Zusammenhalt,  Gemeinschaftssinn und einen respektvollen, wertschätzenden Umgang. Regelmäßige Weiterbildung hat bei uns einen enormen Stellenwert.  Jede/r Mitarbeiter:in hat bei uns die Möglichkeit von finanzierten Aus- -und Weiterbildungen zu profitieren.

Bei regelmäßigen Mitarbeiter:innenschulungen, Events, Verkostungen und Kellerführungen bis hin zu Rebschnitt-Workshops wird jedem Team-Mitglied von WEIN & CO viel Know-How vermittelt, um die Faszination für das Thema Wein optimal an Kund:innen weiterzugeben.

Name: Flower Organics India
Description:
Flower organics is the brand that promises our mother’s and grandmother’s kitchen-based skin formulas with great fragrances for our skin. 

As we all know that there are ample beauty care products in the market and with each passing day we hear that a new beauty brand popped into the market. It is tough to decide which one to choose among the variety of beauty brands. Hence we have the motto to make pure kitchen-based skin products accessible to all without making you put in any effort. 

Our gentle-to-skin products are prepared with the goodness of all pure ingredients such as masoor dal, saffron, raw milk, etc. We use modern technology to process these ingredients and prepare blends that are suitable for all skin types when used on a daily basis. There is also a blend of new era products which has been designed keeping youngsters in mind, as they generally suffer from acne, pimples, dandruff, uneven skin tone, and many more so, we are trying to give solutions to their needs.

Our Story 
Our founder has been serving the skincare industry for more than a decade. She always had the feeling that the products we all are using these days are not pure. There are a lot of chemicals and toxic materials used in the products that are not healthy for the skin in the long run. There is always one or the other problem that arises with whatever new brands and products come into the market. On the other hand, our beloved founder has grown up using pure kitchen-based blends for her skin, which she knew was best for everyone’s skin. So, she always has the thought of coming up with something which is pure and organic. This is when Flower Organics came into existence with the aim of pouring all the pure kitchen-based ingredients into skincare products. 

This brand was like a dream come true for the founder, as she always wanted to make purely unique products accessible to all which don't have any side effects on anyone’s skin.

Description:
The Fruit Company specializes in premium gourmet gifts, but we are not any ordinary gifting company which is why we have been featured as one of Oprah's favorite things in her "O" Magazine Gift Guide, and highlighted by media influencer Robyn Spizman.  One of the main things that set us apart from competitors is that we use ONLY premium grade fruit, and even that is sorted three times before it makes the cut to our gifts.  Furthermore, our Complimentary Corporate Concierge Program allows for customization and the ability to incorporate a brand into the gift, and our HarvestClub members have the ability to customize the months they receive their fruit at any time.  We have harder-to-find options such as Gluten-Free, Kosher, and Organic gift items as well.

Our roots extend back to 1942, when Roy Webster founded Webster Orchards and began delivering extraordinary pears and apples to the Hood River Valley of northern Oregon.  

Roy’s grandsons, Scott and Addison, grew up in the family business of growing fruit. Their Dad’s love for growing fruit and the family business was an inspiration. After leaving the valley to pursue their academic and professional careers, they returned with the same vision of expanding the Webster Orchard venture. 

Today The Fruit Company owns over 600 acres of fruit trees and blueberry fields and does much of its business through online orders at thefruitcompany.com, compared to their grandfather’s first mail-order catalog.  The Fruit Company has also been one of the top 15 growing companies in Oregon and part of Internet Retailer’s Top 50 “Best of the Web.”

Our goal remains unchanged: Bring the Nation the World's Finest Fruit. We welcome you to visit our website and make someone smile with a fresh fruit gift.

Name: Mercado Trading LLC
Description:
Welcome to Delili!
We are here to offer you a unique grocery shopping experience that serves the avid and enthusiastic chef within.
Delili caters to a wide range of retail products, not only do we stock an incredible food variety but we also serve you solutions to all your culinary needs. Whether you’re looking for a curated charcuterie board, a ready to eat picnic basket or your daily fruits & vegetables - we’ve got you covered! We aim to provide the adventurous outdoor individual to the groups that want something delivered hassle free to the location of their choice in and around Dubai.
You can shop everything we have to offer from our website or mobile app - sign up today and get first news on our latest promotions!

Happy Shopping,
Your Daily Deli - Delili

Name: Sezamo.it
Description:
Con +7.000 referenze, Sezamo.it è un servizio di food e-commerce che consegna la tua spesa a domicilio in tre ore dal momento dell’ordine.
Da noi puoi trovare un vasto e completo assortimento di prodotti che vanno dai freschi ai surgelati, dalla dispensa al gelato in vaschetta, dalla cura della persona a quella della casa, in un perfetto connubio tra prodotti artigianali, gourmet e regionali con le grandi marche.
Supermercato e cascine, insieme. E non è tutto: consegnando la spesa con furgoni completamente ecosostenibili dotati di contenitori refrigerati, riusciamo non solo ad assicurare la freschezza e la qualità dei nostri prodotti, ma ci impegniamo anche a ridurre al minimo il nostro impatto sull’ambiente.
Cosa ci contraddistingue:
- Il cliente è al centro del nostro universo. Tutto quello che facciamo, lo facciamo per lui!
- Eat well, Live well è il nostro motto. Abbiamo a cuore il benessere dei nostri clienti, nella convinzione che mangiare bene ci aiuti a vivere una vita più sana e felice.
- Consegniamo la spesa in tre ore direttamente al piano e ti offriamo la possibilità di scegliere la fascia oraria preferita. Potrai pagare online o direttamente alla consegna con carta.
- Il nostro servizio clienti, attivo ogni giorno dalle 8:00 alle 22:00, ti supporterà in ogni richiesta grazie alla costruzione di un rapporto di completa fiducia.
Facciamo parte della grande famiglia Rohlik, una delle più importanti piattaforme di food e-commerce in Europa. Nato nel 2014 in Repubblica Ceca (Rohlik.cz), il gruppo è riuscito in pochissimo tempo a raggiungere l’Ungheria (kifli.hu), l’Austria (gurkerl.at) e la Germania (knuspr.de).
La rivoluzione della spesa online è arrivata a Milano, vuoi farne parte? Ordina subito e goditi il piacere di una spesa completa senza file al supermercato.

Name: Satoriz
Description:
Réseau indépendant de magasins 100% bio, Satoriz commercialise depuis 1981 des produits bio et s’engage pour l’écologie auprès des producteurs comme des citoyens. Satoriz, c’est 39 magasins bio, 4 restaurants, une boulangerie, une centrale et une plateforme de distribution des fruits et légumes et plus de 700 collaborateur.rices. 
Nos magasins sont tous labellisés "Magasin Engagé Biocohérence"

Name: Yelloh
Description: Yelloh, formerly known as Schwan’s Home Delivery, is a direct-to-consumer frozen food delivery company that provides customers with the convenience of door-to-door delivery. With quality service and hundreds of appetizing eats, there are options fit for every taste and occasion including premium meats, meals, snacks and treats. From Marvin Schwan’s first yellow truck to our modern-day fleet of Yelloh freezers-on-wheels, we’ve been pioneering frozen food delivery for over 70 years. To learn more or start shopping and fill your Freezer Full of Happy, visit yelloh.com.

Name: Avocado Store GmbH
Description:
Avocadostore ist Deutschlands größter Online Marktplatz für Eco Fashion & Green Lifestyle und bietet eine vielfältige Auswahl ausschließlich nachhaltiger Produkte: aktuelle Mode, Yoga-Bedarf, plastikfreie Kosmetik, Kinderspielzeug, Wohnaccessoires und vieles mehr. Aktuell fasst das Sortiment über 350.000 Produkte von etwa 4.000 Marken. Nicht zuletzt aufgrund des vielfältigen Angebots ist es uns wichtig, für bewussten Konsum zu sensibilisieren. Denn jede überlegte Entscheidung macht einen Unterschied und tut der Umwelt und einem selbst gut.

Orientierung dank Transparenz
Als Konsument:in fällt es einem häufig nicht leicht, diejenigen Marken und Produkte zu finden, die wirklich halten, was sie versprechen. Diese Unsicherheit möchten wir nehmen und mit unserer Plattform die Suche nach nachhaltigen Alternativen so einfach wie möglich machen. Dafür gelten auf dem Marktplatz zehn Nachhaltigkeitskriterien – alle Händler:innen und Marken müssen für jedes Produkt begründen, in welcher Weise es ökologischen, fairen und sozialen Ansprüchen gerecht wird.

Gemeinsam gestalten
Bei Avocadostore verstehen wir Nachhaltigkeit als ganzheitliche Aufgabe und als Kompass für unser Tun – das gilt auch für unsere Zusammenarbeit im Team. Bei uns macht Arbeiten Spaß und Sinn. Denn uns alle treibt ein gemeinsames Ziel an: Unsere Zukunft ganzheitlich nachhaltig zu gestalten. Dieses Ziel verfolgen wir mit viel Herz und genauso viel Verstand, und ohne erhobenen Zeigefinger.

2010 angefangen als Startup sind wir nicht mehr am Anfang, aber auch lange noch nicht am Ziel. Und wenn du willst, kannst du gemeinsam mit uns wachsen und Teil unserer grünen Erfolgsgeschichte werden. Denn bei uns ist viel Platz für dein Know-How, deine Ideen und deine ganz eigene Zukunft.

Name: Grupo Planes
Description:
El Grupo Planes, está formado por compuesto por tres divisiones: Grupo Planes Distribución, Casa Planes e Italian Dough.

En Grupo Planes Distribución trabajamos para acercar la frescura de todo tipo de carnes y elaborados a negocios de restauración, catering y distribución de alimentación. Contamos con una flota propia mediante la cual repartimos en las 3 provincias de la Comunidad Valenciana a más de 200 clientes satisfechos. 

Las tiendas Casa Planes son un concepto avanzado de carnicería tradicional donde encontrará:
-La atención cercana  a los clientes.
-Una relación calidad-precio que solo una gran empresa puede ofrecer.
-Un surtido seleccionado y especializado muy amplio.

Por último en Italian Dough fabricamos pizzas, bases y bolas siguiendo la receta tradicional y utilizando los mejores ingredientes. Contamos con una línea productiva de última tecnología y con los mejores pizzeros que le dan el toque maestro a todas nuestras elaboraciones. 

Desde 1939: Aunque poseamos más de 80 años de historia hay valores que no cambian.

En el Grupo Planes hay dos inmutables:
*Calidad: Sólo adquirimos materia prima de origen nacional de la máxima calidad. 
*Frescura: Nuestros pollos, y el despiece de los mismo, llegan frescos (con menos de 24 horas desde que se sacrificaron) antes de las 9 de la mañana de cada día a  todas y cada una de las tiendas y clientes.

Conservamos el mismo espíritu y respeto por la calidad, el cliente de los tenderos tradicionales.

Nuestras cifras reflejan el éxito del trabajo bien hecho:
-140 tiendas en Valencia, Castellón, Alicante y Barcelona.
-Más de 50 millones de euros de facturación.
-Un equipo de más de 400 personas.

Name: Wild Fork Canada
Description:
Wild Fork is an innovative food company evolving how Canadians plan, prep and eat their favourite meals with high quality meat, seafood and more . Wild Fork meticulously sources worldwide, hand selects and chef tests every
product, and locks in freshness to provide the largest variety in Canada at great prices delivered right to your doorstep.

Name: PT JCO Donut & Coffee
Description: PT JCO Donut & Coffee is a mining & metals company based out of Indonesia.

Name: HAMMEL
Description:
Indépendante et familiale, l’entreprise française Hammel soutient, de génération en génération, les artisans plombiers depuis 1948.

Vous êtes la précision et l’agilité.
La connaissance et la technique.
Vous devez agir vite mais votre œuvre doit durer.
Vous assainissez, fluidifiez, réparez, installez.
Vous fabriquez des foyers plus chaleureux, plus sains, plus confortables.
Vous rassurez ceux que vous venez dépanner.
Vous êtes fiers de votre art, transmis de génération en génération.
Fiers de ce que vous accomplissez au quotidien.
Vous êtes indépendants et vous allez le rester.

Chez Hammel, nous partageons votre histoire et vos valeurs.

À vous les plombiers indépendants. Nous sommes fiers d’être à vos côtés. Où que vous soyez.
Engagés à faire tout ce qui est en notre pouvoir pour vous aider à rendre un maximum de foyers plus confortables à vivre.

Hammel, aux côtés des plombiers indépendants depuis 1948.

Name: AVU SA
Description:
AVU SA is one of Europe's leading fine wine merchants and one of the largest stockholders of fine wines. With over 600'000 bottles of the world's finest labels, coming from the most prestigious wine regions, like Bordeaux, Burgundy, Champagne, Tuscany, Piedmont, as well as from the New World, like Napa Valley, and Barossa Valley…just think about the rarest wines and vintages, or even special large formats, we probably have it.


Operating on a global level, we have some of the largest allocations from the most exclusive estates. Thanks to our comprehensive, international vinous network, made up of producers, private collectors and international merchants, we only offer wines of impeccable provenance and of the upmost quality.


Thanks to our strategically placed warehouses and professional shipping partners, we can efficiently deliver our wines almost anywhere in the world. We can also deliver to private clients across Europe, due to our European subsidiary in Spain (AVU Wines). Our clients also have the possibility to securely store their wines with us. We have several modern temperature and humidity controlled warehouses located in Stabio (Switzerland), Bordeaux (France), London (UK) and Spain. Our headquarters is based in Sorengo, very close to Lugano in Switzerland.

Name: Rawteen Special Store
Description:
Rawteen is a health-focused special Store in Dubai, offering a diverse range of high-quality foods tailored to various diets, including DASH, Keto, Flexitarian, and Low-FODMAP. 

Founded by Mohammed Banat, a brain cancer survivor and seasoned entrepreneur, Rawteen is dedicated to promoting wellness through nutritious food and expert guidance. 

Join us on our mission to make healthy living accessible and enjoyable for everyone.

Name: Wine Park
Description: Wine park offers fine wines from various regions of the world into India. The portfolio focuses on wineries where innovation and passion are blended to make wines of highest quality and which truly expresses the region in its wines style. We believe that each wine bottle has a great story behind it. These stories and your experiences while drinking the wine is what really makes the whole wine drinking so much fun and enjoyable. We intend to bring countless such stories to your tables.

Name: Super Portugal Supermercado
Description: O Super Portugal é uma empresa supermercadista há mais de 27 anos de mercado. Iniciou suas atividades no dia 28 de Agosto de 1996. Atualmente com 8 lojas além de um centro de distribuição, com uma média de 600 funcionários. Somos hoje um importante ponto de referência na região da Granja Portugal, com a geração de empregos diretos e indiretos, potencializando a economia local.

Name: Ananse Africa
Description: Ananse Africa is an ECOMMERCE PLATFORM equipping African fashion designers and artists for local and international trade, creating entrepreneurship opportunities for women and youth. Our technology solution solves key problems behind the market challenges that prevent African fashion designers and artists from being commercially successful and growing their businesses. Ananse's all-in-one trade solution allows African fashion designers and artists to transact seamlessly with customers worldwide.

Name: Full Glass Wine Co.
Description: Full Glass Wine Co. is a brand acquisition and management firm focused on rapidly acquiring Direct-to-Consumer (DTC) wine companies to build a multi-brand wine marketplace. Co-founded by industry pioneer Louis Amoroso and Neha Kumar, the company is revolutionizing DTC wine by leveraging the power of compelling storytelling, immersive content, groundbreaking business models, and personalized e-commerce experiences. We are committed to fostering long-term partnerships with our investors, who share a passion for shaping the future of the wine industry and unlocking unprecedented value for all stakeholders.

Name: Foodstories
Description:
Foodstories is a gourmet food experience designed for well-travelled, affluent, nuanced food connoisseurs and those that have arrived in life. A seamless commerce business striving to dominate the gourmet food space in India, offering customers the convenience of ordering through the website, whatsapp chats, and phone calls, alongside an immersive in-store shopping experience.

The first Foodstories store, a 9,000 sq ft format at Ambience Mall, Vasant Kunj, Delhi NCR along with its digital twin, foodstories.shop was launched in March 2024. The store also houses, a 30-seater all-day dining café that showcases a unique and wholly organic estate-to-cup coffee program, a luxurious single-origin chocolate experience, bespoke cheese, single-origin spices and dry fruits, farm-sourced fruits and vegetables and a new-age biohacking zone to cater to India’s evolving wellbeing needs. 

Since then, Foodstories has expanded with a stunning 10,000 sq ft store in Hyderabad’s Banjara Hills and opened doors in Bengaluru with a 12,000 sq ft store and Garden Cafe at Lavelle Road — bringing a signature blend of curation, design, and discovery to new cities.

Name: The Bradford Group
Description: The Bradford Group of companies are leaders in artistic expressions and designs, offering truly one-of-a kind products from architectural villages to coins and jewelry, to one-of-a-kind collectibles. We are the place where your passions become art.

Name: Nomad Pizza
Description:
In September 2019, we opened our delivery kitchen with the mission to make the best pizzas in Delhi.

Our unique concept of bringing ‘pizzas from around the world to your doorstep’ quickly caught the imagination of a discerning South Delhi audience. In just four months we became one of the fastest-growing pizza delivery start-ups in India and opened our second outlet for delivery and a dine-in service in Gurgaon.

We offer pizzas from 11 different regions of the world – ranging from America to Korea. We insist on quality and therefore use the best and freshest ingredients possible. There is absolutely no compromise on this. Even our pizza dough is made fresh onsite everyday and our various pizza bases speak for themselves!

As they say, it’s not hard to find pizza but it’s very hard to find really good pizza! We hope you’ll try ours and become a fan of our passion!

Name: Crossian
Description:
Crossian is a high-growth, technology-driven retailing business. 

Founded in 2020, we have grown over 900% in less than four years, driven by innovation and the passion of our people. What began as a start-up has quickly become a dynamic environment where curiosity, collaboration, and bold ideas thrive. 

Today, we are on a mission to build direct-to-consumer brands that go beyond transactions — creating lasting value and genuine connections with customers across the globe.

Name: Snack That
Description: We are your munching partner. Making guilt-free delicious and healthy snacks for your needs. Our bestsellers are roasted makhana, energy bars, jowar puffs.

Name: Manutan Group
Description:
A committed player in BtoB e-commerce in Europe specialising in the distribution of equipment and supplies for enterprises, local authorities and traders, Manutan is constantly innovating to improve its customers' experience. 

We put sincerity and responsibility at the heart of all our actions to build a business-to-business model where all our stakeholders can develop and progress, thus enterprising for a better World  

To do so we are contributing actively towards a better planet, a better society and a better business.

Our common culture revolves around: 
 Relationships and care
 Performance and continuous improvement 
 Technology and data 
 Customers and entrepreneurship 

Thanks to 2,500 dedicated employees who are passionate about their profession, the Group shines throughout Europe through 25 subsidiaries, spread over 17 countries. In 2025, 12 subsdiaries have been certified Great Place to Work.

Its ambition? Provide an all-in-one product and service offering that allows its customers to operate efficiently and sustainably on a daily basis. 

Join the Manutan Group community

Name: RS France
Description:
RS France est une marque du Groupe RS plc, distributeur mondial pour les clients et fournisseurs industriels impliqués dans la conception, la construction ou la maintenance d’équipements et d’installations industrielles.

 Présent dans 31 pays
 Plus de 1 000 000 produits 
 d’un million de clients
 Plus de 60 000 colis par jour
 2 500 fournisseurs

Notre offre comprend différentes gammes : semiconducteurs, interconnexion, composants passifs et électro-mécaniques, automatisme et contrôle, électrique, test et mesure, outillage et consommables.
Nous accompagnons nos clients tout au long du cycle de vie des produits :
 que ce soit par l'innovation et l'assistance technique lors de la phase de conception,
 l'amélioration du délai de commercialisation et de la productivité dès la phase de construction, 
 ou en réduisant les coûts d'achat et en optimisant les stocks dans la phase de maintenance.

RS France regroupe aujourd’hui plus de 500 collaborateurs : 
· 120 commerciaux, 
· 70 conseillers au service de nos clients par mail, chat et téléphone, 
· 120 collaborateurs aux fonctions supports,
· 220 à la logistique,
· 20 techniciens.

Nous assurons un accompagnement terrain grâce à une étroite collaboration avec nos 170 fabricants partenaires.

Enfin, RS propose aussi des solutions achats (vente en ligne, système de délégation des achats et d’e-procurement), d’inventaire (RS ScanStock, RS VendStock, RS Magasin Autonome), de maintenance (GMAO & capteurs IoT, solutions 3D scanning / BIM, Métrologie) et sur-mesure (des boîtiers, cordons et connecteurs ainsi que l’impression 3D) pour accompagner ses clients au mieux.

Name: Goody's - Everest Group
Description: Goody’s-Everest Group is the foodservice sector of Vivartia - one of the top F&B Groups in Europe. It is one of largest foodservice groups in Southeast Europe that has developed and operates some of the most important brands in the foodservice sector like Goody’s Burger House, Everest, Flocafe Espresso Room and La Pasteria. The Group has also developed and manages a wide portfolio of unique foodservice concepts, e-commerce ventures and two production units specializing in the production and distribution of meat products, ready-made meals and desserts, and the capacity to undertake large scale contract catering projects as well as in-flight catering. The Group operates over 560 points of sale in Greece and abroad and employs over 5.000 people (directly or indirectly through its partner franchisees). Driven by passion for innovation, Goody’s-Everest is always committed to excellence in execution in serving its customers’ needs and aspirations.

Name: KisaanSay
Description:

KisaanSay- The Best of India

Description: Through flagship websites and specialized ecommerce platforms, JAM+ websites focus on customized products and have a shared e-commerce platform that powers a multi-brand shopping experience, a core marketing engine and shared back office operations. Backed by private equity firm TZP Group and led by CEO Andrew Jacobs, JAM+ brands continue to innovate and expand into new categories.

Name: Bidfood South Africa
Description:
Bidfood is a leading broad line supplier of frozen, chilled, ambient grocery and allied products to businesses in the foodservice industry across South Africa and parts of Africa. 

We are the preferred supply partner for over 27 000 customers looking for quality food and related products delivered to their door. We are proud of our ability to provide a complete one stop solution that encompasses a wide range of products and services, tailored to help our customers grow. 

With 18 branches located in major provinces our national footprint is strategically placed to fully service the needs of businesses in the foodservice industry. We service a broad range of customers in the hospitality and industrial catering industries such as restaurants, hotels, coffee shops, canteens, conference venues, hospitals, schools, old age homes, etc.  We have a wide range of products ranging from food to packaging and cleaning materials as well as foodservice equipment to satisfy their individual needs.

Name: TyresOnline
Description: TyresOnline, easily buy and fit new tyres online.

Name: Greenheart Organic Farms
Description: Greenheart Organic Farms Trading LLC is a grower, retailer & wholesaler of genuine organic produce. Our retail outlet is located at The Light Commercial Tower, Arjan, Dubai, United Arab Emirates.

Name: PERGOLUX

Name: X UP Brands
Description: At X UP Brands, we specialize in the strategic acquisition and optimization of Amazon FBA businesses. With a proven track record of cultivating brands for exponential growth, we empower entrepreneurs to realize their e-commerce ambitions. Join us in reshaping the future of online retail, one thriving business at a time.

Name: Brightland
Description:
Brightland makes artfully-crafted ingredients to help pour on a little bit of the good life. Best known for our iconic olive oils, we source all of our products directly from small, family farms in California and Hawaii. With a passion for art both inside and outside the kitchen, we make it our mission to bring beautiful tastes, objects, and experiences to the everyday.

Find us at Brightland.co and on IG @wearebrightland.

Name: Smart Break
Description:
Empresa pioneira e líder no ramo de mini mercados autônomos  em condomínios residenciais, empresas e hoteis com mais de 650 lojas instaladas.

Nascemos para transformar o hábito de consumo das pessoas, trazendo mas comodidade, segurança, qualidade e variedade para todos os nosso consumidores a qualquer hora do dia. 

Somos quem te dá uma xícara de açúcar quando precisa.
Somos quem te acompanha na pausa do trabalho.
Somos quem te chama para tomar uma cerveja.
Somos quem te dá energia para o dia começar e quem te relaxa quando o dia acabar.

Estamos à sua frente para solucionar seu problema.
Estamos ao seu lado para você ter tempo. Tempo para aproveitar a vida como quiser.
Estamos ao seu redor para fazer todo minuto do seu dia valer a pena.

SOMOS A SMART BREAK. TUDO O QUE VOCÊ PRECISA A QUALQUER  HORA DO DIA.

Vem ser Smart com a gente!

Name: QahwaBLK | قهوة بلاك
Description:
In 2019, we started QahwaBLK with a simple yet bold question? Could we consistently deliver an exceptional cup of coffee with a great experience without the hefty price tag or the intimidating atmosphere?

This question became our mission, leading us to create a space where everyone feels welcome. Our approach strips away the complexities, focusing on quality coffee and genuine interactions. It's not just our baristas who make QahwaBLK special; it's the culture they embody and share with every customer. By marrying straightforward marketing with our team's passion, we've turned every visit into an opportunity for connection, making QahwaBLK a place where coffee lovers gather, not just for the beverage but for the experience that comes with it.

Name: Plaay
Description:
At Plaay, we blend wholesome indulgence with playful energy, redefining what it means to snack smart. Founded by nutritionist Rashi Chowdhary, Plaay brings you 100% clean & highly indulgent chocolates and snacks that satisfy cravings without compromise.

Based in Dubai, Plaay creates indulgent, mindful snacks that balance flavour with wellness—perfect for those who crave something sweet without the sugar crash. Whether you need a quick pick-me-up or a moment to savour, Plaay delivers a unique snacking experience with 100% clean ingredients.

Everything is made in-house at our Dubai factory, where innovation meets indulgence. Join us in building a world of guilt-free indulgence and be part of the Plaay family as we craft moments of indulgence that fuel your day, mind, and body.

Name: SuperYou
Description:
Welcome to SUPERYOU, where science meets snacking.

We’re the first brand to introduce fermented yeast protein to India. It’s as effective as whey, better than plant protein, and designed to fuel every you—snackers, movers, shakers, and game-changers alike.
With 10g of clean protein in every bite, we’re reimagining what protein can be—smarter, tastier, and accessible for all. No chalky aftertaste, no compromises, no added sugar and 3g of fiber. 

Ready to taste the revolution? Let’s keep it super.

Name: Building & Scaling
Description:
Building and Scaling was founded in 2021 with one goal in mind: to accelerate the pace of innovation in companies by allowing real people to give their honest opinions about their products and services.

The philosophy behind the company is simple. The better companies can listen to their customers, the better they do will perform in the marketplace, and as a result, the world will benefit from better products and services

Name: Myfood
Description: We deliver a smart greenhouse that allows everyone to reconnect with their food. Designed to grow fruits and vegetables in limited spaces, our technology combines the best growing techniques to minimize the carbon footprint.

Name: Acentecom
Description: Acentecom is a consumer-focused e-commerce, Mobile Apps and software holding company that builds and scales health, wellness, and lifestyle brands. We specialize in performance-driven growth, product innovation, and direct-to-consumer distribution across global markets.

Name: Managementboek.nl

Managementboek is een online boekhandel waar u terecht kunt voor vakinformatie en inspiratie. Managementboek onderscheidt zich door het aanbod van boeken en aanverwante producten specifiek af te stemmen op de behoeftes van business professionals. Name: KERO Hipermercado

Sob nova gestão da Accord Group Lda, o KERO é a maior cadeia de retalho e um dos maiores empregadores de Angola.

Contribuir para a qualidade de vida dos Angolanos, através de uma oferta de produtos e serviços diferenciadora, com os melhores preços de mercado e uma qualidade irrepreensível, é a  nossa missão.

Name: Pixmania
Description:
Chez Pixmania notre mission est double : rendre la tech accessible à tous, tout en minimisant notre impact sur la planète.

Nous soutenons l'économie circulaire ainsi que le pouvoir d'achat, en rendant les dernières nouveautés mobiles et high-tech plus accessibles que jamais, tout en maximisant leur durée de vie !

Name: PICKUP COFFEE
Description: UPlifting everyone with fast, delicious, and surprisingly affordable beverages, everywhere — one PICKUP at a time.

Name: Grupo Verona
OKAM
Description:
Established in 1979 as a result of a joint venture between two major groups in the Middle East: The Omar Kassem Alesayi group and HSA - The Hayel Saeed Anam group of companies (Frimex Investment).
Established as a food division company with an unwavering vision to become the leading food distribution company in Saudi Arabia, and one of the largest in the Middle East.

Over the 45 years, OKAM became one of the major importers and distributors of branded and quality products in several food categories, with aggressive plans for further expansion and diversifying the current portfolio.

Today OKAM, with over 500 employees, is one of the leading FMCG Marketing & Distribution companies in Saudi Arabia.

Our Product Categories Include: Rice | Tuna | Canned Beans | Sterilized Cream | Olive Oil | Olives | Honey 

تأسست شركة اوكام عام 1979 نتيجة شراكة بين مجموعتين رائدتين في الشرق الأوسط: مجموعة عمر قاسم العيسائي ومجموعة هائل سعيد أنعم ( شركة فريمكس للاستثمار).

انطلقت كشركة متخصصة في قطاع الأغذية، برؤية ثابتة لتصبح الشركة الرائدة في توزيع المواد الغذائية في المملكة العربية السعودية، وواحدة من أكبر الشركات في الشرق الأوسط.

على مدى 45 عامًا، أصبحت شركة اوكام من أكبر مستوردي وموزعي المنتجات ذات العلامات التجارية والجودة العالمية في العديد من فئات الأغذية، مع خطط طموحة للتوسع وتنوع محفظتها الحالية.

اليوم، تضم شركة اوكام أكثر من 500 موظف، وتعد واحدة من الشركات الرائدة في تسويق وتوزيع السلع الاستهلاكية في المملكة العربية السعودية.

تشمل فئات منتجات اوكام : الأرز | التونا | البقوليات المعلبة | القشطة  | زيت زيتون | زيتون | العسل

Name: Independent Brands Australia
Description:
The Independent Brands Australia (IBA) network is home to a number of successful national brands such as Cellarbrations, The Bottle-O, IGA Liquor, Porters Liquor and Thirsty Camel. The IBA retail network consists of more than 1,800 tier one bannered stores across Australia and New Zealand.

We support IBA bannered retailers through a framework that offers national buying power, marketing support, shopper-focused promotional programs and network investment to provide ‘The Best Store in Their Town’.

Our IBA network is well positioned to meet current shopper trends with local and convenient store locations, tailored ranges and marketing programs.

Name: Zachys Wine & Liquor
Description:
Zachys is a fourth-generation family-owned business with a rich history dating back almost eight decades. Founded by Zachy Zacharia in 1944, Zachys has evolved from a corner liquor store into a renowned destination for fine wine and spirits and an internationally recognized auction powerhouse. 

Our mission is to offer unique experiences and access opportunities to our clients. In the 1970s, we were the first U.S. retailer to sell Bordeaux Futures. In the 1990s, we were among the first in the industry to launch a website. In the mid-1990s, we played a pivotal role in introducing wine auctions to New York, transforming these events into social gatherings where clients could acquire rare bottles while enjoying great company. 

Today, Zachys offers a comprehensive suite of services encompassing Retail, Storage, and Auction, expertly guiding clients through an extraordinary journey from discovery to curation, and even to consignment.

With four generations of the Zacharia family and a dedicated team, we've evolved from a local shop in Scarsdale, NY, into the institution we are today. Our commitment to our clients’ complete satisfaction and delivering exclusive discoveries and unforgettable experiences remains unwavering. We invite you to join us on this incredible journey.

Description: Välkommen till Nordens största bokhandel. Hos oss hittar du all din läsning på ett och samma ställe.

Name: Elavate Superfoods
Description:
Founded in 2023, Elavate Superfoods is on a mission to help women achieve their skin health & wellness goals, through science-backed superfood products. Elavate was built from our founder's (Alex Philip) personal experience. After witnessing his mother's frustration with overpriced, ineffective, and unpalatable collagen supplements, he set out to create something extraordinary: a collagen supplement that actually worked, tasted great, and remained affordable.

Today, that mission has transformed into the UK's fastest-growing Collagen brand. In just our first year, we've helped over 20,000 women regain their confidence and vitality.

We're based in London, UK and we're actively seeking exceptional talent to join us in scaling Elavate to 9 figures in revenue. If you're an ambitious high-performer and want to be part of the UK's next biggest supplement brand, we'd love to connect and explore how you could help shape our future.

FoodHealth Co. is a nutrition intelligence company revolutionizing how we understand and access healthy food. Through its personalized FoodHealth Score, the company provides data tools that help consumers make better choices, retailers curate smarter shelves, and brands design with health in mind. Formerly known as bitewell, the company is headquartered in San Francisco.

Description:
Culligan UK delivers innovative, high-quality water solutions to homes and businesses across the United Kingdom.

Our solutions include:
- Bottled and Mains-Fed Watercoolers
- Hospitality water systems
- Multi-functional taps
- Water softeners and filtration systems
- Customised water refill stations and drinking fountains for public, offices, and commercial spaces

Driven by a mission to provide better, sustainable drinking water for everyone — at home, at work, or on the go, we're helping customers reduce reliance on single-use plastic and enjoy great-tasting, high-quality water every day. 

Part of Culligan International, a global leader in water treatment for more than 85 years, we combine local expertise with world-class technology to meet a wide range of hydration needs.

Name: You Get
Description:
A You Get é uma marca que pertence à empresa Fun Display, Lda.

Fundada em 2005, a You Get nasceu com a missão de ser a solução tecnológica de confiança para cada cliente. Começámos com uma pequena loja e uma grande visão. Hoje, contamos com lojas físicas em Portugal, um ecommerce sólido e presença em 28 países.

Aliamos a venda de tecnologia a um centro técnico altamente especializado em reparações eletrónicas, desde smartphones a equipamentos industriais. Trabalhamos todos os dias para simplificar a vida de quem nos procura, com respostas rápidas, soluções fiáveis e um serviço de excelência.

Na You Get, mais do que tecnologia, entregamos confiança.
If you need, You Get.

Name: Beauty In
Description:
beauty´in é a primeira empresa do mundo a lançar produtos aliméticos, alimentos com ativos que garantem propriedades cosméticas e de bem estar. Idealizada por Cristiana Arcangeli, tem como investidor o BTG Pactual, um dos maiores grupos financeiros do país. 

A marca, que foi lançada em 2010, conta com 4 linhas de produtos: beautydrink, em oito versões, beautycandy, em quatro versões, beautybar, em quatro versões, e beautydrink de preparo instantâneo, também em quatro versões. Os produtos contêm vitaminas, minerais, colágeno e compostos bioativos extraídos de frutas orgânicas com funcionalidade cosmética e de bem estar, que ajudam na saúde, beleza e na disposição e bom humor. 

beauty´in já recebeu diversos prêmios de inovação e design e conta com todo o know how de Cristiana Arcangeli, empresária pioneira no segmento de cosméticos e bem estar. 

beauty´in faz bem por dentro e cuida por fora.

Name: BIG BAD WOLF BOOKS [BBW BOOKS]
Description:
The Big Bad Wolf Books was launched in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia, in 2009, is the brainchild of BookXcess' founders, Andrew Yap and Jacqueline Ng. The primary mission is to cultivate reading habits, increase English literacy worldwide and build a new generation of readers, by making books more affordable and accessible, to EVERYONE.

Known as the World's Biggest Book Sale, the Sale is a global reading advocacy initiative that aims to encourage people of all ages to discover the joys of reading and inspire them to pursue their dreams and, importantly, empower them with the knowledge to realise them. We believe that the more knowledge that one gain, the better-equipped a person is to meet today’s competitive world's exacting demands.

Since its inception, the Big Bad Wolf Books Sale has evolved tremendously, going global and touring 48 cities in 15 countries, such as Cambodia, Hong Kong, Indonesia, Myanmar, Pakistan, the Philippines, Sri Lanka, South Korea, Singapore, Thailand, Taiwan, and the United Arab Emirates.

Since 2020, the Big Bad Wolf Books' Online Book Sale has been successfully launched in 10 countries, including Malaysia.

Name: BERO

Name: DOONAILS
Description:
Hey, wir sind Doonails – und wir haben uns ein großes Ziel gesetzt: Wir wollen Maniküre neu denken! 

Mit unseren Produkten holst du dir perfekte Nägel ganz easy direkt nach Hause. Denn bei uns gibt’s keine „One-size-fits-all“-Lösungen – wir glauben an individuelle Routinen, die genauso einzigartig sind wie du.

Gegründet 2020, sind wir aus purer Leidenschaft gestartet, um dir professionelle Maniküre-Ergebnisse für Zuhause zu liefern. Nach Monaten des Tüftelns war unser erstes Set bereit – und zack, der Shop ging live!  Heute sind wir in mehreren Ländern am Start, in Drogerien und online, mit über 300.000 glücklichen Kunden und einem internationalen Team von über 50 kreativen Köpfen. .

Doonails ist mehr als ein Beauty-Start-up: Wir schaffen Erlebnisse, geben Individualität Raum und machen deine Maniküre-Routine so einfach wie möglich. Mit unseren drei innovativen Methoden und unserer pflegenden Nail Care Line bringen wir Style und Pflege in dein Leben – easy, schön und stressfrei. 

Unsere Doonails Werte:

 Care
Unsere Kunden und unser Team stehen immer an erster Stelle. Wir packen an, helfen, wo es nötig ist, und sorgen dafür, dass jeder sich unterstützt fühlt – egal ob beim Produkt oder im Alltag.

 Community
Wir wollen mehr als nur Produkte – wir wollen eine Community schaffen! Eine, in der du Ideen teilen, Tipps bekommen und dich inspirieren lassen kannst. So wird Maniküre zum Erlebnis.

 Growth
Stillstand? Nicht bei uns! Wir lernen, wachsen und verbessern uns ständig – ob bei unseren Produkten, im Team oder bei uns selbst.

 Simplicity
Schönheit muss nicht kompliziert sein. Unsere Produkte sind so einfach, dass du dich voll aufs Ergebnis konzentrieren kannst – und das ganz ohne Stress.

 Uniqueness
Deine Schönheit ist einzigartig – und genauso sollte deine Maniküre sein. Wir geben dir die Tools an die Hand, damit du deine Individualität grenzenlos ausleben kannst.

Name: Holi Supermercado
Description:
En Supermercados Holi creemos que hacer las compras debería sentirse tan bien como compartir un buen momento. Por eso, no solo vendemos productos: construimos experiencias pensadas para nuestros clientes, colaboradores y aliados.

Con presencia en Lima y en constante crecimiento —ya con 7 tiendas abiertas— nos hemos convertido en un supermercado que apuesta por la innovación, la frescura y la cercanía. Nuestra misión es transformar la manera en la que se vive el retail, ofreciendo más que precios competitivos: un lugar donde la comunidad siempre es lo primero.

Somos Holi: un supermercado que crece contigo, que escucha, que sorprende y que siempre busca marcar la diferencia.

Name: BODEBOCA
Description:
BODEBOCA (www.bodeboca.com) es la plataforma líder en España en la venta online de vino.

Fundada en 2010 por los emprendedores Greg Bulckaert y Nathanaël Berbessou y adquirida en 2019 por el grupo Pernod Ricard, tiene la mayor comunidad online de aficionados al vino en España.

Actualmente cuenta con más de dos millones de usuarios registrados y más de 200.000 opiniones de compradores, lo que la convierte en la mayor comunidad de aficionados al vino en España.

 BODEBOCA comercializa vinos de 1.500 bodegas entre las más prestigiosas del país y tiene un catálogo de más de 9.000 vinos y 1.000 destilados seleccionados de todo el mundo.

Name: Brim Burgers Pk
Description:
Brim Burgers, a pioneering smash burger concept, inaugurated its first corporate store in May 2021 in the UK, with the
ambitious goal of ascending to the summit of the quick service restaurant (QSR) hierarchy in the UK. The adept team
behind the venture boasts a collective experience of over 15 years in the industry, bringing together a harmonious fusion
of business management acumen and advanced technical expertise.
BRIM Burgers entered the Pakistan market in March 2023, launching its first store in May 2023. Following an exceptional
response, the brand rapidly expanded, opening nine stores across Lahore, Sargodha ,and Islamabad. Introducing its
pioneering smash burger concept, BRIM Burgers has gained strong traction by offering high-quality ingredients, freshly
smashed burgers, and a modern fast-casual dining experience. Leveraging its proven UK franchise model, the brand
ensures strict quality control, hygiene, efficient operations, and local supply chain optimization.
With Pakistan's growing demand for premium burger concepts, BRIM Burgers is actively exploring further expansion to
all major cities across Pakistan, supported by an experienced team, operational excellence, marketing and key partnerships to maximize consistent returns.
Committed to ensuring the success of their franchisees, Brim Burgers has implemented rigorous vetting procedures.
These procedures focus on assessing candidates' management skills, business acumen, and financial standing. Prior
to accepting any franchisee, the Brim team conducts thorough due diligence to maintain the brand's high standards.

Name: Graviss Good Foods
Description:
Graviss Good Foods, a part of The Graviss Group (www.gravissgroup.com), was born with a simple mission; to make everyone’s food-lives diverse, exciting and fulfilling, no matter how they choose to eat. 

In a world of fun and tempting foods, "healthy eating” often becomes a serious, boring and narrowly-defined choice. However, At GGF we strongly believe that eating with joy is essential to eating better. That's why we're obsessed with creating enjoyable food experiences for everyone, regardless of their health journeys or preferences.

In alignment with our mission, we launched The Brooklyn Creamery’s range of low calorie, no added sugar treats in early 2020 and most recently launched the second brand under the Graviss Good Foods Umbrella – Plantaway. 3 years since launch, our products can be found in over 7 countries including The United Arab Emirates, The Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, India, The Maldives & more which supports our vision of becoming a multi-brand, multi-category FMCG company focused on the better-for-you food & beverage market across the globe.

Name: NutriTap
Description:
Nutritap is a retail-tech company providing 24X7, neighbourhood retail to customers through patented, IoT based retail kiosks. Nutritap is creating alternate retail channels for brand to reach their customers directly. 

NutriTap brings retail products on tap through state of the art automated retail machines. Our mission is to make 24X7 neighbourhood retail accessible to consumers. Through our innovative, tech-driven and anywhere-anytime automated retailing machines, we bring FMCG retail at an arm's length of customers.

We embody innovation through a unique fusion methodology: we blend the peak of global mastery with the ancient heritage of Al-Ahsa Oasis to craft unparalleled creations. Every innovation is a story of Al-Ahsa pride, designed to elevate the standard of Arab hospitality.

Our mission is to deliver a bespoke luxury experience that is worthy of representing our national identity at every occasion.

Name: Resparked - Formerly EcomStyle
Description:
Somos Resparked: una marca D2C que está revolucionando cómo las personas conectan con su creatividad.

Desde Sudamérica y con un equipo remoto, diseñamos y comercializamos experiencias creativas en forma de kits de arte y manualidades que ya inspiraron a más de 550.000 personas globalmente. Operamos con mentalidad startup, crecimiento acelerado (+200% interanual) y una misión clara: volver a encender la chispa creativa en las personas.

En Resparked cada persona genera impacto real: lo que creas se materializa, se lanza al mercado e impacta en la vida de miles de personas en todo el mundo.

Si te apasiona construir desde cero, valorás la autonomía y querés ser parte de un equipo que está impulsando una marca global con alma creativa, este puede ser tu espacio para crecer.

➤ Always Growing

Name: etepetete
Description:
Wir sind etepetete, ein junges Unternehmen aus München, welches es sich zur Aufgabe gemacht hat, der Lebensmittelverschwendung den Kampf anzusagen. Denn jährlich schaffen es rund 30 - 40% der Ernte nicht in den Handel und das nur aufgrund von Schönheitsfehlern. Das Obst und Gemüse wird dann vernichtet oder zur Energiegewinnung zweckentfremdet. Bis jetzt konnten wir mit unseren Obst und -Gemüseboxen über 15 Millionen kg Bio-Obst und -Gemüse retten. Und es werden von Tag zu Tag mehr.
.
Unsere Boxen:
>100% Bio
>klimaneutraler Versand
>direkt vor deine Haustür

Helft uns gemeinsam die Welt ein bisschen Konsum-Bewusster zu gestalten und gegen Verschwendung anzukämpfen.

Name: Artisanal Brewing Ventures
Description:
Artisanal Brewing Ventures (ABV) is a Charlotte, NC based east coast focused family of like-minded, best-in-class craft beverage companies including Victory Brewing, Southern Tier Brewing, Southern Tier Distilling, Sixpoint Brewery, & Bold Rock Cider.

ABV is currently ranked as a top 10 regional craft company in the U.S., with locations in 5 states (NY, PA, OH, VA, NC) including taprooms, production facilities, & our corporate headquarters.

Our corporate teams support our family of brands through managing the “back office” work so the team members who support in the production of our liquids can focus on making great tasting, innovative quality craft beverages. Our shared services team is made up of accounting/finance, human resources, supply chain, marketing, & sales – all who are skilled in their space & share a love of craft beverages.

Brands under the ABV umbrella maintain independence with actively involved founders and a craft focused Executive Management Team.

Name: Wild&Org healthy Grab&Go cafes
Description:
It’s hard to find healthy, delicious food in the middle of a busy day, so we created a welcoming place where you can eat on your terms and live the healthy, adventurous life you deserve. 

This is why we are launching Wild&Org – to bring healthy Grab&Go to our community in Jeddah. 

Now you won’t have to make compromises on food quality for the sake of time. 

Our professional nutritionists & chefs are cooking up tantalizing tastes of earth's best to tend to your wild side’s need for culinary discovery and enjoyment while nurturing your health with honest, natural food inspired by local ingredients, all with Grab & Go convenience.

We can’t wait to meet you here soon. 

. . 

Wild&Org is the delicious Grab&Go cafe for the savvy, health-conscious foodie.


We’re committed to supporting our customers’ efforts to live their best, healthiest lives by making it easy to find healthy, organic, delicious food throughout cities in Saudi Arabia using locally-inspired ingredients. 

Our shortcut-free approach to bringing unparalleled food choices in a ready-made format to our local community puts us at the leading forefront of an urban health movement. 

Visit us online at WildandOrg.com.

Name: Ecom Style
Description:
Somos una marca de eCommerce (No agencia): Creamos productos innovadores y los vendemos directo al consumidor en Estados Unidos, AU, UK, CA y Europa. Todo esto, desde Sudamerica.

No somos para todos. Somos para los que buscan romper sus propios límites, para los que aman trabajar duro, aprender rápido y construir algo que realmente importe. 
Aca no hay lugar para lo mediocre. Si buscás comodidad o mediocridad, este no es tu lugar. Si estás listo para darlo todo y jugar en el máximo nivel, welcome onboard!

¿Qué Ofrecemos?
Crecimiento Exponencial: Si tenés lo que se necesita, acá vas a crecer más rápido que en cualquier otro lado. Invertimos mucho en capacitacion y desarrollo.
Flexibilidad con Responsabilidad: ¿Remoto? Sí. ¿Relajado? No. Acá tenés libertad, pero siempre atada a resultados concretos y de alto nivel. 
Autonomia: Confiamos en nuestra gente, dejamos tomar decisiones y liderar cambios, no importa tu puesto. Vas a poder implementar y ver resultados de tu trabajo en una marca global que nace desde 0

Desde nuestra creación en 2020, hemos enviado más de 350,000 productos de art & crafts. Nuestro propósito es ayudar a revivir la creatividad en la vida de las personas haciendo que hacer art & crafts sea simple y divertido. Todo esto a travez de un portfolio de marcas en esa industria!

Gracias por leer, valoramos que te tomes el tiempo y llegues a aca abajo. No todos lo hacen, buscamos gente como vos que si lo haga

Name: Guday
Description: Criada pela influenciadora Manu Cit, a Guday oferece gummies deliciosos que tornam a suplementação divertida. Combinando sabor e nutrição, a marca inspira um estilo de vida saudável de forma mais agradável.

Name: Switz Foods Private Limited - Mio Amore
Description:

Growing & Profitable - Your business is profitable on each channel you sell-through and has an annual revenue of $1M to $30M.

Name: Starbucks Cambodia/Laos
Description:
Our story began in 1971. Back then we were a roaster and retailer of whole bean and ground coffee, tea, and spices with a single store in Seattle’s Pike Place Market. Today, we are privileged to connect with millions of customers every day with exceptional products and more than 30,000 retail stores in 80 markets. Starbucks is named after the first mate in Herman Melville’s Moby Dick. Our logo is also inspired by the sea – featuring a twin-tailed siren from Greek mythology.
Starbucks in Cambodia began its business operation by opening its first coffeehouse in 2015. By staying connected, one cup at a time, what started off as a staff of less than 5 has grown to a staff of nearly four hundred in just 8 years. Starbucks has expanded over 30 retail locations across the country. The company is dedicated to making the Starbucks Experience a rewarding part of the day for all its customers in Cambodia while contributing positively to the community, people, and planet positive through its sponsorship and CSR activities. Aside from extraordinary coffee, Starbucks has made a business out of human connections, community involvement, and the celebration of cultures.

Description:
At The Health Factory, we pride ourselves on being innovators in the realm of wholesome nutrition. We're not ones to shy away from trying new things and challenging the norm because we believe that the path to a healthier and happier life is often carved by those willing to take the less-traveled route.

For generations, bread has been a cherished staple in the lives of many, a testament to its enduring popularity. However, in recent times, there have arisen unsettling doubts about the purity and nutritional value of the breads produced by commercial manufacturers. This is where The Health Factory steps in, committed to restoring your faith in this timeless classic.

Our mission is clear and unwavering: we aim to provide our customers with bread in its truest form. The cornerstone of our philosophy is purity, and to this end, we craft our bread with no compromises – no preservatives, no added colors, and absolutely no maida. We understand that your health is of paramount importance, and our range of products is meticulously crafted to reflect this commitment.

In a world where dietary choices often come laden with guilt, The Health Factory's range of bread offers a refreshing change. We aspire to redefine the way India consumes bread, making it not just a source of sustenance but a source of health and well-being. With each bite, you can indulge guilt-free, knowing that you are savoring the simple, unadulterated goodness of bread as it was meant to be.

Welcome to The Health Factory, where we invite you to embrace a new era of bread-eating, one that promises authenticity, quality, and, above all, your well-being. 
BREAD BADLO. AADAT NAHI.

Name: Librerie Ubik
Description:
Le librerie Ubik sono una rete di oltre 180 librerie presenti in 18 regioni italiane.

Il nome Ubik deriva dal latino "ubique" (ovunque) ed esprime l’obiettivo dell’azienda: sviluppare una rete di librerie che siano un punto di riferimento di qualità per i lettori su tutto il territorio italiano.

Ubik rappresenta un modello di offerta focalizzato sulle peculiarità dei mestieri del libro: il ruolo del libraio, la sua indipendenza, la volontà di fornire servizio e assortimento, il radicamento sul territorio, la capacità di attrarre comunità di lettori. 

Ubik è il retail in franchising della holding EMMELIBRI - GRUPPO MESSAGGERIE, società che coordina le attività distributive e commerciali nell'ambito librario.

I punti forti del franchising Ubik sono:
-	Il radicamento sul territorio
-	L’identità e l’indipendenza di ogni libreria
-	Un forte orientamento al cliente, con una particolare attenzione al lettore forte
-	La creazione di una comunità di lettori intorno alla libreria attraverso eventi e incontri con gli autori
-	La formazione e l’aggiornamento costante dei librai 
-	Un’architettura digitale a sostegno dell’attività del libraio 
-	L’eccellenza logistica con la reperibilità di oltre 150.000 titoli in 48 ore

Name: Lala Company
Description:
The Good Indian Employee’s Guide to Surviving a Lala Company is an essential read for anyone navigating the unique landscape of Indian family-owned businesses. Written by Rajiv Gupta, a corporate veteran with over 30 years of experience, this book is packed with candid insights, practical advice, and a touch of humor, making it relatable and enjoyable.

Through vivid real-life examples and humorous cartoons, this guide reveals the dual perspectives of both employee and employer. It dives deep into the distinct culture of Lala Companies—known for their loyalty and traditional values, yet often shaped by rigid hierarchies and blurred personal boundaries. The book offers invaluable advice on how employees can not only survive but thrive in these settings, while also providing owners with strategies to strengthen both their business and family bonds.

Since its launch, The Good Indian Employee’s Guide to Surviving a Lala Company has been celebrated for its honest take on building trust, transparency, and communication in family businesses and was Shortlisted in Top 5 for the 2023 BBLF CK Prahlad Best Book Business Award.

It’s a must-read for anyone looking to make a meaningful impact in the family business world.

 Get your copy today: https://www.amazon.in/Indian-Employees-Guide-Surviving-Company/dp/9356291217/

Our Mission

At Good In Bread, we strive to provide easy access to nutritious and tasty sourdough bread to homes in the UK. We believe that everyone deserves the best quality bread, made from the finest ingredients, without any hassle.  

Our Values

Health: We prioritise your well-being by using only the highest-quality, natural ingredients. Our sourdough is not only delicious but also beneficial for your health. We are committed to educating our community, empowering them to make healthy food choices.

Sustainability: We are committed to the health of our planet. We recognise the importance of sustainable farming practices and therefore choose organic regenerative flour for our loaves. We also adhere to a zero waste philosophy as all our bread is made-to-order. We strive to think of sustainability holistically, from the product to the packaging, to the way our products are delivered.

Community: As proud members of Buy Women Built, we support and network  with other female entrepreneurs. We believe in the power of community and work to create positive change through our business practices.

Join Us

Experience the joy of freshly baked sourdough delivered to your home. Visit us at https://wearegoodinbread.com/ to learn more about our offerings and subscribe today.

Description: MyKidStory est une plateforme unique d'apprentissage par la lecture qui permet de créer des histoires sur mesures, pédagogique et éducatives pour les enfants dans lesquelles ils deviennent les héros de leurs histoires. Elle utilise et développe des algorithmes d'Intelligence Artificielle pour réinventer la façon dont les enfants apprennent en les impliquants dans un processus ludique. Badger Bevs, LLC was founded in 2022 by David Vogel.  David is partnered with the Bishop Family, founders of Sobe Beverages and Blue Buffalo Pet Products.  Together they plan to bring Badger to America’s best bars, restaurants, country clubs, hotels, cruise lines and retailers.

As a subsidiary of Capital Finance Group, C-Tradis is a company specializing in the distribution of Fast-Moving Consumer Goods (FMCG). Operating primarily through traditional channels, we cover over 60% of the Moroccan territory, from Tanger to Essaouira.
Our workforce comprises a total of 500 employees across all departments, including sales, logistics, and finance. We utilize an ERP system to automate our sales and accounting processes, along with IT solutions that provide real-time data on sales, qualitative KPIs, and more.

Description:

Les 4 piliers du concept de MyPiscine.com sont : délais, expertise, prix et service. 

 Le délai : la quasi totalité du matériel proposé sur notre site est en stock, au sein de notre plateforme logistique. Plus de 7M€ en pleine saison. Notre outil logistique nous permet d'expédier toutes commandes passées sur Mypiscine.com avant midi le jour même.

 L'expertise : nous sommes à la fois experts dans le domaine du E-Commerce ET de la piscine. Ainsi, nos développeurs informatiques côtoient chaque jour nos techniciens spécialistes de la piscine. C'est l'ADN de Mypiscine, depuis ses débuts. Une savoureuse alchimie !

 Le prix : nous ne sommes pas toujours les moins chers, mais garantissons l'achat au juste prix. Cette notion, qui nous est primordiale, permet à la société de consolider ses bases financières tout en préservant notre éthique : aucune externalisation à l'étranger.

 Le service : pourquoi acheter sur internet serait il moins bien que d'acheter en boutique traditionnelle ? 
Nous essayons de démontrer le contraire, sans pour autant dresser un mur entre ces deux secteurs d'activité.  Nous sommes complémentaires.
