Name: Swell UK
Description:
About Swell UK Ltd

Swell UK Ltd is one of the UK’s leading specialist pet retailers, with a multimillion-pound turnover and over 50 dedicated staff based at our 40,000 sq. ft. head office and warehouse in Greater Manchester.

Since our launch, we’ve grown to become a trusted name in aquatics, ponds, marine, and indoor aquariums, while also establishing ourselves as the UK’s retail leader in reptile equipment. Alongside distributing products from the world’s best brands, we design and develop our own exclusive Swell products—bringing innovation and quality directly to our customers.

Our warehouse stocks over 12,000 product lines, ensuring a huge range for our customers, and we’re proud to operate a well-stocked retail shop offering great quality livestock, from tropical and marine fish to reptiles, all cared for by our expert team.

Our people cover everything from marketing and customer service to warehousing and livestock care, working together to deliver a seamless experience for hobbyists, first-time keepers, and serious aquarists alike.

At Swell UK, we pride ourselves on being forward-thinking and ambitious, always seeking new ways to innovate within the specialist pet industry. Whether it’s pioneering new product ranges, investing in digital growth, or reimagining what a pet retailer can be, we’re building for the future.

If you want to be part of a fast-growing, innovative, and dynamic company where your work has a real impact, Swell UK is the place to thrive.

Name: Marius Wine Shop
Description:
Eén van de fijnste wijnwinkels van Nederland. Dat is waar we bij Marius naar streven. In onze winkels in het Haagse Zeeheldenkwartier (sinds 2005) en Wassenaar. Marius wil een plek zijn van en voor wijnliefhebbers, met een collectie wijn waar we trots op zijn. Die we direct bij de wijnmakers zelf proeven én inkopen. Wijn van toegewijde kleine en grote wijnhuizen, wijnboeren en estates van over de hele wereld. Wijnmakers die geloven in wat ze maken, gepassioneerd zijn om iets bijzonders te creëren. Het aan-bod in onze winkels is net zo breed en gevarieerd als ons smaakpalet. Veel van onze wijnen scoren elk jaar opnieuw weer hoog in wijngidsen als de Omfietswijn, De Grote Hamersma, maar ook bij gerenommeerde internationale kenners als Parker, Decanter en The Wine Advocate. We leveren niet voor niets aan een toe-nemend aantal restaurants in Den Haag en omstreken, van eetcafé’s tot sterrenzaak.

Bij Marius vind je wijnen uit de oude en de nieuwe wereld, van eenvoudige plezierige en gemakkelijke wijnen die je elke dag zou kunnen drinken tot wijnen met een diepgang en complexiteit waar je lang en intens van kunt genieten. We helpen je graag de juiste wijn te vinden, van een snelle doordeweekse fles, een bijzondere saké tot een uitgebreide reis door de wijnwereld. Elke vrijdag en zaterdag staan er in onze winkels flessen open om te proeven. Regelmatig ontvangen we wijnmakers in de winkel en houden we proeverijen. Het team van Marius organiseert daarnaast wijnavonden en wijndiners in samenwerking met de restaurants waar wij aan leveren en verzorgt ook opleidingen in samenwerking met de wijnacademie. In onze webshop MariusWijn.nl is de hele collectie die Marius biedt terug te vinden én te bestellen. Wij bezorgen de wijn zo snel mogelijk, desgewenst in cadeauverpakking. In onze winkels geven we graag persoonlijk advies. Liefst zo goed mogelijk. Omdat we nu eenmaal één van de fijnste wijnwinkels van Nederland willen zijn. Welkom bij Marius.

Description:

La nostra offerta nasce dall’ascolto dei vostri bisogni dall’ascolto delle vostre esigenze e dalla consapevolezza di essere un punto di riferimento per molti. 

Consigliamo i prodotti migliori, seguiamo la crescita dei vostri figli e aiutiamo mamme e papà durante le prime fasi di sviluppo dei loro bambini.

Siamo un’azienda che da sempre mette in primo piano l’ascolto, la qualità, e l’efficienza.

Name: VERMUTERIA-PORTUGUESA
Description:
A VERMUTERIA PORTUGUESA é uma marca registada pertencente à WINE-TIME EUROPE Lda (www.wine-time.biz) empresa especializada na importação e Distribuição de bebidas alcoólicas (vinhos, champagnes, vermutes, licores e espirituosos).

No decorrer dos anos a Wine-Time Europe pressentiu um crescimento na área dos vermutes e aperitivos devido ao crescimento de estrangeiros radicados em Portugal e pelos milhares de visitantes ocasionais, todos trazendo com eles a cultura dos seus países, nomeadamente os da Europa do Sul, que não dispensavam o seu apéritif.

Assim nasceu a vontade de empurrar esta cultura aproveitando a abertura de esplanadas em todos os passeios disponíveis em Portugal e proporcionando assim mais uma fonte de receitas para os especialistas do canal Horeca.

Hoje podemos afirmar que embora ainda principiante a noção do aperitivo está já bem assente e já podemos afirmar que os vermutes não são unicamente utilizados na mixologia para cocktails famosos como o Negroni ou o Manhattan.

Aqui na Vermuteria Portuguesa, quisemos criar um espaço virtual onde os amantes de Vermutes e Aperitivos podem encontrar o que se faz de melhor nesta categoria de bebidas antigas mas de tanta actualidade,

Name: Livros Fraternos
Description:
𝗟𝗶𝘃𝗿𝗼𝘀 𝗙𝗿𝗮𝘁𝗲𝗿𝗻𝗼𝘀 é uma Iniciativa Voluntária Permanente de arrecadação e venda de livros para manter e criar Bibliotecas Vivas nos projetos da Fraternidade sem Fronteiras – uma organização humanitária sem fins lucrativos.

𝗟𝗶𝘃𝗿𝗼𝘀 𝗙𝗿𝗮𝘁𝗲𝗿𝗻𝗼𝘀 é formado por Empreendedores Sociais Voluntários em diversas cidades no Brasil e no exterior, realizando ações estrategicamente dentro dos Objetivos de Livros Fraternos – o GIPE:
𝗚 - Gerar recursos financeiros através da venda de livros adquiridos por doação
𝗜 - Incentivar o apadrinhamento de projetos sociais e o voluntariado
𝗣 - Promover a cultura e educação através da criação e manutenção de Bibliotecas Vivas
𝗘 - Estimular a consciência e a sustentabilidade ambiental

O principal investimento com os valores arrecadados com a venda de livros destina-se ao financiamento para criação e manutenção das Bibliotecas Vivas dentro dos Projetos Próprios e Apoiados pela Fraternidade sem Fronteiras, além da capacitação e preparação de tutores, facilitadores e cuidadores responsáveis pelas bibliotecas no Brasil e no exterior.

Os Polos Locais de Livros Fraternos administram localmente atividades como: gestão e organização das ações, relacionamento com as diversas parcerias; comunicação e divulgação de ações; captação e arrecadação dos livros doados; curadoria, categorização e precificação dos livros; controle, estoque e armazenamento dos livros; e a estruturação das Livrotecas Criativas para a venda de livros.

Os livros doados recebidos pelos Polos Locais, podem ser: usados, novos, seminovos, antigos, danificados, já expostos, de segunda mão, não mais vendáveis, com pequenos defeitos, com avarias, com páginas amareladas, com ferrugem de papel, com presença de amassados, com marcas, com manchas, com riscos, com sinais de uso, com imperfeição de produção etc.

Para ser Doador, Apoiador ou Voluntário fale conosco:
e-mail: livrosfraternos@gmail.com
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/livrosfraternos/
.

Name: WildVoie
Description:
Adventure calls—in the whisper of the wind, the crunch of trails beneath your feet, and the promise of discovery waiting just beyond the horizon. At WildVoie, we’re here for those who seek the raw beauty of the outdoors and the thrill of adventure.

Born from a deep love of exploration, WildVoie is more than an outdoor gear store—it’s a gateway to freedom. Our name reflects our passion for the wild path (“Voie”), the road less traveled, where every turn unveils new experiences. It’s a call to step off the beaten track and forge your own journey, embracing the beauty, challenges, and unpredictability of the natural world.

At WildVoie, we specialize in equipping adventurers with the tools they need to go further and connect more deeply with nature. From high-performance e-bikes designed to conquer rugged terrain to durable camping tents that provide shelter in even the harshest conditions, our products are built for those who don’t just visit the outdoors but live for it. Each piece of gear is handpicked with the true adventurer in mind, ensuring reliability, performance, and a connection to the untamed wilderness.

WildVoie is more than gear—it’s a community of like-minded explorers who value freedom, discovery, and the power of the natural world to inspire and rejuvenate. We are for those who embrace challenges, find beauty in the unpredictable, and long to reconnect with the world around them.

Our mission is simple: to help you go further, explore deeper, and ignite your adventurous spirit. Whether you're summiting a remote peak, cycling down rugged trails, or camping under a star-filled sky, WildVoie is here to support your journey.

Pack your curiosity, stoke the fire of your adventurous spirit, and step into the wild. At WildVoie, we invite you to dare to roam, to break free from the ordinary, and to live your adventure.

WildVoie: Dare to roam.

Name: Go Cartly
Description:
About Us

Go Cartly is an early-stage startup with a simple mission: to make online shopping easier, faster, and more enjoyable for everyone.

We are a team of curious, driven individuals who believe that the future of retail lies in simplicity, connection, and accessibility. In a world where online shopping can often feel overwhelming with too many options, inconsistent supplier experiences, and scattered content, we’re working on building a platform that brings it all together in a smarter way.

At this stage, we’re laying the groundwork. That means wearing many hats and tackling the essential building blocks of a modern e-commerce brand:

Content & Storytelling: Crafting engaging, relatable narratives to connect with shoppers and suppliers.

Supplier Partnerships: Building trusted relationships to ensure variety, quality, and reliability in what we offer.

Social Media Engagement: Creating an authentic digital presence to grow a community around our vision.

Team Collaboration: Empowering our small but passionate team to innovate, experiment, and learn as we go.

We don’t yet have a website or a finished product to showcase, but that’s the exciting part. We’re in the process of learning, testing, and shaping our ideas into something impactful. What sets us apart is our culture: a group of curious minds who aren’t afraid to ask questions, try new things, and rethink the way online shopping can and should work.

Our long-term vision is to build a platform that benefits both sides of the shopping experience. For shoppers, Go Cartly will provide a seamless, trustworthy, and enjoyable way to discover and buy products. For suppliers, we aim to offer a space where they can connect with customers more directly, share their stories, and grow their businesses without unnecessary friction.

Above all, Go Cartly is about people: our team, our partners, and the shoppers we serve. Every step we take is guided by the belief that technology should simplify life.

In the heart of Tokyo, where the rhythm of street culture and the pulse of fashion create a symphony of contrasts, 2foods emerged as an icon. Our journey started with a vision—to orchestrate harmony from the seemingly discordant. Just like Tokyo itself, 2foods embodies a fusion of worlds. It's a blend of tradition and innovation, bridging the gap between the bold and the humble, the global and the quintessentially Japanese.

Our name, TWO, encapsulates our ethos. It signifies the perfect balance between function and emotion, fashion and universality. In each delectable, 100% plant-based bite we offer, we capture the essence of emotions, crafting not just food, but unforgettable experiences.

At 2foods, we're not just creators; we're catalysts for change. We're deeply rooted in the cultural movements that shape our world. From the electrifying beats of hip-hop to the adrenaline-fueled world of extreme sports, our connection to street culture is not just authentic; it's at the core of our identity. In just over two years, this connection has propelled us to become Tokyo's number one plant-based restaurant group and CPG brand.

We stand at the intersection of music, fashion, and plant-based living, celebrating a vibrant and inclusive community. Our products are a tribute to impeccable Japanese quality and craftsmanship, ensuring that every plant-based offering is as delicious as it is responsible.

But 2foods isn't just about feeding the body; it's about nourishing the soul. It's about being part of a movement that values taste, texture, and the planet equally. We're here to change the world, one delectable, plant-based bite at a time. Made with love in Japan, cherished in every corner of the globe.

With 2foods, you don't just savor flavor; you savor life's most flavorful moments.

Founded in 2023 and headquartered in Phnom Penh, Cambodia, Bug-Free Home is at the forefront of providing eco-friendly and effective solutions against flies and mosquitoes. Our mission is to create safe, bug-free living environments that cater to the well-being of individuals and communities across Cambodia. With a focus on innovation and sustainability, we import and distribute a range of non-toxic, pyrethrum-based insect repellents.

Our products are designed for rapid action, offering a 90% reduction in flies and mosquitoes within just three days, backed by a full money-back guarantee. Recognizing the importance of safety, our sprays exhibit no toxicity to humans and pets, making them ideal for use in homes, as well as in sensitive environments like hotels, restaurants, spas, and clinics.

In addition to our flagship repellents, we provide a selection of automated dispensers, ensuring continuous protection with minimal environmental impact. While our products are available nationwide, we offer specialized installation and maintenance services exclusively in Phnom Penh.

At Bug-Free Home, we're not just about pest control; we're about creating healthier living spaces. Our commitment to non-toxic solutions means you can enjoy peace of mind, knowing you're protected without harming the planet. Join us in our mission to safeguard Cambodia from mosquito-borne diseases, one bug-free zone at a time.

Name: Dodjivi
Description:
We’ve only got one life to live, so why not make it a great one! We are dedicated to providing epicureans like you with an experience to satisfy the senses. Functional foods and high-quality mushroom-based products, backed by powerful scientific research, accessible to everyone. Tried-and-true, live life the Dodjivi way, with your cup half-full. Everybody say yama-yama with me, it’s time to start a functional food revolution!

Our journey began in 2013. My spouse, Claudine, and I are salsa dance teachers in Quebec; it’s certainly a way to warm up the Canadian winters. Dodjivi came to life as a by-product of my love for Claudine and our journey towards health together. After sustaining multiple injuries and health complications, dancing became difficult for Claudine. As her pain and sleepless nights continued, I knew I had to do something, so paso a paso, I searched tirelessly for a solution…

What does Dodjivi mean and how on Earth do you say it?! Pronounced as doe-(d)jee-vee; the name Dodjivi holds significant meaning. My name is Komlanvi Dodji Dodjro, I am a native of the small but mighty country, Togo in West Africa. In my mother tongue, Ewe, the word Dodji means courage, fortitude, hope, and perseverance. Vi means to start small.

We strive to educate our fellow foodies on how to incorporate functional foods into their daily nutrition and lifestyle. We aim to simplify our global community’s path to good health. Our mission is to allow people to discover how to look after themselves by joining a wholesome revolution.

Vision
Our vision is to lead an exciting movement in the functional food industry. We want to be a sustainable Canadian company proud of making high-quality functional mushroom-based products accessible to everyone, everywhere! We believe in providing holistic solutions to support your health journey and small lifestyle changes for a vibrant future.

Read our full story: dodjivi.com/our-story

Name: Monday Morning AF
Description:
Most people doubt it’s possible to enjoy alcohol-free drinking. At Monday Morning, we called B.S. We curate the best non-alcoholic brews, wines, spirits, and cocktails from around the world and bring them to our non-alcoholic bottle shop in San Diego so San Diegans can enjoy drinking differently.

We’re on a mission to remove the barriers to alcohol-free drinking and transform the AF scene with vibrant drinks that bring people together without the haze of alcohol.

Enjoy the top non-alcoholic drinks from around the world at our bottle shop, tasting room, and online store. Whatever your reason for drinking booze-free beverages, do it without missing out on fun or flavor.

Choosing a non-alcoholic beverage is about choosing you. And when you choose yourself, you also choose connection and community. Doing what you need to do for yourself makes the people around you better, too. We’re all about that.

Our non-alcoholic bottle shop and tasting room is a welcoming place for mindful drinkers to:
Sample different non-alcoholic drinks to find your favorites
Attend mocktail mixology classes so you can learn to DIY your own drinks at home
Connect with fellow AF drinkers, whether fully AF or sober curious
Create a custom pack of your favorite non-alcoholic brews
Shop non-alcoholic wines, brews, spirits, and cocktails from around the globe–many of which you’ll only be able to find in OUR shop!

Whatever brings you to our shop – cutting back, going dry, or simply sober curious — you’re welcome here at Monday Morning.

Name: TacVent
Description: We thank you for taking the time to look at the cop-invented and American-made TacVent, the first and only passive ventilation device that allows the unobstructed flow and release of heat through true separation, using actual space, not matter – no spongy, meshy, absorptive material or inflatable devices, both of which can be counterproductive. Testing has shown TacVent to lower body surface temperatures by at least 14.5°, its distinctly unique and patented design consisting of a corrugated and perforated panel of extremely soft and highly flexible, engineering-grade, hypoallergenic thermoplastic elastomer. A huge plus is that its design and material allow it to act as a cushion, profoundly minimizing blunt force trauma. Using Velcro, it is easily secured and removed with all armor carriers, front and back, the “hook” portion stitched to the TacVent, and the “loop” portion attached with high-adhesive backing to any material. Again, we truly appreciate you taking a look at TacVent, the only solution in body armor ventilation!

Description:

Baked in Tavistock, where it all began, our flapjacks come in all kinds of delicious flavours - think Burnt Caramel & Sea Salt, Honeycomb Rocky Road, and plenty more. We’re also big on gifting, whether it’s a thoughtful treat for someone special or a corporate gift to impress.

Acreditamos que uma alimentação saudável e nutritiva é a força mais poderosa para mudança que o mundo precisa. E é por isso que nosso objetivo é criar um ecossistema que promove renda justa, reduz desperdícios e contribui para um caminho de suprimentos mais sustentável, diminuido a distância dos alimentos até o seu prato. 

Quintal Coletivo, revolucionando o modelo de consumo atual através de um mercado sustentável. Pediu, chegou!

At Gimi Michi, we're on a mission to bring the bold, authentic flavors of Southeast Asia to your everyday meals—conveniently, affordably, and with zero compromise on taste.

Every bowl of Gimi Michi is backed by months of R&D, real tasting panels, and obsessive attention to detail—from the chewy, long-strand noodles to our signature seasoning and vegetable blend. It’s not just a snack—it’s a full meal experience.

We're building more than just a product—we’re building a brand that celebrates real food, cross-cultural flavors, and a bold new wave of FMCG innovation from India.

Whether you're a foodie, an explorer of global cuisines, or just someone craving a hearty, flavorful meal—we're here for you.

Whether you’d like us to fill the cart with tons of delicious sweets and baked treats, or looking for a dry hire to fill the cart yourself, we provide a cost effective way to make your occasion an event that your guests will remember for years to come.

Name: Donkid
Description:
Donkid Srl è un'azienda digitale multicanale in forte espansione, specializzata nella vendita online di prodotti per la prima infanzia, ausili per l’incontinenza, prodotti paramedicali e per animali domestici con una vocazione aperta all’innovazione e alla diversificazione.

Fondata nel 2018, Donkid ha costruito un solido modello di business basato sull’integrazione strategica tra marketplace internazionali (Amazon, eBay, Cdiscount, Kaufland, Redcare/Shop Apotheke/Farmaline, Worten, TikTok Shop, Allegro, Empik) e una rete proprietaria di eCommerce verticali e generalisti, attivi in tutta l’Unione Europea e nel Regno Unito.

Nel solo biennio 2023-2024, Donkid ha registrato una crescita straordinaria, con un +230% nel 2023 e +120% nel 2024. Al centro di questo sviluppo c’è una visione chiara: diventare uno dei principali Digital Retailer italiani, portando qualità, affidabilità e specializzazione in segmenti di mercato in forte evoluzione.

L'azienda investe costantemente in nuovi progetti, nello sviluppo di Private Label e nella registrazione di marchi proprietari, cogliendo le opportunità emergenti in modo rapido e strutturato.

Crescita, apertura al cambiamento e ambizione imprenditoriale sono le leve che ci guidano ogni giorno, con l’obiettivo di conquistare nuovi mercati, ampliare il nostro portfolio-marchi e costruire una relazione di valore duratura con il cliente.

Name: GOTOOLS
Description:
Willkommen bei gotools.de – Ihrem ultimativen Ziel für hochwertige Werkzeuge und Zubehör, egal ob Sie ein leidenschaftlicher Heimwerker oder ein Profi sind. Unser Unternehmen ist stolz darauf, Werkzeugliebhabern die besten Produkte anzubieten.

Unsere Mission ist einfach: Wir sind genauso begeistert von Werkzeugen wie unsere Kunden. Bei gotools.de dreht sich alles um die Welt der Werkzeuge, und unsere Follower teilen diese Leidenschaft mit uns. Wir sind zu 100 % von echten Werkzeugfans umgeben, und das spiegelt sich in unserer engagierten Community wider.

Mit über 30 Jahren Erfahrung im stationären Handel haben wir ein tiefes Verständnis für die Bedürfnisse unserer Kunden entwickelt. Diese Expertise haben wir erfolgreich in unseren Online-Shop übertragen, um sicherzustellen, dass Sie die besten Werkzeuge und das perfekte Zubehör finden.

Aber das ist noch nicht alles. Unser YouTube-Channel hat bereits über 170.000 glückliche Abonnenten gewonnen. Dort teilen wir unser Wissen, bieten Tipps und Tricks sowie Produktbewertungen – alles im Dienste unserer Werkzeug-Community.

Auf Facebook haben wir eine lebendige Gemeinschaft aus über 42.000 echten Werkzeugfans geschaffen. Hier tauschen wir Ideen aus, diskutieren Projekte und feiern unsere gemeinsame Begeisterung für hochwertige Werkzeuge.

Bei gotools.de geht es nicht nur um den Verkauf von Werkzeugen, sondern auch darum, eine lebendige Werkzeug-Community aufzubauen. Wir sind stolz darauf, ein Teil dieser Gemeinschaft zu sein und freuen uns darauf, unsere Leidenschaft für Werkzeuge mit Ihnen zu teilen. Werden Sie Teil unserer Familie, und entdecken Sie die Welt der Werkzeuge auf gotools.de!

Name: ape2o
Description:
We are the Anti-plastic-bottle Water Company: spearheading 21st century public water provision for Smart Cities

Our mission is to eradicate single use plastic water bottles - water on-the-go without plastic. 

We all know the problem: there's a growing environmental catastrophe of single use plastic, not just in the natural world, but even in the human gut … now that's the last straw! Paying £1.50 on-the-go for plastic bottled water makes no economic sense, and the bottles exacerbate the problem. There is an inevitable trend towards more sustainable alternatives. 

We've created a network of sophisticated public water vending machines with still & sparkling ultra-filtered water, a range of stay-cold steel refillable bottles, and a philanthropic mandate to clean up oceans/beaches/rivers and fund conservation projects.

We're a profit-with-purpose certified B Corp, donating 10% of all our sales to our cause. 

We want you to feel good about refilling knowing that with every refill and bottle purchase, you're part of the solution, not the problem. 

We're recession friendly and relevant in a post-covid world with hygiene and water purity at our core.

Doch tonton ist mehr als nur ein Schulranzen. Mit unserem 1:1-Prinzip spenden wir für jeden verkauften Ranzen einen ähnlichen an ein Kind in Not. So fördern wir Bildungschancen und Chancengleichheit – ein Schulranzen nach dem anderen.

Unsere Werte: Qualität, Nachhaltigkeit, soziale Verantwortung und Individualität. Wir glauben, dass Bildung der Schlüssel zu einer besseren Zukunft ist – und möchten mit unseren Produkten einen positiven Beitrag leisten.

Name: SPPL
Description:
About Us www.purepollachi.com


We Are The Future of Tender Coconuts – Pure, Fresh, Effortless

Imagine holding a tender coconut so perfectly designed that opening it is as easy as a gentle push —no tools, no hassle, just nature’s goodness in its purest form. Our premium-quality tender coconuts are crafted for modern convenience, ensuring that every sip is an experience of effortless refreshment.

With a naturally stable base, our coconuts sit securely on your table, allowing you to enjoy your drink without spills or balancing tricks. Whether at home, in a café, or on the go, hydration has never been this seamless.

But convenience is just the beginning. From the lush farms where they are carefully nurtured to the moment they reach your hands, our coconuts travel through a meticulously controlled, ultra-hygienic, and temperature-regulated supply chain. Every step is designed to preserve their freshness, flavor, and nutrition—so you get nothing but the best.

We are not just offering coconuts; we are revolutionizing the way you enjoy them. No mess. No stress. Just pure, natural hydration at its finest.

Welcome to a new era of coconut indulgence. Fresh. Hygienic. Effortless. Designed for professionals and individuals with sedentary lifestyles, our product is set to redefine the beverage industry.

Dans un fût de bonne humeur, élevez 130 vignerons et faites évoluer les arômes avec des moments inoubliables. Saupoudrez d’une pointe d’humour, structurez avec quelques brins de douceur. Sortez vos plus beaux tire-bouchons et choisissez un des 600 moments de bonheur (600 références disponibles) à votre disposition.

Name: Curry Town Pizza
Description:
Curry Town Pizza: Redefining the Global Pizza Landscape  

Curry Town Pizza is an ambitious, disruptive QSR concept actively developing a premium Fusion Pizza brand destined to become a market leader in the UK and beyond.

We are currently operating at a grassroots level (from a market-tested gazebo concept) with a clear vision for scalable growth, operational excellence, and a differentiated culinary offering.

For Pizza Professionals & Chefs: We are pioneering the next major food trend. Our focus is on the artisan technique and innovative application of flavour, demanding a high level of culinary skill. We offer a chance to work with a unique product at the intersection of two major global cuisines.

For Future Investors: We are validating a highly scalable, high-margin model built on the untapped demand for elevated East-meets-West cuisine. We aim to move from market concept to a full-scale operation with strong unit economics and a defensible, unique brand identity.

Follow us to track our journey as we prove our concept, refine our operations, and move toward significant scaling. We are building the future of pizza, and we're looking for ambitious partners to join us.

Name: Big Guns Coffee and Farm
Description:
Introducing Big Guns Coffee: Where High-Octane Coffee Meets Heart and Soul

Are you tired of the same old cup of joe that leaves you feeling uninspired and lacking the energy to tackle life's challenges? Look no further than Big Guns Coffee, the brainchild of the dynamic duo: T.Shane Johnson and his seven-year-old daughter, Charli Johnson. This is not your average coffee; it's a caffeinated masterpiece crafted with passion, resilience, and a whole lot of love.

T.Shane Johnson is no ordinary individual. He's a Marine Corps Veteran, serial entrepreneur, motivational speaker, madman, author, world record athlete, and philanthropist. Having faced life-threatening situations, homelessness, and adversity, he embodies the spirit of never quitting and living life on the edge. His remarkable journey has inspired millions, and now he's channeling that same energy into the creation of Big Guns Coffee.

The story of Big Guns Coffee started with Charli Johnson, a budding entrepreneur in her own right. She suggested to her father that they create a coffee brand that reflects their fast-living, risk-taking attitude. Together, they embarked on a mission to create a coffee line that would energize and motivate individuals like no other. And thus, Big Guns Coffee was born.

With an impressive selection of 38 blends sourced from every corner of the earth, Big Guns Coffee offers a tantalizing array of flavors that will awaken your taste buds and invigorate your senses. Each roast is carefully crafted to deliver an extraordinary taste and an unparalleled caffeine boost that will have you crushing your life goals on a daily basis. And to top it off, Big Guns Coffee proudly presents the First North Carolina Hydroponic Coffee Farm EVER, ensuring that every sip is infused with freshness and quality.

At the heart of Big Guns Coffee is the unwavering dedication of T.Shane and Charli Johnson. Every Sunday, they transform their garage into a coffee-roasting haven.

Our founder Dan spent several years in and out of incarceration between the ages of thirteen and twenty-two before his first child was born while he was in prison. Since then he has turned his life around and has over forty years experience in Hospitality leading brands like Applebee's, Logan's Roadhouse, Marie Callender's , Rock Bottom Brewery, Illegal Pete's and Cheba Hut to name a few.

In almost every company we have seen that the front line employee is under-valued while the CEO and investors clean up on the backs of their hard work. We seek to create something better, something different where everyone wins.

Name: MyFeld AG
Description:
Konsumenten wünschen sich frische Lebensmittel aus der Region, ehrlich und sozial produziert. Regional, nachhaltig und klimaschonend sind längst nicht mehr leere Worte. Gemüseanbau mit der Natur als Partner – krumm gewachsen und entgegen der Norm im Supermarkt. Jeder der schon sein eigenes Gemüse geerntet hat, weiss, dass es einfach besser schmeckt als Standardware. Aber in unserem heutige Leben haben nur wenige  die Zeit, um sich darum zu kümmern oder der Platz in der Stadtwohnung fehlt!

Hier kommt MyFeld.ch ins Spiel: Wir bringen dir deinen eigenen Garten ins  Wohnzimmer. Und dies in digitaler und spielerischer Weise.

Pflanze online Gemüse, Früchte und Kräuter. Du hast die Wahl aus über 30 Sorten, um dein eigenes 16 qm Feld zu bestücken. Über eine Webcam kannst du dann sogar dein Gemüse beobachten, wie es wächst. Den Unterhalt übernehmen wir für dich – unsere Bauern und Gärtner pflegen deinen Garten mit bestem Wissen und Gewissen. Sobald deine Ernte reif ist, liefern wir dir die MyFeld.ch-Box in regelmässigen Abständen nach Hause.

Name: Sanad Books
Description:
At SanadBooks, we’re passionate about transforming the book industry by connecting publishers and readers all around the globe. Our platform makes it easy for publishers to reach a worldwide audience and share their stories with readers everywhere.

Here’s how we help publishers:

    - Reach More Readers: We open the doors to a global market, helping your books find new readers in every corner of the world.
    - Promote Your Titles: Whether it’s a brand-new release or a classic from your backlist, our platform lets you easily showcase and market your books to a wide audience.
    - Free Global Shipping: We handle the logistics so you don’t have to. We ensure your books are delivered quickly and reliably to readers worldwide—at no cost to you.

At SanadBooks, we’re dedicated to helping publishers grow and making books accessible to everyone. Together, we can share the love of reading with the world.

Name: Cookie Dough Bliss
Description:
The Brand Story You Didn’t Know You Needed (But You Absolutely Do)

Once upon a time (around 2017), a couple of brave souls decided the world needed a new kind of happiness. Sure, there’s world peace and ending hunger, but have you ever just sat down with a spoon and some cookie dough? Not the kind your mom told you not to eat, but the kind that makes you feel like you’ve won the emotional lottery, minus the salmonella.

We tried to resist. We really did. But let’s be honest, resisting cookie dough is like trying to outrun a treadmill—it’s exhausting, pointless, and you end up with cookie dough anyway. So we embraced it. And thus, Cookie Dough Bliss was born. Because you deserve dessert that loves you back.

Fast forward to today, we’re franchising this magical experience across the land. We’re not just here to sell cookie dough, we’re here to make bad days better, to celebrate the fact that you don’t need a reason to eat cookie dough, and to remind you that life’s too short for the “I’ll start my diet on Monday” nonsense. Spoiler alert: Monday never comes.

We’re not heroes. But if someone wants to start calling us that, we won’t stop you.

Name: Veda Bharath Natural Food Products Private Limited
Description:
Veda Bharath Foods Pvt Ltd is a Hyderabad based social business forefront in the development and promotion of natural farming and expertise in desi seeds for healthy yield, free from contamination. 

Veda Bharath associates with farmers by supplying desi seeds, buy back desi rice and market the premium quality healthy rice on ecommerce platforms and retail outlets in India, and further plans to export as well. 

Built on the strong foundation of ancient Vedic philosophy of “Sarve Jana Sukhino Bhavantu” which translates to “May everyone be happy”, Veda Bharath believes healthy eating leads to physical and mental well-being, influencing happiness. And Veda Bharath endeavours for a pollution-free, strong and healthy India, through its commitment to natural farming methods free from chemicals. 

Active in the field of natural farming since 2017, the environmentally conscious company strongly believes that natural farming ensures environment protection, farmer welfare and consumers’ good health. Taking inspiration from the pragmatic agriculturist and famous exponent of natural farming, Shri Subhash Palekar, Veda Bharath aims to encourage farmers to adopt natural farming methods, while protecting cows, which are an integral part of farming families. 

Veda Bharath sources over 4700 varieties of desi seeds which facilitates farmers a viable and debt free farming practices. Beginning with 10 acres, Veda Bharath has now reached 600 acres and plans to cover 1000 acres of land under natural farming, by collaborating with farmers. Adhering to its tagline, Veda Bharath envisions to dedicate its efforts towards healthy natural farming practice that results in a healthy community, happy farmers and successful business.

Name: Le Goût des Vins - Cave & Dégustation
Description:
L’histoire remonte à 2012… Des vacances en Toscane. Un coup de foudre pour une cave - bar à vin. Et l’idée lancée autour d’antipasti et de bons verres de Chianti, les yeux pleins d’étoiles … « un jour on fera çà ! »… 
En 2020, en plein confinement, l’audace nous emporte : on se lance ! La France offre cette opportunité de pouvoir créer une entreprise en 3 semaines seulement, même en cette période si spéciale… Alors le concept de base n’est pas tout à fait celui-là, mais on s’adapte ! Caviste en ligne avec livraison expresse sur la métropole lilloise avec pour objectif bien sûr de s’installer ensuite physiquement. 

Mars 2022 nous y sommes ! Après quelques mois d’attente, et quelques autres travaux de transformation, nous avons le plaisir de vous accueillir à Chéreng pour vous faire découvrir des vins 100% plaisir - tous rigoureusement dégustés et sélectionnés (on n’a pas un boulot facile, vous savez !… ;-) Notre passion pour la satisfaction clients n'a pas de limite ! 

Suivez-nous, découvrez de jolies pépites à prix plaisir, pour vous et pour vos évènements d’entreprise & actions de team building !

Name: Too Sweet Cakes
Description:
Every great story starts with a dream—and ours began with a simple one: to create pastries that not only tasted incredible but made people feel cared for.

Too Sweet Cakes was founded in 2016 by Shelbi Geyer, whose love for baking started as a young girl, sketching cake designs and dreaming of one day opening her own bakery. That dream stayed with her, fueled by a passion for creativity, connection, and a belief that food could be something truly meaningful.

What started as a small wholesale bakery quickly grew into something more. In 2018, we opened our first storefront in Bend, Oregon, creating a space where pastries weren’t just desserts—they were memories in the making. From there Too Sweet Cakes expanded to Lake Oswego, and today, we proudly operate four retail locations across Oregon and Arizona, with a fifth location opening in 2026 in Paradise Valley, Arizona.

Beyond our storefronts, you’ll find Too Sweet Cakes pastries featured in over 100 locations across Oregon, Washington, and Arizona. It’s been an incredible journey—one made possible by the extraordinary team who has brought their talents, heart, and dedication into every part of the business.

Our team of bakers, decorators, and visionaries are the heartbeat of Too Sweet Cakes. Together, we share a mission that’s never changed: to love people well through pastries.

As we continue to grow, we remain rooted in the values that sparked it all—creativity, community, and a deep love for making people feel special. We are so grateful to every customer, partner, and community who has supported our journey—and we can’t wait to celebrate even more sweet moments with you, one bite at a time.

Name: Freshopp
Description:
Véritable acteur de l’anti-gaspi, Freshopp est la solution de proximité qui rapproche les producteurs et les transformateurs confrontés à leurs problématiques de production et les consomm’acteurs soucieux de l’avenir de la planète et de leur pouvoir d’achat dans un contexte économique tendu.


Freshopp propose à prix réduits des produits de qualité, frais et surgelés, sauvés du gaspillage qualité, directement issus de producteurs et de transformateurs agroalimentaires. Ces produits n'ont pas trouvé leur place dans les réseaux de distribution classique (produit hors calibre, en surproduction, série limitée, léger défaut esthétique, packaging spécifique…).


Freshopp offre l'opportunité à tous de consommer des produits français de qualité de façon éco responsable, et de sauvegarder son pouvoir d’achat.


Freshopp accompagne également les producteurs et les transformateurs agroalimentaires en leur permettant de se mettre en conformité avec la législation en vigueur, de valoriser leurs produits à sauver donc à réduire leur gaspillage et leur empreinte carbone et ainsi agir pour la planète.


Notre ambition résumée en quelques points :

-  Limiter le gaspillage alimentaire 
-  Redonner du sens à la consommation pour qu’elle devienne éco responsable
-  Contribuer à maintenir le pouvoir d’achat des ménages 
-  Préserver l’environnement et les ressources naturelles 
-  Valoriser les produits en circuit court 
-  Participer à la démarche RSE des producteurs et des transformateurs
-  Participer au développement économique des commerces locaux servant de point de collecte grâce à leur parking


Devenez Freshopper et rejoignez nous dans la lutte contre le gaspillage alimentaire !

#antigaspi #agroalimentaire #foodtech #Ecommerce #alimentation
#sustainability #food #innovation #startups #digitalmarketing #mobileapplications #ecoresponsable #developpementdurable

Name: 0815 Online Handel GmbH
Description:
Die 0815 Online Handel GmbH, gegründet von Florian Fleck, Oz Hazi und Alexander Peretti öffnete im Mai 2007 ihre Tore. Ziel war es, einen kundenorientierten Elektro-Onlineshop mit dem Service und Support eines persönlichen Fachhandels zu schaffen.

Die hohe Kundenorientierung in Verbindung mit dem engagierten Team führte nach nur einem Jahr zum erfolgsbedingten Bedarf, den Standort zu erweitern und so erstrahlt das Geschäftslokal seit September 2008 im neuen Glanz mit vergrößertem Verkaufsraum und vervielfachter Lagerfläche.

Mit einem neuen Versandlager in Wien 22 schritt 0815 im Jahr 2011 mit großen Schritten weiter voran. Um der hohen Nachfrage gerecht zu werden, können nun auf der großen Lagerfläche mehr unterschiedliche Produkte zu höheren Stückzahlen für den Versand bereit gehalten werden. Unsere Kunden profitieren seitdem zunehmend von der verbesserten Produktverfügbarkeit und den kürzeren Lieferzeiten.
2012 wurde zum 5-jährigen Bestehen des Unternehmens ein weiterer Shop in Wien eröffnet.

2021년도 대비 2022년은 더블성장한 매출 500억원대 달성, 2023년의 경우 947억원 매출을 만들었습니다. 이제는 연 매출 1,000억원 이상 규모의 기업으로 성장해나갑니다. 

이그니스가 지속적인 성장세를 이어올 수 있는 이는 'INNOVATIVE BRAND DEVELOPER' 라는 원대한 비전이 있기 때문입니다. 
비전을 달성하기 위해 저희는 기존의 방식에 안주하지 않고 새로운 아이디어와 전략을 제시하는 EVOLUTION 정신, 어떤 도전이든 포기하지 않고 최선을 다하는 GRIT 정신, 팀워크와 협업을 중요시하며, 함께 일하는 것으로 더 나은 결과를 달성할 수 있다고 믿는 SYNERGY를 중요시하고 있습니다. 

혁신적인 제품 기획부터 온,오프라인 채널과 마케팅 전반의 전문가들이 함께 모여서 매일매일의 성장을 만들어냅니다.

Name: worldsafarishop
Description:
At World Safari Shop, our mission is to elevate awareness and understanding of world cultures. We specialize in providing a comprehensive collection of books that focus on diverse cultures, customs, traditions, and belief systems. These elements collectively define the identity of any group of people, anywhere in the world. By gathering these invaluable resources in one place, we aim to offer you a unique opportunity to explore and immerse yourself in the worlds of others like never before.

Our commitment to cultural education and appreciation stems from a belief that knowledge fosters empathy and peace. Through this collection, we hope to promote rich cultural interactions, leading to more harmonious societies with a deeper level of cross-cultural understanding and a greater appreciation of the diverse ways people live across the globe.

Name: Josimar S.A
Description:
SOBRE NOSOTROS

Lo importante para nosotros es estar cerca de tuyo, por eso desarrollamos este servicio de compra a través de internet, para que compres desde la comodidad de tu hogar y lo recibas en tu domicilio o lo retires en nuestras sucursales, trabajamos todos los días para darte productos de calidad a buenos precios.

Estamos cerca, en los barrios donde vos estas, con supermercados cómodos, modernos, y con un equipo de trabajo capacitado, de más de 300 personas, que todos los días, damos lo mejor de nosotros para atenderte.

Estamos cerca, con los servicios que vos necesitas: te ofrecemos horarios extendidos, estacionamiento, ambiente climatizado, envíos a domicilio, una gran variedad de medios de pago. En Josimar queremos solucionarte una parte de tus necesidades, porque sabemos que tu tiempo vale.

Además, constantemente disponemos de Promociones y Ofertas para que tengas a tu alcance los mejores precios.

En síntesis, te ofrecemos lo mejor para estar cerca tuyo; con servicios, con variedad y calidad de productos, con buenos precios, y con lo más importante que también nos diferencia, el calor de una atención personalizada.

Name: Wijnwinkel Barneveld
Description:
Wie we zijn
Wijnwinkel Barneveld is al generaties lang hét vertrouwde adres in Barneveld. Wat begon als de zuivelhandel van overgrootvader Gert is uitgegroeid tot dé wijnspeciaalzaak en slijterij van de regio. Inmiddels staat de vierde generatie aan het roer: Jan en Liesbeth van den Brink. Met liefde voor het vak, uitgebreide productkennis en oprechte aandacht voor iedere klant zetten zij de traditie van kwaliteit en gastvrijheid voort samen met hun team.

Onze missie
Of het nu gaat om een diner thuis, verjaardag, jubileum of zakelijke gelegenheid—wij zorgen voor dat stukje extra beleving. Met ons brede assortiment – van betaalbare kwaliteitswijnen tot exclusieve whisky’s, speciaalbieren en geschenken – maken we elk moment bijzonder. Persoonlijke service staat centraal: we denken mee, verrassen en ontzorgen. Proef de smaak van kwaliteit.

Winkel
•	Advies op maat: deskundig en afgestemd op jouw wensen.
•	Proefmogelijkheden: ontdek nieuwe smaken in onze proefkasten.
•	Cadeaus: stijlvol verpakt, van losse flessen tot geschenkpakketten.
•	Cadeaubonnen: voor wie zelf de keuze wil maken.

Webshop
•	Online bestellen: eenvoudig en veilig.
•	Verzending per post: laat je bestelling thuisbezorgen.
•	Afhalen in de winkel: online gemak, persoonlijk contact.

Drank voor je feest & tapverhuur
•	Complete drankverzorging voor feesten en evenementen.
•	Inclusief tapverhuur en glazenservice.
•	Wat over is, mag retour – zo betaal je nooit te veel.

Relatiegeschenken
Persoonlijke en zakelijke geschenken het hele jaar door, volledig op maat samengesteld.

Kerstpakketten
Eindejaarsgeschenken voor collega’s, vrijwilligers of relaties, passend bij elk budget en elke wens.

Bezoek ons
Kom langs in onze winkel aan de Amersfoortsestraat 65 in Barneveld of bestel via onze webshop www.wijnwinkelbarneveld.nl. Wijnwinkel Barneveld: waar kwaliteit, service en aandacht samenkomen voor bijzondere momenten.

Our global headquarters is located in Drums, Pennsylvania which is known as the heart of “cigar country.” With our state-of-the-art cigar humidor warehouse and exceptional customer service, we ensure maximum freshness in every cigar we ship to our customers.

We provide a wide selection of high-quality cigar products for beginners and seasoned smokers. At Best Cigar Prices you can find various cigar brands, humidors, samplers, and accessories from brands including Macanudo Cafe, Romeo y Julieta 1875, Arturo Fuente, Dutch Masters, Montecristo, Padron, and many more at the lowest prices.

Name: Enzers
Description:
Enzers è una start-up torinese che crea prodotti sostenibili per la pulizia della casa.

Ogni anno ci sono 2,41 milioni di tonnellate di rifiuti plastici dovuti al monouso della plastica, di cui il 62% deriva dall'uso domestico. Il 93% della plastica contenuta nei prodotti per la pulizia domestica viene buttato.

La presenza di plastica in mare è una delle maggiori problematiche ambientali. Prendere coscienza del problema e del proprio ruolo nella salvaguardia del pianeta, è un passo fondamentale.

La missione di Enzers è ridurre a 0 lo spreco di plastica nei prodotti della pulizia domestica, offrendo soluzioni innovative, semplici da utilizzare e più economiche rispetto alle soluzioni tradizionali.

Infine, i prodotti Enzers seguono i seguenti valori:

• Eco-friendly
• Zero waste
• Vegan
• Cruelty-Free
• Non-toxic
• Thoughtful Packaging

Name: Fun Wine
Description:
We’re a lightly carbonated wine cocktail drink that’s low in sugar and calories, but still knows how to have fun! We thrive in creativity, individuality, and innovation, with a focus on art and culture that sets us apart from our competitors. Flavor drives us, fans inspire us and our Chief Culture Officer Christina Aguilera keeps us on trend.

We work hard as forward thinkers, but always know how to have a good time. Reach out to connect! We speak English, Spanish, Hebrew, Portuguese, and French. 

Europe and Asia - Sharon Ayalon- sharon@funwine.com
Latin American and Central America - Kat Villalon - kat@funwine.com 
United States - Tim Turner - tim.turner@funwine.com

Name: Solex Catsmo
Description: At Solex Catsmo, we are dedicated to delivering only the finest in gourmet excellence. From our signature smoked salmon and seafood to caviar, artisanal cheeses, specialty meats, and curated gift collections, every product we craft or distribute meets the highest standards of quality. Our mission is simple: to provide premium taste and freshness at competitive prices, with packaging that ensures our products arrive in peak condition. Name: Jardin & Terroir
Description:
Bienvenue sur Jardin & Terroir ! Nous sommes une plateforme en ligne dédiée à la vente de produits du terroir et de l'horticulture Français en direct des producteurs.

Notre mission est de soutenir les petits producteurs indépendants en leur offrant une plateforme pour vendre leurs produits directement aux consommateurs. Nous croyons que les produits locaux de saisons sont non seulement plus frais et plus savoureux, mais aussi plus durables et plus éthiques que les produits importés.

Chez Jardin & Terroir, nous travaillons en étroite collaboration avec les producteurs français les plus talentueux pour vous offrir une sélection de produits de saison de qualité. Nous nous efforçons de faire des achats en circuit-court une expérience simple et agréable pour les consommateurs, tout en soutenant les producteurs dans leur développement.

Nous croyons que les consommateurs peuvent faire une différence significative en choisissant de soutenir les petits producteurs. C'est pourquoi nous vous invitons à découvrir leurs produits sur notre site web et à faire la différence. En achetant sur Jardin & Terroir vous soutenez leurs savoir-faire et l’économie locale.

Nous sommes fiers de vous offrir un service de qualité et nous sommes toujours là pour répondre à vos questions et à vos besoins. N'hésitez pas à nous contacter pour plus d'informations sur nos produits et sur notre entreprise.

Merci de nous faire confiance pour promouvoir le commerce local !

L'équipe de Jardin & Terroir.

Description:
At Craft & Culture, we empower liquor brands to seamlessly enter and thrive in the Middle East market. Through our comprehensive services – including licensing, importation, warehousing, and distribution – we provide the tools and expertise necessary for success.

We are dedicated to building strong partnerships with our clients, offering innovative solutions and a deep understanding of regional dynamics.

Name: Gyawun.com
Description:
www.gyawun.com is an exclusive online destination dedicated to celebrating and preserving the rich heritage of Kashmir through authentic handicrafts, luxury apparel, and cultural storytelling. Rooted deeply in Kashmiri tradition, Gyawun curates a carefully selected range of artisanal products including luxury pherans, handwoven stoles, intricate sozni embroidery pieces, and exquisite shawls crafted by skilled local artisans. Each item embodies the timeless artistry, culture, and elegance of Kashmir, merging contemporary appeal with traditional craftsmanship.

Gyawun's mission goes beyond commerce; it seeks to empower local artisans by showcasing their skills on a global platform, helping sustain ancient arts and supporting community livelihoods. With a strong emphasis on authenticity and quality, every product at Gyawun represents a narrative woven with passion, care, and cultural pride.

The website also serves as an informative and engaging resource, presenting stories, traditions, and insights into the vibrant Kashmiri lifestyle. Visitors to Gyawun experience Kashmir's essence through compelling visuals, insightful articles, and immersive storytelling, creating meaningful connections between consumers and creators.

In essence, www.gyawun.com is not merely an e-commerce site—it is a cultural bridge connecting the world with Kashmir’s rich legacy, blending tradition and luxury in a seamless, elegant, and memorable experience.

Name: AFK Épicerie Fine | Spécialités Africaines et Antillaises
Description:
REDÉFINIR L'ÉPICERIE FINE AFRICAINE EN ESSONNE 

AFK est la première #ÉpicerieFine africaine implantée au cœur d'Évry, en #Essonne, face à la gare du Bras de Fer, dans un environnement urbain dynamique. Notre ambition est de centraliser et de valoriser la richesse et la diversité des produits d'épicerie africaine au sein d'un espace de vente moderne et accueillant.

Notre proposition de valeur repose sur trois piliers fondamentaux :
| EXPERTISE : Une connaissance approfondie de nos produits, de leur origine à leurs spécificités.
| QUALITÉ : Une sélection rigoureuse de produits d'une qualité irréprochable, privilégiant l'authenticité et le savoir-faire.
| TRANSPARENCE : Un engagement clair sur l'ensemble de notre chaîne de valeur, de la production à la distribution.

#AFK propose une gamme étendue de plus d'une centaine de références, incluant des produits rares et exclusifs en Essonne, allant des ingrédients essentiels aux découvertes gastronomiques telles que le chocolat artisanal de Côte d'Ivoire, la vanille de Madagascar et le Poivre de Penja (IGP).

Fondée par Aïssatou, AFK est née d'une vision : celle de revaloriser l'épicerie africaine et de la rendre accessible à un public plus large.
L'implantation stratégique à #Évry témoigne également d'une volonté de contribuer à la revitalisation des centres urbains de banlieue.

AFK invite partenaires, fournisseurs et clients à se joindre à cette mission collective : redonner à l'épicerie africaine la place qu'elle mérite.

Description:

We started with a simple mission: snacks should be honest. No additives, no preservatives, no confusing labels - just real food that makes you feel good.

Our first range includes nuts & foxnuts, made with transparency at the core. Ingredients you recognize. Labels you can trust.

We’re building the future of snacking for a generation that reads the back of the pack before buying.

Healthy isn’t boring anymore. Healthy hits different.

Name: Altima Caviar
Description:
Altima Caviar sources the highest quality caviar from the world’s most exclusive and sustainable farms.

Our Farms raise their sturgeon in controlled, clean, and secure environments.  They are overseen by internationally-acclaimed biologists to assure sustainable conditions, individual quality and compliance to all international regulations.

Each fish is always raised in conditions that closely match their natural habitat. This, as well as an abundance of clean, flowing, and oxygen-rich water allows our farms to maintain the highest product quality without using antibiotics, growth hormones, GMO’s, or preservatives.

 Every tin of Altima caviar is produced from one single fish which ensures our clients will experience consistency regardless of their order size.

 We take great pride and joy in providing our clients a curated selection of the world’s best Beluga, Sevruga, Starlet and Oscietra.

Name: FlourabyChoyal
Description:
We are proud to introduce our innovative and sustainable solution to the traditional flour industry - freshly milled, fresh ground flour made with the world's first fresh flour grinding and vending machine. Our unique approach to flour production reduces carbon footprint and minimizes the need for transportation.
We believe that good food starts with quality ingredients, and that's why we only use the finest grains in our stone mill grinding process. Our state-of-the-art machine allows us to offer freshly ground flour that's full of flavor, nutrients, and aroma. Our customers can now enjoy the taste and health benefits of fresh flour that was once only available to professional bakers and chefs.
Our commitment to sustainability is at the core of our business philosophy. By using locally sourced grains and reducing transportation, we aim to minimize our environmental impact and contribute to a cleaner, healthier planet. We're proud to offer an eco-friendly product that not only benefits our customers' health but also our planet's future.
Join us in our mission to revolutionize the flour industry and promote sustainable food practices. Connect with us to learn more about our products and services, and how we can work together to make a difference.

Join our Nauti Fam and benefit from our seasoned executive team, raving customer testimonials, cost-effective start-up plan, adaptable business model, and top-tier marketing support. Embark on a ground-floor opportunity with Nautical Bowls and be a part of our nationwide expansion!

Name: Taste Supply
Description:
Taste Supply is a startup and the first and only Social E-commerce Platform dedicated to small and medium-sized Specialty Food Makers and consumers.  Launched in 2024, Taste Supply connects food entrepreneurs with food lovers in the $207 billion Specialty Food market.

The Problem:
Big Food companies not only dominate our grocery stores but also online with Amazon and Google, as a result thousands of small and medium-sized Food Makers struggle to compete due to limited resources and lack of exposure. 

Consumers and Foodies find it frustrating and time-consuming searching for these premium, unique food products both in stores and online.

The Solution:
Taste Supply stands out as the only Social E-commerce Platform connecting Specialty Food Makers with Consumers and Foodies across the nation.  Our mission is to revolutionize the traditional grocery industry by providing a "one-stop shop" online for Specialty Foods, catering to the millions of people who cannot easily find these foods.  Just as Etsy revolutionized the handmade and vintage E-commerce market and Chewy did the same with the retail pet food/products category, we aim to do the same for the Specialty Foods & Beverages.

Platform Features:
On TasteSupply.com, Food Makers can utilize social media capabilities like TikTok, YouTube and Instagram to engage with consumers.  More than ever, people today are searching for foods not only for taste and discovery, but they are also looking for foods that address certain allergies, diets, cultures and lifestyles. Le BIB est de loin plus pratique (conservation longue de 4 à 6 semaines une fois ouvert, stockage optimisé), plus écologique (recyclable et empreinte carbone jusqu’à 9 fois inférieure / bouteille en verre) et plus économique (prix d’achat largement inférieur aux mêmes vins en bouteilles quand ils existent). 
  
Les vins sélectionnés par Let it BIB sont TOUS produits par des vigneron(ne)s que nous avons vraiment rencontré(e)s et vraiment aimé(e)s, respectueux de l’environnement, tout comme leurs vins que nous avons tous goutés et rigoureusement sélectionnés pour leurs qualités gustatives .

Vive le cubi libre !

Name: Pizza Wine
Description:
Pizza Wine is a highly crushable, canned sparkling red wine that’s great with pizza and great without. Made from hybrid grapes grown in NY’s Lake Erie AVA, Pizza Wine is on a mission to make wine less intimidating without sacrificing quality. 

Our grapes are farmed with minimal intervention. Nothing is added that doesn’t belong (no artificial flavors, no concentrates, no “natural” flavors, no chemicals). Every seed, skin, stem is returned to the soil. 

We’re restaurant and bar people (not celebrities) that have built our careers around making people feel welcome. We live for the perfect pairing and are devastated (truly) that traditional wine culture is pushing people away. 

We could spend hours explaining why this pizza and wine pairing works — how the structure perfectly balances the acidity in the tomatoes, and the bubbles attach to and wash down the fats from the cheese — but that’s not our vibe. 

Italians have been drinking sparkling red with pizza for hundreds of years — we couldn’t find one that tasted the way we wanted, so we made it ourselves. Drink it from the can, pour it over ice, or mix it with Coke for all we care.  Hope you love it.

Name: GASTRO'S
Description:
Hos Gastro's er vores mission at skabe rammerne for en bedre pause, om det er på arbejdspladsen, uddannelsesinstitutionen, på sygehuset eller til træning.
Vi tror på at produkter af høj kvalitet skaber en bedre oplevelse, derfor har vi stort fokus på hvilke produkter vi tilbyder i vores Gastro Pods, så de passer til den situation forbrugeren befinder sig i. 
Når vi tilbyder kaffe, så er det ikke bare kaffe. Vores barista har udvalgt økologiske bønner af højeste kvalitet, som er ristet til den nordiske smag.

Vi skal værne om miljøet, derfor er vores kaffeløsninger altid Co2 neutrale og vi tilbyder desuden et retur system, så vi tager den brugte kaffegrums retur, så den kan genanvendes i økologisk planteproduktion.

Vil I høre mere om hvordan Gastro's kan hjælpe din virksomhed med at skabe større trivsel blandt medarbejderne, studerende på en skole eller noget helt tredje, så kontakt os på info@gastros.dk

Name: Les Super Heros de la Supply Chain
Description:
Les Super Heros de la Supply Chain proposent des ouvrages qui évoquent, d’une manière pédagogique et ludique, les différentes facettes de la logistique et de la Supply Chain.

La bande dessinée "Les Super Héros de la Supply Chain, la bande dessinée à l'usage de votre entourage qui n'a jamais compris ce que vous faisiez exactement", vise à aborder modestement ce sujet à travers des situations qu’un grand nombre de professionnels ont déjà vécues. Les dessins sont complétés par quelques textes explicatifs qui apportent un éclairage supplémentaire, notamment aux lecteurs « non-initiés ».

Le livre illustré "Il était une fois la Supply Chain, une histoire illustrée qui raconte pourquoi et comment la logistique "globale" est devenue le Supply Chain Management en quelques années", raconte l’origine du Supply Chain Management et la manière dont il s’est imposé en France. Cette chronologie propose un témoignage qui se veut à la fois pédagogique et accessible. L'ouvrage est agrémenté de témoignages de personnalités marquantes, et illustré par de nombreux dessins qui apportent une touche humoristique.

Rendez-vous sur notre site pour découvrir nos ouvrages, 
et chaque vendredi pour retrouver "Le petit édito des Super Héros", l'actualité illustrée de la Supply Chain.

Name: Gander Australia
Description:
The Australian retail sector wastes 527 kilotonnes (or $4.4 billion) of food per year. For retailers, the value of their wasted food is equal to roughly double the profits from their sales.
Gander is a world-first solution on a mission to prevent as much food as possible (ideally all) from becoming waste from a retailer's shelves. As a world-first solution, Gander connects retailers' near-waste food to local consumers via a mobile app. 
The app automatically showcases exactly what markdown items are available in store in real time so shoppers can browse or search for food to buy before it goes to waste.
As a result, significantly more markdowns are sold meaning less go to waste and markdowns are sold faster meaning they are sold at higher margins.
With Gander, retailers reduce their waste profitably while changing nothing to their in-store processes.

Name: Overstory Ventures
Description:
What do Kernza perennial grain, hybrid hazelnuts, and new winter annual crops have in common? They all represent innovative approaches to sustainable agriculture that can enhance soil health, reduce environmental impact, and promote long-term farming resilience. 

At Overstory Ventures, we focus on launching companies that will introduce these groundbreaking regenerative crops to the market. Our mission is to transform agriculture, steering it towards practices that mirror natural ecosystems.

Here is another fact. Did you know that in nature, a striking 90% of plants are perennial, thriving with living roots and lush green cover year-round? Yet, our agricultural practices often stray far from this natural balance. In the US and Europe, over 300 million acres of arable farmland are primarily devoted to annual grains, largely relying on high-input monocultures that demand excessive tillage and inputs. Shockingly, more than half of this land in Europe and a staggering 95% in the US lack winter cover crops, leading to severe soil erosion, nutrient depletion, carbon emissions, loss of biodiversity, and missed revenue opportunities for growers.

But there’s a silver lining! Profitable, viable perennial and winter annual crops are in development, providing a robust toolkit for the food and agricultural sector. By embracing these crops, we can harmonize farming with natural systems, reducing labor and inputs for farmers, minimizing soil disturbance, boosting production efficiency, and unlocking significant environmental benefits.

At Overstory we believe that well-supported entrepreneurship is key to advancing these new regenerative crops to market. We invite talented entrepreneurs eager to make an impact to join us on this journey. 

The uniqueness that we use a venture building model that brings together:
1. Access to cutting-edge intellectual property on new crops
2. Essential resources and structured support for success 

Interested in joining our mission? Contact us!

Name: St Pierres Sushi
Description:
“To improve the quality of life of people through new exciting tasty
& healthy foods" - Its why we do what we do!

St Pierre's began in Wellington by three brothers in 1984 as a seafood delicatessen. With a range of products included Beluga Russian Caviar, sushi, smoked and fresh salmon it was very innovative for it's time.

In 1993 St Pierre's formed an alliance with one of Japans largest food exporters, The Tokyo Mutual Trading Company. They had been the pioneers of Japanese food in the USA and had provided superior cooking condiments and expertise to St Pierre's . From that time St Pierre's started to import all its own products used for making sushi from Japan, to make the most delicious sushi possible.

Fresh salmon arrives daily from the Marlborough Sounds and is skinned and boned on premises. The rice is freshly cooked California short grain rice. The fresh chicken for Teriyaki Chicken arrives daily and is marinated and cooked fresh every day. All the cucumbers, avocados and other vegetables are cut daily for super freshness. 

If a sushi flavour has sold out, we encourage customers to ask our sushi chefs to make up a fresh sushi roll! And special requests are always welcomed.

The name St Pierre's is the French the famous New Zealand fish; the John Dory it also translates to St Peter, who was the Patron Saint of Fisherman.

Name: Ufresh
Description:
Uğur Şirketler Grubu bünyesinde faaliyet yürüten Uğur Entegre Gıda Şirketinin bir markasıdır. 2011 yılında, Nazilli ilçesinde, kurulan Ufresh’in çıktığı lezzet yolcuğu günümüzde yüksek kaliteli ürünleri ve nitelikli satış ağı ile sürmektedir. Ufresh; lezzet ve tazelikten ödün vermeden tüketicisine kuruyemiş, lokum, kahve, draje, yağ ve kuru meyve ürünlerini sunmaktadır.

Ufresh başta verimli toprakları ile ünlü Nazilli ve Türkiye’nin dört bir yanından gelen özenle seçilmiş lezzetleri, geniş ürün yelpazesini tüketiciler ile buluşturmaktadır. 2020 Yılında başladığı perakende serüveninde, seçkin lezzetler ve özgün ürün gamı ile mağazalarında hizmet vermeye başlayan Ufresh, sektörünün yenilikçi markalarındandır.

Çağımızın gerekliliklerini modern vizyonu ile harmanlayan Ufresh, mağazalarındaki çeşitlilik ve farklı konseptleri ile dikkat çekmektedir. Mağazasında misafirlerine, yaşayan mağaza konsepti ile tüketicilere yeni lezzetleri keşfetme imkânı tanıyor.

Ufresh, lezzetleri ile sadece anınıza eşlik etmekle kalmaz, anın tadını sonuna kadar çıkarmanızı sağlar. Zamanınızı lezzet ile dolu yaşamanızı sağlayacak Ufresh, sezon hasatlarıyla size her zaman taze ve yeni ürün keşfi sunar.

Ufresh, mağazalarında misafirlerine kaliteli, modern ve otantik bir deneyim sunar. Değişen konseptleri ile sizlere yeni lezzetleri keşfetme keyfi yaşatır.

Mağazaları ve internet sitesi ile Türkiye’nin dört bir yanındaki müşterilerinin tüm istek ve ihtiyaçlarını karşılamayı başaran Ufresh, ürün grubuna her geçen gün yeni ürünler eklemekte, kaliteli ürün gamını geliştirmektedir. Farklı ambalaj, gramaj ve abonelik sistemleri ile tüketiciye özel olarak sunulan hizmetleri ile Türkiye’de ilklere imza atmaktadır.

Name: Rede Max Argolo
Description:
Quem somos nós?
A rede Max Argolo é uma empresa com tradição familiar no ramo de supermercados e panificadora. Senhor Gildo, pai dos atuais sócios das empresas, tem mais de 30 anos de atuação em comércios na cidade de Amargosa, situada a 240 km de Salvador, na Bahia. Atualmente,  o Max Argolo possui 11 unidades presente em 09 municípios da Bahia!
Quer saber um pouco mais sobre nossa história? Continue lendo! 
Em 1992, Sr. Gildo abre uma panificadora na zona rural de amargosa, mas somente em 1995, nasce a ARGOLO & ALVES COMERCIAL DE ALIMENTOS LTDA, que ao longo dos anos, resistindo a diversos cenários como crises, troca de moedas e inflações, veio se fortalecendo cada vez mais!
Victor e Eric, únicos filhos do senhor Gildo, desde pequenos, já ajudavam o pai no comércio. Foram inseridos no mundo empresarial mesmo antes da idade adulta e o espírito empreendedor inevitavelmente tomou conta de toda a família! 
Victor dividia seu tempo entre os estudos e o supermercado do pai. De um lado, os estudos conferiram a ele a aprovação em vestibular e conclusão da faculdade de medicina, do outro lado, o trabalho com o pai desde cedo moldou nele a responsabilidade com os negócios da família e a consciência de que tudo o que o Sr. Gildo havia construído precisava ser perpetuado.
Eric, por sua vez, a exemplo do pai e do irmão mais velho, sempre esteve envolvido nos negócios. É hoje o presidente do grupo e executivo mais atuante, tendo buscado diversos cursos e treinamentos e atualmente cursa faculdade de Administração justamente pela aplicabilidade nos negócios da família. A responsabilidade e o comprometimento com os negócios são, talvez, a principal marca: “tenho obrigação de dar sequência ao trabalho do meu pai”.
E assim tem sido! Estamos em crescente e constante busca pelo nosso maior objetivo: fazer o varejo acontecer! Com a qualidade e variedade que nossos clientes merecem.

Name: Revista Problemas Brasileiros
Description:
A Revista Problemas Brasileiros (PB) é uma publicação singular. Com mais de 60 anos de história, mantém-se fiel ao propósito da sua criação: estimular o necessário debate à superação de mazelas seculares e contrastes que fazem do Brasil um dos países mais desiguais do mundo.

Sua versão impressa é publicada bimestralmente e distribuída a um público constituído por empreendedores, acadêmicos e estudantes. A publicação se destaca também por suas parcerias com universidades e organizações do terceiro setor, uma maneira de dar voz aos mais amplos setores da sociedade. Em sua versão digital, conta diariamente com reportagens inéditas, entrevistas e artigos de opinião. 

Uma realização da Federação do Comércio de Bens, Serviços e Turismo do Estado de São Paulo (FecomercioSP), a PB seguiu trajetória única como publicação de entidade de classe porque não se restringe a discussões político-econômicas. As causas do atraso estrutural do País são analisadas também sob a perspectiva de áreas como Educação, Trabalho, Gestão Pública, Meio Ambiente, Infraestrutura, Saúde e Cultura.

Livre de alinhamentos de qualquer natureza, a PB se mantém aberta à diversidade para analisar as transformações que moldam e influenciam o País. Em sua linha editorial, persegue a ideia de que o Brasil precisa crescer mantendo e ampliando as conquistas democráticas, com distribuição de renda, e incorporando a sustentabilidade socioambiental à cultura de desenvolvimento.

A FecomercioSP acredita que informação aprofundada é um instrumento fundamental para qualificar o debate público sobre assuntos importantes não só para a classe empresarial, mas para toda a sociedade.

Name: Rede de Supermercados Bom Dia
Description:
Em Fevereiro de 1996, um grupo de pequenos supermercadistas do noroeste do Paraná, decidiu se unir para poder concorrer com as grandes redes de supermercados que estavam surgindo na região. 

Esse grupo deu início então a uma associação de compras chamada "UNISUPER".  O primeiro presidente foi o Sr. Roberto Júnior Gazolla, proprietário de um supermercado na cidade de Nova Esperança.  

A UNISUPER teve inicio em um pequeno imóvel locado na avenida Kakogawa, na cidade de Maringá. Em 2004, os associados perceberam que precisavam fazer as ações de marketing em conjunto. 

A maioria das lojas já existia há mais de uma década o que gerou bastante resistência em abandonar os nomes antigos e tradicionais, para usar um novo nome, totalmente desconhecido. Entretanto os empresários foram arrojados e reconheceram a necessidade de inovar e aceitaram a mudança, surgindo então a marca ?

BOMDIA?. Com o nome fantasia em comum, todas as ações de divulgação das lojas foram unificadas. A rede começou a fazer anúncios na TV aberta, outdoors, rádio e jornais de ofertas. 

Foram padronizados também, as sacolinhas, etiquetas e uniformes.  Hoje, a rede BOMDIA possui um centro de distribuição próprio, construído dentro de uma área de 50 mil metros quadrados. Conta com um depósito de 6 mil metros, onde é feito o recebimento, separação e expedição dos produtos através de sua frota própria. 

Neste mesmo espaço, encontra-se a central de negócios, onde estão sediados os departamentos de marketing e comercial da rede. Atualmente, a rede BOMDIA conta com 12 associados e 40 lojas, distribuídas em 12 cidades do noroeste do Paraná. Além de Maringá, as cidades de Sarandi, Iguatemi, Paiçandu, Mandaguaçu, Nova Esperança, Campo Mourão, Engenheiro Beltrão, Peabiru, Quinta do Sol, Santa Fé e São Pedro do Ivaí têm uma loja do BOMDIA perto de você!  

As lojas totalizam juntas 32 mil metros de área de vendas, 312 check-outs, 2.200 colaboradores diretos e são comercializados mais de 10 mil iten

Family-owned and operated for over three generations, we proudly ship bare-root native trees, shrubs, perennials, ferns, vines, and mosses nationwide.

Our mission is rooted in sustainability—helping homeowners, landscapers, and large-scale restoration projects bring pollinator-friendly, eco-restorative plants back to the land. TN Nursery has supplied plants to iconic institutions such as the History Channel, Discovery Channel, Arlington National Cemetery, and the Washington Monument, as well as state and federal conservation programs.
From rare pawpaw trees to pollinator-loved wildflowers, every plant is grown with care and shipped fresh from our Tennessee farm. With decades of expertise, a legacy of trust, and a passion for preserving biodiversity, TN Nursery continues to help America plant with purpose.

Name: Marczyk Fine Foods
Description:
It all started in April of 2002…

That’s when we first opened the doors to Marczyk Fine Foods.  Pete Marczyk has always been passionate about great ingredients, but was frustrated at having to drive all over Denver to find them.  One place for fish, another for meat, another for produce… you get the picture.  Pete raised the funds to start his market, hired the contractor, found the staff and filled the shelves with products Denver had never seen under one roof:  sustainably raised beef, pork and lamb from family farms, unique and interesting Italian imports, old fashioned sodas, milk in glass bottles, amazing Colorado-made products, and so much more.  We are a neighborhood market where people can get great ingredients for breakfast, lunch and dinner or really excellent prepared food for an easy meal.

We opened a second location in 2011 at the corner of Colfax and Fairfax, in a building that once was a Safeway store.  Same great ingredients, plus a great, big kitchen to create all our prepared foods. In 2012 we celebrated our first store’s 10 year anniversary.  That same year Pete and Paul's long-time dream of starting an in-house bakery for fresh baguettes and sandwich breads came to fruition.  Our special events, like summer burger nights, our Colfax anniversary clambake, and the fall pig roast continue to build community, and the Colorado offerings just get better and better. Stay tuned, because there's always something great being cooked up at Marczyk's!

Nossa Cultura

Name: Spectrum Wine
Description:
Spectrum Wine is a global fine and rare wine and wine services firm headquartered in Santa Ana, California with additional offices in Newport Beach, California; Tsim Sha Tsui, Hong Kong; and Minneapolis, Minnesota.

We specialize in fine and rare wine auctions, traditional wine merchant retail and e-commerce, wine storage, and associated wine services including inventory, transport, appraisal, and more. Our auction and retail businesses also offer a wide selection of fine, rare, and aged beers, spirits, liqueurs, and other fine foods and beverages.

Spectrum Wine traces its history to the founding of Orange County's first wine store - Rolf's Wine & Spirits - in Tustin in 1953 by local entrepreneur, sports legend, inventor, and wine pioneer Rolf Engen.

Following an early and formidable career in basketball and volleyball, Rolf's entrepreneurial passion for wine developed quickly as he found success with his game-changing wine store in Tustin. He duly expanded the original Tustin store in 1956 and later came to expand his wine retail business throughout the region. In the 1960s, Rolf began traveling to Europe to taste and to source the great wines of France, Italy, and Germany, and he came to be one of the first to import and to sell the great wines of Europe in Orange County.

In 2017, Rolf's Wine & Spirits merged with wine auction house Spectrum Wine Auctions. Spectrum Wine, a nimble, new, 21st-century auction house of fine, rare, and collectible wines led by a deep team of passionate wine-lovers and established as a subsidiary of the Fortune 500-listed auctioneer and global collectibles and trading network Spectrum Group International (SPGZ), had grown rapidly with a global customer list and a consistent series of marquee auctions. In 2014, Spectrum Wine was taken private by longtime CEO Jason D. Boland.

→ Visit us at www.SpectrumWine.com
→ Visit our retail store online at www.SpectrumWine.com/Retail
→ Explore storage options at www.SpectrumWine.com/Storage

Name: Narici
Description:
NARICI /naˈri.tʃi/

The Italian word "narici" translates to "nostrils" in English. It refers to the two openings of the nose that allow air to enter and exit, enabling breathing and the sense of smell.

We are a contemporary Italian perfume house based in Milan. Each fragrance is crafted from single-origin ingredients sourced across Italy and reimagined into modern olfactory stories. 

We are exclusively available on our website Narici.com and we ship globally from Italy.

PERFUME IN AN AGRICULTURAL ACT
Big fragrance houses develop captive synthetic molecules to make their perfumes hard to copy. Instead, at Narici, we source, and in some cases, develop bespoke high-impact natural essential oils and absolutes from single-origin Italian ingredients.

Our launch plans are based on the crop calendar, and our supply chain relies on the relationships with farmers and growers. We release a new perfume each month, as different materials are harvested and processed for the upcoming batches. Our releases are often limited because we have to wait for the next crop to make more perfume.
