In unserer Familie ist die Kunst des Kochens eine Tradition, die über Generationen hinweg gelebt wird. Von unserer Grossmutter bis hin zu uns hat sich die Leidenschaft für köstliche Aromen wie ein kostbares Erbe durchgesetzt. Ihre einzigartigen Gewürzmischungen waren ein Geheimnis, das jedes Gericht in ein kulinarisches Meisterwerk verwandelte.

Heute setzen wir diese Tradition fort, indem wir ihre einzigartigen Rezepte in Ehren halten. Jedes Glas unserer handgefertigten Gewürze ist ein Tribut an ihre Hingabe und ihr Talent, verfeinert mit den feinsten Zutaten und gespickt mit der Essenz echter Leidenschaft für gutes Essen. Mit jedem neuen Kunden teilen wir nicht nur Geschmack, sondern auch die Geschichte und die Werte, die unsere Familie geprägt haben.

Entdecken Sie eine Welt voller Aromen und Inspiration, die Ihre kulinarische Reise bereichern wird. Von herzhaften Gerichten bis hin zu süssen Genüssen bieten unsere Gewürzmischungen endlose Möglichkeiten, Ihre Küche in eine Geschmacksoase zu verwandeln. Lassen Sie sich von der Magie unserer familiären Traditionen verführen und erleben Sie den Genuss, der unsere Familie seit Generationen vereint.

Name: Chapters Bookstore
Description:
A new chapter for Chapters …

Words like institution, gem, foremost, important, stalwart are words constantly bandied around, but with no real sense of weight or gravitas.  After 40 years in business as an independent bookseller, with a hugely extensive, eclectic range of new and secondhand books, Chapters announced in October that we would be closing our doors in Parnell Street, January 31st, 2022.  The response to this news was both shocking and gratifying; people contacted us from around the world to express their affection for the store and disappointment that we would be going, customers queued down the street to load shopping trollies with treasures that they found on our shelves and tables.

As always, Ireland likes to buck a trend and contrary to widespread opinion, we as a nation still love books and bookshops … so as breaking up is hard to do, Chapters will reopen on Friday 11th March.

Willie Kinsella, founder, mentor and secret bibliophile really does want to retire and spend more time reading books, rather than working on them, so he has sold the store to his protégées, Kevin Neary and Michael Finucane, co-founders, and former directors of GameStop Ireland. In a perfect example of the circular economy, Neary and Finucane opened their first shop in a 50 square meter space at the back of Chapters old store in Middle Abbey Street – 25 years of friendship, admiration and shared understanding of retail and championing customer choice have come home again. 
Although vastly experienced in retail and retail environments, the new directors believe the secret to Chapters continued success will be to leave it alone; investment will be made in improving the IT infrastructure and stock visibility systems, plus converting the website for ecommerce.

At Lumens Depot, we believe lighting is more than illumination—it’s a way to create safer, more sustainable, and inspiring spaces. Our mission is to empower homes and businesses to embrace energy-efficient solutions that save money and contribute to a brighter, greener future. We’re committed to innovation and sustainability because we believe every small step toward eco-friendly choices has the power to light the path to a better tomorrow.

We combine cutting-edge technology with a deep understanding of customer needs to deliver premium-quality lighting solutions. Our products are rigorously designed for efficiency, durability, and ease of use. By focusing on energy conservation and lasting performance, we help our customers reduce their carbon footprint while enjoying superior illumination.

From sourcing sustainable materials to maintaining rigorous quality control standards, we are passionate about making products that reflect excellence, care, and purpose.

Lumens Depot specializes in a wide range of innovative lighting solutions, including LED bulbs, panels, smart lighting systems, and commercial-grade fixtures. Every product is thoughtfully designed to enhance spaces with bright, reliable light that aligns with our customers' unique requirements.

Whether you're looking to brighten a home, optimize an office, or innovate an industrial setup, Lumens Depot is your trusted partner for dependable, eco-conscious lighting solutions.

Name: Klik
Description:
KLIK sviluppa e progetta il futuro aziendale avendo esclusivamente come riferimento centrale il cliente.
L'apertura no-stop dal lunedi al sabato, il servizio su misura per i clienti, l'organizzazione basata su efficienza, preparazione e competenza tecnica del personale: è la filosofia aziendale.
Klik è il megastore dell'elettricità specializzato in materiale elettrico, illuminazione, automazione, allarmi e sicurezza, telefonia e tv, hobbistica e fai-da-te, attrezzature, condizionamento e riscaldamento.
Il punto vendita è diventato un vero e proprio punto di riferimento del settore elettricità per la quasi totalità della Regione Lazio.
I punti di forza dell' azienda?
•	Gli orari di apertura
•	Il self-service o il selfservice assistito
•	La possibilità di acquistare in negozio o direttamente on line
•	Tecnici specializzati consiglieranno le migliori soluzioni per ogni esigenza.
Il punto vendita è aperto tutti i giorni, dal lunedì al sabato, con la formula no-stop, dalle 7 alle 20, domenica dalle 9:30 alle 13. Con 13 ore giornaliere di apertura continua, tra l'altro, viene definitivamente eliminata ogni possibilità di fila per i clienti.
Sia i professionisti che i privati all'interno del megastore possono scegliere: chi sa già ciò che vuole e anche dove trovarlo, nei 2.500 metri quadrati di Self-service, si serve da solo e passa direttamente alla cassa, con un ulteriore guadagno di tempo, oppure scegliere il self-service assistito facendosi consigliare dai nostri tecnici specializzati.
Tutto, in ogni caso, è regolato da un sistema di tickets salvacoda.

Il magazzino è completamente informatizzato e ogni commesso ha con sé un piccolo computer portatile interattivo.
I clienti, inoltre, hanno l'accesso telefonico diretto per parlare con il loro commesso referente.

L'acquisto, in ogni caso, si risolve sempre in una manciata di minuti. E il tempo, si sa, è denaro per tutti.

Name: Traffeum GmbH
Description:
Die Traffeum GmbH ist ein innovationsfreudiges Unternehmen auf dem Gebiet der Verkehrstechnik, der Stadtraumgestaltung und Softwareentwicklung. Wir vertreiben, produzieren und entwickeln über 30.000 Produkte mit einer Reihe von Eigenmarken und kundenspezifisch entwickelten Lösungen. Unsere Stärken sind unser breites Netzwerk, unsere Herstellerunabhängigkeit und die Verzahnung von klassischen Produkten mit innovativen, digitalen Lösungen in enger Zusammenarbeit mit unseren Kunden. Ergänzt wird unser Portfolio durch eine Vielzahl von Dienstleistungs- u. Serviceangeboten: Von der Montage über Markierungen bis hin zur vollständigen Umsetzung komplexer Projekte, z.B. Leitsysteme ... von der Planung, Konzeption bis zum Bau, der Montage und Wartung. Dabei kommen auch unsere modernen Softwarelösungen zum Einsatz, die speziell für Kommunen und Industriekunden entwickeln wurden.  

Zahlreiche Vertreter aus den Bereichen kommunale Entscheider, Industrie- u. Gewerbebau, Architektur und Planung sowie Garten- u. Landschaftsbau sind daher bereits auf uns aufmerksam geworden. 

Wir tauschen gerne unser Wissen mit anderen Profis aus und sind dank dieser weitreichenden Kooperationspartnerschaften und durch unser breites Dienstleistungsspektrum wichtiger Impulsgeber der Branche und bringen gemeinsam mit unseren Kunden Produktinnovationen auf den Weg.

C'est également :
•    3 sites représentant une surface totale de 45 000 m2, implantés en région parisienne (91 et 95) et en Provence (Aix en Provence)

Name: ForwardVerlag
Description:
Wann hören wir eigentlich auf zu lernen?
Am besten niemals!
In einer Welt, in der wir uns ständig weiterentwickeln und neue Horizonte erkunden, stellen wir uns die Frage: „Wann hören wir eigentlich auf zu lernen?“ Unsere Vision lautet: Am besten niemals!

Wir sehen eine Zukunft, in der das Streben nach Wissen und persönlicher Weiterentwicklung zu einem grundlegenden Bestandteil unseres Lebens wird. In dieser Welt hören Menschen niemals auf zu lernen, unabhängig von ihrem Alter, ihrer Herkunft oder ihrem aktuellen Wissensstand.

Aus dieser Vision heraus, haben wir den ForwardVerlag gegründet. Bei uns findest du eine große Auswahl an Büchern aus den verschiedensten Kategorien, die deine Persönlichkeitsentwicklung fördern.

„Wer zu lesen versteht, besitzt den Schlüssel zu großen Taten, zu unerträumten Möglichkeiten.“
(Aldous Huxley)

Name: Cantinium
Description:
Cantinium is an innovative platform that offers NFTs (non-fungible tokens) of high-quality Italian wines and spirits, with a guarantee of authenticity and preservation. 
We purchase the most valuable bottles directly from the best Italian producers and store them in a cellar equipped with IoT (Internet of Things) technologies that constantly monitor temperature, humidity, and light. 
The collected data is recorded on the Polygon blockchain, creating unique and verifiable NFTs for each bottle, which also attest to ownership. In this way, we offer our customers the opportunity to purchase, store or resell bottles through NFTs, with the assurance of having original and well-preserved products. Cantinium is the NFT marketplace for Italian wine and spirits enthusiasts.

Specjalizacja w: 
• kulach do kąpieli opartych na minerałach (m.in. magnez, potas)
• projektowaniu kąpieli jako świadomego rytuału
• łączeniu kosmetyki naturalnej z wiedzą o układzie nerwowym

Produkty powstają w oparciu o: 
– wiedzę z zakresu kosmetyki i substancji naturalnych
– biologiczne działanie ciepła, zapachu i dotyku
– odpowiedzialne, europejskie standardy produkcji

Sigh Yoga, rozwijana w ramach Louie’s Atelier, jest autorskim systemem pracy z oddechem i ciałem, który uzupełnia rytuały kąpielowe i edukuje, jak wspierać regenerację poza wanną.

Nie obietnice.
Produkty i systemy, które realnie działają na ciało.

 Kąpiele, publikacje i materiały edukacyjne: https://www.liinks.co/louiesatelier

Name: SIGMA BAKERIES LTD
Description:
Οur history as family bakers goes back three generations. Companions in your everyday life, at your table for breakfast, lunch and dinner; we honor our lasting relationship by using natural and the purest ingredients as well as by being consistent with the traditional practices of bread making in line with a healthy diet.

We use only the best ingredients in all our baked goods, without preservatives or additives. Our baking methods follow the time-honored family know-how, traditions and techniques passed down from generation to generation. The extra time and care we take in our baking process ensures that we deliver to you exceptional, flavourful bread, rich in color, with a moist texture and crisp crust. After all, the art of baking bread - and lots more! - is one we have mastered for over a century.

- HISTORY -

Sigma bakeries began with our great-grandfather, an artisan of bread making who mastered and passed the technique to our grandfather, his son, George. George started his first bakery in Limassol in 1922; he then moved to Famagusta in the late 50’s. His know-how, enthusiasm and love for artisan bread was inherited by his son Savvas, who became a master baker. Savvas and his wife Andriana, both worked hard and managed to advance and prosper with one old bakery shop at Leondiou street, Old hospital road in Limassol.

In the late 70s the children of the family, entered the business bringing a new philosophy, vision and culture which was established under the name of SIGMA. The brand name Sigma was derived from the initials of all the family members’ names. Being together, united as a family, with almost no capital to invest, they were faced with the challenging task of creating a leading, trusted brand. 
Joining forces with other like-minded professionals, persevering through hard work, being united in vision and trust, the Company evolved to become a leading chain of bakeries and among the very best performing companies in the food sector in Cyprus today.

Our journey started in 2015 when we started to create our first homemade recipe, the Signature Classic Cinnamon Rolls and there’s nothing like our smooth dough and rich cream cheese as the finishing touch. In 2020, we have opened the doors of our first outlet in Bukit Jelutong, Shah Alam for C.Lovers to enjoy our modern industrial Northern Europe ambience while indulging in our selection of Cinnamon Rolls varieties. Alternatively, we also serve Swedish Knots Polish Bapka, Bear Claw, Assorted Bagels, and a selection of bagels in our All-Day Breakfast Menu for people who prefer other types of pastries for their 'fika'. Consequently, we are kicking our plans into high gear to open more branches in different community areas so that you will get to have the pastries that you crave from any of our nearby cafe outlets.

If you have been a part of our journey, you are the bee’s knees. Words are not enough to describe how thankful we are for the chance to bring happiness into your life and we are pleased to have more C.Lovers to visit us along our journey as an artisan bakery. Description:

Tranquebar ligger på et gadehjørne. 
Vi forsøger, at være svære at runde – og helst ikke til at komme udenom.
Et skarpt hjørne.
Bogen er i centrum.
Men der er adskillige andre årsager. Fordi herinde, blandt alle forlag, forfattere og formuleringer – ude på gulvet eller bag skranken – finder du folk, der har læst med, og altid har lyst til at tale om litteraturen.
Vi er snakkesalige folk. Belæste i fritiden, berettende i arbejdstiden. 
Herinde på hjørnet frister kaffen. De krydsede fingre er fordi, vi håber du køber en kop mere.
Og leder du efter en gave? Alt er i sin tid indkøbt af os, som du nu selv er på indkøb. På jagt efter kvalitet og originalitet.
Hold øje med vores foredrag, vores arrangementer. 
Så ses vi også, en skønne aften.

Name: Sadie's Foods
Description:
Founded and operated by entrepreneur/mom/TV host/community builder Mercedes E. Wilson.

While growing up Mercedes' grandparents had eleven children!  They had a huge garden in their backyard and from it, her grandmother canned a lot of food.  One of the dishes that she canned was something they all called Cha Cha Relish and Mercedes' Grandmother used to put it on her collard greens to give it a little kick.  Mercedes learned about Cha Cha Relish while doing a Recipes for Life  segment on ABC Buffalo affiliate with her father in early 2020.  They did collard greens with relish and everyone fell in love with it.  

Mercedes has since made her now famous relish for all of her friends and family to try and they fell in love with it too!  The relish that you see in stores today, is that exact relish – the one inspired by Mercedes' grandmother that was loved by so many.

Nous proposons l'une des offres les plus complètes du web : de la Bourgogne à Bordeaux en passant par les grands vins étrangers, toutes les appellations viticoles sont représentées, avec une majorité de vins de Bourgogne. 
Du grand vigneron reconnu au petit domaine précurseur qui a su remettre au goût du jour une appellation, notre passion dévorante pour la découverte de pépites nous permet de vous proposer une vaste sélection. 
Nous bénéficions d’une réelle proximité avec nos vignerons partenaires, ce qui nous permet de vous offrir une sélection confidentielle, rigoureuse et authentique au meilleur prix. Rencontres après rencontres, dégustations après dégustations, nous avons établi des liens forts avec les producteurs et nous avons à cœur de vous raconter leur histoire. En soutien aux vignerons et pour maintenir les plus justes prix pour vous, nous vous proposons des vins aux prix pratiqués pour les particuliers dans les domaines. C'est comme si vous achetiez en direct chez le vigneron, sans vous déplacer !  

 Inscrivez-vous à notre newsletter pour ne rien louper et recevoir nos offres spéciales en avant-première !

C’est l’histoire d’une vision, celle de faire renaître un vin exceptionnel sur un terroir inattendu, en Normandie. 
Depuis 1995, nous cultivons notre vigne avec amour et persévérance pour offrir des cuvées qui racontent une histoire : celle d’un sol unique, d’un climat tempéré et d’un travail passionné.
Dégustez nos vins et savourez l’authenticité, forgée par la nature et le temps.

Name: Liwé

 Revendez légalement vos ebooks!
 Lisez quand et où vous le voulez !
 Soutenez vos auteurs !

La bêta de Liwé est disponible ! 

Avec les technologies du web3, Liwé développe une librairie numérique et crée le marché de l'occasion numérique des ebooks pour :

Description:
Unser Ziel ist es, die bevorzugte Wahl für Trinkgläser im Großhandel in der Schweiz zu werden. Unsere Mission ist es, Produkte zu liefern, die nicht nur durch ihre exzellente Verarbeitung und ansprechendes Design überzeugen, sondern auch durch ihre Langlebigkeit und Funktionalität.

Darüber hinaus legen wir großen Wert auf eine pünktliche und zuverlässige Lieferung, um sicherzustellen, dass unsere Kunden stets auf uns zählen können.

Wir glauben fest daran, dass Qualität und Zuverlässigkeit die Grundlagen für langfristige Partnerschaften sind. Deshalb arbeiten wir kontinuierlich daran, unser Angebot und unsere Dienstleistungen zu optimieren, um das Vertrauen und die Zufriedenheit unserer Geschäftspartner nachhaltig zu stärken.

SIXBY EOOD ist ein familiengeführter Grosshändler im Bereich Trinkgläser. Seit unserer Gründung im Jahr 2007 stehen bei uns Qualität und absolute Zuverlässigkeit im Vordergrund. Dank unserer jahrelangen Erfahrung in der Gastronomie wissen wir genau, was unsere Kunden brauchen. Wir liefern europaweit hochwertige Gläser an B2B Kunden, Hotels, Gastronomiebetriebe, Catering-Unternehmen und Veranstaltungsorganisatoren.

Mit Sixby.ch sind wir zertifizierter Vertriebspartner von SIXBY EOOD für Deutschland und die Schweiz. Damit haben wir einen Meilenstein gesetzt, um unseren Fokus auf den Schweizer Markt zu unterstreichen.

Name: Epsilon-Vet Coffee
Description:
Every Bean Tells a Story of Valor and Virtue.

At Epsilon-Vet Coffee, we believe in the unmatched freshness of coffee, but our mission runs deeper than just delivering the freshest coffee to your doorstep. Founded and operated by Special Operations Veterans, we're dedicated to honoring the service and sacrifice of our fellow heroes. We don't just roast coffee; we craft a blend of courage, community, and commitment to making a real difference.

Freshness with a Purpose

We pledge an unparalleled coffee experience, ensuring no bean is roasted until your order is placed. This relentless pursuit of excellence and freshness means every cup is imbued with the richness and vitality of perfectly roasted coffee, shipped the same day to guarantee the ultimate taste experience. But there's more in every sip than just flavor.

A Cup Full of Support

Beyond the brew, Epsilon-Vet Coffee is a conduit for change, a salute to those who've served. A portion of every purchase is directly invested in initiatives designed to combat veteran suicide and support mental health, reinforcing our belief that together, we can brew a better future for our veterans.

Join Our Mission

When you choose Epsilon-Vet Coffee, you're not just selecting a coffee; you're joining a movement. Together, we celebrate the resilience of the human spirit and honor the bravery of those who've worn the uniform. Experience the goodness of freshly roasted beans that carry a legacy of strength and service.

Taste the Difference, Make a Difference

Embark on a journey with us, where every order offers more than just a morning ritual—it's a pledge to support, honor, and uplift the veteran community. Let's make every cup count.

Name: Moteev
Description:
Moteev is building Africa’s fastest, most reliable online supermarket. We solve the daily problem of grocery shopping for busy young professionals and students by combining three elements: a NLP powered mobile app for ordering, neighbourhood storage hubs for inventory, and our own fleet of riders for last-mile delivery.

Unlike existing options that rely on informal motorcycle riders or fragmented store networks, Moteev integrates the full stack, catalogue management, fulfilment, and delivery, enabling us to deliver 500+ products, from fresh produce to pantry staples and meat, in under 40 minutes.

Our vision is to scale from thousands to millions of orders per month by expanding across African cities, starting with university campuses as our first growth engine.

Ultimately, Moteev is not just a delivery service, it is infrastructure for how Africans will buy everyday essentials online, a $50B+ opportunity in the next five years.

Ispirata all’eleganza del Lago di Como, sviluppa prodotti innovativi con ingredienti selezionati, sfruttando biotecnologie avanzate per garantire risultati efficaci e rispettosi della pelle.

Ogni formula è realizzata in Italia con standard elevati e senza parabeni, siliconi o petrolati. L’azienda si distingue per l’uso di attivi naturali e biotecnologici come acido ialuronico, peptidi e vitamine, ideali per idratare, rigenerare e contrastare i segni del tempo. La sostenibilità è un valore fondamentale: i prodotti sono cruelty-free, con packaging eco-friendly e processi produttivi a basso impatto ambientale.

La linea Dermastudio Como include creme, sieri, detergenti e trattamenti mirati per ogni esigenza della pelle, offrendo un’esperienza skincare efficace e sicura. La missione dell’azienda è rendere la bellezza accessibile a tutti, combinando innovazione, qualità e benessere.

Scopri la nostra collezione e vivi l’eccellenza della skincare italiana.

I launched NZ’s first zero alcohol brewery, State Of Play Brewing, because I want people to have a choice of quality drinks on every occasion. With good choice comes great change and now we can all enjoy a beer with mates regardless of the alcohol content. That’s my State of Play.

I believe in empowering individuals to make informed choices about their health and well-being, whether that's through moderation, exploration of alcohol-free alternatives, or embracing a lifestyle change.

 WHAT IF YOU LOVE BEER, BUT DON’T WANT ALCOHOL?
Whatever your motivation, the State of Play award winning Zero’s will hit the spot. Taste is above all else. At State of Play we brew the proper way, no funny business. Naturally brewed with an innovative yeast to retain all the beeriness. It’s beer that tastes like beer should – full of flavour. Our flagship IPA is brewed with New Zealand hops and Canterbury malts, in sunny Hawkes Bay. Crack a can today.

Name: Carrossel Supermercados
Description:
O Carrossel Supermercados é uma empresa familiar, inaugurada em 11 de novembro de 1972, em São Lourenço, juntamente com uma loja de materiais de construção e com a representação de bebidas Antártica, pelos sócios da empresa Casa Dutra Ltda:

João Flori, José Carbone Filho, Miguel Arcanjo Gorgulho e José Ildefonso Fernandes. Em julho de 1973 esta sociedade foi desfeita e cada um dos sócios assumiu uma parte do negócio. José Ildefonso, em sociedade com seu cunhado Lourenço Sérgio Nogueira, ficou com a parte de auto-serviço, hoje Carrossel Supermercados. Em outubro de 1975 Lourenço Sérgio Nogueira deixou a sociedade e José

Ildefonso assumiu a empresa ao lado de sua esposa Regina. Com o passar do tempo, os filhos foram admitidos na sociedade e atualmente administram a empresa: Heli e José Carlos (desde 01/10/1972), Dimas (desde 31/12/1980), Flávio (desde 02/01/1984), Luciano (desde 16/12/1990) e Regina Célia (desde 01/11/2003). Em 1988 José Ildefonso se afastou, passando a administrar o Sítio Carrossel.

A família realizou uma votação e o filho Heli foi escolhido para dirigir a empresa, dando continuidade à administração, juntamente com os irmãos. A empresa chega aos seus 50 anos com cinco lojas da bandeira Carrossel nas cidades de São Lourenço, Caxambu, Baependi e Itanhandu e uma loja com a bandeira Sempre Nosso, na cidade de São Lourenço, gerando atualmente mais de 600 empregos diretos. E já planejamos crescer nos próximos anos, gerando mais empregos e atendendo com toda excelência nossos clientes.

Name: Kongsi Tea Bar India
Description:
At 𝗞𝗼𝗻𝗴𝘀𝗶 𝗧𝗲𝗮 𝗕𝗮𝗿, we’re not just brewing tea —we’re crafting experiences that resonate.

𝗕𝗼𝗿𝗻 𝗶𝗻 𝗧𝗵𝗮𝗶𝗹𝗮𝗻𝗱 and reimagined for India, the idea was sparked during a family trip — a sip of authentic bubble tea that felt different. That moment lit the path: a brand built not on trends, but on trust, taste, and craft.

From the start, we knew we were entering a tough space. The Indian market was flooded with shortcuts — premixes, powders, diluted interpretations. But we made a different choice: to bet on authenticity. To believe quality, integrity, and cultural depth would speak louder than convenience.

Our journey began with one mission: to set a new standard for bubble tea in India. With ingredients from Thailand and beyond, we bring freshly brewed teas and perfectly cooked boba — to a nation that loves its beverages bold, and full of flavor.

Kongsi is a space where moments are shared, ideas are sparked, and communities come together. With sustainable practices like RPET bottles and in-house RO ice, we’re making every sip better — for you and the planet.

After 18 months of planning, hours of tasting, and a focus on authenticity, our team’s precision and passion have helped Kongsi become the gold standard for bubble tea in India.

As an early mover in the category, we’re reshaping how India discovers, experiences, and embraces real bubble tea. With 7 outlets in Bangalore and a roadmap to 100 across India by 2026, we’re building a brand that’s as innovative as it is welcoming.

Milestones
• From Phuket’s streets to Bangalore’s heart, we’ve redefined what bubble tea can be.
• Introducing India to authentic Thai Bubble Tea made with uncompromised quality.
• Recognized for our cafés and premium kiosk model, ideal for scale.

We exist to bring uncompromised bubble tea moments for you to remember.
Come experience bubble tea the way it was meant to be — bold, brewed fresh, and made with care.

Kongsi isn’t just a drink. It’s a mood. It’s a movement

Unsere Firmenkultur baut auf ehrlicher und transparenter Kommunikation auf, um die besten Ideen zu fördern. Wir glauben, dass bedeutungsvolle Arbeit und bedeutungsvolle Beziehungen dann entstehen, wenn ambitionierte Personen aufeinandertreffen und authentisch und ehrlich miteinander interagieren.

Die Zusammenarbeit bei uns basiert auf radikaler Ehrlichkeit und radikaler Transparenz - dadurch ebnen wir den besten Ideen den Weg. 

-Ehrlichkeit
Radikale Ehrlichkeit und Transparenz sind unser Fundament.

-Wertschätzung
Uns ist es wichtig, Wertschätzung gegenüber jeder Person zu äußern, die einen Teil zum Großen Ganzen beiträgt.

-Vertrauen
Nach allgemeinen Unternehmensstandards schenken wir unseren Mitarbeitenden viel Vertrauen. Das ist völlig in Ordnung für uns. Wir möchten mit Menschen zusammenarbeiten, die von Grund auf gute Absichten haben und großen Wert auf kollegiales Verhalten legen. -Diversität
Wir legen großen Wert auf Diversität, um dadurch unterschiedliche Perspektiven und Denkweisen zu verstehen.

Wir sind fest davon überzeugt, dass Menschen dann ihr volles Potenzial ausschöpfen können, wenn sie sich nicht verstellen müssen und ganz sie selbst sein können. Wir möchten jeder Person in unserem Team die Chance geben, sich selbst weiter zu entwickeln.

Name: Fooch's Sports Cards & Collectibles LLC
Description:
Paul D. Fucci, is the Founder and President of Fooch’s Sports Cards & Collectibles LLC. Fooch, his nickname since junior high school, has been collecting sports cards, including baseball, football, basketball, and hockey cards, for over 50 years. 

In 2008, he rekindled his love of baseball card collecting when he made his first of numerous  annual pilgrimages, with his wife Lisa, to Cooperstown, New York, the home of the National Baseball Hall of Fame and Museum. After he visits the Baseball Hall of Fame, he loves walking down Main Street in Cooperstown looking for baseball cards in several of the shops there. He typically comes home with dozens of baseball cards, mostly New York Mets and New York Yankees players, from the fifties to present day. 

After graduating from Rider College (now University), Fooch made a living as a corporate sales professional for over 25 years and earlier in his career he spent a decade in retail sales and operations management. He has decided to make the transition to becoming a fourth-generation entrepreneur, following in the footsteps of his great grandmother, grandparents, and parents. His great grandmother, an Italian immigrant, opened Fucci’s Italian Kitchen in 1910, one of the first Italian restaurants in Newark, New Jersey. While working and eating there for the first 17 years of his life, he learned valuable business lessons that impacted him both personally and professionally.

Name: BURGER&SAUCE
Description:
Burger&Sauce is a fast-casual burger brand that aims to bring the freshness and quality back into fast food.  We live by our motto ‘Always Fresh. Never Frozen.’

Founded at the end of 2020, the brand has had a consistent trajectory of growth and now has 19 sites trading.  Our vision is to be recognised as one of the top fast-casual burger brands in the UK.

To help us do this our burgers are made using only the best quality ingredients whilst maintaining a competitively low price point.  Every order we make is freshly prepared to ensure our guests have a great experience each and every time whether in store or delivered.

We maintain this quality and consistency by having our own integrated supply chain which allows us to control the freshness of meats, poultry as well as vegetables used. 

With over 15 years of franchise and fast food experience behind us  we have created our own unique signature sauces as well as innovating new burger concepts in our limited ranges.

By combining consistently fresh food, fast quality service and a clean friendly environment, we hope to continue to grow our name in this market.

Name: Ren Beaulieu
Description:
Ren Beaulieu Luxury Tea is an exquisite experience that encapsulates life's most intimate moments. Ren Beaulieu is a story that lies deep within our hearts. it's a story in the warmth of family moments shared over a cup of tea.  And our stories are woven into each leaf, each blend that we bring to you today. 

We take great pride and care when crafting our bespoke collections. For us, luxury is an art, a form of resilience, love, and passion. What you find in our store is what we truly enjoy at home, the teas that are the highest grades. Our selection process takes more than a year; we examine the lands, soil, waters and altitudes in which these tea plants grow. We look into workers' living conditions and how they are being treated. 

Each leaf is selected with the utmost care, ensuring that only the best ingredients make it into every Ren Beaulieu blend. Our artisans skillfully combine these leaves with rare herbs and exotic spices, crafting a range of teas that are not only rich in flavor but also steeped in quality.

From the delicate aroma that greets you upon opening each package to the last lingering note of flavor, every sip is a testament to our dedication to excellence. Our teas are an invitation to indulge in a moment of luxury, to pause and savor life's finer things.

We invite you to join us on this journey of discovery and indulgence. Follow Ren Beaulieu on LinkedIn for the latest updates on our exclusive blends, insights into the world of luxury teas, and stories that celebrate the art and culture surrounding this timeless beverage.

Ren Beaulieu - Where every cup tells a story.

Name: Wohlenberg Vinhandel
Description:
Wohlenberg - Specialbutikken i Sønderborg
Et navn, der forpligter - og en butik, som kan fejre 100 års jubilæum i 2013. 
Vi - Anna & Jørn Petersen - købte Butikken pr. 1. maj 2004, og i 2007 blev Jens Kristian Bertelsen kompagnon med en andel på 20%. Vores filosofi er at videreføre Butikken med respekt for fortiden samt med nye tiltag sikre, at Butikken fremstår som en "moderne specialbutik" i Sønderborg Centrum med et udbud af mange spændende og unikke produkter.
 
Tre butikker - én Vinhandel
Butikken på Perlegade 10 tilbyder alt indenfor: Kaffe - med vores egne blandinger. Te - 130 slags. Specialøl - 150 slags. De verdenskendte lakridsprodukter fra Johan Bülow, karameller fra Bornholm, chokolade fra Summerbird, Sv. Michelsen, Konnerup & Co. og Valrhona, specialiteter fra hele verden som fx krydderier fra Mill & Mortar, olie og balsamico fra tapperi, Læsø-salt, spiritus og vin. Vi mener selv, at vi er "verdensmestre" i at lave gavepakker og spændende kurve. 
På Vinlageret i baggården kan man opleve et vinkældermiljø med ca. 10.000 flasker vin samt høj faglig betjening. Kom med din menu, og vi sammensætter vin og mad.Vi er mestre i at lave vinsmagninger og aktiviter med vin og mad.
Kiosken blev en del af Wohlenberg i april 2010. Her fører vi Orlik pibetobak, Cuba cigarer, Tips og Lotto, Landbrugslotteriet samt forhandler gavekort til Sønderborg Handel.

Name: La Maison Du Taraud
Description:
L'aventure commence en 1959, à Nantes, dans un garage, celui de mon grand-père.

Amoureux des belles mécaniques, il a consacré toute sa vie à les entretenir, à les réparer et à les restaurer.

Souvent confronté à un problème de filetage, ou à « un pas qui foire », il a toujours cherché et sélectionné les meilleurs tarauds, filières, filets rapportés, accessoires et autres outils aux dimensions introuvables … au prix le plus juste.

Héritiers de cette tradition, nous vous proposons aujourd’hui une sélection de ses meilleurs outils.

Si vous ne trouvez pas les dimensions et formes recherchées, consultez nous via le formulaire contact. Certains outils peuvent être réalisés sur mesure, sans nécessité de quantité minimale.

Pour une meilleure clarté et plus de transparence, tous nos prix sont indiqués en TTC.

Alors à vous, tous les professionnels rigoureux ou bien les particuliers passionnés, soyez les bienvenus à La Maison du Taraud.

Name: BlendUp

Name: Peel Of Tea GmbH
Description:
Willkommen bei 7Tea - Deine Online-Destination für Tee-Exzellenz. Für leidenschaftliche Tee-Liebhaber und diejenigen, die ihre Reise in die Welt des Tees gerade erst beginnen, bieten wir mehr als nur eindimensionalen Geschmack. Entdecke die Komplexität und die Vielfalt, die nur bei uns zu finden sind. Tritt unserer Gemeinschaft bei und erlebe den Unterschied mit 7Tea.

Denn genau das ist unser Bestreben: Hochkreative, faszinierende Bio-Tees mit intensivsten Geschmäckern, bestückt ausschließlich mit den besten Pflanzen.

Nie wieder Kompromisse oder tausende Tees im Shop, sondern nur das, was unseren Kunden, also dir, gut tut und wofür wir mit unserem Gewissen auch stehen können. Wenn wir selbst einen Tee nicht mögen, fliegt er aus dem Shop. Dadurch erreichen wir eine hervorragende Auswahl und spezialisieren uns auf wirklich gesunde Tees.

❝Tee hat nicht die Arroganz des Weines, nicht das Selbstbewusstsein des Kaffees, nicht die kindliche Unschuld von Kakao. Im Geschmack des Tees liegt ein zarter Charme, der ihn unwiderstehlich macht und dazu verführt ihn zu idealisieren.❞ (Laotse) 

Für uns wie die Luft zum Atmen, sind wir davon überzeugt, dass nur die besten Tees in die Tasse kommen werden. Dafür Tees zu suchen, zu probieren und auch selbst zu entwickeln ist unsere Leidenschaft.

Name: Librería El gato que lee y bebe
Description:
El Gato que Lee y Bebe: Donde la Magia de las Letras se Encuentra con el Alma de Villa de Leyva

Bienvenidos al rincón más mágico de Villa de Leyva! En El Gato que Lee y Bebe, no solo encontrarás una librería, sino un espacio donde cada visita se transforma en una experiencia sensorial y cultural inolvidable. 

Soy Claudia Sterling, y mi pasión es entrelazar el encanto de los libros con el deleite de los vinos, el aroma del café y la riqueza de las letras, creando un universo donde la mente y el espíritu se nutren en perfecta armonía.

En nuestro acogedor hogar de historias, celebramos la lectura como un viaje sin fin. Desde las grandes obras literarias hasta los tesoros escondidos, cada libro es una puerta a mundos inexplorados y a nuevas perspectivas. Pero la magia no termina ahí. Complementamos esta travesía con una cuidadosa selección de vinos y viches que acarician el paladar y cafés y tés que despiertan los sentidos, elevando cada momento de lectura a una experiencia sublime.

El Gato que Lee y Bebe es más que una librería; es un epicentro cultural en Villa de Leyva. Aquí, las letras cobran vida en tertulias, presentaciones de libros y encuentros con autores que inspiran y conectan. 
Fomentamos la cultura en todas sus expresiones, creando un ambiente vibrante donde la conversación fluye tan libremente como la tinta en una página.

Si eres un amante de los libros, un entusiasta del buen beber, o simplemente buscas un refugio donde la imaginación se encuentre con la realidad, te invitamos a ser parte de nuestra historia. 

Ven y descubre por qué en El Gato que Lee y Bebe, cada página, cada sorbo y cada charla es una invitación a la magia.

Name: A'la Liberty
Description:
Welcome to A'La Liberty, where Culinary Innovation meets unparalleled Hospitality. Since our inception in 1988 as a humble Catering Business, we've continuously evolved, setting trends and redefining the culinary landscape.

In the early 1990s, we pioneered the introduction of International Cuisines, elevating the dining experience with a diverse array of dishes including desserts, chaats, and starters. Our commitment to attention to detail and cleanliness became synonymous with our brand, setting new standards in the industry.

One of our groundbreaking innovations was the introduction of Live Counters for Hot Naans at events, adding an interactive element to our Catering Services. This innovation not only delighted guests but also set a new benchmark for Outdoor Catering.

In 2010, we took a bold step forward by expanding into the banquet and restaurant businesses. Today, we proudly operate two Restaurants and three Banquets in the Twin Cities, catering to a diverse range of clientele.

At A'La Liberty, our commitment to the "Style of Liberty" goes beyond just food and ambiance. It encompasses our dedication to both our Customers and our Internal Team Members, creating warm and endearing bonds with every interaction.

Whether you're a vegetarian enthusiast or someone seeking a unique dining adventure, A'La Liberty invites you to immerse yourself in the essence of Vegetarian Dining and Hospitality. Join us on a culinary journey where innovation, hospitality, and passion come together to create cherishing experiences in all our locations, be it the Banquets, Restaurants or our Catering Services!

Description:
Sou Inês Ferreira, fundadora da loja Pituka. Sou Engenheira Civil de formação, mas em 2012 a crise neste setor deixou-me sem trabalho.
 
Em 2014 com o nascimento da minha filha Vera, apelidada de a nossa "Pituka", decido iniciar este projeto (não imaginando o sucesso que ia ter!), partilhando sempre a minha paixão pela maternidade com outras mães.
 
Estamos no mercado online de calçado a mais de 5 anos.
Em finais de 2015 inicio a minha loja online com apenas um produto: o calçado carneira (um artigo artesanal) e hoje ofereço uma variedade vasta deste tipo de calçado.
 
Depois do sucesso que tive e tenho com este calçado,
procurei por marcas de referência, como Victória, Paez,
Menorquinas Avarca, Plakton, Igor e Ipanema.
 
Neste momento, conto com uma equipa a trabalhar
comigo, na gestão da página do facebook, encomendas, fornecedores, serviço Pós-Venda, aconselhamento personalizado e mais de 91 mil seguidores no Facebook.

Hablar de Wolfood es hablar de perros más felices, con mejor energía, heces saludables y menos mal olor, pero también de familias tranquilas, que sienten que finalmente encontraron una opción confiable, práctica y honesta.

Nuestros clientes destacan tres cosas que nos hacen distintos:
• Calidad que se nota. La comida huele bien, se ve bien y se sienten los resultados.

• Comodidad y confianza. Entregas a domicilio, atención cercana, consistencia y transparencia en cada lote.

En Wolfood creemos que la nutrición es una manera de cuidar la vida que amas.
Si quieres unirte a una comunidad que alimenta con conciencia y cariño, estamos aquí para ti y tu compañero de cuatro patas.

Name: Elden TCG
Description:
Elden TCG est une entreprise indépendante basée à Cormelles le Royal en Normandie, dédiée aux jeux de cartes à collectionner : Yu-Gi-Oh!, Pokémon, Magic: The Gathering et Lorcana etc.

J’ai créé Elden TCG pour proposer une approche simple et sérieuse du TCG :
des cartes authentiques, un suivi rigoureux de l’état des produits, des envois fiables, et une expérience pensée autant pour les joueurs que pour les collectionneurs.

L’activité repose sur deux piliers :
– la vente de cartes à l’unité via Cardmarket, avec un contrôle précis de chaque référence,
– la vente en ligne de produits scellés et d’accessoires (boosters, displays, sleeves, deck box, classeurs, tapis de jeu…).

Mais le projet va plus loin que le commerce.

Autour d’Elden TCG se développe aussi une association dédiée à la communauté TCG locale et en ligne. Son objectif est simple : créer un cadre accessible pour jouer, apprendre, échanger et transmettre. Débutants, passionnés, compétiteurs ou simples curieux y trouvent leur place.

L’association permet d’organiser des rencontres, des événements, des tournois, des initiations et des projets pédagogiques autour du jeu de cartes, avec une ligne claire : inclusion, respect et passion commune.

Elden TCG, c’est donc à la fois :
– une structure professionnelle,
– une vision communautaire forte,
– et l’envie de construire, sur le long terme, un écosystème TCG sérieux, humain et durable.

Je développe ce projet avec une conviction simple : derrière chaque carte, il y a un joueur, une histoire et une passion qui mérite d’être respectée.

Elden TCG — Tous les univers, une même passion.

Notre ambition : mettre en lumière celles et ceux qui font bouger les lignes et leur donner les moyens d’agir. 

À la clé : un soutien financier, une vidéo professionnelle, des mises en avant médiatiques mais surtout rejoignez une communauté d’entrepreneurs.es soudée et passionnée. 

Depuis 2017, nous avons soutenu plus de 80 projets et accompagné au travers du programme des milliers de femmes. 

Pourquoi pas vous ? 
- Candidatez dès maintenant pour rejoindre un programme qui peut changer le cours de votre projet et même de votre vie.
- Ou suivez nos projets lauréats, partagez-les... Vous avez le pouvoir de contribuer à changer la vie de milliers de femmes !

Name: Start Your road to financial Independence at any age
Description:
Start your road to financial independence at any age! It is our belief that financial education should start when children are young and continue throughout life. “Financial independence for children, teens, and adults” is a series of short books focused on a specific age group or life event. Topics include teaching your child or teen about money, raising children to be money smart, what adults need to know to become financially competent and confident, how women can overcome common barriers to financial independence, blending financial priorities and spending habits as a couple, preparing for retirement and more. You will become educated in creating financial plans, budgeting, managing credit, setting up accounts, planning for retirement, and investing. 

We have both general books and books based on specific topics such as children and money, teens, couples, and women. Topics covered include the following, depending on the book:
•	Identifying financial goals and values
•	Creating a budget
•	Basics of everyday personal finances
•	Importance of savings and emergency funds
•	Obtaining financial freedom
•	Planning for retirement 
•	Strategies for each stage of your child’s development
•	Incorporating finances into child’s everyday life
•	Empowering your child to make smart money decisions
•	Value driven allowance
•	Seeing how children can learn to budget
•	College, vocational school, and career options
•	Decision-making based on comparisons of college costs
•	Preparing for living independently
•	Detailed student loan section
•	Information on how to pay for college
•	Investing for teens

Name: Tambu Outdoor | European Sales Office Lhotse Ltd. BD
Description:
TAMBU - Connect to nature

TAMBU ist die erste Zeltmarke in Europa, die ihre komplette Kollektion aus recycelten und umweltschonenden Materialien produziert. TAMBU ist von der Vision geprägt, nachhaltige Alternativen im Outdoor-Bereich zu ermöglichen und steht für umweltbewusstes Campingvergnügen zu einem fairen Preis-Leistungs-Verhältnis.

Innovation & Recycling
TAMBU nutzt Polyester zu 100% aus recycelten PET-Flaschen (rPET). Dafür kommen aufwendige technische Aufbereitungsverfahren zum Einsatz. 
Polyester aus PET-Flaschen ist qualitativ gleichwertig mit neu produziertem Polyester, jedoch entsteht in der Herstellung ein 59 % niedrigerer Ressourcenverbrauch. Durch die Verwendung von recyceltem Polyester hilft TAMBU dabei, die Umwelt zu schonen. 

Material und Qualität
Nachhaltige Zelte in langlebiger Qualität und mit einer durchdachten Ausstattung zu einem fairen Preis - das ist der Anspruch von TAMBU. Nach diesen Kriterien werden alle TAMBU Zelte entwickelt. Alle Modelle verfügen über eine hohe Belastbarkeit und verlässliche Langlebigkeit. Um das zu garantieren, werden hochwertige Materialien verarbeitet. 

Die Kollektionen – Origin & Core
Von TAMBU gibt es zwei Zeltkollektionen – Origin und Core. Das Highlight der Origin Kollektion ist ein Familien-Tunnelzelt, Highlight der Core Kollektion sind ein Dachzelt sowie ein Luftzelt für vier Personen. 
Zur Produktrange gehören aber auch Schlafsäcke, Decken und Isomatten – perfekte Ergänzungen für den Outdoor-Spaß. Und es ist noch mehr in der Entwicklungs-Pipeline.

Soziale Verantwortung
Von unserem Standort Köln aus setzen wir uns im sozialen Bereich für unsere Kollegen in den Produktionsstätten in Asien ein, da es uns sehr wichtig ist, die Lebensbedingungen vor Ort zu verbessern. Mit jedem verkauften Zelt unterstützt TAMBU ein Waisenhaus in Bangladesch. Dieses Engagement von TAMBU ist öffentlich einsehbar, TAMBU und die Partnerfabriken sind Mitglieder der BSCI-Initiative für eine ethisch ambitionierte Lieferkette.

Name: Safia
Description:
Все начиналось с сушек бабушки 

Сеть кондитерских домов Safia - это семейный бизнес, история которого начинается с кондитера-любителя Мухайё Касимовой. В 2001 году Мухайё Касимова вместе со своим супругом у себя дома начали выпекать сушки и продавать их.

Уже в 2008 году их дочь - Мадина Акмаловна, в целях развития семейного бизнеса, основывает первый кондитерский магазин. Не имея никаких внешних инвестиций, на основе своих личных сбережений, начинает  деятельность в своем первом кондитерском магазине под названием «Дом Выпечки от Мадины».

Она вдохновляется успешным опытом семьи и реализует собственные идеи, рецепты, вкус. Благодаря ее кулинарному опыту и кондитерскому мастерству продукция кондитерской становится вкусной, красивой, высококачественной.

В 2015 году число кондитерских магазинов увеличивается до трех.


В 2015 году к семейному бизнесу присоединились сыновья Мадины Акмаловны. Шахзод Алишерович – старшый сын Мадины Акмаловны, создает эффективную финансовую модель и автоматизированный учет компании.

А Бекзод Алишерович, завершив обучение в Европе, привносит в кондитерскую новые идеи и концепции. По его инициативе в этом же году открывается бренд «Safia», названный в честь племянницы, и кондитерские превращаются в сеть кофеен с широким ассортиментом горячих и холодных блюд, в дополнении к полюбившейся всем выпечке.

Вскоре запускается услуга индивидуального заказа для создания эксклюзивных тортов с неповторимым оформлением. Также становится доступной услуга кейтеринга.

Продукция Safia становится востребованной среди потребителей не под воздействием громких рекламных кампаний, а по рекомендациям родственников, знакомых, к которым было доверие.

You’ll learn about how fan tokens are poised to disrupt your understanding of the relationship between artists and their fans  and how you can take control of your personal data with a self-sovereign identity on the blockchain. You’ll discover how our next generation of young people, Generation Alpha, communicate with one another—and with us—and how the ways they form human connections will impact our own online and offline social networks.

A can’t-miss roadmap to critically important new technologies that are already making digital waves around the world, The Future of Community will earn a place in the libraries of business leaders, entrepreneurs, founders, and technology and Web3 enthusiasts ready to leap into the future.

Name: Valuation and Sustainability
Description:
Valuation and Sustainability is a collective book born from the work of top notch experts in the field of business valuation and sustainability: Elena Maksimovich founder at Weather Trade Net, Paul Jouy financial due diligence and valuation manager at BDO, Mathieu Joubrel founder at ValueCo, Laurent Inard partner at Mazars and Frédéric Le Meaux Senior European Equity Portfolio at Amundi.

The book primarily aims at reaching two types of audiences: practitioners and students in finance (graduate and undergraduate level).

Practitioners in finance will find interest in the book, as it will give them access to academic knowledge in a format that suits them.

Academic research has made substantial advances in the field of business valuation and ESG.

The book intends to transform this knowledge into practical and rigorous methodologies for taking ESG into account when valuing a company.

Graduate and undergraduate courses have recently developed in business schools, universities, and engineering schools. These courses usually directly refer to academic articles or valuation companies' website documentation, but not to academic books.

Therefore, the book will allow students to have access to centralized and organized information about business valuation and ESG.

Readers without prior knowledge of business valuation will be guided through the ESG integration process. They will first be introduced to the concept of value and the reasons for incorporating ESG into the value. They will then learn simple financial methods to value firms and see step-by-step use cases. 

For instance, the reader will learn how to value a firm in the renewable energy sector using cash flow and multiple valuation methods.

After building knowledge of standard business valuation, readers will better understand ESG data and ratings. The reader will then learn how to integrate ESG into business valuation using cash flow and multiples approaches.

Description:
Sabeel est un projet marocain de vente de produits naturels locaux, tels que le miel, l'huile d'olive, le safran, l'argane, le thym et les fruits du terroir. Le projet vise à promouvoir les produits naturels du Maroc et à les rendre accessibles à un public plus large.

Les produits proposés par Sabeel sont tous produits localement, à partir de matières premières de qualité supérieure. Le miel, par exemple, est produit à partir de fleurs sauvages dans les montagnes du Haut Atlas, tandis que l'huile d'olive est extraite des olives cultivées dans la région de Marrakech. Le safran est cultivé dans les plaines de Taliouine, connues pour produire la meilleure qualité de safran au Maroc.

L'argane est également une composante importante des produits Sabeel. L'huile d'argane est extraite des noix d'argane, qui sont récoltées dans les régions semi-arides du sud-ouest du Maroc. Cette huile est riche en acides gras essentiels et en antioxydants, et est utilisée depuis des siècles par les femmes berbères pour ses propriétés nourrissantes et hydratantes.

En plus de ces produits de base, Sabeel propose également une variété de fruits du terroir, tels que les figues, les dattes et les grenades, qui sont tous cultivés dans les vergers du Maroc.

Le projet Sabeel vise à promouvoir la consommation de produits naturels et à encourager le développement économique des régions rurales du Maroc. Les produits Sabeel sont vendus en ligne et dans des magasins spécialisés à travers le pays, offrant ainsi une solution pratique pour les consommateurs qui cherchent à acheter des produits de qualité supérieure.

Name: Caboclo Distribuidor
Description:
Foi numa barraca de feira que o Caboclo Distribuidor deu os seus primeiros passos. Em meio à alegria do comércio, da aproximação com o público, e com o olhar focado na dinâmica de mercado, Carlos Caboclo visualizou uma grande oportunidade. Naquele tempo os feirantes reclamavam da atenção dos atacadistas. Recebiam cotas de produtos insuficientes, que se esgotavam nas primeiras horas da manhã.

Um prejuízo e tanto para quem vive de vender.

Como Carlos Caboclo sempre trabalhava bem abastecido, acabava por emprestar parte do seu estoque para os colegas. Resultado: rapidamente as gentilezas viraram um negócio. Em menos de um ano, a "Barraca do Emporinho" deu lugar à primeira sede do Caboclo, no bairro paulistano do Jabaquara. Um atacado de balcão voltado a suprir principalmente os feirantes.

Após 45 anos, já no final de 2.013 houve a primeira mudança de endereço, adequando a sua operação em uma instalação maior, agora no bairro da Vila Carioca, também na zona sul da capital.

Em março/2017 completamos 50 anos de atuação no mercado, sempre procurando a excelência em nossos serviços, o que compreende agilidade e compromisso com nossos clientes.

Trabalhamos com marcas renomadas como Lacta, Oreo, Trident, Halls, Club Social, Tang, Trakinas, Bis, entre outros.

Name: The Urbanist: Dan Doctoroff and the Rise of New York
Description:
A never-before-told, behind-the-scenes look at the central role one man played in New York’s rise from the ashes of 9/11, creating a new generation of landmarks in the world’s most recognizable city.

On January 1, 2002, Michael R. Bloomberg took office as the 108th mayor of New York City, with smoke still rising from the World Trade Center site. Many questioned whether the city could rebound from the worst terrorist attack in the nation’s history. Instead, New York thrived — entering a period of unprecedented growth, spurred by new neighborhoods, parks, office districts, cultural facilities, and more. At the center of many of these initiatives was Daniel L. Doctoroff, who served as Deputy Mayor for Economic Development and Rebuilding from 2002 to 2007.

Told through the eyes of the individuals who worked with Doctoroff to lead these projects and accompanied by more than 450 photos, The Urbanist: Dan Doctoroff and the Rise of New York tells the astonishing story of the role that one man played in creating an array of iconic projects, from the rebuilt World Trade Center to Brooklyn Bridge Park to the High Line and more.

Name: The Company Coffee
Description:
The Company Coffee, kahveden öte; insanları, hikâyeleri ve hayalleri buluşturma yolculuğudur. Bizim için kahve insanları bir araya getiren, sohbeti başlatan ve bağ kurduran bir deneyimdir. 

25 yıllık sektör tecrübesi ile, Eskişehir, İzmir, Bursa, Aydın, Kütahya ve Afyon'da bulunan toplam 13 (şimdilik) şubemizle, büyüme yolculuğumuzun en önemli motivasyonu misafirlerimiz, çalışanlarımız ve ortaklarımız ile kurduğumuz bağdır. 

Ve en önemli değerimiz olan çalışanlarımız sadece “ekip arkadaşları” değil, bu yolculuğun gerçek ortaklarıdır. Çünkü burada çalışmak, yalnızca bir iş yapmak değil; birlikte büyümek, birlikte öğrenmek ve birlikte güzel şeyler başarmak demektir.

Her gün hazırladığımız her fincan kahve, hem misafirlerimize hem de bize ilham verir. Bizimle yol almak, kendi potansiyelini keşfetme fırsatı, insanlığa ve çevreye katkı sağlama imkânı ve daha güçlü bir kariyer yolculuğu demektir.

The Company Coffee’de herkese yer var. Farklılıklarımızı zenginlik olarak görüyoruz ve her bireyin hikâyesine değer veriyoruz.

Amacımız basit ama güçlü: En iyi kahveyi sunarken, her fincanda insan ruhuna dokunmak.

Gelin, birlikte daha fazlasını paylaşalım.
Her fincanda ilhamla buluşalım.

Name: Baurucas
Description:
A história da Baurucas começou em 2018, movida por um grande amor e um “vício” irresistível por pipocas de um casal empreendedor.

Sabendo que o Brasil é o segundo maior consumidor de pipocas do mundo, decidiram transformar essa paixão em um negócio. O sucesso e crescimento da marca despertaram inúmeros interesses, e assim nasceu a Baurucas Franquias.

Hoje, com mais de 40 lojas, oferecemos as melhores receitas de pipocas que você pode imaginar. Além disso, nossos produtos cativam e conquistam cada vez mais fãs por todo o Brasil!

Nossas receitas são inspiradas no universo das pipocas dos Estados Unidos, mas com um paladar totalmente brasileiro!

Nossa missão: transformar o consumo de pipocas no Brasil, entregando um momento Baurucas para o maior número de pessoas possível.

Aqui, não vendemos só pipocas; nossas receitas são o motivo perfeito para levar um momento especial à rotina das pessoas.

E não se esqueça: Curta esse momento!

Description:
As first-time parents, you'll face many unfamiliar decisions, but choosing the right baby products shouldn't keep you awake at night! 

 Overwhelmed by choice? Many new parents buy too much or end up replacing items later, once they understand what kit works best. 

 To save you time – and money – Anita has compiled her unparalleled insights based on 22+ years of working with parents and babies in a series of expert video guides! Covering home, nursery, travel, and beyond, so you can buy right first time!

Name: SAASOA
Description:
Strategic Alliance for Affiliated Store Owners of America (SAASOA) is a non-profit organization serving gas station, convenience store, smoke shop, and liquor store owners. We help our members access the best deals, discounts, and rebates available, saving them money and boosting their bottom line.

Founded in 2012 with just 25 member sites in Alabama, SAASOA has grown into the most trusted alliance representing over 5,150 stores across 13 states in the Southern, Eastern, and Midwestern U.S.

But we’re more than just a buying group. We bring educational resources, legislative grassroots efforts, networking opportunities, promote our vendors’ products, support our members with technology and marketing tools, and keep them informed on the latest retail trends. Our goal is to level the playing field for small and independent businesses, helping them grow, compete, and succeed.

Our vision goes beyond business. We aim to build a supportive community where owners grow not only financially, but also personally, rooted in unity, cultural values, and shared success.

We’re not just a network. We’re a movement.
Join us. Grow with us. Win with us.

Name: zamimo boutique
Description:
Zamimo est une boutique en ligne dynamique et diversifiée, fondée par Ndahaza Mohamed Mike et Mwenze muvula Dan. Inspiré par les initiales du nom de Ndahaza, Zamimo Store est un espace où la qualité rencontre la commodité.

Nous proposons une large gamme de produits pour répondre à tous vos besoins. Notre sélection comprend des produits cosmétiques pour améliorer votre routine de beauté, des produits électroniques pour rester à la pointe de la technologie, des accessoires pour téléphones et ordinateurs pour optimiser votre utilisation, et du matériel informatique pour améliorer votre productivité.

Mais ce n’est pas tout. Nous avons également une gamme d’accessoires de décoration pour la maison pour ajouter une touche personnelle à votre espace, des bijoux pour dames et hommes pour compléter votre style, des drones pour explorer le monde d’une nouvelle manière, et du matériel de bureau pour organiser votre espace de travail.

Chez Zamimo , nous nous engageons à fournir un service client exceptionnel. Nous sommes constamment à la recherche de nouvelles façons d’améliorer votre expérience d’achat. Notre objectif est de faire de Zamimo  votre destination de choix pour tous vos besoins d’achat en ligne. Bienvenue chez Zamimo – où le shopping est simplifié.

Biographie
Zamimo Store, une boutique en ligne innovante, est le fruit de la vision et de l’ambition de deux entrepreneurs congolais, Ndahaza Mohamed Mike et Mwenze Dan. Le nom de la boutique, Zamimo, est inspiré des initiales du nom de Ndahaza, reflétant son dévouement et son engagement envers cette entreprise.

Ndahaza, le fondateur, a toujours eu une passion pour l’entrepreneuriat. Avec l’aide de son co-fondateur Mwenze Dan, ils ont transformé cette passion en réalité. Ensemble, ils ont créé Zamimo Store avec l’objectif de fournir une expérience d’achat en ligne exceptionnelle à leurs clients.

Name: Winefamly.dk
Description:
Winefamly.dk er en medlemsbaseret online vinportal- og butik, som sælger håndplukkede vine fra hele verden. Alle produkter udvælges af os og distribueres direkte ud til medlemmerne. På den måde elimineres de fordyrende mellemled og Winefamly er i stand til at tilbyde medlemmerne vin, til den lavest mulige pris, samtidig med at vi sikrer vinbønderne en fair pris for deres produkter. 

De mere end 50.000 medlemmer hos Winefamly, tilbydes en lang række fordele i forbindelse med deres køb af vin, herunder muligheden for at blande og bestille vin som de ønsker - altså ingen krav om køb af 6 stk. for at opnå en rabat. Plus-medlemmer hos Winefamly kan desuden bestille al deres vin til kostpris og alle andre får vinen til landets laveste pris. Der er selvfølgelig også 100% nydelsesgaranti på alle flasker - fordi ingen må drikke vin uden at nyde det.

Som virksomhed befinder Winefamly sig i krydsfeltet mellem tech- og vinindustrien. Vi sætter en ære i at kombinere det tekniske med det velsmagende. Winefamly er en ungdommelig arbejdsplads med en flad struktur og en høj grad af diversitet i sammensætningen af medarbejdere. Der bliver nørdet alt fra kode og SEO-optimering, til tysk Riesling og gode år for italiensk Barolo.
Fælles for os alle er en høj grad af arbejdsglæde, faglig stolthed og stor passion for at være sammen om den gode vin. 

Hos Winefamly er vi i konstant vækst og er derfor altid interesseret i at høre fra dig hvis du mener at vi mangler netop din profil i vores team.

Name: Cookie Co.
Description:
Cookie Co. was founded in 2020 during the height of the Covid-19 pandemic by Elise and Matt Thomas. Working behind the scenes to open the first Cookie Co. location, Elise baked her signature cookie recipes using real eggs, real butter, and real cane sugar in her home, preparing hundreds of boxes weekly by hand for driveway pick-up. Quickly becoming known as “The Cookie Lady,” and amassing an organic social media following, Elise realized that her passion project was blooming into a full blown business. The original Cookie Co. shop opened just around the corner, allowing the company to serve more loyal Cookie Co. fans.

Despite all odds, the flagship Cookie Co. location opened in August 2020 without any formal marketing - simply great cookies and happy customers sharing word of mouth. With their proprietary recipes, Cookie Co. began to offer four flavors per week, with one always being Cookie Co.’s famous Chocolate Chip cookie.

Cookie Co.’s mission is to be the local cookie shop at the core of every great town - a symbol of happiness, comfort, and hope. Supporting all things local by investing in the community and paying it forward through charitable giving, Cookie Co. believes that each local cookie shop can help their communities thrive together.

En la Librería Nacional nos destacamos también por la novedosa integración de heladerías y cafeterías dentro de nuestras sedes (en las de Cali particularmente); en la actualidad contamos con 31 Agencias a nivel Nacional, librerías en seis ciudades (Bogotá, Cali, Medellín, Barranquilla, Cartagena yPereira) situadas en los mejores centros comerciales de cada una de estas ciudades, y con la Tienda Virtual: www.librerianacional.com, con la que llegamos a nuestros clientes de cualquier parte del mundo.

Manejamos más de 60.000 referencias en todos los temas y materias.

Contamos con 250 Proveedores y Editoriales entre las cuales están las más representativas del mundo editorial en lengua española e inglesa.

Mensualmente recibimos un promedio de 500 novedades diversas, entre los que se destacan los libros de mayor venta en todo el mundo; los bestseller de éxito siempre están primero en nuestras librerías.

Tradición, ambiente agradable, amplio y variado surtido y atención personalizada son nuestras cartas de presentación para atender a todo aquel que busca un libro.

Name: Dengo France
Description:
Dengo est un projet à impact social et d'agro-foresterie durable autour du cacao lancé au Brésil en 2017.  Parti de l’idée de protéger la Forêt Atlantique et la biodiversité, Dengo a pour mission d’améliorer les conditions de vie des fermiers et de leurs familles. Ainsi est né Dengo avec pour seule ambition :  changer le monde du chocolat grâce à un projet qui protège autant la nature que les communautés locales, sans faire de compromis sur le plaisir et le goût. Dengo est certifiée B Corp depuis sa création. 

Au Brésil, Dengo travaille déjà avec plus de 150 familles qui cultivent le cacao. Leurs fèves sont achetées en direct, à un prix entre 90 et 160 % de la valeur du marché (données 2022) pour la plus haute qualité. Programmes de formation à l’agro-foresterie; à la protection de l’environnement; Dengo accompagne les producteurs dans leur métier au quotidien, y compris en veillant à la scolarisation des enfants.

Avec les "Quebra-Quebra" et les "Pepitas", les chocolats Dengo sont devenus les favoris des Brésiliens, surtout lorsqu'il s'agit de se faire plaisir, d'apporter de la joie et de faire découvrir ce que la nature sait faire de mieux à ses proches. 

Dengo a déjà développé plus de 30 boutiques au Brésil, et une boutique en ligne. Pas surprenant qu'en 2023, Dengo arrive en Europe avec la France pour première escale.

With a strong focus on excellence, innovation, and customer satisfaction, we aim to enrich the Saudi food industry by providing premium products that meet global standards. Name: VerlichtingNL
Description:

We leveren oplossingen voor uiteenlopende ruimtes: van bedrijfshallen en kantoren tot zorginstellingen, winkels, horecagelegenheden en particuliere woningen. Ook voor verlichting in de tuin of op het terras kun je bij ons terecht.

Ons aanbod is geschikt voor zowel particuliere als zakelijke klanten. Door onze merkonafhankelijke aanpak kunnen we altijd de oplossing bieden die het beste past bij de situatie, het budget en de technische eisen van de klant.

Wat je van ons kunt verwachten:
-	Een compleet assortiment, inclusief LED-verlichting, binnen- en buitenverlichting, ventilatoren en accessoires
-	Levering binnen 24 uur op voorraadhoudende artikelen binnen Nederland
-	Technisch en praktisch advies op maat
-	Bestellen zonder verplicht account
-	Kortingen tot 20% voor installateurs en zakelijke klanten (afhankelijk van merk en afnamevolume)

Als merkonafhankelijke leverancier bieden wij producten van verschillende betrouwbare merken, zoals Signify/Philips, Ledvance/Osram, Trilux, SPL, Beacon, Elstead, Elpro, Megaman, Macbright en Prolumia.

Of het nu gaat om een energiezuinige oplossing voor een magazijn, een plafondventilator voor de slaapkamer of wandverlichting in een restaurant: we denken graag mee en zorgen dat je de juiste keuze maakt.

Meer informatie of direct bestellen? Kijk op www.verlichting.nl

We empower independent restaurants, from local cafés to family-run eateries  with reliable, next-day access to wholesale supplies including fresh ingredients, beverages, packaging, and essentials.

By combining technology, efficient logistics, and supplier partnerships, we’re leveling the playing field so independents have the same supply chain advantages as large chains.

Name: Retrophiliac
Description:
Retrophiliac by Margaux Wosk stands as a pioneering business, proudly owned by an Autistic individual. Specializing in distinctive enamel pins, patches, stickers, and more, our product line takes a dedicated approach to addressing communication needs, Autism, Disability, identities, pronouns, LGBTQIA2+, and beyond.

Margaux is passionately committed to challenging narrow perspectives that limit the potential of disabled and neurodivergent individuals to traditional employment. Our overarching goal is to shatter stigma by showcasing the possibilities of self-employment. Margaux envisions establishing a mentorship program with an integrated grant, nurturing the incubation, development, and realization of ideas from disabled and neurodivergent creators. Upholding the principle of "nothing about us without us," we recognize that our own community members are best positioned to serve and innovate for us. We represent an untapped source of genuine innovation, making us the ideal choice for supporting and uplifting our diverse and vibrant community.

Notably, Retrophiliac items are available in over 45 retail stores across the United States and Canada. Margaux's impactful journey has been featured in AMI's Our Community Episode titled "We Belong," and their neurodiversity pride pin has earned a spot in the Museum of Vancouver's openMOV exhibit. Margaux's dedication has also been recognized through various grants, and they have emerged as a finalist for several prestigious awards.

Description:

Name: LAFRANCAISE - Mailles in France
Description:
LAFRANÇAISE joue le Jeu du Style et de  L’éthique
avec une Maille Cool et Chic de Fabrication 100% Française.

LAFRANCAISE est une marque de maille Française fabriquée exclusivement en France dont l’essentiel de la collection est confectionné dans son atelier De Villers-Bocage labellisé France Terre Textile. 
Soucieuse de soutenir des métiers devenus rares ( remaillage, raccoutrage, bonneterie, tricotage…) elle perpétue ces savoir-faire depuis plus de 100 ans grâce à son atelier Normand. En 2023, elle réinvente la fabrication 100% made in France avec une nouvelle création de mailles qui affirme un style cool, féminin et chic. La maille joue le grand jeu et affirme une élégance nonchalante et joyeuse. Aux intemporels du vestiaire féminin s’associent des pièces fortes ou les volumes, les couleurs et les détails embrassent l’air du temps. Les fils et les matières premières sélectionnées chez les meilleurs filateurs européens offrent une maille au confort absolu et à la sensualité naturelle. 
La marque s'engage également dans une démarche de durabilité en privilégiant des matières naturelles et durables, et en favorisant une production respectueuse de l'environnement. Elle produit seulement 2 collections par an et fabrique ses pièces en quantité limitée afin de produire au plus juste et éviter les stocks d’invendus.  Elle assure une seconde vie aux vêtements dans une logique d’économie circulaire et propose la réparabilité à vie de ses mailles, rendue possible grâce à la conservation de nos fils dans notre atelier et aux talents de nos raccoutreuses, remailleuses.

Name: Spectrum Foodservice Solutions LLC
Description:
Spectrum Foodservice Solutions is a provider of kitchen and cafeteria equipment. The focus is K12 schools, national chains, and independent restaurants. Spectrum FS.1 is located in Nashville, TN | Orlando, FL

The two principals, Kern Halls, and Sean King founded Spectrum Foodservice Solutions, LLC in 2023, initially as a matter of necessity. After years of collaboration on foodservice projects, they aligned their expertise and resources forming a minority and veteran-owned business.

Kern Halls has a long and diverse track record of success in food and beverage industry.

Starting as a culinary specialist in the United States Navy, Kern finished at the top of his class earning him accelerated advancement for his rank as well as a recommendation to work at Camp David.

Kern has worked on ships that carried a range of 300 to over 3,500 servicemen. He was amassed (in civilian terms “employee of the month”) for 6 months in a row. He has cooked for dignitaries from other countries and has been awarded numerous accolades while serving his country.

Sean King brings 35 years of foodservice design and AIA protocol to SFS. Sean has been featured in national publications like The Specifier Magazine and most notably Foodservice Equipment & Supply Magazine. Over the years he has worked with Cracker Barrel, Ruby Tuesdays, Brookfield Development and Food Network to name a few. Together Kern & Sean bring over 70 years of collective expertise in the foodservice Industry.

Mission:
We are a minority and Veteran owned organization. We promote diversity in the workplace and seek alliances with those who seek the same. Our mission is to build foodservice spaces that inspire creativity and productivity.

Name: Delikao
Description:
Chez Delikao, nous avons l’intime conviction qu’il est crucial de repenser notre relation à la nourriture dans une société où les normes et les attentes sont souvent dictées par des idéaux de beauté et de santé souvent irréalistes. 

Trop souvent, nous sommes confrontés à une multitude de messages contradictoires sur ce qui constitue une alimentation "bonne" ou "mauvaise", avec certains aliments vantés comme indispensables tandis que d'autres sont stigmatisés. Cette pression constante pour se conformer à des régimes alimentaires restrictifs peut avoir des conséquences néfastes sur notre estime de soi et notre bien-être général. Nous nous retrouvons pris dans un cycle incessant d'excès, que ce soit en nous privant de certains aliments essentiels à notre équilibre nutritionnel ou en nous livrant à des comportements compulsifs pour compenser nos frustrations. 

En fin de compte, cette obsession pour les régimes alimentaires et la restriction conduit souvent à un déséquilibre mental et physique, compromettant notre santé globale et notre bonheur. Il est donc impératif de reconsidérer notre approche de l'alimentation et de cultiver une relation plus équilibrée et bienveillante envers la nourriture, en mettant l'accent sur le plaisir, la variété et le respect de nos besoins individuels.

Delikao, c'est une solution innovante qui allie gourmandise et bien être.   Elle permet à chacun de se rapprocher un peu plus d'un équilibre personnel. Nous nous donnons comme mission de vous apporter sourire et satisfaction grâce à nos recettes premium uniques.

Name: La Melting Coop
Description:
La Melting Coop : une épicerie et un café participatifs en plein cœur de Villeurbanne. 

Notre projet La Melting Coop regroupe sous une même enseigne :
- l'épicerie coopérative et participative de la coopérative "Demain Supermarché",
- un café participatif géré par l'association "Les Amis de Demain"

C'est, la supérette coopérative et citoyenne lyonnaise. Une épicerie créé, gérée et détenue par et pour ses clients coopérateur·rices. 

Difficile aujourd’hui de combiner qualité, accessibilité et responsabilité lors de nos achats quotidiens. Pourtant, nous sommes de plus en plus nombreux·ses sur l’agglomération lyonnaise à ne pas être satisfait·es de l’offre proposée dans les supermarchés. Partant de ce constat, nous avons décidé de reprendre le contrôle sur notre alimentation, de sortir du modèle de la grande distribution et de construire un lieu à notre image, sur la métropole de Lyon ! Un supermarché différent, à la fois coopératif et citoyen. 

Notre projet La Melting Coop s’inscrit dans une logique d’économie solidaire, de coopération et d’intelligence collective. Notre souhait ? Proposer une alternative de consommation aux Grand·es Lyonnais·es, une gamme de produits alimentaires et non-alimentaires sélectionnée par les coopérateur·rices eux-mêmes !

Notre épicerie a ouvert sur ce principe en octobre 2019 et a déménagé à Villeurbanne en mars 2023 : venez la découvrir !

Notre nouveau local nous permet d'avoir un café participatif qui propose de très nombreuses animations ! 
N'hésitez pas à les découvrir : 
https://les-amis-de-demain.assoconnect.com/page/2248443-accueil

Name: Fagokho Corporation (Ramen Nagi PH)
Description:
RAMEN NAGI
Highly regarded by ramen purists and trendsetters alike, our authentic preparation, bold approach and innovation sets us apart within the sphere of top-quality ramen shops. Our Master Ramen Chef Satoshi Ikuta trained for over a decade in classic Hakata ramen shops before winning a contest for a spot in Tokyo’s famous Tachikawa Ramen Square. Founded in 2004, we have expanded to over 35 restaurants with branches throughout Asia. Our Palo Alto ramen shop is our first US location and the realization of a dream come true.

RAMEN MASTER
CHEF SATOSHI IKUTA
Nagi was founded in 2004 by Mr. Satoshi Ikuta at the age of 27. Chef Ikuta, who had trained for over a decade in various classic Hakata ramen shops, began with the practice known as ‘aida kari’, borrowing bar space one day a week to run a guerrilla ramen shop. With his rebellious spirit, Ikuta made a name for himself by first winning a contest for a spot in Tokyo’s famous Tachikawa Ramen Square (noodle theme park). He quickly followed with a successful shop in Shibuya and then Shinjuku Golden Gai. There are now over 35 locations around the world.

Name: Teraa Living
Description:
Teraa Living: Conscious Luxury for a New World
Teraa Living isn’t just a business, it’s a lifestyle movement. A place where design meets soul, wellness meets intention, and clean living becomes second nature.
Founded by Megha Modi, a holistic designer with roots in fashion, interiors, and energy healing, Teraa Living brings together brands that exist to nourish, restore, and inspire. From organic food to soulful interiors to mindful pet care, every offering is grounded in the belief that luxury is alignment—with nature, with purpose, and with a life well-lived.
________________________________________
Our Story
Megha’s journey began in fashion at age 16, working alongside her mother while balancing school and business. Over time, her passion for design grew beyond clothing and into the spaces people lived in. As she explored interiors, ancient modalities, holistic healing, energy work which added deeper purpose to her work.
A turning point came during her own health struggles. Exhausted and seeking answers, she turned to holistic healing and the teachings of the Medical Medium, discovering the power of clean, plant-based living. That transformation gave rise to Happy Earth Organic—and eventually, the vision for Teraa Living.
Today, every brand under Teraa Living is an expression of Megha’s mission: to create with intention, to heal through design, and to make wellness a way of life.
________________________________________
Our Vision
We imagine a world where:
•	Clean, organic living is the norm
•	Spaces support wellbeing, not just aesthetics
•	Conscious consumption becomes the default
•	Luxury means essence, not excess
We’re here to help make that world real—one honest product, one healing space, one intentional choice at a time.
________________________________________
Our Mission
To bring together impact-driven brands that merge ancient wisdom with modern innovation.
To lead a shift toward sustainable living, soulful design, and authentic wellness.
