2022 hat unser in-House Paid Ads Team die deutsche Online-Marketing-Szene auf den Kopf gestellt. Als erste Brand in Deutschland haben wir Formate wie Straßenumfragen oder Podcasts als hochperformante Video-Creatives etabliert. So konnten wir in nur 3 Jahren mehr als 300.000 glücklichen Kunden und Kundinnen gewinnen. 

Bei uns kommen A-Player mit Leidenschaft für ihr Feld zusammen, um sich selbst zu verwirklichen.

Die TryMoin DNA? 
Wir geben immer 110%. Nicht weil wir müssen, sondern weil es uns Spaß macht.
Wir helfen uns gegenseitig und ziehen an einem Strang.
Wir sind ehrlich, offen und transparent. 
Wir sagen nie "Das haben wir aber schon immer so gemacht" sondern freuen uns über neuen Input.
Wir respektieren und schätzen alle Teammitglieder und deren Meinungen gleichermaßen - egal welche Position.
Wir ermöglichen maximale Freiheit durch eine moderne Arbeitskultur.
Wir finden kreative Lösungen und ungewöhnliche Ansätze um komplexe Probleme zu lösen.
Wir lieben, was wir tun.

Name: Mimosa Rwm Espiritu
Description:
In 1865, a ship carrying the first Welsh settlers seeking a new life in Patagonia, Argentina, set sail from Liverpool on a voyage of discovery. The first ship, Mimosa, carried passengers on this life changing voyage, and was followed by more ships, establishing the Welsh speaking communities in Patagonia that remain today.
Creating a new spirit brand to celebrate the pioneering spirit of the Welsh people who embarked on this new life and adventure is the vision of Alun Wyn Jones, who won his first cap for Wales in Argentina on the 11th of June 2006 at the Estadio Raul Conti, Puerto Madryn Patagonia.

Um dieser Aufgabe gerecht zu werden haben wir speziell für Männer eine einfache, innovative und wirksames Lösung entwickelt.

Unser Traum ist es, dass MaleUp in die Hautpflegeroutine eines jeden Mannes aufgenommen wird und ihm hilft, jeden Tag das Beste aus sich raus zu holen und sich selbstbewusst zu fühlen. Vor allem im Job kann ein leichtes Männer-Make-up für mehr Wohlbefinden und somit auch für einen dynamischeren Auftritt sorgen. Denn nur, wer sich in seiner Haut wohl fühlt, strahlt das auch aus und kann andere mitreißen.

Description:
Big League Chew was created by former Cornell lefty Rob Nelson in 1977 while playing for the fabled Portland Mavericks. With help from 13-year-old batboy Todd Field and former New York Yankee All-Star Jim Bouton, Rob's idea got off to a sweet start. 
The idea was simple: shredded bubble gum in a stay-fresh pouch. The first batch was made on Feb. 6th, 1979 in Candy Field's kitchen (Todd's mom!). Big League Chew hit retail shelves a year later and instantly became a fan favorite across America. 
Over four decades and one BILLION pouches later, Big League Chew remains a classic for kids and adults. It can even be found in Cooperstown as the "Hall of Fame Bubble Gum "!

Name: Ethico India
Description:
Ethico started as an online platform with the aim of making conscious living convenient and then added an experiential space in Goa.
We are devoted to building conversations and initiating action around the climate crisis. By sourcing sustainable and ethically produced food, personal care, homecare goods, upcycled goods, and furniture created from reclaimed wood, we are aiding a plastic free lifestyle, and enabling consumers to question their choices and their impact on the environment. We’re always on the lookout for like minded partners we call Ethiclan, so connect with us for collaboration.
So far, we have reduced plastic production of 60,000+ plastic units and counting! Perceiving the importance of individual impact and living more consciously after having picked up 10,00,000 kilos of trash from the Mahim shoreline, we realised that there are millions of others who are not afraid to make the tiny and sometimes big personal changes that will make a difference. So we consolidated our learnings into the making of Ethico to create sustainable lasting change.

Name: FHorácio Representações
Description:
FHorácio Representações nasceu com a essência de uma palavra - “Inconformidade”.

Após uma vitoriosa passagem pela gerência comercial na indústria de laticínios, identificamos um enorme potencial de mercado não atendido, a visão era tão clara e a inconformidade com as soluções no mercado era tão grande, que optamos por renunciar uma excelente oportunidade na indústria para ir atrás de outras ainda melhores no mercado de representação.

Foi então que iniciamos nossas atividades em 2014, já tivemos outro nome, mas a essência continua a mesma inconformidade, que nos fez sair de um cargo gerencial para nos aventurarmos a empreender, com a certeza de que poderíamos e ainda podemos oferecer uma solução cada vez mais otimizada ao mercado.
Além de representação comercial, atuamos com consultoria, gestão de equipe de vendas (de algumas indústrias parceiras), equipe de merchandising própria e nossa última empreitada, é um sistema de gestão comercial para representantes, distribuidores e indústrias.

Temos como principal diferencial a busca constante pela excelência no sell out, foco no PDV, gerenciamento analítico dos resultados e desenvolvimento de estratégias para alavancar o negócio de nossos clientes.
Sempre buscando parcerias profissionais, sustentáveis e éticas com nossos clientes e parceiros, construindo relacionamentos de longo prazo com indústrias e clientes.

O objetivo deste canal é nos manter conectados com nossos clientes, parceiros e com todos aqueles que queiram conhecer mais sobre nossa empresa, produtos e nossa forma de trabalho!

Name: Nisarga-A Millet Kitchen
Description:
Nisarga: Millet-Based Cloud Kitchen in Indore – Healthy Junk Food Alternatives

At Nisarga, we are a millet-based cloud kitchen in Indore committed to transforming popular junk foods into healthy, nutritious alternatives—all while keeping the delicious taste intact. Our mission is to make healthy eating enjoyable, by offering a variety of millet-based dishes that cater to health-conscious individuals.

We also offer a Pranic Meal Service, a monthly subscription plan providing wholesome, nutrient-dense lunch and dinner meals delivered directly to your door. Whether you’re craving healthier versions of your favorite foods or looking for customized meal plans, Nisarga brings the perfect balance of taste and nutrition to your daily diet.

Name: sy'a

our patrons believe in the ultimate scale of our existence. they see the abundance in nature. they see the planet as vast, with resources aplenty. they see the creator and every creation of his/hers as abundant.

they share. they care. they excel.

our mission is to serve this cult. we aim to be the fuel of this abundance revolution.

Name: Leo's Market & Eatery
Description: Leo’s Market & Eatery, founded by Stephanie White-Longworth and Keith White, is a subsidiary of Pride Investment Partners.  The pair were the fourth generation of leadership of GasAmerica, which they grew to more than 90 stores across Indiana and the Midwest before selling to Marathon Petroleum in 2012.  Leo’s is named after the business partners’ late father, Richard Leo White.  Originating in Greenfield, Indiana, Leo’s is like no other ‘convenience’ store concept in the industry today.  Leo’s has a chef providing weekly special featured food dishes including prepared and made-to-order soups, salads, pastas, pastries, and more; and is known for its wide assortment of breakfast, lunch, dinner and dessert kolaches.  Grab your food to-go, dine-in, or visit the drive-thru which serves both eatery and market items.  Leo’s market provides a wide assortment of grocery items including fresh produce, meats, cheeses, breads, ready-to-go family meal options, hand-picked flowers, and gifts; and of course, has your traditional snacks, chips, beverages, etc.  Leo’s supports local Indiana vendors; so, you will always find something ‘homegrown’ or ‘homemade’ in Indiana on the shelves.  Find your local Leo’s at www.yourleos.com.

Name: HyBuys
Description:
HyBuys-ի մայր ընկերությունը՝ Նետրեքս ՍՊԸ Գերմանիայի Առևտրի պալատի պաշտոնական անդամ է, որն ունի 20+ տարվա փորձ էլեկտրոնային առևտրի ոլորտում: Մենք ստեղծում ենք կամուրջ ՀՀ-ում ապրող գնորդների և եվրոպական(Գերմանիա, Իսպանիա, Իտալիա, Ֆրանսիա, Նիդեռլանդներ, Բելգիա, Ավստրիա) առցանց խանութների միջև։

HyBuys-ի միջոցով գնումների առավելություններն են՝

ավելի ցածր գները,
ապահով գնումները,
առաքման արագ կազմակերպումը,
առանց միջնորդավճարի ծառայությունը։

ԵՄ-ից դուրս ապրող յուրաքանչյուր ոք կարող է օգտվել HyBuys-ից՝ Գերմանիայից և Իսպանիայից գնումներ կատարելու համար: Մեզ հետ Դուք կարող եք պատվիրել ցանկացած իր, որը հասանելի է եվրոպական առցանց շուկայում։ Մենք կգնենք Ձեր նախընտրած իրը և կառաքենք այն ՀՀ՝ տրամադրելով 5% քեշբեք ամեն գնումի համար (բացառություն են կազմում flaconi.de կայքից կատարված կոսմետիկ միջոցների և օծանելիքի՝ 30,000 դրամը գերազանցող գնումները, որոնց համար գործում է ԱՆՎՃԱՐ առաքում)։

Մեր միջոցով կատարված գնումների պարագայում Ձեզ մնում է միայն ստանալ պատվերները՝ առանց որևէ բանի մասին անհանգստանալու։

Այլ կերպ ասած՝ հայբայե՛ք, խնայե՛ք և վայելե՛ք HyBuys-ի հետ, քանզի մեզ հետ անիրականն արդեն իրական է։

Name: Atomy Canada Inc.
Description:
Established in 2009, Atomy is a network marketing company that conducts direct sales in 23 different regions (as of Dec.2021) including South Korea and Canada in 2011.

We are growing at a rapid pace by implementing a consumer-oriented strategy that adheres to the principles of Absolute Quality Absolute Price established by our founding Chairman Han-Gill Park.

We are also solidifying the foundation for sustainable growth by focusing on 
our forward-thinking goal of customer success and fostering three key corporate cultures: observing principles, growing together, and sharing. In 2021, Atomy's annual revenue was 1.84 billion USD and our global members reached 16 million.

Name: Crooked Beverage Company
Description:
Crooked Beverage Company is committed to the values, the rules and the desires of those looking for an alternative to alcohol. We are as authentic and real as the fruit we use, the passion we share, and the investments we make to our communities, our partners and those we serve. We will always prioritize safety and education to ensure a happy and enjoyable experience before, during and after consumption of our tonics. Made in Minnesota, by Minnesotans using Minnesota materials, land, and core values.

Like the water in our lakes, the snow on our roofs, the color of our autumn leaves, the fish under our ice and the cravings for summers we all share, we are Minnesota. Crooked is the ultimate Minnesota, functional beverage! You’ll find our tonics in the stores you trust, the restaurants you love, and online at crookedbeverage.com 

Let’s get highdrated!

Name: Hé!maté
Description:
Née en 2021, Hé!maté est une entreprise située dans le Calvados proposant ses 8 recettes de matés 100% naturels et sans arômes artificiels dans les grandes et moyennes surfaces. Aujourd'hui c'est plus de 300 magasins qui nous font confiances ! 

Les feuilles de yerba maté que nous utilisons proviennent d'un fournisseur brésilien certifié biologique et ECOCERT. En outre, nos produits sont conditionnés par deux ESAT (Établissement et Service d'Aide par le Travail) du Calvados, soulignant notre engagement en faveur de l'insertion des personnes en situation de handicap.

Au-delà de notre mission sociale, Hé!maté est profondément engagée dans la préservation de l'environnement. Nos produits sont dépourvus de suremballage, et nous avons éliminé l'utilisation de plastique, privilégiant le carton recyclé et des infusettes fabriquées à partir d'amidon de maïs 100% biodégradable.

Rejoignez-nous dans cette aventure où le goût exquis du maté rencontre un engagement social et environnemental fort !

Name: Taatsu - Japanese Baked Tarts

Through every tart and our packaging, we hope to share our journey in pursuit of perfection. From our kitchen to your home, from the oven to you, with every order we put our best bake forward. 

You’ll never forget your first bite.

Name: Its Our Planet Too
Description:
At It’s Our Planet Too our vision is for every child to believe that they have the power to protect our planet. We want to empower them to become little eco heroes who seek to make a positive change for a greener future. 

Our award winning eco subscription boxes - a TOOL KITS FOR ECO HEROES are designed to connect children with our precious planet and empower parents. They are sustainable and 100% plastic free. As featured in the Evening Standard 10 Best Kids' Subscription Boxes.

As a social venture, we are committed to giving back. Be it gently educating our littles ones (and their families), distributing our Tool Kits to children that may not receive any environmental education or supporting a charity that is very close to our hearts. We pledge to give a minimum of 50% of our profits to good causes.

Gold winner City Kids Magazine Green Awards 2023
Shortlisted for the 2023 Startup Awards - Social Enterprise StartUp of the year
2022 Small Business Britain #SmallBiz100 campaign

Name: Grupo Açaí Original / Polpanorte Europa
Description:
A Família #Polpanorte surgiu no ano 1995 com o fornecimento de polpas de fruta de excelente qualidade para o mercado local, e rapidamente se tornou uma marca líder e de confiança no Brasil. 

Quase 30 anos depois, e com um vasto know how no segmento das polpas de fruta, foi no açaí que a marca consolidou o seu mercado, criando uma fórmula com alma, que torna o seu mix de açaí o mais cremoso e saboroso, não só no Brasil, mas também na Europa através da representação da marca Açaí Original. 

Rico em carbohidratos, lipídeos e fibras, além de outros nutrientes essenciais para o funcionamento do nosso organismo, o valor energético do açaí, conta com gorduras benéficas que auxiliam na redução do colesterol mau (LDL) e melhoram o colesterol bom (HDL). São inúmeros os benefícios para a saúde e bem estar, nomeadamente a sua ação antioxidante, essencial no combate à ação dos radicais livres, responsáveis pelo envelhecimento precoce e pelo surgimento de doenças degenerativas do sistema nervoso, mas é o seu sabor que o torna tão desejado.

Connosco, para além do Mix com Guaraná, o Mix com Banana, Zero ou puro, pode encontrar também o creme de Cupuaçu em vários formatos, assim como diversas polpas de frutas congeladas que podem ser utilizadas das mais diversas formas, contribuindo com um sabor naturalmente único, às suas várias formas de utilização. 

Não deixe que o seu negócio fique para trás. Acompanhe as tendências, e garanta este sabor de origem natural aos seus clientes. 

Fale connosco e encomende já.

Name: Nature Lab Global Corp.
Description:
Company Overview
PT Nature Lab Global is a growing retail company in the health supplement industry, committed to helping people live healthier lives through innovative and trusted wellness products. Based in Tangerang, Indonesia, our team is passionate about natural health, customer satisfaction, and building a company culture rooted in integrity, collaboration, and growth.

Our product lines are carefully curated and continuously developed to meet modern lifestyle needs — combining science-backed formulations with nature-inspired ingredients. We’re proud to serve customers both online and offline, with a vision to become a leading health brand in Southeast Asia.

People & Culture
At Nature Lab Global, we believe that people are our greatest asset. Our HR vision is to create a dynamic, inclusive, and purpose-driven work environment where every team member feels valued and empowered.

We support our employees through structured onboarding, ongoing training, performance development, and opportunities for growth. From our Back Office to our Operational Team, we’re building a workplace where collaboration, well-being, and innovation are part of everyday life.

We welcome individuals who are not only talented but also eager to grow, contribute, and make a positive impact on people’s health and lives.

Name: Duffy Group PNG
Description:
The Duffy Group was established in Port Moresby, Papua New Guinea in 2010. We are the pioneer, market leader in the café, specialty coffee and artisan baked goods industry in Papua New Guinea. 
We currently operate 4 Duffy cafés within Port Moresby and our business employs approximately 140 staff. Our Head Quarters location is approximately 1500sqm, accommodating our flagship café, central kitchen, bakery, coffee roasting facility and dry/cold goods storage.
The Group portfolio also includes Baker Boy Family Restaurants & The Kokomo wholesale Bakery.

Name: Flags For Good
Description:
Hey, I'm Michael.

In early 2020, as the world was going to shit, I decided to channel my anger into action. Flags For Good was born out of that societal rage, quarantine boredom, and my lifelong obsession with flags. (I’m talking has a TED talk-level flag nerd...)

We created Flags For Good to:
  Raise awareness of causes that move humanity in the right direction
  Donate a portion of each sale to said causes
  Put more tools of change in people's hands

In our short history, we've been able to go viral on Tiktok a few times, make some awesome flags (and redesign some terrible ones), and most importantly, donate over $200,000 to deserving organizations.

Name: PuninWine
Description:
Профессиональные сотрудники встречают гостей в двух просторных магазинах, разделенных по принципу: винный отдел; а также крепкий алкоголь и сигары. 
На наших полках собраны лучшие образцы продуктов со всего света. Прямые поставки по эксклюзивным контрактам гарантируют оригинальность и качество нашей продукции. Опытные закупщики следят за последними тенденциями в мире алкоголя и сигар, чтобы наши клиенты получали только лучшие новинки в каждой категории. Подобранный ассортимент закрывает практически все запросы наших гостей, так как в нем помимо популярных позиций представлены такие редкие на острове продукты, как канарские вулканические вина, премиальное саке, китайская водка Мао Та, самые дорогие в мире бокалы ручной работы и многое другое.
Наш раздел “Элитная коллекция” не оставит равнодушным ни одного искушенного любителя вин и крепкого алкоголя.. В нем представлены произведения искусства: от Великих шато Бордо, до вертикальной коллекции Romanee Conti и самых редких виски Macallan. Вас ждут более 500 редких вин Бургундии, Калифорнии, Тосканы, при этом года урожая подобраны таким образом, чтобы любители наслаждались винами уже сейчас. Также, гости смогут оставить заказ, и мы найдем и доставим на Кипр любое вино, существующее в мире.
Сигары - быстро развивающаяся категория во всем мире. Punin Wine представляет широкий ассортимент сигар и элитных сигарных аксессуаров. Эксклюзивный контракт с Дэниел Маршалл позволил представить на острове знаменитые золотые сигары. А изысканные хьюмидоры и другие сигарные аксессуары уже украшают кабинеты многих знатоков ароматного хобби Кипра.

Name: Helvetic'Arts
Description:
L'association Helvetic'Arts indépendante est établie à Genève en Suisse et regroupe plusieurs domaines de la culture vivante du 21e siècle. Existante depuis 2022, elle a permis aux Daily Rock et Daily Movies de survivre grâce à des dons privés et publics, comme le prouve ses différents sites internet. Uniques et complémentaires, à l’instar de nos mensuels toujours existants également, nos sites web attirent toujours plus, un public impliqué et diversifié. Tant par son âge, son sexe ou sa classe sociale.

Grâce à ses équipes de spécialistes, jeunes et passionnées, Helvetic'Arts s’adapte aux nouvelles tendances et peut créer des synergies entre ses différents supports s’adaptant ainsi au caractère de plus en plus transmédia de la production culturelle.

Helvetic'Arts, votre porte d’accès sur le monde culturel d’aujourd’hui… et de demain!

Name: Skiddis of Sweden AB
Description:
There's no bad weather , only bad clothes.

We have created Skiddis brand to provide children with high-performance rain pants that protect both our children and our resources. They are comfortable, easy to put on and take off, and durable.

Name: LoveReading4Kids
Description:
Reading books changes lives. Now buying books through the LoveReading4Kids online bookstore can change lives, too.

LoveReading and LoveReading4Kids, the UK’s leading book recommendation website, has launched an online bookshop with social purpose, in response to the book funding crisis in schools – in a move that’s been praised by the New Children’s Laureate.

Launched 17 years ago, LoveReading and LoveReading4Kids have since become a staple for readers looking for their next book.

Now, they have relaunched, enabling readers the ability to purchase books directly from the site, with 25% of the cover price being donated to a school, delivering better outcomes for the UK’s children. Readers will also receive 10% off the RRP on a huge selection of titles.

Recent research by the Centre for Literacy in Primary Education found that the school funding crisis means that 60% of classrooms have no access to a budget for new books.

Studies also show that reading and writing are key to unlocking a child’s learning potential and allows them to overcome a disadvantaged background.

Offering a socially conscious way to buy books online, LoveReading’s new venture will allow book buyers to actively support their local school. For books ordered and directly allocated to a particular school, the school will receive 25% of the cover price from each sale. When a sale is made and not attributed to a specific school, 10% of the cover price will go into a pot that will then be split between LoveReading’s school members, prioritising a percentage for schools in particular need and supporting pupils in deprived areas.

Go on, buy a book, support a school  and make a difference. 
Because books change lives.

www.lovereading.co.uk 
www.lovereading4kids.co.uk

The ambition is to create a transcendent experience that tantalizes the senses and satisfies the soul. Creating the world's best-tasting ice cream is no small feat. It took years of meticulous research, countless iterations and an unwavering commitment of quality to perfect our recipes. Ice creams served at Amul Ice Lounge are the result of a labor of love, a testament of dedication to provide an unparalleled sensory experience. 
Amul Ice Lounge is not just about ice cream; it's about an experience. An experience curated for young adults with a craving for the exotic and the extraordinary. Our ice creams are crafted from real milk, infused with rare ingredients that capture the authentic essence of their country of origin. Velvety indulgence, French Caramel; the exquisite bliss of Swiss Chocolate; the creamy perfection of Gelato Chocolate and the robust aroma of Turkish Coffee, are amongst many other international flavours.  
What sets Amul Ice Lounge apart is its exclusivity. These flavors are not available anywhere else, making each visit to Amul Ice Lounge a new discovery. The ever-evolving menu ensures that there is always something new to try. Amul Ice Lounge has the “Instagrammble” ambiance, pampering service and the joy of sharing something truly special with those you love.

Name: Gomo Coop
Description:
A Gomo Coop é uma Cooperativa de Consumo Participativa localizada no centro da cidade de São Paulo.

Um supermercado inovador baseado num modelo que é sucesso em diferentes lugares do mundo!

Qualquer pessoa pode comprar na Gomo, basta  se tornar cooperante e participar do funcionamento do espaço  para ter acesso a uma grande variedade de produtos frescos e de qualidade, livres de veneno e também convencionais!

Como?
Trabalhando  junto para manter um negócio que também é seu!
Cada pessoa se torna dona de uma parcela da cooperativa e contribui com 3 horas por mês realizando uma tarefa, como operar o caixa, organizar o estoque, limpar um espaço, atender às pessoas cooperantes no escritório, entre muitas outras opções.

Pertencer a um lugar assim traz muitas vantagens!

- Você constrói um negócio solidário mais sustentável e justo;
- Conhece a origem e a rede de distribuição dos seus alimentos;
- Participa de uma comunidade que compartilha dos seus valores;
- Encontra uma melhor versão do que você consome no dia a dia;
- Entende a composição dos preços e também economiza!

A Gomo Coop acredita que para consumir com responsabilidade é preciso valorizar a transparência, atuar pela preservação do planeta e lutar por melhorias sociais coletivamente.

Quer vir com a gente? Preencha sua pré-cooperativação!

Name: Книгарня "Є"
Description:
КНИГАРНЯ «Є» — велика всеукраїнська мережа, яка стала однією з перших компаній в просуванні українського продукту — української книжки. Ми пишаємося такою позицією, яка викристалізувана вже понад 17 років, і тішимося нашою наполегливістю, незламністю та успіхами.

Наша мережа – це заохочення не тільки для покупця, а й для українського видавця, оскільки його книги посідають тут чільне місце.

Name: DXN Brasil
Description:
A DXN foi fundada em 1993 por Datuk Lim Siow Jin, um graduado do Instituto Indiano de Tecnologia, impulsionado pela busca pelos benefícios do cogumelo Ganoderma (Lingzhi, o Rei das Ervas) para a saúde humana. Seu trabalho incansável resultou na criação da empresa com foco no potencial dessa erva.

Com sede na Malásia e atuação global, as principais atividades da DXN são o cultivo, fabricação e comercialização de suplementos alimentares saudáveis, sendo mundialmente conhecida pelos seus produtos à base de Ganoderma. Suas linhas incluem suplementos dietéticos, alimentos, bebidas, higiene pessoal, cosméticos, utilidades domésticas e sistemas de tratamento de água.

Desde o início, a DXN adota a filosofia "Um Dragão, Um Mundo, Um Mercado, e Uma Mentalidade" ('One Dragon One World One Market and One Mind') para seu crescimento contínuo.

A DXN Holdings Berhad, a holding do Grupo DXN, foi listada na bolsa de valores da Malásia (Bursa Malaysia) em 2003, saindo em 2011 após uma oferta pública de aquisição do fundador.

Reconhecida por sua qualidade, a DXN diversificou seus negócios para áreas como imobiliário e tecnologia da informação. No seu principal modelo de venda direta, a empresa tem uma rápida expansão global, com mais de 20 milhões de distribuidores registrados em todo o mundo, consolidando sua posição como líder em produtos baseados em Ganoderma.

Name: CasaMia Eccellenze A Tavola
Description:
CasaMia nutre un interesse particolare per il cibo, perché per noi non deve solo saziare, ma deve anche soddisfare il palato, saziare gli occhi, raccontare, trasmettere sensazioni ed emozioni nuove. Per noi, ogni piatto è un’opera d’arte che si materializza sulla tavola, pronto ad emozionare chi lo gusta.

CasaMia è un luogo in cui la passione per il cibo si fonde con la cura per i dettagli, creando un’esperienza unica e indimenticabile. E ogni volta che ci sediamo a tavola, sappiamo che stiamo per vivere un’esperienza che va ben oltre il semplice piacere del gusto.


CasaMia è un luogo dove la passione per le cose buone è coltivata da tempo. Qui, tutto è ben fatto con un’attenzione costante all’eccellenza, valorizzando i prodotti del territorio e rispettando l’evoluzione del gusto.

La ristorazione a filiera corta è frutto di una ricerca attenta della qualità, dalla selezione delle materie prime fresche alla cura speciale dello Chef, che si impegna a garantire piatti di grande valore. Ma CasaMia è molto di più di un semplice ristorante. CasaMia è un luogo in cui il cibo è un’esperienza completa, che va oltre il semplice saziare la fame.

Name: Korean Beauty
Description:
När koreansk hudvård var mer än ett rykte, föddes idén om Korean Beauty.

Korean Beauty är ett familjeföretag som startade 2019, med visionen att tillhandahålla ett omfattande sortiment av koreansk hudvård. Vårt mål var att få fler att upptäcka fördelarna med dessa produkter. Vi strävade efter att göra våra produkter tillgängliga för alla, oavsett om man är nybörjare eller redan väl insatt i K-beauty.

Genom åren har vi vuxit till en stor K-Beauty-familj och vårt community expanderar dagligen. Det är en plats där alla kan mötas och diskutera hudvård. Så oavsett om du är ny på K-beauty eller en erfaren användare med en tio-stegs rutin, så hittar du din plats hos oss på Korean Beauty. För oss är det inte bara hudvård – det är en resa och en gemenskap.

Koreansk hudvård är mer än en 10-stegs hudvårdsrutin – det är en livsstil som har blivit ett globalt fenomen. Det är förankrat i Koreas kulturella fokus på hälsosam hud och understöds av decennier av vetenskaplig forskning. Det handlar inte om att äga en uppsjö av produkter, utan om att välja de rätta produkterna för din hudtyp och använda dem i en effektiv ordning.

Marknader: Vi verkar på 9 marknader; Sverige, Norge, Finland, Danmark, Nederländerna, Tyskland, Spanien, Belgien och Polen.

Name: Suqi
Description:
Suqi is a digital grocery platform aimed at delivering a variety of exclusive and affordable Halal goods to consumers across Europe.

Founded in 2022, Suqi acts as the culinary bridge between customers’ cultural and current homes. Bringing proud and diverse foods, inspired by the cultures and places that make up the fabric of Europe's communities, to their fingertips, any day of the week.
Customers can order from a range of about 1,500 products, including a variety of pantry staples for everyday cooking, meats, cheeses, fruits and vegetables, beverages, aromatics, seasonings, as well as frozen foods to stock up on.

For Suqi, making cooking Halal food easier is not an end in itself. Suqi believes that cooking and time spent around the dinner table is what truly brings people together. Therefore, creating memories around the dinner table shouldn’t be expensive or inconvenient. Suqi tackles this with affordable options without sacrificing quality.

Name: Ship My Plants
Description:
Before, there wasn't that one, go to place that plant and garden enthusiasts could go and find just about anything they were looking for all in one place… until now!

Ship My Plants is the first of its kind plant-based marketplace!
Inspired by a lifetime love for plants and plant-related knowledge, Ship My Plants offers a uniquely innovative, fair, and open marketplace for local plant buyers and sellers alike. Our vendor-first e-commerce and data management tools create growing possibilities for Ship My Plants to be the ultimate online destination to connect plant businesses with plant purchasers near and far.

Our mission is to be Earth’s most plant and people-centric company, and to create a fair and open marketplace for people who love plants. Buyers will find a spot to explore and discover new plants, old favorites, and learn from the people who grew them. Sellers will find a spot to share the fruits of their labor and watch them bloom.

Additionally, we believe in uncompromised quality and hold our sellers to the highest of standards. We prioritize education & resources to buyers and sellers alike. We are plant people and knowledge is the key to the offerings found on Ship My Plants.

Name: LAYVA S.A.
Description:
LAYVA S.A. comenzó sus actividades el 09/06/2004 y su nombre está formado por las primeras sílabas de los apellidos de sus fundadores Larrique y Vanni. Ambos comenzaron su carrera en el área de la soldadura en la década de 1980, recibiendo capacitación de reconocidas empresas de Europa, USA y de otros países de América. Hoy continúan representando a esas mismas empresas que dieron inicio a su carrera profesional.
Somos una empresa que posee certificación de calidad ISO 9001:2015 en calidad y WQO 2100:16 en responsabilidad social organizacional y la única empresa de Uruguay dedicada exclusivamente al rubro soldadura. Importadores de sus representadas:
SUMIG-Brasil
NOVAMETAL-Brasil-Suiza
KESTRA-Brasil
CEBORA-Italia
HARRIS-USA
AMPROCORP-USA
PROWELD-CE
REHM-Alemania
RHODIUS-Alemania
Contamos con personal técnico en soldadura que se ocupa del entrenamiento de soldadores que recién se incorporan a la profesión así como del asesoramiento en las funciones de sofisticados equipos para los soldadores más experimentados. Dispone de tres técnicos en electrónica que se ocupan de la reparación de equipos de soldadura y corte plasma de todas las marcas existentes en el mercado. Estos técnicos son capacitados por los fabricantes que representamos, tanto en Europa como en Uruguay cuando nos visitan los técnicos europeos. Mediante un teléfono celular se brinda asistencia técnica las 24 hrs. los 365 días del año.
En el año 2011 nos mudamos a nuestro nuevo local comercial propio donde se amplió el espacio tanto de atención al cliente como también en el área de trabajo y de servicio técnico.
Destinamos año tras año un rubro especial para la capacitación permanente de sus funcionarios.
Muchos de ellos se han capacitado y otros continúan haciéndolo en ventas, administración, idiomas, comercio exterior, etc. En otros casos, nuestros técnicos han concurrido a Italia a recibir capacitación en reparación de soldadoras y corte plasma de la marca CEBORA y a Brasil a la fábrica de SUMIG.

Name: Café Way Of Life
Description:
Le café  n'est pas seulement celui qu’on boit ou celui qui se trouve au coin de la rue. Il existe sous d’autres formes et s'invite dans des univers inattendus comme la maison ou encore la mode. Dans le quotidien, le café mérite sa place, bien plus que dans une tasse.

Bienvenue dans le Café Way Of Life !

Nous sourçons et proposons des produits et objets café originaux, responsables et utiles. Chaque produit ou objet est sélectionné avec soin parmi des marques engagées et audacieuses du monde entier, pour offrir à nos clients une expérience unique et authentique.

Nous avons à  de mobiliser le plus grand nombre pour rendre visibles et valoriser les petits acteurs qui font bouger la filière café. C’est pourquoi nous avons initié la cafellowship, notre communauté qui réconcilie buveurs et non buveurs de café avant tout amateurs de Café Way Of Life, un nouvel art de vivre dédié au café lifestyle.

Marques, entreprises, partenaires rejoignent notre cafellowship pour encourager une filière plus vertueuse et un monde plus ouvert !

Notre page LinkedIn présente nos marques, notre offre B2B, nos partenariats, nos découvertes sectorielles et notre actualité.

Prêt(e)s à adopter le Café Way Of Life, votre source d'inspiration infinie pour caféiner le quotidien ?
_____

Fournisseurs, si vous proposez des produits innovants et responsables issus de la filière café, rejoignez notre aventure. Saisissez l’opportunité de les faire connaître à une clientèle curieuse et avide de nouveautés !

Entreprises, si vous souhaitez offrir à vos clients ou salariés une expérience inédite, adoptez le Café Way Of Life. Que ce soit à travers notre gamme exclusive de produits ou avec nos animations et ateliers sur-mesure, nous créons des moments mémorables.

Si vous êtes un organisme qui évolue dans les univers du surcyclage, de l’innovation autour du café, de l’entrepreneuriat et que vous adhérez à nos valeurs, rejoignez notre écosystème !

Description:
Welcome to our LinkedIn page! 

At D2D, we are passionate about promoting a healthy and balanced lifestyle among people who need it the most, modern working professionals. We do this by crafting health products that can fit in easily in their lifestyle and improve their lives holistically.

Join us on this journey as we inspire and empower working professionals in the metropolitan cities of India to lead healthier and happier lives. Through our engaging mindset posts, thought-provoking podcasts featuring industry leaders, and curated content on healthy lifestyle choices, we aim to provide valuable insights and practical tips that you can incorporate into your daily routine.

We strive to foster a supportive environment where everyone can share their experiences, exchange ideas, and find inspiration to achieve their wellness goals. Whether you're looking to enhance your physical health, boost mental well-being, or cultivate a positive mindset, our community is here to support you every step of the way.

Stay tuned for our latest updates, expert advice, and exclusive content that will help you navigate the challenges of modern living while prioritizing your health. Together, let's create a vibrant community that thrives on healthy habits and empowers each other to live our best lives.

Follow us to stay connected, engage in meaningful discussions, and embark on a transformative journey towards a healthier and happier you. Join our movement today and be a part of the change!

#Everydayhabithustle #HealthyHabits #WellnessCommunity #TransformYourLife

Zum Ausbau unseres Direktvertriebssystems suchen wir laufend selbständige MyBarista-Partner:
- Sie lieben Kaffee, sind ein kommunikativer Netzwerker und möchten Ihre Kaffeeleidenschaft zum Beruf machen?
- Sie arbeiten seit Jahren als Barista und möchten Ihr Wissen an private Kaffeeliebhaber weitergeben?
- Sie wollen selbst bestimmt und flexibel arbeiten und einem erfüllten Job nachgehen?
- Unternehmerische Eigenverantwortung, Unabhängigkeit und ein lukratives, erfolgsbasiertes Einkommen sind Ihnen wichtig?

Name: 30000days.live
Description:
Nos valeurs
Pour nous, tout repose sur 5 valeurs fondamentales.
Elles sont l’ADN de la marque 30 000, elles dirigent chacun de nos choix.

30000
Nous avons en moyenne 30000 jours à vivre.
Il ne suffit pas de savoir que la vie est courte, c'est lorsqu'on en a pleinement conscience que l'on peut réellement commencer à vivre.

Act Yourself
Agis toi-même, tout dépend de toi !
Nous sommes seuls à pouvoir décider comment, où et quand agir.

Aucun regret
On regrette uniquement ce que l'on n'a pas accompli, c’est pourquoi il est primordial d’avoir le courage d'oser chaque jour.

Aucune barrière
Il est essentiel de se donner les moyens de réaliser nos rêves.
On a de limites que celles que l’on se fixe.

Dépasse toi
Se dépasser, aller plus loin et être ambitieux chaque jour est l'unique moyen de ne plus subir sa vie, mais de réellement commencer à la vivre.

30000 n’aurait jamais vu le jour s’il était simple de s’appliquer ces valeurs.

Instinctivement, l’être humain se réfugie dans le confort de ses habitudes, nous devons tous lutter pour en sortir et devons affronter nos peurs et nos doutes.

Alors, auras-tu le courage de réaliser tes rêves ?

Name: Fil
Description:
Welcome to Fil! Our journey begins with the Arabic word 'filfil,' meaning 'pepper,' reflecting the heart of our company. Since our inception, we have brought the rich flavours of Palestinian culture to your table through our authentic and addictive shatta.

Shatta is a delicious and versatile Palestinian chilli-based condiment that is a staple in most if not all, Palestinian households. It is unique in its heritage and ritual as an integral part of the daily culinary experience, with a recipe typically passed down through generations. 

As three Palestinian co-founders, our story is no different. Each of us grew up with salt, pepper, and shatta on the kitchen table. What distinguishes us is not only the mouth-watering flavour of our shatta but also the adaptation of shatta to a global context while remaining true to the cultural journey it represents. We are thrilled to bring a spoonful of our heritage to your table and introduce you to the rich culinary tapestry of our homeland.

Join us on this flavourful journey as we bring Palestinian traditions to a global audience. Discover our products, participate in our traditions, and Get Your Fil

Name: Joon Foods
Description:
Meet Joon, a soon-to-launch pistachio snack company inspired by a 300-year-old family recipe that leverages a unique cooking process to deliver the perfect pistachio experience.

Joon is addressing a gap in the market where tasty, fresh, high-quality pistachios with clean ingredients have been hard to come by.

Pistachios are a superfood rich in antioxidants and high in protein; they contain all nine essential amino acids, making them a complete protein. However, most brands on the market today add seed oils, artificial ingredients, 'natural' flavors, sugars, and other additives to their flavored SKUs. 

We've created the tastiest pistachios, without compromising the health benefits, by avoiding unwanted ingredients.

What Sets Joon Apart?
- Unique Cooking Process: our cooking method results in the creamiest, crunchiest, and tastiest pistachios
- Family Tradition: inspired by a 300-year-old family recipe from a region that pioneered pistachio cultivation
- Delicious Flavors: launching with Original Salted, Salt and Pepper, and Dill Pickle
- Real Ingredients: no additives, no artificial/natural flavors, no added sugars, and no seed oils – just simple, easy to pronounce ingredients
- Convenient and Clean: easy to open, consistently large, and leave no residue on your hands. We source bigger and higher quality pistachios - no more painfully prying open shells
- Vibrant Colors + Unique Look: natural, beautiful shades of pink, purple, and green as if they just fell off the tree. Our use of whole ingredients leaves a one-of-a-kind pattern on every shell and kernel.

Name: Kongres Kawy
Description:
Być może uznasz, że Kongres Kawy to kolejny sklep internetowy z kawą i herbatą. I na pierwszy rzut oka, w zasadzie będzie to prawda. Jednak nie o to nam chodzi w tej grze.
Marzy nam się sklep z kawą i herbatą, który będzie miał wpływ na środowisko w którym żyjemy oraz społeczność, która zbierze się w jednym miejscu by nam w tym pomagać. Tak naprawdę kawa i herbata jest tu jedynie pierwszym krokiem, do spełnienia tego marzenia i dziękujemy Ci, że czytając to pchasz nasz w tym kierunku!
Co dokładnie chcemy zrobić?
Przede wszystkim dzięki twoim zakupom chcemy posadzić mnóstwo drzew, pomagać zwierzętom i stworzyć miejsce do odpoczynku w stylu SLOW.
Wyobrażamy sobie to w ten sposób, że za zyski, które będziemy osiągać w związku z prowadzeniem tego sklepu najpierw kupimy działkę, która będzie z daleka od ludzi a następnie posadzimy tam cudowny las, w którym każde zwierzę odnajdzie swój dom.
Gdy już osiągniemy ten milowy krok, na obrzeżach lasu postawimy maleńkie domki a w zasadzie kopuły, z których klienci naszego sklepu będą mogli korzystać na specjalnych warunkach. To przecież będzie również Twoja zasługa! Dzięki nim będzie można wyrwać się z pędzącego świata i choć na chwile zjednoczyć się z naturą. Brzmi pięknie prawda? Pomyśl, jak będzie smakować tam Twoja ulubiona kawa!
W tym wszystkim nie zapominamy jednak o naszej miłości do kawy.

OUR VISION
Refresh garden knowledge & promote sustainability
Our vision is to revolutionize the industry of sustainable garden and home products. To accomplish this, we take a very data-driven approach, analyzing the markets, and based on that, developing the most sustainable and effective products for our customers. In addition to product development, we are also very committed to connecting people with a green thumb and educating them with up-to-date knowledge.

OUR FOUNDER
From gray mechanical engineering to green startup
Our founder Felix already deepened his passion for gardening and wildlife during his studies to become an industrial engineer. During his studies, while in contact with a large chemical company for gardening and landscaping, he realized that the constant use of chemicals in home and agriculture would bring disastrous long-term consequences. Out of this motivation, he founded Legona to bring more knowledge and more sustainability into everyone's household.

Name: Shaeb Roasters محامص الشعب
Description:
Established in 2001 in the city of Aqaba, under the Trademark  “Al Shaab” a word that originated from Arabic that means (The People), To prove over the years that the satisfaction of our customers is one of our biggest concerns, as we offer all products of the best types in terms of taste, quality and price.

Alshaeb has a presence in Jordan with over 50 branches and 2 malls, as well as in the UAE and Qatar.

Name: Roastory Koffie
Description:
Bij Roastory Koffie draait alles om één ding: passie voor écht goede koffie. Vanuit onze eigen branderij selecteren en branden wij de mooiste koffiebonen van over de hele wereld. Van de verfijnde bloemige Yirgacheffe uit Ethiopië tot de volle, nootachtige Braziliaanse Cerrado – iedere boon krijgt bij ons de aandacht die hij verdient.

Wij geloven in de kracht van de slow-roast methode: rustig branden op lagere temperatuur, zodat de smaak en aroma’s zich optimaal kunnen ontwikkelen. Het resultaat? Koffies met een rijk, gelaagd karakter – altijd perfect in balans en afgestemd op de smaakbeleving van onze klanten.

Of het nu gaat om een espresso vol intensiteit, een cappuccino met romige zoetheid of een filterkoffie die sprankelt van frisheid, bij Roastory brengen we de wereld van specialty coffee rechtstreeks in jouw kop. Met precisie, vakmanschap en bovenal: liefde voor koffie.

Name: Swash Group
Description:
The new Swash Group unites leading bathroom retailers MEGABAD.de and Groupe Le Monde du Bain to forge a pan-European alliance in bathroom and sanitary E-Commerce. 

Under leadership of CEO Dr. Hans Dohrmann, a Digital Commerce Entrepreneur with a stellar track record, and backed by FSN Capital Funds, a leading private equity investor with €4 billion under management, Swash Group is becoming the leading destination for talents, dedicated to transforming the bathroom industry and the bathlife of customer across Europe.

"I'm thrilled to announce the launch of Swash Group. Our focus: innovation and sustainability leading to exceptional customer experiences. We tailor our approach to each European market, delivering solutions that surpass the expectations of our customers. Together with our partners, we strive to transform the industry across Europe", says CEO Hans Dohrmann.

While we offer products and services worldwide, we also stay regional in our approaches to cater to the unique needs of each market.

We develop a truly enjoyable customer journey using the most modern technology available, making it easy and convenient for customers to access our wide range of products and services. Our focus is on creating maximum customer value, which in turn creates value for our shareholders.

Name: ScoopMan
Description:
ScoopMan Ice Creams & Cafe, your one-stop for all your dessert cravings in Rohini, North-West Delhi, India. You'll drool over ScoopMan's different premium fresh, creamy milk Ice Creams, customized Sundaes, fresh baked Waffles, thick & creamy Shakes, frothy Ice Cream Sodas, live Pasta and many Appetizers. Your desserts can be customized however you like, as their tagline states, "Real Milk, Real Flavours.".

ScoopMan Ice Creams & Cafe started its first outlet in Oct 2021 and the second outlet was opened in Oct 2022 in Rohini, North-West Delhi. 

In July 2021, the founders came up with the idea after realising that there is a need for a one-stop destination to meet the different dessert cravings for the people staying in Rohini, North-West Delhi. With the backbone of 30 years of manufacturing excellence in premium fresh, creamy milk ice creams, the concept was thoughtfully initiated and driven to provide a one-stop shop for all dessert cravings - from fresh creamy milk ice creams (different real fruit flavours, chocolate options, caramel & nuts options) to customized sundaes, fresh baked waffles, thick shakes, ice cream sodas, live pasta, appetizers and much more. 

The USP of this brand is that it offers diverse premium options of real fresh & creamy milk ice creams and customized dessert options as per one’s taste and preference and is the perfect place for all age groups. 


At the Live Counter in the outlets, you can see how desserts are being created live and get a real taste of it. As you get to know "ScoopMan," you will develop an understanding of the character due to its unique character identity. In terms of prices, they are more reasonable than other large Ice Cream Cafe brands.

Name: Madame Planche
Description:
Madame Planche c'est une boutique physique et en ligne, commerçant de produits alimentaire axé sur l'instant de consommation de l'apéritif ! 

Nous commercialisons des planches apéritives mais aussi des produits d'épicerie fine (toujours autour de l'apéritif).
L'ensemble de nos produits sont 100% locaux et proviennent de la région Auvergne Rhône Alpes. 

Les planches apéritives sont à récupérer dans notre boutique de Lentilly ou livrées sur commande dans un rayon de 20 km autour de Lentilly alors que nos produits d'épicerie fine peuvent être expédiés sur toute la France.

Madame Planche c'est également un service traiteur. Nous nous déplaçons sur les lieux de votre évènement pour mettre en place un buffet de planches en format XXL, un buffet que nous aurons travaillé ensemble pour qu'il corresponde au mieux à vos attentes.

Name: Grupo Museu da Gula
Description:
O Museu da Gula foi inaugurado no segundo semestre de 1998, na cidade de Ribeirão Preto como um espaço que haveria de representar para a cidade, um local de encontro entre qualidade, conveniência em gastronomia, conveniência e bem estar.

Jamais deixamos de ver através de nossas ações e da incessante busca por novos e melhores produtos, tudo que viesse fortalecer os vínculos de confiança e reciprocidade que, desde o início, recebemos de nossos fiéis clientes.

Trabalhamos com uma visão de futuro, sem comprometer a qualidade e os bons preceitos de relacionamento. No Museu da Gula, produtos e serviços refletem uma filosofia de trabalho construída com solidez, muita persistência aos seus princípios e exagerada preocupação com o bem estar.

Sabemos que tamanha obsessão não nos levará à perfeição. Ela simplesmente cumpre o seu dever de refletir o anseio de nosso maior patrimônio: os clientes “Museu da Gula”.

Name: Anything Speaker
Description:
This portable mini wireless Bluetooth vibration bone conduction speaker turns anything into a speaker! Sonic Vibrations are transmitted into the surface it’s on to create a stronger bass, level, and volume.
Wirelessly pair two speakers together for an immersive 3D Stereo sound.
As small as a golf ball yet produces levels as loud (or louder) than larger Bluetooth speakers.
Experience sound in a whole new way as each surface produces a unique tonal quality. From bass-boosted lows to crystal-clear highs, find which surface sounds the best to you.

Name: Neudorff ePerformances
Description:
Die Neudorff ePerformance GmbH verantwortet die Planung und Umsetzung der digitalen Vertriebsstrategie der Neudorff Gruppe mit dem Ziel, die Markenpräsenz zu stärken und das Wachstum im Online-Geschäft voranzutreiben. Durch die Auswahl und Anbindung nationaler und internationaler Online-Plattformen wie Shopify, Marketplaces und diverse eTailer schaffen wir neue Absatzchancen und verbessern das Kundenerlebnis durch innovative Maßnahmen. Wir gestalten den Aufbau der gesamten eCommerce-Struktur von Grund auf – inklusive eigener Logistik, Lagerverwaltung, Fulfillment-Prozesse und einem spezialisierten Team aus über 10 Experten in Vertrieb, Operations und Administration. Als dynamische Einheit innerhalb des Konzerns unterstützen wir alle Unternehmen der Neudorff Gruppe dabei, flexibel und unabhängig von bestehenden Systemen zu agieren.
Mit einer gezielten Integration relevanter eCommerce-Kanäle und einer umfassenden Marktstrategie starten wir in das D2C Business, steigern die digitale Reichweite und erhöhen die Kontaktpunkte zu unseren Kundinnen. Gleichzeitig treiben wir die internationale Expansion der Marke Neudorff voran, indem wir unsere Präsenz in Auslandsmärkten wie der EU, dem Vereinigten Königreich und den USA etablieren – für eine zukunftsorientierte und weltweit vernetzte eCommerce-Strategie.

Name: LeSteelist
Description:
Nous sommes une entreprise passionnée par la création d'œuvres d'art en acier sur mesure. Chez Le Steelist, nous croyons que chaque pièce a le pouvoir de raconter une histoire unique. 

 Notre mission est de transformer les idées en réalité métallique, en offrant à nos clients la possibilité de créer leur propre steel. Avec une expertise artisanale et une attention méticuleuse aux détails, nous façonnons chaque pièce avec amour et dévouement. 

 Que vous cherchiez à embellir votre espace de vie ou à offrir un cadeau mémorable, nous sommes là pour vous aider à concrétiser votre vision. Avec une gamme de couleurs éclatantes et une qualité inégalée, nos créations ajoutent une touche d'élégance et de sophistication à n'importe quel environnement. 

 Rejoignez-nous dans notre voyage artistique en acier ! Explorez notre collection et découvrez comment nous pouvons transformer vos idées en pièces uniques et intemporelles. Chez Le Steelist, chaque création est une célébration de l'art et de l'individualité.

Name: Nourish Box
Description:
At Nourish Box, we’re transforming the way people cook at home by making meal preparation simple, enjoyable, and stress-free. Our mission is to take the hassle out of cooking by delivering fresh, pre-portioned ingredients and easy-to-follow recipes straight to your doorstep.

Whether you're a busy professional, a home cook exploring new flavors, or someone looking for healthier meal options, our service provides the perfect solution for delicious, homemade meals without the fuss.

We Offer

- Convenience: No more long grocery lists or time spent measuring ingredients.
- Variety: Explore a range of recipes inspired by global and local cuisines.
- Freshness: Ingredients are handpicked and sourced from trusted suppliers.
- Sustainability: Minimizing food waste with perfectly portioned ingredients.

Join us on this journey to make cooking at home easier, more fun, and more rewarding. Follow our page for updates on new recipes, exclusive offers, and tips for enhancing your cooking experience!

Let’s simplify meal prep—one box at a time.

Name: The Healthy Brands Company
Description:
At The Healthy Brands Company, we’re on a mission to revolutionize health and wellness. As a dynamic house of brands specializing in well-being, health, energy, and fitness, we invest in and support innovative brands that share our vision of enhancing lives. Our diverse portfolio includes cutting-edge superfoods, energizing drinks, and fitness solutions designed to empower individuals to thrive.

The Healthy Brands Company is a part of Umida Group (Publ).

Name: Blackriver GmbH
Description:
Blackriver was founded in 1999, with the goal of producing and providing the world with professional fingerboard equipment.


Since then, Blackriver has been the number one online shop for fingerboarding gear. Whether it be fingerboard ramps, fingerboards, wheels, trucks, or special equipment, we have everything you need, for every skill level. Apart from our inhouse brands (Blackriver, Berlinwood, Bollie, Riptape), we offer other high quality brands such as Flatface, Sorry, Dislocation, and Pop Decks.


As the first company in the world to recognize fingerboarding as a sport, we have pioneered the way for fingerboarding. We characterize our company with the constant development and innovation of new products, as well as worldwide contests, and the sponsorship of team riders.

Whether a coffee lover or manager for your office - or both! - check out our website to learn more and find your flavor today!

Name: La Main Française
Description:
Thank you for your interest in La Main Française!

La Main Française is a facilitator between French craftsmen and women and customers craving for high quality products for their home, hygiene routine, cosmetics or clothes and accessories.

France is reknown worldwide for its know-how in creating high end lifestyle products. La Main Française proposes you to get in touch with hidden secrets of our unique luxury culture, in a ethical and transparent way.

Indeed, La Main Française only works with craftspeople following strong ethics in protecting their social and natural environment (see our website for more info), and the products they offer are all proposing traditional or innovative solutions towards a better world.

Our website gives all the information you need about where, how and who is behind each product and allows you to make a choice knowing exactly why you chose this product instead of another: because it does not hurt your health, because it is respectful of the people and the planet, and because it is an authentic Quality Product coming from centuries of tradition and culture.

Please join us, and let us change the world together!
All the best,
Camille

www.lamainfrancaise.org

Name: Le Vestiaire à MoT
Description: Librairie spécialisée dans la littérature sportive à Nice, Le Vestiaire à MoT est aussi un lieu de vie proposant des espaces de coworking, réunions et séminaires d'entreprise. Ouvert du lundi au samedi, de 9h à 18h.

Name: Myndflo
Description:
When people come together, creativity unlocks and big ideas happen.

That’s why we reinvented the humble sticky note. To make it a fun and practical tool that people will actually use to stimulate creativity and make big ideas happen.

Myndflo notes stick using static electricity. They stick completely, to any flat surface, no glue, no residue, and effortlessly slide around to organise your ideas, without falling off.

These super-thin, super-fun and super-functional static notes are guaranteed to bring your workshops to life.

Easily turn walls, windows and furniture into engaging mind-maps, project plans, process flows, storyboards and more!

Increase engagement, inspire creativity, improve collaboration and make those big ideas happen!

www.myndflo.com

Name: Green Me Up
Description: We make your life green. At greenmeup.de you will find the plants that fits to your lifestyle. Fresh and directly delivered from the grower to you.

Name: Katori
Description:
Katori is an artisan food company curating a gourmet range of organic food products handcrafted by women artisans of Rajasthan. At the core of Katori is a network of women-owned collectives that employ over 200 women full-time and directly engage with over 2000 small and marginal farmers across the country. 

Traditionally made 
We are reviving age-old and traditional practices to bring you maximum nutrition, freshness and flavour.  

Small Batches 
Women artisans minimally process our products in small batches to maintain the highest standard of quality and authenticity. 

Ethical & sustainable practices 
We promote organic and sustainable practices amongst our farmer networks while also ensuring that they get a fair price for their produce. 

Women's Empowerment 
More than 70% of our proceeds go back to our women's collectives that are providing women artisans with a steady source of employment and income and helping them lead a life with dignity.

Name: Therapro
Description:
Therapro: The therapy resource for families and professionals!

We provide therapists, teachers, parents and other caregivers with the highest quality and most economical therapeutic and educational resources for all ages and abilities, from kids to adults. 

Our goal is to provide unique speech and occupational therapy supplies for preventive, developmental, and rehabilitative care. With the right tools, including occupational therapy assessments and evaluations, kids and adult activities, games, products and toys, developing gross motor skills, fine motor skills and communication skills is less frustrating, and will result in better outcomes in a shorter period of time.

Name: Triangle Wine Company
Description: Locally owned and operated, Triangle Wine Company was formed in 2011 by like-minded individuals committed to creating the best shopping experience in wine retail. Our team has decades of experience in the wine industry at every level. As a group we have been involved in the creation of 100 point scoring wines on the production side of the business, to managing distributorships and retail operations that have led the industry in sales growth. Although there are multiple locations of Triangle Wine Company retail stores, TWC is not a franchise. It is owned together in small business partnership by friends currently open to investors.

Name: Couple's Coffee
Description:
Crafted by an Army Veteran and his coffee-loving wife. Couple's Coffee is inspired by our shared passion for crafting the ultimate coffee experience, one that embodies both sweetness and strength. Coffee plays a profound role in our lives and serves as the centerpiece of our mornings, uniting us before embarking on the adventures of each bustling day.

We take immense pride in not only our unwavering commitment to one another but also in our devotion to offering you an exceptional coffee experience. Every sip of our bold and delectable coffee is a testament to our dedication. Rest assured, our beans are meticulously roasted right here in the USA, ensuring the highest quality and freshness in every cup.

Name: TAHIRA Foods Ltd.
Description: Today, Tahira Foods Limited is the leading producer and distributor of Halal foods in Europe. Our distribution infrastructure is composed of depots, cold stores and a fleet of delivery vans in the United Kingdom (London and Manchester), France (Paris, Lille and Lyon), Germany (Hamburg, Stuttgart, Berlin and Siegburg), Holland (Breukelen) and Sweden (Malmo). Tahira products are also distributed through independent wholesalers in Denmark, Italy, Spain, Ireland and Austria. Our products can be predominantly found in nationwide supermarkets named on our stocklists and local ethnic stores.

Name: TJ's War - Can Love Survive when the World is on Fire
Description: This is the page for all things connected with TJ's War, a book by @Iain Maclean,. This true story is about the life and experiences of Thomas John Maclean, who at the age of 18 was plucked from university in 1939 to become a soldier in the a Highland regiment of the British Army, and by 19 was a sergeant in Military Intelligence. The story is at once a war-story, an anti-war story, and a love story, it covers the entire duration of WWII, with a scope that touches on events in Hawaii, through to clandestine operations in Norway, Italy, Austria and even Ireland.

Name: PremOla Granola
Description: PremOla Granola was founded by Lisa and Ben Bastian. Ben has enjoyed this granola since he can remember. He suggested to his mom to share it beyond their immediate family.  They did just that and have been taking orders ever since.  People love it all by itself, as a sprinkle on yogurt, smoothie bowls, oatmeal, on salad or as a baking mixture for fruit cobblers - a super versatile and fun nutty offering.

Name: Fat Tomato
Description:
Fat Tomato is Anthony O’Toole’s horticulture project, where the seasons are celebrated through both old and new Irish flavours. It is more than just an edible garden—it’s a living pantry, a shop, and, later, a new place for sharing and community.

Driven by curiosity, biodiversity, and flavour, the garden is home to over 500 varieties of organic heritage seeds and plants, along with a few feathered friends and an abundance of wildlife. Here, the focus is on diversity—not just in appearance, but in taste. Imagine a garden filled with heirloom figs, tomatoes, herbs, apples, chillies, pears, squashes, currants, and more—each variety offering something unique and exciting to discover.

Name: BACCHIC wine boutique
Description: BACCHIC wine boutique is a refined yet rebellious fine wines and spirits business. Young, ambitious, and unashamedly in love with great bottles and great company. We move fast, think independently, and have fun doing it. If you appreciate elegance with a touch of mischief, you will feel at home.

Name: PT Serata Boga Raya | SerataFoods
Description:
SerataFoods (SerataFoods.com) parts of Serata Group is a kitchen distributor & equipment supplies for HORECA based in Surabaya, East Java Indonesia

At SerataFoods, we put forward the four cores of our foundation: Tested Products, Competitive Prices, Trusted Suppliers, and Reliable Payment. Our vision is to provide the best and most trusted online shopping place for families/entrepreneurs (B2C / B2B) in the F&B sector in Indonesia to get the most quality kitchen and restaurant goods. With our founding team who has multi-years of experience in Research-Chef, Restopreneur, and Operations Logistic, we strive to be the best of the best in delivering your kitchen satisfaction.

Name: DeenSquare.com
Description:
A homegrown company founded in 2016, is now the region’s largest and the leading e-commerce platform and marketplace with a niche in Islamic faith based products, offering incredible value across multiple categories. 

Carrying a simple mission to be a one-stop shop for the best Islamic faith based products – whether books, toys, clothing, honey, herbs, dates, pilgrimage, electronics, prayer mats, wall art and more – DeenSquare.com is guided by their core principles: 
A)	Preserve, implement, and disseminate knowledge by providing access to authentic products 
B)	Passion to develop affordable products with no compromise on quality
C)	Commitment to operational excellence & customer satisfaction

With the scope and capabilities of a large company and the spirit and heart of a small one, we hope to not only accelerate the digital economy of the region, but also be a part of assisting people in their journey of practicing their faith.

We are grateful to Allah ﷻ to have allowed us to run this business and hope that he accepts this from us.

Name: RTM FOODS
Description:
RTM Foods: Crafting Flavorful Traditions 

Welcome to RTM Foods, where every bite tells a story! 

At RTM Foods, we’re more than a namkeen brand—we’re a flavor journey. Our roots trace back to Ratlam Madhya Pradesh, where generations of artisans have perfected the art of creating authentic namkeen. From secret spice blends to handcrafted batches, we infuse tradition with innovation.

Our Promise:

 Authenticity: Our namkeen bowls carry the soul of Ratlami flavors.
 Innovation: We blend old-world techniques with modern quality standards.
 Community: RTM Foods is a family—a network of artisans, customers, and food enthusiasts.
 Quality: Our golden namkeen ribbon symbolizes unwavering standards.
 Passion: Flames dance in our kitchen, fueled by love for flavor.

We dream of RTM Foods becoming India’s flavor ambassador. Imagine our namkeen gracing tables worldwide, sparking conversations, and celebrating the artistry of Ratlam. It’s more than food—it’s a language of love.

Join Our Flavor Journey: Connect with us! Let’s chat about spices, entrepreneurship, or that unforgettable namkeen crunch. Together, we’ll savor success.

Name: PT. Made Bali Roti (Daily Baguette)
Description:
Daily Baguette was established in 2014. Owned by a couple from France, Delphine and Maxime. After travelling all over Southeast Asia in 2011, including to Bali, the couple fell in love with the island and kept on talking about moving to Bali for good. 

Having spent years working as a baker in a boulangerie in Paris, Maxime saw the opportunity to bring his skills elsewhere. He started by teaching the skills while travelling. After several trips back and forth to Bali for vacation, they've decided to bring French cuisine, which is also the passion shared in the family, to Bali. 

Everything in Daily Baguette is made fresh everyday with authentic French ingredients to uphold the top-notch quality. The whole idea about building the baked goods shop and restaurant, Daily Baguette started in 2013. Delphine came up with the brand name, because in French, people buy fresh bread everyday and there were not many of those services offered in Bali back then.

They made the right decision moving to Bali and opening the restaurant Daily Baguette. Now after almost 10 years, with team members growing from 15 to 60 people and more, as the business is growing exponentially. Aiming to be a household name, Daily Baguette is focusing on delivering the same top quality French bread and pastry everyday.
