 Accède à des vins exclusifs selon tes goûts
 Livraison offerte dès 2 bouteilles
 Rejoins la communauté Karafe

Name: Illegal Beans
Description:
At Illegal Beans, we’re on a mission to make every coffee moment extraordinary—no bitter aftertaste, no boring beans! Founded in the Czech Republic, our diverse team of coffee lovers came together with one goal: to roast premium beans that bring joy to cups across the globe.

Why ‘Illegal’? Because we believe in defying the norm! Our Deskpresso service fuels businesses with top-tier office coffee, while our e-shop caters to coffee connoisseurs at home. From Ethiopian floral profiles to bold Colombian blends, we source ethically and roast fresh every week—so you get the best aromas, flavors, and that oh-so-satisfying first sip.

Join the Illegal Beans community and discover coffee worth sipping, savoring, and sharing. The only crime here is settling for less!

Name: Vip Comércio de Frutas e Legumes LTDA
Description: Desde nossa fundação em 2001, nos tornamos mestres em nosso ofício. Com um atendimento incomparável, temos o compromisso de fornecer produtos de qualidade e serviços excepcionais para que nossos clientes sempre voltem a nos procurar.  Sempre oferecendo produtos e serviços vips.

Name: Dinora Shopping
Description:
Centro Comercial online.

Primeras marcas a precios increíbles.

Name: Bumper Magazine
Description:
Na Bumper Magazine, nossa essência se baseia em três pilares: simplicidade, experiência e lifestyle.

- Simplicidade: Acreditamos que comprar online deve ser descomplicado. Nossa missão é tornar sua navegação mais prática e confortável, oferecendo uma variedade de produtos de marcas renomadas, sempre com foco na praticidade e sem complicações.

- Experiência: Valorizamos a sua jornada de compra e escolhemos com cuidado os melhores produtos e marcas para garantir uma experiência única e acessível. Estamos aqui para conquistar sua confiança e mostrar que é possível ter qualidade sem gastar muito.

- Lifestyle: Acreditamos que adotar novos hábitos e manter uma vida saudável pode ser simples. Oferecemos produtos que ajudam você a ter uma vida equilibrada e saudável, com pequenas mudanças que fazem uma grande diferença.

Estamos constantemente em busca de soluções inovadoras para transformar sua experiência de compra online em algo especial. Explore nossos produtos e descubra como podemos ajudar a melhorar sua vida com facilidade e prazer!

Name: H&CO
Description: An instinct to continually aim for excellence. H&CO is the grand blueprint to encompass and refine all of the founder's, Howard, endeavors: to be at the forefront of the nation's gourmet gifts and lifestyle industry. H&CO sets out to provide an even greater service as a purveyor of exquisite taste and refined luxury. The inspiration for growth has always been empowered by the growing demands of the cultured urbanites, thus inspiring the H&CO mission to promise the creation of more distinctive products, those that span beyond desserts and into gifts, lifestyle and merchandises.

Name: SHE (Start Healthy Eating)
Description:
SHE is a health-focused food startup founded in 2020, dedicated to revolutionizing snacking with nutritious, millet-based products. The brand is on a mission to provide wholesome and tasty snacking solutions, catering especially to individuals with diabetes, gluten intolerance, and those seeking a balanced diet.

Our Products:

Millet Cookies: Crafted with care, these cookies are rich in fiber, low in sugar, and gluten-free, making them ideal for health-conscious individuals.
Millet Energy Bars: Packed with nutrients, these bars offer a perfect on-the-go energy boost without compromising health.
Savory Millet Snacks: Deliciously crunchy snacks that combine health and taste, offering a guilt-free indulgence.
With a commitment to promoting sustainable and healthy eating habits, SHE aims to be a trusted choice for health enthusiasts around the globe.

Name: Brand-Hub
Description:
Brand Hub is an experienced business collective that love to create great brands.

The team serve as a catalyst for transformation, enabling brands to thrive in competitive markets and achieve sustainable success.

With a keen eye on future trends and a commitment to sustainability, Brand Hub is shaping the future of branding, product development and retail partnerships.

Brand Hub was established in 2023 and is based in Melbourne, Australia.  The portfolio comprises of both new businesses and established businesses

Orange and Green Pty Ltd
Potato Utopia Pty Ltd
Destination Italy Pty Ltd
TUMME IBS Healthcare Pty Ltd

Name: ARVIDA Signé Québec
Description:
ARVIDA Signé Québec est une entreprise née de mon souhait de partager mes racines québécoises avec mon pays d’accueil, la France. 

Je suis allée à la recherche des meilleurs produits Québécois pour vous permettre de découvrir et d'acheter des produits qui soient qualitatifs, beaux, bons, sexy et responsables ! 

Tout est % made in Québec, avec des entrepreneurs passionnés ayant de belles valeurs ! 

 Une belle variété de produits uniques en France. C’est vraiment parfait pour offrir des cadeaux différents à notre famille, nos amis, nos collègues ou tout simplement pour se faire plaisir !

 Nous développons également une offre pour les PRO ainsi que les cadeaux corporatifs! 

Nos valeurs humaines et responsables feront assurément une belle différence dans ce projet! En effet, nous optimisons déjà notre chaîne logistique et améliorons les conditionnements. Nous regardons aussi l’avenir afin de trouver des solutions plus saine pour l’environnement. Des bateaux moins consommateurs par exemple .
 
De plus, nous souhaitons par-dessus tout permettre aux entrepreneurs Québécois de faire connaître leurs produits en France. Faire rayonner les producteur et le Québec ! Rien de moins  (cela se veut sans prétentions bien entendu)
 
Nous pensons que ce projet nous permettra, à notre niveau, d’être acteur du changement et espérons de tout cœur que vous partirez à l’aventure avec nous !

Pour m'aider à me faire connaître en ligne, il me faut des partages et des connexions. J’ai donc besoin du support de notre belle communauté


Abonnez-vous à ma page Facebook et Instagram pour me suivre 

Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/arvidasignequebec
Instagram: arvida_signe.quebec

 https://arvida-signequebec.com/

Je vous dis, à très vite!

ARVIDA Signé Québec

Name: Blomsterverden / Fred's Garden
Description:
Blomsterverden er en moderne, hurtigtvoksende e-commerce virksomhed specialiseret i premium blomsterløg, knolde, frø og sæsonbaserede haveprodukter.
Vi startede i Danmark – og er i dag aktive i hele Norden samt flere europæiske markeder under brands som Fred’s Garden, Bloomenwelt og Kukkamaailma.

Vi har en loyal kundebase på hundredtusindvis af haveelskere, der følger os tæt, deler deres resultater og engagerer sig i vores univers. For at sikre den højeste kvalitet driver vi egne testhaver, hvor vi hvert år planter tusindvis af løg, knolde og frø. Det giver os unikt indhold, dyb produktviden og en stærk forbindelse til vores community.

Blomsterverden er et lille, fokuseret team med store ambitioner. Vi arbejder datadrevet, kreativt og med højt tempo – og vi er i gang med at bygge en europæisk e-commerce case med solidt fundament og kæmpe potentiale.

Name: Puffy Cotton Candy
Description:
Puffy Cotton Candy is an innovative cotton candy company centered around the magical experience of seeing cotton candy spun fresh, in a vibrant physical store environment. Our store concept takes cotton candy-making to thrilling new heights as Puffy artists spin custom creations by hand, in eye-popping sizes, shapes, and colors — in dozens of mouthwatering flavors. In addition to spinning delicious traditional cones, cakes, and crystals, Puffy crafts mesmerizing cotton candy edible art sculptures. Standing nearly two feet high, Puffy transforms a mountain of fresh cotton candy into magical characters like a magical unicorn, cuddly teddy bear, sweet puppy dog, and much more.

Our Puffy flagship store opened in late-2022 in Franklin, TN, and our second store location opened in mid-2024 in Nashville, TN. Our first Puffy franchise location opened its doors in Freehold, NJ in early 2025, our second and third franchise locations opened in Orlando, FL and Las Vegas, NV in mid-2025, with 15 additional franchise locations slated to open across Dallas-Fort Worth, TX, Orlando, FL, Tampa, FL, Jacksonville, FL, and NJ State starting in mid-2025.

Name: Penny Lick Ice Cream Company
Description: Penny Lick Ice Cream Company is a New York based, small batch ice cream brand proudly free of peanuts, tree nuts and sesame. Find our shops in Hastings on Hudson, Mamaroneck, and Ossining. Find our carts all over the NYC metro area. We are available for vending and for private events year round.

Name: Jurgy
Description:
Jurgy is on a mission to bring you the best tasting beef jerky on the planet. Founded by Cam Jurgens in 2021, Jurgy is a testament to Jurgens Farm, established more than 100 years ago in the small town of Pickrell, Nebraska.

Cam grew up farming cattle, corn, hay, soybeans and more. Jurgy is a culmination of Cam’s love for beef and farmers. The hard work, attention to detail, and humility learned on the farm are the same characteristics that drive Cam on the football field and in his quest to bring you world-class beef jerky products.

Name: Celtic - Eau Minérale Naturelle
Description: Un don de la Nature, au coeur du Parc Naturel Régional des Vosges du Nord, classé Réserve Mondiale de Biosphère par l’UNESCO.

Name: Tahweel
Description:
Tahweel is your trusted digital companion for all e-commerce needs — from gift cards and entertainment to travel, subscriptions, and lifestyle services.
We make online shopping simple, fast, and secure — anytime, anywhere.

Name: Pharmafiore
Description:
Pharmafiore è un’azienda operante nel settore delle forniture medico-sanitarie.
Si rivolge a studi medici, fisioterapisti, case di riposo, RSA, RSSA ed operatori sanitari, come fornitore di materiale di consumo.

Name: Dolce Bakery
Description: We are a scratch made bakery. Our team consists of creative, committed, and uplifting people. We are drawn to friendly individuals that are excited to be a part of this busy bakery and easily connect with our customers with warmth and enthusiasm.

Name: Celsius Roasters
Description:
Nous sommes une marque de café de spécialité, haut de gamme et responsable, à destination des professionnels (CHR et entreprises) et des particuliers. 

Plus que notre mission, voici notre raison d'être :
- Proposer des cafés d'exception, sélectionnés sur les meilleurs terroirs et récoltés par des producteurs consciencieux
- Torréfier de manière artisanale, en harmonie avec chaque café pour révéler leur potentiel aromatique
- Limiter au maximum notre impact environnemental, dans une démarche d’amélioration continue et d’ouverture aux critiques constructives
- Développer des relations long terme avec nos différents interlocuteurs : producteurs, importateurs, fournisseurs et clients

Nous proposons un accompagnement sur-mesure pour votre transition vers le café de spécialité (définition des besoins, mise en relation avec les fournisseurs de machines et suivi régulier) et un service de livraison en entreprise de café fraichement torréfié. 

Vous pouvez nous contacter sur notre site https://celsius-roasters.fr/pages/bureaux

Name: Freja Health
Description:
Bio Strength - Your Health, Your Rules.

Science-backed supplements designed for women and their needs.

Name: Madras Cafes
Description:
We are an upcoming chain of South Indian pure vegetarian and road side QSR coffee shops in Kerala. The first lot of the shops would be installed in Kochi region. The brand would focus on providing traditional South Indian beverages and snacks at the highest standards of quality, taste and hygiene. 

All products would be priced in the budget range. A lean business model shall be followed, with minimal store size & menu. 

Our operations would be based out of Kochi.

Name: Grimbey
Description:
Grimbey : Pioneering Mobile Accessories .
Grimbey proudly presents our flagship website, specializing in cutting-edge mobile phone accessories. Our product lineup includes an array of must-have items :

- Phone photography accessories
- Phone holders
- Fast chargers
- Headphones
- Phone covers
Everything you need to elevate your mobile experience .

We're dedicated to improving the user experience, keeping pace with technological advancements and the latest fashion trends.

Name: Cantine Associate
Description:
Chi ha avuto la fortuna di vivere la grande Italia dei piccoli comuni, probabilmente sa che nelle cantine si conserva il meglio della nostra produzione agroalimentare ed enologica.

La cantina è il luogo in cui stagioniamo, affiniamo o banalmente conserviamo i prodotti della sapienza di un intero popolo, delle contaminazioni culturali e sociali che ha ricevuto. 
L’Italia, anzi l’Europa più in generale, ha sviluppato un’infinità di sapori e tradizioni invidiate nel resto del mondo sia per la biodiversità del territorio, sia per la lunga storia di civiltà. Molte di queste tradizioni si
sono tramandate nelle nostre cantine, oltre che nelle pratiche di produzione, e molte sono ancora, purtroppo, ignote ai più.
L’idea di scoprire e conoscere sapori nuovi, sapori legati a storie e territori che non per caso le hanno sviluppate e tramandate, mi
ha sempre affascinato ed è così che è diventata una passione, la nostra passione.
Cantine Associate nasce per aiutare i commercianti ed i ristoratori a divulgare l’amore per la qualità, della specialità,
dell’unicità.

Luciano Iollo

Name: Librairie Carrière
Description: Librairie en ligne dédiée à votre évolution professionnelle et personnelle ! Découvrez une vaste sélection de livres inspirants sur le développement personnel, les compétences et la réussite. Nous vous offrons une source inépuisable de connaissances et d'outils pratiques pour vous aider à atteindre vos objectifs et à vous épanouir dans tous les aspects de votre vie.

Name: Fren'chic attitude
Description:
Parce que la qualité des produits et le savoir faire sont au centre de nos valeurs, nous vous proposons des produits 100% français.

Parce que nous avons la chance d’avoir un terroir riche de produits de qualité et de personnes passionnées, alors profitons en !

Parce que notre avenir et celui de nos enfants  est important, nous favorisons les circuits courts et les emballages éco responsables.

Name: GEMAX Werkzeuge GmbH & Co. KG
Description: Von unserem Standort in Trier beliefern wir Kunden aus Industrie und Handwerk sowie Privatkunden europaweit mit Werkzeugen aus den Bereichen Sägen, Trennen und Bohren. Neben dem Vertrieb diverser namhafter Marken wird unser Produktportfolio verstärkt mit unseren Eigenmarken ausgebaut. Als moderner und innovativer E-Commerce Fachhandel hegen wir hohe Ansprüche an Content, Marketing, Design und IT. Um diesen Anforderungen gerecht zu werden wird unser Team stets durch Spezialisten erweitert. Getrieben von einer hohen Marktdynamik stellen wir uns gemeinsam mit voller Kraft neuen Herausforderungen.

Name: The Daily Coffee Group
Description:
The Daily Coffee Group is a rapidly expanding and truly home-grown South African coffee café franchise group. Our The Daily Coffee Café franchises – renowned for their good coffee and being the place where locals meet – offer high-yielding investment prospects that the serious franchisee should take note of.

We offer more than mere franchise opportunities. We present a premium investment platform to become part of South Africa’s lucrative and fast-growing coffee industry in which there is an increasing demand for good coffee and branded lifestyle coffee destinations. This demand, furthermore, is fuelled by a collective requirement for neighbourhood destinations – other than the home or the workplace – where people can meet with family and friends, conduct business discussions, and catch up with work while on the move. 
 
The coffee café has become this essential resource for the community. It serves as that important third place, not where people work or live, but where they spend time to regenerate, interact with others, and continue to be productive in their work. This is what people need today. This is where the action is at community and micro-society level, where the money is spent, and where an investment in a coffee franchise offers dividends!

The Daily Coffee Café franchisees can expect to receive a better-than-average return on investment. This earning power is further enhanced by the fact that the capital needed for franchise set-up costs is considerably lower than that of comparable franchise models available in the market.  

Contact us! Discover your future today in our remarkable franchise investment opportunities. Visit our website, www.drinkgoodcoffee.co.za, for more information. You can also complete our concise online franchise application form at https://thedailycoffeecafe.co.za/franchise-application-form/, or contact Adriaan de Bruyn at adriaan@thedailygroup.africa.

Name: IFM Lab
Description:
Noi della IFM Lab siamo un’azienda dalla duplice

moda. Siamo proprietari di tre marchi di calzature
donna: Poème1420, Attisure e Federico Rosi;
siamo presenti in oltre 600 punti vendita su tutto il

Name: Inversiones Pigasus S.A.S
Description:
INVERSIONES PIGASUS, es un sueño que nace 5 años atrás, por la idea de crear un restaurante 
especializado en comida de cerdo, teniendo como plato insignia las hamburguesas de chicharrón, 
siendo el primer restaurante en Medellín en implementar esta novedosa idea. 
Durante estos años, nos hemos convertido en el lugar donde te hacemos volar.
Ganadores del burger master 2022

Name: DIABLISS tips for a healthy life
Description:
Diabliss je unikátny prírodný trstinový cukor, ktorý vďaka siedmim rastlinným extraktom dosahuje hodnotu glykemického indexu len 44,4 čím sa stáva vhodný pre diabetikov a všetkých, ktorým záleží na svojom zdraví.
Už žiadne umelé sladidlá, rafinovaný biely cukor či zdraviu škodlivý glukózovo - fruktózový syrup.
Vychutnajte si pravú chuť prírodného cukru vo svojej šálke kávy, čaju, limonády, alebo si upečte mňamky bez výčitiek

Name: Gleam
Description: Gleam is an Innovative oral care company founded in 2021 with the mission to provide scientifically proven teeth whitening solutions that are effective, safe and affordable.

Name: MANGIOBEVO
Description: Mangiobevo is a Swiss company celebrating the very best of Italian gastronomy. We specialise in sourcing exceptional artisanal products and fine wines from across Italy, working hand-in-hand with small local producers who share our passion for authenticity and quality. To meet the needs of corporate clients, Mangiobevo has developed an extensive and flexible range of offerings, from event catering with our Apéro Boxes, to personalised gift boxes, and festive specialties like Easter Colombe and Christmas Panettoni.

Name: Nutrabbit
Description: Nutrabbit es un emprendimiento colombiano en donde buscamos aportar a la nutrición de deportistas y personas que cuidan su alimentación de una forma dulce y equilibrada.

Name: Petits pays
Description:
PETITS PAYS c'est une histoire de famille, une volonté de perpétuer des traditions familiales et partager un amour de la terre 

Notre objectif : Soutenir les producteurs, proposer des produits sains à notre communauté 

Nos produits sont  locaux et de saison respectant des normes
environnementales.

 Grâce à nos partenaires et notre équipe, vos paniers vous arrivent à domicile ou en points relais chaque semaine, 2 fois par semaine ou 1 fois par mois selon la fréquence choisie sur le site.

Nos paniers sont conçus pour satisfaire vos envies et peuvent être adaptés à votre consommation ou régime alimentaire 

N’hésitez plus et commander en ligne

Name: Wild Garrano
Description: Wine/spirits

Name: Upcoming Book
Description:
Are you always on the lookout for the next big read? Do you love discovering books before they hit the bestseller lists? Then you’ll want to check out UpcomingBook.com — your go-to source for upcoming releases, exclusive previews, and early recommendations!

 Stay ahead with curated lists of the most anticipated books  
 Get alerts for pre-orders and special deals  
 Be the first to know about debut authors and hidden gems  

Whether you're a voracious reader, a book blogger, or just love staying ahead of trends, UpcomingBook.com helps you discover tomorrow’s favorites today!

 Visit UpcomingBook.comand never miss a great book again!

#BookLover #NewReleases #ReadingList #BookDiscovery #UpcomingBooks #MustRead #NewBook #BookLaunch

Name: Cupcake Central Bakery
Description: At Cupcake Central, we have a freshly hand baked dessert to satisfy everyone and every occasion. Cupcake delivery is available 7 days a week and we will always do our best to help you out of a pickle, to accommodate a same day cupcake delivery in and around Melbourne. If you need something a little extra special or an order that requires multi location deliveries, please reach out to us as we’re always happy to work with you. Life is sweet, with Cupcake Central.

Name: Gotcha Fresh Tea
Description:
A genuine new tea brand concept. WE FARM OUR OWN TEA.
Gotcha Fresh Tea is a unique offering in the Australian tea space, much more than another 'bubble tea', Gotcha Fresh Tea is freshly brewed and made for each individual order.

Furthermore, Gotcha Fresh Tea is farmed and picked from a single tea plantation in Mount Ali and therefore, claim unsurpassed, provenance.

Name: EPI ON WEB
Description:
Au service de nombreux domaines d'activité, EPI ON WEB est une plateforme multi-fournisseur B2B qui propose une offre complète en Équipements de Protection Individuelle. 

Grâce à nos 10 000 références (qui proviennent de plus de 100 fournisseurs différents) nous permettons à nos clients de trouver facilement les équipements les mieux adaptés à leurs besoins. 

Notre plateforme se caractérise par un large choix de produits allant d'EPI dédiés aux artisans spécialisés, jusqu'aux fournitures des collectivités publiques.

Derrière notre site e-commerce, se cachent plusieurs techniciens qui veillent à sa mise et à jour et sa maintenance régulière. 

Une équipe compétente et spécialisée est également là pour assurer le suivi de la relation clients. Conseil technique, information normative, détail d'une commande, la clarté et le suivi du parcours d'achat sont au coeur de nos préoccupations.  

Enfin, EPI ON WEB c'est aussi une prestation de personnalisation. 
Le flocage et la broderie des vêtements sont réalisés à quelques kilomètres seulement de notre espace de stockage, ce qui nous permet d'envoyer rapidement les commandes dans toute la France. 
Un atout au service de notre réactivité !

Name: TIANLALA INDONESIA - PT. HUI WANG PROSPERITY
Description: Tianlala Indonesia merupakan perusahaan yang bergerak pada F&B yang saat ini sedang berkembang di Indonesia.

Name: Colo Coffee Roasters
Description:
Somos inicialmente cerveceros colombianos con más de 20 años de experiencia y unos apasionados por la industria de bebidas. En 2018 decidimos emprender en el mundo del café especial con COLO COFFEE ROASTERS, una marca de cafés especiales colombianos inspirada en nuestro país, en la riqueza de su gente y de su tierra. 

Nuestro propósito es seleccionar, tostar y servir las mejores tazas de café de Colombia, y para esto, trabajamos de la mano con los caficultores para que puedan producir un mejor café.
Creemos que ese trabajo por la calidad y diversidad llevará a que el mundo conozca Colombia a través de los cafés de COLO. Queremos contar todas las historias que hay detrás del café y promover el consumo consciente en Colombia

Name: Beaune Gueules
Description:
Wine is a pleasure to be shared. At Beaune Gueules, we want to spread this pleasure and make it accessible for everyone.

The Beaune Gueules' team is travelling all over French and European vineyards to meet passionate winemakers and select for you the most beautiful wines at a fair price!

Elegance of a wine shouldn't be found in its price but in its soul!

Name: SIREN GROUNDS | FEMALE FIRST COFFEE BRAND
Description:
Siren Grounds is more than just coffee — it’s a full-bodied experience. Inspired by the heat, allure, and quiet power of presence, Siren doesn’t shout — she draws you in. It’s an invitation to pause, to feel, to connect. 

The “Grounds” speaks not only to the rich, artisanal coffee we serve, but to the space itself — a cultivated meeting point, a foundation for bold ideas, fresh conversations, and unexpected connections. 

Where seductive coffee culture meets intentional community, Siren Grounds brews more than caffeine — it brews chemistry. This isn’t just your morning pick-me-up. It’s a whole mood.

Name: Der Zuckerbäcker GmbH
Description:
Der Zuckerbäcker ist ein junges Unternehmen, das mit schönen Produkten Freude verbreitet.

Mit unserem Onlineshop für Süßigkeiten aber auch mit süßen Produkten im Internet auf verschiedenen Kanälen und im Einzelhandel machen wir den Alltag bunter und stehen für Freude, Vielfalt und Toleranz. Unsere Artikel werden von unseren Mitarbeiterinnen vor Ort zusammengestellt und versendet. 

Im Bereich B2B betreut das Vertriebsteam namhafte Unternehmen in der Gestaltung ihrer Werbeartikel, kümmert sich um die spannenden Sonderanfragen, entwickelt neue Produktideen und sorgt für die Zufriedenheit unserer Firmenkunden. 

Wir haben Spaß an der Arbeit und setzen das Miteinander an erste Stelle. Unser Motto leben wir und gestalten so auch unsere Arbeitsweise. Wir arbeiten mit Leidenschaft, uns ist eine angenehme Arbeitsatmosphäre wichtig, sowie Freiheiten in der Ausgestaltung der Arbeitsweise und –zeit.

Name: Dope Burger & Co.
Description: Dope Burger & Co. is a highly renowned food & beverages startup in Jakarta, Indonesia, serving various dishes from authentic burgers to aromatic coffee. Dope stands for not only good taste, but also addiction and satisfaction. After four years of successfully running our first store in Menteng, we decided to switch to an online, cloud-kitchen setting. We hope to keep providing the best quality and service to all our loyal Dopers. Come join us on our journey and get #DopeforLove!

Name: JoyousPack
Description:
Tudjuk, milyen nehéz jó ajándékot találni, legyen az születésnap, névnap, esküvő, vagy a baba érkezése… ezért döntöttünk úgy, hogy létrehozzuk ezt a kicsi, de általunk nagyon szeretett családi vállalkozást. 
Olyan hazai, döntően kézműves kisüzemek termékeiből állítjuk össze ajándékcsomagjainkat, melyek kiváló minőséget képviselnek, természetes összetevőket tartalmaznak, nem utaznak feleslegesen a fél világon át, és ami még nagyon fontos, hogy igazi különlegességek, melyek nem jönnek szembe Veled a boltok polcain! Ráadásul mindezzel egy picit talán még segíteni is tudjuk a kistermelőket, kisvállalkozásokat, manufaktúrákat.

We know how difficult it is to find a good gift, whether it's a birthday, name day, wedding, or the arrival of a baby... that's why we decided to create this small, but much-loved family business. 
We put together our gift packages from the products of small domestic, mainly artisan factories, which represent excellent quality, contain natural ingredients, do not needlessly travel halfway around the world, and what is very important, are real specialties that you will not find on store shelves! In addition, with all of this, we might even be able to help small producers, small businesses, and factories a little.

Name: Ellie G's Ice Cream
Description: homemade ice cream made with love, local in nyc.

Name: NaturHalya
Description:
Bienvenue chez NaturHalya ! 

Je suis ravie de vous accueillir dans mon univers, où chaque création est une ode à la nature et à l’artisanat. NaturHalya, c’est ma marque de bougies parfumées et d’objets décoratifs uniques, fabriqués à partir de cire d’olive 100 % naturelle.

Chaque pièce est imaginée et conçue avec amour à Saint-Avertin (37 550), en mêlant authenticité, douceur et respect de l’environnement. Mon objectif est simple : apporter une touche de chaleur, de sérénité et de raffinement à votre intérieur.

Merci de soutenir cette aventure artisanale !

Name: Tree2mydoor Business
Description:
For over twenty years, Tree2MyDoor has helped people and organisations give with life, not waste.
We are a Manchester-based nature gifting company that creates meaningful connections through living gifts that grow.

Our story began in family gardens where fruit trees and roses were sent to mark moments of love, remembrance and renewal. Today, those same values guide our partnerships with businesses across the UK and beyond, helping teams, clients and communities celebrate in ways that last.

Every gift we send carries life and purpose. A lemon tree for a new home. An oak to honour a milestone. A rose to remember someone loved. Each is sustainably grown, beautifully presented and supported by our lifetime MyTree care system, ensuring every recipient feels cared for and every gesture has lasting impact.

For individuals, we help restore meaning to gifting. For businesses, we turn corporate gestures into living symbols of appreciation, culture and sustainability. Our planted gifting programmes help organisations replace single-use merchandise with experiences that strengthen relationships and support environmental goals.

Trusted by brands such as Innocent Drinks, PwC and WWF, we design and deliver creative gifting campaigns that measure their impact in people, purpose and planet. With over half a million trees already planted through our customers and partners, our work continues to grow, season after season.

Let’s restore the meaning of gifting.
Let’s give with purpose and watch what grows.

Name: Cindys Bakery & Restaurant
Description:
Cindys began as a quaint neighborhood bakery that served freshly baked goods to the community in Tarlac City. It quickly gained popularity for its fluffy breads and buttery pastries that served as the breakfast and merienda of choice for many.

Launching off of its crowd-favorite breads and snack specials, Cindys transformed from a simple bakeshop into a full service eatery, buffing up its menu to include more savory dishes like its best selling Palabok and Chicken Barbecue.

Cindys began to rapidly expand, serving its delectable delicacies to Northern Luzon and Metro Manila. Cindys continues to serve its signature meals and baked goods to a standard of quality that keeps people coming back for more, ensuring that it’s always better than you remember.

Cindys has earned its place in the hearts and minds of the Filipino people for its scrumptious food and welcoming atmosphere. Its cherished heritage of serving hearty, heart-warming meals that remind people of home and family has given it the reputation of being the place to be.

Each of our sprouted nut and seed varieties, including almonds, cashews, walnuts, pumpkin seeds and sunflower seeds, are packed with natural protein, fiber, and other vital nutrients to fuel your body throughout the day. And with our Super Snack Mixes, you can enjoy a satisfyingly crunchy blend of sprouted nuts, seeds, and more — perfect for a between- meal boost or a post-workout recharge.

At Purely Sprouted, we're firmly devoted to providing clean label snacks that are made with only the best ingredients. That's why we promise that our snacks are verified Non-GMO and plant based with no artificial colors, preservatives, sweeteners or other additives. We also believe in transparency, which is why we passionately promote our process and espouse the wonder of sprouting.

As a woman-founded and operated brand, Purely Sprouted brings a unique perspective to the world of health and wellness. With a commitment to conscious nutrition, transparent ingredients and a healthier planet, we strive to create a kinder and more equitable world for everyone. We believe that by empowering women in business, we can build a better future.

Name: Afuera Coffee Co.
Description:
Afuera Coffee Co. helps change the world, one cup at a time. We provide specialty coffees from the best & most sustainable farms from around the world, providing lovers of the outdoors with the fuel they need for their adventures.

Every action, both big and small, is an opportunity to make a positive impact. Something as simple as purchasing your monthly bag of coffee really can do some good! We believe that put together, it’s all the small, positive actions that can make the biggest difference in time.

Afuera Coffee Co.’s mission is simple: to provide convenient coffee subscriptions that fuel your passions and to support the preservation of our natural environments. We chose Afuera, meaning “outside” in Spanish, as our name because it is at the heart of everything we do and everything we are. 5% of every sale, not just profits, is donated to charities and organizations that actively restore and preserve our outdoors, so that it can be enjoyed by the people of today as well as of tomorrow.

We aim to build a community of people who are just as passionate about exploring the world around them as they are about protecting it. Hence our motto, “Do Good And Go Afuera.”

We hope our coffee helps start your mornings on the right foot and powers your outdoor adventures, just as it does for us!

Nautic RVS staat voor kwalitatief hoogwaardige producten en ons assortiment bestaat uit veel RVS 316 hoogglans gepolijste producten. Onze artikelen zijn een selectie van maatwerkprojecten die ook voor uw schip geschikt zijn. Daarbij is ons assortiment aangevuld met artikelen vanuit o.a. Lankhorst Taselaar. Indien u een specifiek artikel zoekt, vraag het ons de kans is groot dat wij u dit gewoon kunnen leveren.

Onze kracht is dat wij ons maatwerk in huis maken. Wij beschikken over een lasafdeling en CNC verspaningsmachines. Hierdoor zijn veel van onze producten een eigen ontwerp en kwalitatief hoogwaardig. Ons motto is ""Kwaliteit is nooit toevallig"".

Dankzij ons ruime assortiment, snelle levertijden en uitstekende klantenservice kunnen wij u van alle gemakken voorzien. Nautic RVS helpt u graag om uw droomschip te realiseren. Wij leveren aan scheepseigenaren, scheepswerven, scheepswinkels en jachthavens.

Délices du terroir est une épicerie itinérante engagée dans la valorisation des produits artisanaux et locaux d’Ardèche et de Drôme. Nous sélectionnons avec soin une large gamme de produits authentiques : charcuteries, confiseries, spécialités à la châtaigne, miels, tartinades et bien d’autres trésors du terroir, élaborés sans conservateurs ni additifs.

 Un engagement fort pour le local et le circuit court
Notre mission ? Rendre accessibles les saveurs du terroir à tous, en desservant les villages ardéchois dépourvus de commerces. Grâce à nos tournées régulières, nous offrons aux habitants une alternative de proximité, tout en soutenant activement les producteurs locaux.

 Bien plus qu’une épicerie : un lien social au cœur des villages
Délices du terroir, c’est aussi une expérience humaine et conviviale : chaque passage de notre épicerie est une occasion de créer du lien, d’échanger et de dynamiser les zones rurales. Nous répondons ainsi à un véritable besoin en produits sains et authentiques, tout en préservant le patrimoine gastronomique local.

Services proposés :
 Tournées hebdomadaires pour les particuliers
 Coffrets gourmands personnalisés pour les entreprises et événements
 Approvisionnement en produits locaux pour les professionnels (entreprises, collectivités, offices du tourisme...)

 Rejoignez-nous dans cette aventure du goût et du partage !

Située à Vannecrocq, non loin du Pays d’Auge, la Ferme du Gros Caillou cultive l’art de transformer la pomme sous toutes ses formes, avec passion et authenticité.

Parmi ses trésors, le fameux balsamique de pomme “Le Velours”, médaillé Épicure d’Or 2024, incarne parfaitement le savoir-faire de la ferme. Élaboré à partir de 7 litres de jus de pomme et 1 litre de vinaigre de cidre, lentement réduits pendant un mois, ce condiment d’exception sublime aussi bien les salades que les mets sucrés ou salés.

Aujourd’hui, la gamme s’est enrichie de quatre variations de balsamiques de pomme, chacune offrant une expérience gustative unique, entre douceur, équilibre et intensité aromatique.

Depuis la reprise de la ferme familiale en 2019, Marc-Antoine Rabel redonne vie à ce lieu chargé d’histoire. Les 5 hectares de vergers produisent cidre, jus de pomme (naturel et pétillant), vinaigre de cidre et bien sûr, la collection de balsamiques de pomme.

Les produits de la Ferme du Gros Caillou sont disponibles directement sur place, dans des casiers automatiques en libre-service, accessibles 24h/24 et 7j/7, pour le plaisir des amateurs de saveurs locales, à toute heure du jour ou de la nuit.

Entre tradition, innovation et respect du terroir, la Ferme du Gros Caillou vous invite à découvrir l’excellence normande à travers ses créations fruitées et raffinées.

Description:

Founded in 2023 by two scientists with a passion for baking, the company's mission is to elevate everyday baking and bring artisan-level sourdough into home kitchens, wholesale bakeries, restaurants, and more through a simpler, more convenient and consistent process.

Leaven's flagship product, Instant Sourdough, is a 100% natural blend of wild yeast and flavor-enhancing “bacteria” captured at their peak, then formulated into a pantry staple. The result is a new product category that opens up sourdough baking to everyone, not just expert bakers. And for those who want more complex flavors from fermentation without the sourdough tang, Leaven Foods Wild Yeast is also available.
 
From artisan sourdough loaves to last-minute pizza parties, Leaven Foods is sourdough made simple.

Name: Mah Brinquedos
Description:
Somos um ecommerce de brinquedos educativos!

Me chamo Lílian Schwarz e sou a idealizadora da Mah Brinquedos - nome em homenagem ao jeitinho que a minha filha fala o nome dela. Antes de inaugurar a loja de brinquedos, eu atuava como mentora de mães, ajudando na construção de uma rotina mais leve, adaptada à vida real da maternidade.

No mundo do empreendedorismo há muitos desafios e os aprendizados vêm para que os movimentos e as mudanças aconteçam - esses são inevitáveis. A organização, o planejamento, a gestão do meu tempo e da minha rotina sempre estarão presentes e com certeza farão parte deste meu novo negócio.

Quando chegou o momento de dar novos passos, escolhi os brinquedos. Essa escolha pode não ter uma conexão direta com a minha caminhada até aqui, porém está ligada às minhas (re) descobertas com a maternidade. Essa conexão com o lúdico, com as brincadeiras e brinquedos no dia a dia com a minha filha Marina despertaram o interesse no aprendizado através do brincar. Então veio a vontade de compartilhar isso com outras pessoas (pais, mães, famílias, cuidadores, terapeutas) e a solução veio através dos meus conhecimentos sobre negócios (e minha experimentação na fabricação e venda de brincadeiras de papel) para montar do zero uma loja virtual de brinquedos.

Isso mesmo! Uma loja de brinquedos linda e divertida, onde espero poder ajudar na escolha consciente desses produtos, pensando em quem vai brincar junto, como vai explorar as potencialidades imaginadas para o brinquedo quando foi desenvolvido, os interesses e necessidades da criança que ganhará o presente!

We also have a range of handpicked spirits, including single malt whiskies, gin and boutique rums, not to mention craft beers from around the world and a selection of Cuban cigars.

Theatre of Wine has extensive experience of instore, corporate and private tastings, having hosted over 1,000 events ranging from our weekly tastings to corporate functions with over 300 guests.

We also offer many of the services of a traditional merchant, such as glass hire, ice and UK-wide delivery, and the ability to set up a wedding or cellar list.

Name: Milk Tash Coffee
Description:
Welcome to Milk Tash Coffee! 

We are so pleased you have come to join us on our mission. To make coffee milky again! 

We have dedicated many hours and taste buds to make our one of a kind premium milk-based coffee collection! 

How have we done this?

We started by looking at the body, sweetness and acidity in the beans and blended different countries beans to get a grasp on strong flavour profiles. by combing stronger and more vibrant flavours it means coffee taste is able to push through the frothy goodness (milk) and still create a flavoursome cup of coffee without leaving you thinking… “I would love some coffee with this milk”

What is Milk-Based coffee you ask?

Well, we understand there is a huge demand for coffees accompanied by a steamed and frothy generous portion of milk…..the likes of your Flat Whites, Lattés, Cappuccinos and so on. 

We also understand that majority of the time, you might be paying for an extra shot, or that store bought coffee you’re making at home just doesn’t quite give you the wow factor you’re after. This is purely down to the fact the milk is diluting the coffee itself. 

All that can stop! We’ve created the solution you’re after!

Our coffee gurus have used expertly sourced beans from countries like Brazil, El Salvador and more to create an innovative coffee that is designed to be paired with milk!

How do I get my hands on this coffee?
We like to think we are a one stop shop for coffee, so all you need to do is have a look through our collection, find the one, or two or even all that you’d like taste and pick your weight and grind type (best fit for your desired way of brewing). Once done you can quickly check out on our store and expect your coffee within a couple of days.

Lastly, we are still going to adhere to everyone who loves coffee because if you love coffee, we love you! Our Single Origin coffees Are now live!!!

Thanks for choosing Milk Tash Coffee

Visit: www.milktash.com

Name: LogoLeon GmbH
Description:
By sensitizing parents to the unhealthy habits of their children and making health prevention of the mouth a fun experience, LogoLeon reduces the occurrence of oral health problems in childhood.

LogoLeon supports children playfully in the healthy development of their MOUTH 

Did you know that it makes a big difference whether children breathe through their mouth or their nose? Breathing through the mouth very often leads to tooth decay, crooked teeth, tonsillitis and speech problems.

 Whether you're a mom, dad, grandma, grandpa, uncle, aunt, or godparent.
Every child deserves YOU to take a closer look!

LogoLeon teaches you what to look for when it comes to your child's development. This way, you'll recognize your child's unhealthy habits early enough. 

"But that's what I have the pediatrician for, right?"
The pediatrician is the number one contact person for parents - and that's good! But parents know their children best. Their perception and intuition are at least as important and should always come first!

 With more knowledge, parents get empowered to make important decisions. Not only if/when to start speech therapy but also when buying the first pacifier and all the supposedly unimportant questions no one thinks about!

Leon the chameleon takes the children on his adventures in the jungle world. They get to know their mouths interactively and thus gain a better perception of themselves.

The LogoLeon product-world is designed by experts, is sustainable, educates, and makes health prevention a fun experience!
 Interactive children's book from 3 years of age
 Augmented reality learning-app from 4 years of age
 DIY sticky poster
 Wall poster

Let LogoLeon make YOU become the expert for your child!
 https://logoleon.de/mundwissen/

Name: The Trust Paradigm
Description:
In any normality trust is paramount, but given current world events, never has there been more need for increased trust. This simple formula emphasizes the key elements of trust for individuals and for organizations:

Trust = Transparency + Relationship + Experience 

The Trust Paradigm draws on the hard-won truths of two authors, Geoff Hudson-Searle and Mark Herbert, and draws on their deep personal lessons from life and business practice, and their efforts to distil those lessons into principles that lead towards a more purposeful life.

The book is intended to be both a holistic overview of what generates and builds trust, and a hands-on guide to how that can be done. A wide range of tips, models and techniques that will help to build strong and effective trust solutions in today’s business world are combined with a range of insights into the topical subjects of the day.

The term ‘trust’ has been overused forever and, during the last decade, considerably devalued. In this book, the authors aim to take the concept back to its essentials and to re-evaluate how real, meaningful trust can be incorporated into management and leadership

Name: Kömpf Onlineshops GmbH
Description:
Die Kömpf Onlineshops GmbH besteht aus einer Vielzahl an Onlineshops aus den Bereichen Haus, Garten und Wohnen. Rund 150 Mitarbeitende kümmern sich in unserem Onlineshop um die Zufriedenheit unserer E-Commerce-Kunden. Qualitativ hochwertige Produkte, die Orientierung an Kundenbedürfnisse und Fachkompetenz zeichnen uns aus.

„Wir sind ein freundliches Unternehmen.“ Ist der erste Satz, den man bei uns im Einstellungsgespräch zu hören bekommt. Und das zeigt sich jeden Tag: Im Umgang mit unseren Kunden und Lieferanten, im Umgang untereinander und selbstverständlich auch in unserem regionalen Umfeld.

Der Startschuss für mittlerweile über 20 Onlineshops fiel 2007, ganz hemdsärmelig, mit zwei Mitarbeitern im Lager unseres Baumarktes in Calw. Unsere Wurzeln - die Nähe zum stationären Handel - blieben uns bis heute erhalten. Mittlerweile sind wir, die KÖMPF-Gruppe, auf über 500 Mitarbeiter gewachsen. 

Unsere Shops decken zahlreiche Sortimente ab. Neben dem klassischen Baumarkt- und DIY Sortiment findet sich neben unserer Kernmarke zahlreiche Marken- und Nischenshops für spezielle Kundensegmente.

Zu unseren Stärken zählen wir die hohe Entwicklungstiefe. Nur durch dieses Know-how lassen sich zahlreiche strategisch wichtige Serviceleistungen überhaupt erst zeitgemäß und wirtschaftlich anbieten. Doch auch die teils über Jahrzehnte gewachsenen, partnerschaftlichen Beziehungen zu unseren Lieferanten erachten wir für unseren Erfolg mindestens ebenso wertvoll.

Name: geh.digital
Description:
Willkommen zur Zukunft des Handels!

Herzlich willkommen zur //geh.digital 2024 – Ihrer innovativen Plattform für die Digitalisierung des Handels. In einer Welt, in der Technologie sich schneller denn je weiterentwickelt und die Kundschaft stets höhere Erwartungen hat, ist es sowohl für Händler als auch Hersteller wichtiger denn je, Schritt zu halten. Doch viele wissen nicht wie oder wo sie anfangen sollen.

Egal ob E-Commerce oder Ladengeschäft: Der Handel steht heute vor vielen Herausforderungen. Die Digitalisierung hat die Spielregeln grundlegend verändert und den Wettbewerb auf eine ganz neue Ebene gehoben. Online-Marktplätze, Pure-Player-Riesen und sich ständig verändernde Bedürfnisse der Kund:innen setzen Hersteller, den traditionellen Einzelhandel und Online-Handel unter Druck. Doch die Digitalisierung bietet auch zahlreiche Chancen und Möglichkeiten zur Weiterentwicklung.

Ein maßgebliches Problem dem sich Händler stellen müssen, ist die Vielfalt der Innovationen. Technologische Durchbrüche wie Künstliche Intelligenz, Internet of Things, Augmented Reality, kontaktloses Bezahlen und viele andere richtungsweisende Ideen drängen auf den Markt. Der Überblick über diese Innovationen und ihre möglichen Auswirkungen auf das Geschäft kann extrem herausfordernd sein. Doch genau hier setzen wir an.

Bei der //geh.digital haben Sie die Möglichkeit, die Welt der digitalen Transformation kennenzulernen. Entdecken Sie die neuesten Lösungen, Technologien und Trends, die den Einzelhandel revolutionieren. Über 200 erfahrene Aussteller bieten Ihnen einen umfassenden Einblick in innovative Systeme, die Sie beim Start in das Online-Business unterstützen und mit denen Sie erfolgreich wachsen können.

Introducing the Trauma To Hope: A Haven for Book Lovers and Mental Wellness Advocates

Welcome to the Trauma To Hope, where the love of literature intersects with the importance of mental well-being. We're thrilled to invite you to join our vibrant community of readers, writers, and mental health enthusiasts as we embark on a journey of self-discovery, connection, and support.

What We Offer:

That's why we've created a space where members can come together to share their love of reading, engage in meaningful discussions, and support one another through life's challenges. Here's what you can expect from our community:

Book Clubs and Discussion Groups: Dive into the world of literature by joining one of our book clubs or discussion groups. Whether you're passionate about fiction, non-fiction, poetry, or self-help books, there's a group for you. Share your thoughts, insights, and recommendations with fellow book lovers and discover new literary treasures along the way.

Online Community and Discord Server: Connect with like-minded individuals from around the world through our online community and Discord server. Our Discord server offers a safe and welcoming space where members can chat, share book recommendations, participate in virtual book club meetings, and more. Join us for lively discussions, author Q&A sessions, and special events designed to celebrate our shared love of reading.

Mental Health Support: We recognize the importance of mental health and provide a dedicated space for members to vent, share, and seek support. Our mental health section offers a supportive environment where individuals can express themselves freely, knowing they are among friends who understand and care. Whether you're struggling with anxiety, depression, or simply need someone to listen, you'll find a compassionate community here to support

Name: La Librairie.
Description:
« Un livre pour chacun, un lieu pour tous. »

Un lieu né d’un désir ancien, pas encore nommé.
Un jour, il s’est dessiné. Presque tout seul. Mais pas tout seul.

Un lieu où le livre peut devenir le prétexte d’autre chose : une rencontre, un écho, une transmission.

On ne vient pas seulement chercher un livre à La Librairie.
On y vient pour autre chose.
Pour un silence partagé. Une voix reconnue.
Pour une conversation, un flottement.
Pour un souvenir, parfois. Pour ce qui reste, même une fois sorti.

On n’a pas construit un concept.
On a bâti un lieu à partir de ce qu’on est.

La Librairie., c’est un lieu indépendant.
Sans dogme mais pas sans convictions.
Une librairie généraliste de quartier,
engagée dans le lien de proximité, la création de repères culturels et l’ouverture à toutes les voix :
celles qui résonnent, celles qui dérangent,
celles qu’on n’a pas toujours l’habitude d’entendre.

On y trouve des livres, bien sûr.
Une sélection exigeante mais accessible.
Des récits, des pensées, des formes graphiques.
Des mots qui bousculent, d’autres qui réconfortent.
Des choix, toujours assumés. Et parfois inattendus.

Et puis des rendez-vous. Des ateliers. Des lectures. Des voix.
Des livres lus à haute voix, pour les petits et pour les grands.
Des auteurs, des autrices.
Des idées qui s’échangent sans podium.
Des histoires qui circulent sans costume.

La Librairie., c’est un lieu d’usage.
Un lieu vivant. Un lieu répit. Un lieu repère.
Un lieu qu’on fréquente, qu’on adopte, qu’on recommande.
Un lieu qui s’imprime doucement dans le quotidien.
Et qui laisse la place à chacun et chacune.

Un lieu qui ne ressemble à aucun autre,
mais qui pourrait, peut-être, ressembler un peu à chacune.

Un lieu qu’on rêve de transmettre.
Un lieu qu’on rêve de voir durer.

Name: Abonauten GmbH
Description:
Die Abonauten sind ein Genuss-Startup aus der Nähe von München, unser erklärtes Ziel ist es einerseits, den Menschen zu zeigen, dass es neben all den großen Marken mit ihren Produkten, Platzierungen und Supermarktlistungen noch viel mehr zu entdecken gibt. Andererseits bieten wir kleinen Herstellern und Manufakturen eine Plattform, um ihre qualitativ hochwertigen Produkte bekannt zu machen.
 
Dies tun wir bislang in den Bereichen Gin, Whisky, Espresso, Filterkaffee, Käse, Champagner und Wein über ein Abosystem, weitere Produktkategorien werden folgen. Unsere Kunden erhalten über die von ihnen gewünschte Laufzeit monatlich Genussboxen mit immer wieder neuen Produkten. Diese von uns kuratierten Produkte können sie in kleinen Abfüllungen, die wir persönlich vornehmen, verkosten. Natürlich ist jedes Produkt im Anschluss auch in Originalgröße bei uns nachbestellbar.
 
Die Vorteile liegen klar auf der Hand: Einerseits lernt man Produkte kennen, die man sonst wahrscheinlich nie in seinem Leben entdeckt hätte. Andererseits können all diese Produkte zunächst in kleiner „Dosis“ probiert werden, ohne dass man direkt zum Beispiel eine ganze Flasche Gin oder ein Kilogramm Espresso kaufen muss.
 
Und das Wichtigste: Es macht verdammt viel Spaß, entweder selbst zu genießen oder aber über ein Geschenk einen lieben Menschen in den Genuss eines unserer Abos kommen zu lassen.

Art of Sucre started as an events based business spinning out of the box flavors of cotton candy at weddings, parties, concerts (Hi Arianna and Elton!), and so much more! Name: I'm Buying Local
Description:
Introducing www.imbuyinglocal.com – Helping Independent Salons and Clinics Unlock New Revenue Streams

A new platform is making waves in the UK’s hair, beauty, wellness, and aesthetics industries – and it's all about championing local business while helping salons and clinics boost revenue and elevate their client offering.

imbuyinglocal.com is a unique product partnership platform that connects independent businesses with premium, in-demand professional retail products, without the hassle or overhead of holding stock. By registering as a Partner Store, salons and clinics can offer a curated selection of beauty, skincare, and wellness products directly to their clients, both in-store and online.

Why Join?

Increase Revenue:
Share 50% of net profit* on every sale without investing in stock or fulfilment. It's a smart way to introduce a retail stream that complements your existing service offering and values.
Enhance Client Experience:
Provide your clients with trusted, high-quality products they can purchase directly through you, whether during a service, or online at their convenience, using the shops unique discount code.
Promote Local, Support Local:
We prioritise partnerships with independent and UK-based brands, like Daimon Barber and Serenity Wellbeing, so you’re not just selling – you’re supporting the wider local business ecosystem.
Simple Setup:
No complicated contracts or setup fees. Just register, choose the products you love, and start earning. Whether you're a hairdresser, beauty therapist, clinic owner, or wellness practitioner, imbuyinglocal.com gives you the tools to grow your business while offering more value to your clients.

Be part of the movement. Register today at www.imbuyinglocal.com
For partnership enquiries, contact: sales@imbuyinglocal.com

Name: Les Compères
Description:
Chez Les Compères, nous fabriquons des produits durables et responsables, respectueux de l’environnement, fabriqués en France avec passion. Maroquinerie, coutellerie, textile, bougies, bonnet, chapeaux... tout un univers de beaux objets qui vous suivront dans vos aventures et se transmettront de génération en génération.

Les Compères c'est : 
Une histoire d’aventure et de passion… Nous sommes tous des aventuriers du quotidien… Urbains, ruraux, montagnards, chaque jour nous révèle une part d’aventure et nous écrivons tous notre histoire. C’est aussi dans la passion que nous nous révélons, comme le disait Eric Tabarly : “l’homme a besoin de passion pour exister” Ce sont sur ces deux piliers que je me suis appuyé pour créer les Compères ! Avec toujours à l’esprit “l’Art de vivre à la Française”.

Nous avons une obsession : celle du travail bien fait. Et une conviction, celle que notre consommation peut avoir un impact économique, social et écologique. Sans être parfait partout, nous pouvons commencer par faire le choix de consommer de manière responsable. C’est pourquoi chez Les Compères, nous avons choisi de développer des produits durables et responsables, respectueux de l’environnement et du savoir-faire français.

Nous aimons : 
. La nature Et oui, car acheter locale c'est aussi préserver notre belle nature.
. Les matériaux nobles Le bois, l'acier, le cuir, la laine... sont avant tout des matériaux et matières durables, et c'est ce qui compte pour nous.
. L'artisanat Et on aime leur savoir faire. Nous avons la volonté de mettre en avant le savoir-faire d'artisans qui chaque jours s'engagent dans le beau et la qualité.

Notre engagement : 
Tous les Compères sont fabriqués en France. Nous valorisons les savoir-faire français. En sélectionnant les meilleurs artisans et industries sur notre territoire.

Sustainability and responsibility aren't afterthoughts for us - they're ingrained in our DNA. Poised to disrupt the market with our unique offering, we are primed to become the preferred choice in the burgeoning "better-for-you" caffeinated snack sector, making a difference in people's lives by enabling allowing them to 'energize without compromise.' Name: WayKup Coffee
Description:
Welcome to WayKup Coffee, a socially conscious brand founded on a love for coffee and a passion for change. Our mission is simple: to provide you with premium-quality coffee while transforming the lives of those less fortunate. Every bag of coffee purchased contributes to well-drilling projects in communities that lack access to clean water, starting in Ethiopia, the birthplace of coffee.

Every gram of coffee we sell provides 1 liter of water to those in need.

Water is the most basic of life’s necessities and in many parts of the world, access to water is restricted or very difficult to obtain. In Africa, usually women and young girls walk hours to retrieve a single bucket of water, removing them from school and exposing them to danger. By providing wells within their villages, we not only provide water, but we pave the way for security, education, community cohesion and economic development.

If you would like to try our coffee or would like to purchase for your office/cafe then please reach out to sales@waykup.ae.

Follow our instagram: @waykup.coffee

Name: Cheapest Liquor
Description:
Cheapest Liquor is Australia's fastest-growing online liquor retailer, reshaping how Australians shop for wines, spirits, and champagnes. Founded with a clear mission—“Shop Smarter, Celebrate Bigger”—we offer an extensive selection, unbeatable prices, and exceptional customer service to individuals and corporate clients nationwide.

We recognised the challenges customers faced with traditional retailers, particularly slow delivery times and limited product ranges. In response, we've built our own efficient delivery network, ensuring rapid next-day service across key regions, including VIC and NSW.

Whether you're celebrating personal milestones or corporate achievements, Cheapest Liquor provides a seamless, stress-free experience. Our dedicated corporate gifting service caters specifically to professionals—such as real estate agents—who value meaningful gestures when closing important deals. We provide no limits on orders, dedicated account management, and fast, reliable delivery.

Join us as we continue to redefine the liquor shopping experience, making it smarter, faster, and better for everyone.

Name: Exquisite Costumes
Description:
Founded in 2022, Exquisite Costumes is the first company to create an e-commerce platform enabling clients to search, source, reserve and rent costumes online.

After working for years as costume designers for schools, Co-Founders Caroline Oliver and Michele Rohr recognized a need for theatrical-quality costumes that could be sourced, reserved and rented online at a reasonable cost. Clients can rent single costumes to entire shows, or work with the design team to create custom pieces.  

Co-founder Michele Rohr retired from her medical practice to obtain her BFA in Costume Design Construction from Purchase College. Caroline Oliver retired from her law practice to preserve the art and tradition of theatrical costuming.

With 1/7 the sugar of Gatorade and 6X the electrolytes, we’re redefining what a premium hydration drink looks like — meeting the needs of the modern wellness movement. Started in golf, made for anyone chasing their best.

Sold nationwide through our online shop & Amazon Prime, and across 23 states in golf, fitness & hospitality. Available in three crushable flavors — Lemon Lime Birdie Time, Caddies’ Golden Peach, and Club Twirling Blue Razz. Get deliciously dialed in.

U kan er een ruim aanbod literatuur terugvinden, maar evenzeer pareltjes van kinder- en jeugdboeken. Tussen de fotografieboeken zitten er onbekende en unieke titels.

Description:
Vinodivino, founded in 2004, is your premier destination for exquisite wines, serving both individual enthusiasts and corporate clients with an exceptional selection of global wines. Our stores are a wine lover's paradise, offering a diverse range of handpicked wines for all occasions.

 Wine Selection:
Explore a world of wine in our stores, where we offer renowned classics and hidden gems to suit your palate. Our expert team is dedicated to assisting you in finding the perfect bottle, whether for personal enjoyment, gifting, or corporate events.

 Wine Education:
Vinodivino is committed to wine education. Our experienced sommeliers and wine enthusiasts are available to share their knowledge, answer inquiries, and elevate your wine experience through tastings and virtual events, making wine education accessible to all.

 Corporate and B2B Sales:
For businesses and corporate clients, we provide tailored wine solutions. Vinodivino offers corporate gifting, event planning, and customized wine selections to enhance your brand and client relationships.

 Shop Online:
Discover our extensive wine collection and shop conveniently online. Vinodivino delivers the world of wine to your doorstep via our user-friendly e-commerce platform, ensuring you can enjoy our wines from anywhere.

Join Vinodivino on a journey through the world of wine, whether you're an individual connoisseur, a corporate client, or a curious novice. Cheers to exceptional wines and unforgettable moments!  Follow us for wine trends, expert tips, and exclusive offers. #VinodivinoWine #WineLovers

Name: Scentception
Description:
SCENTCEPTION is a niche fine fragrance brand with purpose, personality and a story to tell, which brings alive the idea to smell consciously.

Nadia Geyken Firenze, in-house Perfumer and Founder of SCENTCEPTION, with an experience of 10 years in crafting fragrances, has created the first unique fragrances in niche perfumery, which combine the concept of conscious smelling with the benefits of natural essential oils.

At the heart of "Smell Consciously" lies a profound philosophy – one that recognizes the intricate interplay between our olfactory senses and the most intimate corners of our minds. By cultivating the ability to smell consciously, we unlock a gateway to a happier and better version of ourselves. With each inhale, we breathe in the potential for emotional balance, mental clarity, and lasting memories.

- Elegance: We're dedicated to curating products that exude refinement and sophistication.
- Sustainability: We strive to promote environmentally conscious practices and products.

Name: Mellanmal Inc
Description:
Mellanmål Inc is a US distribution company that sells better-for-you-and-the-planet food products. 

We currently operate in the US and Sweden, but are opening up new markets as opportunities arise. In the US we have a full one-stop-shop operation and offer shipping, import, warehousing, sales and distribution. Our main sales channels are retail B2B but also we also offer B2C sales on our website www.mellanmalofsweden.com.

Get in touch if you are a food entrepreneur that wants to sell your products in the US or Sweden, or if you are a US or Swedish retailer that wants to list the products we sell.

MELLANMÅL is Swedish and literally means "middle-meal" and is a big part of Swedish food culture. It's a healthier small meal between meals, usually low on sugar and high on protein, as opposed to a sweet snack.

Name: Gauchos OnLine
Description:
O cliente da Gaúchos Online é tratado como se fossemos nós mesmos do outro lado recebendo o produto. É pensando nessa pessoa que escolhemos os produtos a serem vendidos para que receba em sua casa, no outro lado do país ou do mundo, um produto genuinamente gaúcho de primeira linha.

Atendemos clientes de todas as regiões do país: Amazonas, Pará, Maranhão, Rio Grande do Norte e São Paulo, o nosso campeão de vendas. Mas já mandamos pelos correios para muitos países também como a Austrália, Canadá, Estados Unidos, Itália, Japão, França e Equador.

Hoje, o nosso ponto forte é a personalização de produtos ligados à nossa tradição e que servem como presentes exclusivos e brindes empresariais.

Como a demanda cresceu muito na nossa região resolvemos, em setembro de 2016, abrir um ponto físico, em Carazinho, para atender aquele cliente mais próximo e que tinha grande interesse em nossos produtos diferenciados.

Our company carries the concept of the most complete modern distribution with a variety of products. Currently, with the number of Principals who entrust the product distribution process to us, we have become a leader in the distribution of 82 (Eighty Two) Principals who have various products.

Our hope is that CV. MAJU MAKMUR Jayapura can be a real and best solution in meeting the needs of the people in Papua, especially Jayapura and Wamena for the products we distribute.

Our commitment is to provide satisfaction for all customers and the community that we implement in the distribution process to remote villages.

Name: Vinerosa
Description:
Que vous soyez amateur(e), curieux(se), débutant(e) ou passionné(e), Vinerosa est fait pour vous. Découvrez ici le monde du vin tel qu'on le voit peu : simple, ludique et centré sur le goût, le voyage, la créativité et la soif d'explorer.

 Nous vous partageons des insights sur les différentes régions du monde, leurs cépages, leurs profils aromatiques, comment accorder le vin et la food...
Bref, une approche complète et simplifiée du monde viticole, permettant de mieux le comprendre pour mieux le pratiquer.

 Dans notre boutique, accédez à une sélection de vins du monde sous forme de ventes éphémères. Les vins proposés seront pour la plupart inédits sur le marché français et sélectionnés pour leur excellence et leur typicité.

 Le site est mis à jour régulièrement, avec de nouvelles ventes et de nouveaux contenus mis en ligne chaque mois.

Name: Keimling Naturkost GmbH
Description:
Gesunde Ernährung liegt uns am Herzen!

Keimling Naturkost ist in über 40 Jahren stark gewachsen. Dennoch ist unser Leitmotiv stets dasselbe geblieben: Nur mit einer Ernährung aus unverarbeiteten, nicht erhitzten Naturprodukten können wahre Gesundheit und ein langes Leben erlangt werden. 

Inzwischen sind vegane und roh-vegane Ernährung, Bio und Rohkost zum nachhaltigen Lebensentwurf von Generationen geworden. Dabei wird Sie Keimling Naturkost auch in Zukunft mit Qualität, Leidenschaft und persönlichem Service begleiten. Ehrlichkeit und Vertrauen sind dabei unsere obersten Prinzipien. Darauf können Sie sich heute und in Zukunft verlassen!

Name: decomonde.fr

Après plusieurs années de collaboration avec les plus grandes maisons de décoration et d'ameublement, nous nous sommes lancer dans une aventure entrepreneuriale afin de proposer uniquement les meilleurs produits.

Passionnés par le design d'intérieur, extérieur et concept, nous voulons mettre à disposition, sur un seul site, une multitude de produits destinés à répondre vos attentes, notamment en termes de qualité et de prix.

Name: Viners - We Love Vinos
Description:
Desde Viners te traemos los mejores vinos de Argentina, con solo un clic, facilitando la compra, desde la elección, hasta el descorche.

Viners nació a fines de 2018, porque como consumidores de vinos queríamos un servicio diferente.

Tenemos una alianza estratégica con Andreani Logística, lo que nos permite entregar nuestros productos en menos de 72 horas en las principales ciudades del país. Además, desarrollamos nuestro propio packaging, con protección premium, para que tus vinos lleguen en perfectas condiciones.

En Viners te ofrecemos solo los mejores vinos de Argentina. El 90% de nuestro catálogo son etiquetas con más de 90 puntos, o con rating mínimo de 4 en Vivino. Y el 10% restante son etiquetas que nuestro Head Sommelier seleccionó especialmente, por su altísima calidad.

Viners no es simplemente una tienda de vinos en internet. Viners es mucho más. Venimos a transformar la vinoteca tradicional, en una experiencia online.

Brindá, compartí, disfrutá!

Name: The Matcha Yaad
Description:
The Matcha Yaad is the home of Britain's first Productivity Beverage. We are where flavour meets function! We specialise in expertly crafting amazing Matcha based products. 

Our Matcha is from Uji, Kyoto, world renowned for the best quality Matcha powder. In fact, Britain's foremost Food and Beverage Brand expert, Eddie Stableford, described our Matcha as "highest, attainable quality". We are serious about delivering to you the best of the best.

Our passion led us from the land of wood and water Jamaica, to the land of the rising sun Japan. There, we immersed ourselves in the vibrant cultures and developed a beverage that is not only packed with powerful nutrients, but has bold, tantalising and mouthwatering flavour! Now we are in the UK empowering our dear customers with our power packed punch!

Name: Movino
Description:
Vi har skabt den moderne vinbutik til dig, som vi altid selv har drømt om! Et sted, hvor vin kombineret med mad, stilfuld gaveindpakning og professionel, men hjemlig service er i fokus. 

Vi kalder det Movino.

Med Movino vil vi skabe fremtidens vinbutik. En moderne detailforretning. En detailforretning som skal trække dig ned i gågaden og ind i butikken. 

Vi er også forhandler af de anerkendte Riedel-glas. Kom ind i butikken og se vores udvalg. 

Her får du vin på glas eller i hele flasker. Serveret ved den rette temperatur og i det rigtige glas. Med fokus på den gode smag og oplevelse.

I køkkenet fremtrylles der frisklavet pasta, vores charcuteri, "Cassoulet" og muligheden for at tilkøbe Joselito-skinker eller kaviar.

Vi glæder os til at byde dig indenfor hos Movino.

Name: Modellbahn Union
Description:
Modellbahn Union – Das Besondere im Detail

Seit über 25 Jahren steht Modellbahn Union für Leidenschaft, Innovation und Vielfalt in der Welt der Modelleisenbahn.
Als Teil der DM-Toys Gruppe entwickeln, produzieren und vertreiben wir hochwertige Modelle und Zubehörprodukte in den Spurweiten H0, N, TT, Z und 0 – von exklusiven Eigenmodellen bis hin zu umfangreichem Zubehör „Made in Germany“ und in unserer europäischen Fertigung.

Unsere Schwerpunkte:

Hersteller & Entwickler: Eigenproduktionen von Rollmaterial und Zubehör in kleinen Auflagen – detailreich, innovativ und exklusiv nur bei uns erhältlich.
Importeur & Partner: Langjährige Zusammenarbeit mit internationalen Marken wie Dapol oder Hornby.
Händler & Logistik: Mehr als 30.000 sofort verfügbare Produkte, effiziente Prozesse und ein europaweit zuverlässiger Versand.
Unser Standort:
Nach dem Brand in Kamen haben wir 2024 einen Neustart in Issum (NRW) vollzogen. Dort bündeln wir Lager, Technik, Verwaltung und Produktion – ein moderner Standort, der uns neue Möglichkeiten für Entwicklung, Fertigung und Service eröffnet.

Unsere Mission:
Wir verbinden Tradition und Hightech, Community und Fachkompetenz. Mit unserem Team und einer starken Community wollen wir Europas führender Anbieter für Modelleisenbahn werden – und gleichzeitig ein attraktiver Arbeitgeber für Menschen mit Leidenschaft für Miniaturwelten.

Besonderes Highlight:
Seit 2022 setzen wir auf Live-Shopping-Formate und innovative Content-Strategien, die Online-Kompetenz und Fachhandelstradition vereinen – für ein einzigartiges Einkaufserlebnis.

Name: Divide
Description:
Drink Different. Drink Divide.

Divide is Sri Lanka’s fastest–growing minimalist coffee brand — built on speed, design innovation, and community culture.
What started as a 100–300 sq.ft. grab-and-go concept in Colombo has rapidly evolved into a franchise-ready model that combines global café aesthetics with the convenience Sri Lankan customers love.

At Divide, we focus on simplicity done perfectly:
 Specialty coffee & matcha curated from around the world
 A compact, efficient store model requiring minimal space
 High daily footfall with fast return on investment
 A design-first experience that people love to photograph and share

Our community markets for us. From French-window facades to clean black-and-white branding, every Divide store becomes a landmark — a spot to take a picture, post a story, and grab a cup of quality coffee on the move.

Our Growth Story:
• In just weeks, we built and launched two Colombo locations — Divide Ward Place & Divide Nawam Mawatha
• We are now expanding across Colombo through micro-spaces and curated franchise partnerships
• International expansion has already begun with Divide’s first overseas branch opening in the Maldives

The Divide Blueprint:
• Small footprint. Big return.
• No kitchen required
• Zero wastage operating model
• Fast build time (2–3 weeks)
• Strong digital presence with high social engagement
• Designed for scalability across malls, corporate buildings, transport hubs, and luxury hotels

Divide is more than coffee — it is a culture, a movement, and a lifestyle brand reshaping how Sri Lankans experience specialty beverages.
We are now partnering with investors, property developers, and business owners who want to bring this next-generation coffee model to their district or city.

Drink Divide.
Experience the future of fast coffee.

Name: PoolSupplies.com
Description:
Swimming pools have a way of bringing families together and family is an important part of the makeup of our company. Spanning over 60 years and two generations, our family strives to give your family the best quality and service in the swimming pool industry.

The company was originally established by Richard Gerspach in 1958 as Island Pools. Island Pools started by simply supplying installation, service, and repairs to swimming pools. From these humble beginnings grew a larger company focusing on a nationwide reach for swimming pool parts and accessories.

We have expanded to include not only general pool supplies and backyard items, but it also has become the largest independent source of replacement parts to fit Kayak Pools, and a manufacturer of parts for the solar deck heated Fanta-Sea Pools. Sales of our products can be seen in prominent positions on numerous websites (including poolsupplies.com), as well as a 60-page, widely distributed print catalog.

With a knowledgeable staff operating a warehouse and office complex spanning over 245,000 square feet, a mail-order catalog, and a high-profile internet site, PoolSupplies.com moves forward in honoring the original legacy of superior products and service from our family to yours.

Name: triple ‘a’ Foodhall
Description:
Welcome to triple ‘a’ Foodhall, where exceptional food meets community pride. Located in Nuneaton, we’re an award winning hub offering everything from hand stretched Neapolitan pizzas, the triple ‘a’ Spud Experience, and freshly baked artisan breads to our signature gelato, made daily with authentic Italian ingredients. We’re also home to the UK’s first Gelato Slice.

We’re more than a foodhall, we’re a community. Whether it’s donating thousands of advent calendars and selection boxes to local schools, supporting initiatives like the National Breakfast Scheme, hosting events such as our festive Santa Meet, or partnering with vendors to showcase the very best in independent retail, we put people first in everything we do.

In 2025, triple ‘a’ achieved multiple major industry honours across the UK retail landscape, including:
 Retail Industry Awards 2025
• Independent Retailer of the Year
 Better Retailing Awards 2025
• Merchandising, In Store Display
• Overall Best Shop
 Bestway Awards 2025
• Large Convenience Store of the Year
 The Convenience Awards 2025
• Large Convenience Store of the Year
• Food to Go Store of the Year

These achievements reflect our commitment to excellence, innovation and community centred retailing.

Visit us to see what makes triple ‘a’ Foodhall a must visit destination. Follow our page for updates, insights and a closer look at what we do best.

 92 Coleshill Rd, Chapel End, Nuneaton CV10 0PH
 tripleafoodhall.co.uk

More than a gourmet brand, it is the result of a dream of someone passionate about originality and innovation, with roots in Vila Nova de Gaia.

This young man, named Helder Lobo, has always had a huge taste for artisanal and traditional products, from small producers, bought locally in the centenary grocery store, where we find something that transports us to the childhood of our ancestors. In this sense, Helder decided to create Premium Bite, in 2020, and in this way join small producers as well as support the local economy, taking it beyond borders.

With this brand, we will make our beautiful Portugal known to the rest of the world, demonstrating the value that each producer holds, through dedication to what is produced daily in our land.

Our delivery and dedication will make the difference for every occasion (festive or otherwise), making life even more special with the presence of the details that can be found in our personalised hampers.

We say we are the best in our creations! We have themed Hampers, Christmas Hampers, Corporate Hampers, Original Gifts, all in an elegant, sustainable and gourmet packaging.

Name: AC Hesed Group
Description:
Founded in Singapore, AC Hesed Group is home to a growing portfolio of food and beverage brands from around the world. It’s existing brand portfolio includes, Krispy Kreme (USA); llaollao (Spain); 108 Matcha Saro (Japan); Ben’s Cookies (UK); TP Tea (Taiwan); Cinnabon (USA); and Jamba Juice (USA). 

Our mission is to provide consumers with foods and beverages of the highest quality and standards, as if they were enjoying our products in their countries of origin. To ensure this, we import key ingredients and equipment to produce our products. For example, flour used in Krispy Kreme doughnuts are imported from the USA; cookie dough in Ben’s Cookies are imported from the UK; and we use only ceremonial-grade matcha powder from Uji, Kyoto, Japan. We also commit to satisfying all international standards of practice, as required by each respective brand principal. 

Our goal is to bring luxurious and delicious treats from around the world to Singapore and beyond. True to this, we have expanded our presence to Malaysia, Indonesia, and soon, Hong Kong. If you are interested in sub-franchising any of the above-mentioned brands (and more), please reach out to us. 

Aligned with our mission to bring delicious treats to the region is the hope to provide homes to similar businesses. Thus, forming the motivation to venture into freehold, food industries commercial property development. 

We look forward to serving you soon.
