Nous sommes une cave en ligne dédiée à la découverte et à la promotion des vins du Languedoc issus de petits producteurs engagés dans une démarche éco-responsable. Notre mission est de faire connaître et apprécier des vins authentiques, respectueux de l'environnement et des traditions locales.

Nos services incluent :

- Sélection de vins :

Une gamme soigneusement choisie de vins du Languedoc, mettant en avant la diversité et la qualité de ce terroir exceptionnel.

- Animations de dégustation :

Des évènements conviviaux pour découvrir et savourer nos vins, tout en apprenant sur les pratiques viticoles durables.

- Vente en ligne : 

Une plateforme facile d'accès pour commander nos vins et recevoir des conseils personnalisés.

- Services aux professionnels :

Des solutions sur mesure pour les restaurants, hôtels, traiteurs etc souhaitant enrichir leur carte avec des vins de qualité.

Nous croyons en une viticulture respectueuse de l'environnement et soutenons des producteurs qui partagent cette vision. Chaque bouteille que nous proposons est le fruit d'un travail passionné et éthique, garantissant une expérience unique à chaque dégustation.

Contactez nous :

Vous pouvez nous contacter pour toute question, collaboration ou commande. Ensemble, partageons la passion du vin éco-responsable !

Notre mission est de révolutionner l'expérience d'achat en ligne en instaurant une confiance sans faille et en garantissant l'excellence à chaque interaction. Forts d'une base solide de 100 000 unités vendues annuellement, nous visons désormais le cap ambitieux d'1 million d'unités en un an, propulsés par notre jeunesse, motivation, travail acharné, et professionnalisme.

Chez Zasha, nous croyons en la puissance de la technologie pour simplifier et enrichir l'expérience d'achat. Notre approche centrée sur le client et notre engagement envers l'innovation nous permettent de répondre aux attentes et aux besoins spécifiques des consommateurs dans les pays du Golfe. Notre équipe, dynamique et passionnée, est dédiée à offrir un service exceptionnel, reflétant notre engagement envers l'excellence et la qualité.

Rejoignez-nous sur cette aventure passionnante pour redéfinir les normes de l'e-commerce dans la région du Golfe. Ensemble, nous pouvons construire un avenir où la confiance et la qualité sont au cœur de chaque achat en ligne. Suivez notre parcours vers l'atteinte de notre objectif d'1 million d'unités vendues, et découvrez comment nous transformons les défis en opportunités. Zasha, votre partenaire de confiance en e-commerce.

Name: Kreator eCommerce
Description:
Kreator eCommerce is a preeminent organization focused on maximizing its impact in the world of eCommerce and digital strategy. It was founded by Kevin Zhang and Raoul Benjamin in August 2018. Starting out as a dorm room hustle between two college friends, Kreator eCommerce now employs 60+ team members across 3 global locations.

Kreator eCommerce owns and manages several subsidiary 7-figure men's apparel and accessory eCommerce brands. To-date, Kreator eCommerce has sold its products to 300,000+ consumers across 20 different countries, successfully generating $30M+ in sales.

Kreator eCommerce offers core services and strategic advice through its consulting arm to businesses and individuals serious about eCommerce. Past and present clients include: A-list celebrities interested in creating their own clothing brand, a high-end designer fashion brand focused on improving digital sales, a 9-figure gaming company focused on promoting a specialty collection, and a viral custom jersey business trying to translate organic growth into profitable paid traffic.

Kreator eCommerce is also active in the world of eCommerce and entrepreneurship education by providing high quality content through Generation E, a movement aimed at inspiring and empower new eCommerce entrepreneurs. Generation E features enough free educational content for any individual to achieve financial freedom through eCommerce.

Name: WineOnline.ca
Description:
WHAT WE DO
At WineOnline.ca, we aim to provide an unmatched shopping experience by providing wine lovers with the opportunity to:

*Purchase quality-focused wines not otherwise retailed Ontario and Alberta 
*Purchase wine as gifts to be delivered to friends and family
*Order wine and wine accessories from the comfort of your home, office, cottage or anywhere else 
*Have wine delivered to your door (FREE for 12+ bottles) 
*Research each wine before purchasing it: tasting notes, expert 3rd party reviews, food complements, serving/storing notes, etc.
*Track current and previous orders via personalized online accounts
*Access fine wine in rural regions

ABOUT THE WINES
Perhaps the most exciting part of our job is sourcing wine. We travel regularly to the world's leading wine regions in search of great values and outstanding selections. We also recognize the quality of wine being made in our own backyard; we make regular visits to our local wineries, and make the stand-outs available to our customers. We also offer a full complement of wine accessories: e.g., glassware, corkscrews, wine bags, books, etc.

WHERE WE'VE BEEN AND WHERE WE'RE GOING
When we started in 2004, we were one of only two online wine shops in Ontario and almost no one knew such a service existed. In 2016, we have thousands of customers who trust us with sourcing the best wines for the best value.  In time, we hope to provide all Canadians with the convenience and quality that our customers in Ontario and Alberta enjoy. We are aware our continued success is based on the quality of our products and our ability to serve our customers well. This is the foundation of our business.

Taste the difference

Name: Finlandia Kirja Oy
Description:
Finlandia Kirja on vuonna 2010 perustettu verkkokirjakauppa ja kirjojen kiertotalouden edelläkävijä, joka tarjoaa ainoana Suomessa laajan valikoiman niin uusia kuin käytettyjä kirjoja. 600 000 käytetyn kirjan valikoima yhdistettynä kotimaisten kustantajien yli 30 000 uuden kirjan valikoimaan tarjoaa markkinoiden monipuolisimman kokonaisuuden erilaisiin lukutarpeisiin.

Toimimme kiertotalouden edelläjävijänä kirja-alalla tarjoten vastuullisia ratkaisuja kirjan koko elinkaaren ajalle niin kuluttajille, kirjankustantajille, kirjastoille kuin uudelleenkäyttöalan toimijoille. Olemme Suomen ensimmäinen kirjakauppa, joka on hyväksytty YK:n Global Conductin jäseneksi. Vastuullisuustavoitteemme perustuvat Global Conductin yritysvastuun periaatetteisiin ja tavoitteisiin. Kierrätämme vuodessa noin 700 000 käytettyä kirjaa, joista suurin osa ohjataan finlandiakirja.fi -verkkokauppamme valikoimaan tai Ilmaisen Kirjan Päivä -hyväntekeväisyys- ja kierrätystapahtumaamme. Elinkaarensa päähän tulleet kirjat kierrätämme uusiokäyttöön, jolloin kirja pysyy edelleen hiilinieluna uusina tuotteina, kuten kotimaisena Ekovillana. Edistämme kuluttajien mahdollisuuksia kierrättää kirjansa vastuullisesti; toteutamme maanlaajuista kotinoutopalvelua yhteistyössä DB Schenkerin kanssa sekä ylläpidämme Kirjan Kiertorata -keräyslaatikoita kirjastoissa.

Olemme Suomen suurin yrittäjävetoinen kirjakauppa. Työllistämme liki 40 henkeä Orimattilan ja Lahden toimipaikoissamme. Olemme jäsenenä Kaupan liitossa, Kirjakauppaliitossa sekä RENET Uudelleenkäyttöverkostossa, missä yrittäjämme Matti Pietilä toimii myös hallituksen jäsenenä.

Name: Die Kommunikationsküche
Description:
Willkommen in der
KOMMUNIKATIONSKÜCHE
Was ist das eigentlich, gelingende Kommunikation?
Was zeichnet erfolgreiche Kommunikator:innen aus?
Und wie können wir alle zu einem gelingenderen Miteinander beitragen?
All dem gehen wir in unserem Rezeptbuch auf den Grund.

Wir, das sind Birgit und Anja, die beiden Autorinnen, und in unserem Sachbuch geht es um Kommunikation im beruflichen wie im privaten Kontext. Immer im Bewusstsein, dass Zeit knapp ist, während Aufmerksamkeits-spannen geringer und Zündschnüre kürzer werden. Genau deshalb ist es ein Rezeptbuch geworden: Die Anleitungen sind kurz, einfach nachzuvollziehen und im Ergebnis ein Genuss.

Die Kommunikationsküche will vor allem sensibilisieren. So Vieles im täglichen Miteinander geht nicht aus böser Absicht schief sondern aus Unachtsamkeit. Dieses Rezeptbuch fördert das Erkennen und Meistern kritischer Situationen und lädt zum Ausprobieren im eigenen Alltag ein. Du bekommst mit diesem Ratgeber also eine Sammlung von wertvollen und hilfreichen Good Practices an die Hand, verfeinert durch die erprobte Anwendung in Workshops und Coachings. Umsetzungsstarke Anleitungen und Beispiele, die du im privaten und beruflichen Kontext sofort einsetzen kannst. 

Über die Autorinnen:
Die Marburgerin Birgit Becker ist Trainerin und Corporate Learning Professional. Anja Kellermann lebt in Heidelberg und arbeitet als Business-Coach. Die Illustrationen von Magdalena Adomeit runden das Rezeptbuch ab.

Bestellen kannst du das Buch über unsere Webseite: www.diekommunikationskueche.de

Name: TwoTwenty
Description:
We’ll try not to keep you too long because we’d rather you were out and about, TwoTwenty in hand, getting up to whatever it is you get up to...

Why call ourselves TwoTwenty? As humans we see with a radius of 220 degrees. We wanted to create a brand that encourages us all to be more present in the moment, enjoying what’s around us right now. We want us all to indulge in more guilt free fun together, whatever that might be.

We have always loved the concept of hard seltzer, yet the brands on offer didn’t hit the mark and lacked personality. They were often pumped full of artificial sweeteners, colours and preservatives or tasted so weak that they made your nan look like Anthony Joshua. So we spent our evenings and weekends creating a hard seltzer that tasted deliciously true to the flavour within.

Taking inspiration from the ephemeral drawings and messages found in venues, TwoTwenty hard seltzer sticks two fingers up to boring.

We want you to revel in the moments in front of you. All 220 degrees.

Enjoy your 220°.

Name: РЕПТИЛ/REPTIL
Description:
Рептил маркетите постојат од 1996 година и бележат континуиран раст и економски успех од своето основање. Нашата компанија е основана врз темелите на поранешните самопослуги Центро преку модернизирање на нивните простории и вработување на дел од нивниот искусен персонал. Ова ни овозможува да се истакнеме како единствен ланец-маркети во градот кој ја продолжува традицијата и гарантира топла и искрена услуга за секој потрошувач. Рептил маркетите не ја забораваат топлината на маалските продавници. Нашиот приоритет е секој купувач да излезе задоволен по пазарувањето.

Денес, нашата компанија располага со 25 маркети со формат на мали, големи и средни. Тие се распоредени во различни населби во главниот град Скопје, а сега и во Виница, кој брои 3 маркети. Рептил Маркети е првата компанија која ја имплементираше првата онлине продавница во Македонија. Од 2016 година до сега успешно работи со константен развој и успешно следење на светските трендови на онлине пазарувањето. Пазарењето може да се прави од сите типови на уреди и е неверојатно брзо и едноставно.

Founded in 1996, REPTIL has been experiencing continuous growth and economic success since its establishment. Our company was founded on the foundations of the former Centro supermarkets by modernizing their premises and employing some of their experienced staff. This allows us to stand out as the only supermarket chain in the city that continues the tradition of guaranteing warm and sincere service for every consumer keeping the culture of the neighborhood stores. Our priority is for every customer to leave satisfied after shopping.

Today, our company has 25 small, large and medium-sized supermarkets. They are located in different neighborhoods in Skopje, and now in Vinica, which has 3 supermarkets. Reptil Markets is the first company to implement the first online store in Macedonia. Since 2016, it has been successfully operating with constant development and successful monitoring of global trends in online shopping.

Name: The 55 Minutes
Description:
Albert Einstein is credited with saying, “If I had an hour to solve a problem, I’d spend fifty-five minutes thinking about the problem and five minutes thinking about solutions.” This book is about how to use those metaphorical first fifty-five minutes wisely. If we want to be successful when we innovate, act, or try to “change the system,” we need to get serious about understanding the problem. But problems don’t exist in a vacuum. They are enmeshed and ensnared in complexity. Moreover, the kinds of problems we face in our workplaces, institutions, and society at large are the results of systems.

Unfortunately, the world that most of us inhabit is focused on those last five minutes—rushing headlong toward a “solution” without having understood the problem. This happens in virtually every industry, organization, and sector of society. It’s one of the reasons most new businesses fail, most public policies are reactive, and “innovation” (whether commercial or social) spends far too much time in the unicorn-seeking land of hackathons, design sprints, and slick pitches, where confident answers make poor substitutes for authentic understanding. We work in “solutions-driven” companies, we expect governments to deliver rapid fixes, and we ask schools to teach and test for the “right” answers, instead of asking new and better questions.

All of our cosmetic products have been created in Gothenburg, Sweden using a selection of the finest ingredients and tailor-made recipes crafted by experts.

Our inspiration, Odin

With inspiration from our ancestors, the Vikings we chose the name Odenson referring to the ancient nordic god Odin, also known as Oden in Swedish. According to nordic mythology, Odin was the god who created the world. Together with his brothers he then killed the giant Ymer and used its body as material for the earth. Odin has many names and is both the god of war and the god of death.

Odin was able to heal the sick, calm storms, turn weapons against the enemy, make women love-sick, and neutralize dangerous sorceresses. Often just through a glance. We are not yet able to create a product that turns men into gods, but what we can do is empower men to become the strongest versions of themselves. 

Odin was also able to change form and that is something that we believe that anyone is able to do. Unlike Odin, you won't be able to turn into a snake, but with the correct guidance and products, you'll be able to change your appearance to a more attractive version of yourself.

Our mission

Our mission is to empower men all over the world, reminding them of the masculine strength our nordic ancestors were known for. In a society that sometimes tries to put down masculinity, we strive to inspire men to wield their true power to fulfill their goals in all aspects of life.

By creating a community of men that want to improve themselves and together develop products to improve our health and appearance, we believe we can have an opportunity to contribute to a better world.

Name: Half Time
Description:
At Half Time, we eat, sleep, and drink craft beer. 
We began in 2002 as a family business, and opened our first store in Poughkeepsie, NY stocked with 600 of the most exciting and unique beers we could get our hands on. 
Recognizing that the demand for a one-stop “beervana” shopping experience exceeded the immediate New York area, Half Time also became an early pioneer of direct-to-consumer online shipping, sending hard-to-find beers all the way across the country! 
In 2011, we opened our second location in Mamaroneck, NY, and our offerings jumped to nearly 5,000 incredible brews.
Today, Half Time bridges the gap between digital and real-world brew hunting. We started out as a hands-on, community-focused retailer 20 years ago, and today that character remains intact; our Poughkeepsie and Mamaroneck outlets are both every bit as inviting as our website. 
Along this journey, Half Time has also become an active member of the craft beer community: We host our own festivals, like the annual Harbor Island International Beer Festival, and we’ve teamed up with the biggest names in craft beer to throw some of the first virtual beer events, like BeerAdvocate’s “Extreme Beer Fest: Cyberspace” and Untappd’s “Virtual Beer Festival.” 
So as you search the site or browse our shelves, ask yourself: What are you looking for? The latest hop bomb? A stout to warm your bones in cold weather? Your imagination and palate are the only limits. Let Half Time do the rest.

Name: GREEN THERAPY
Description:
Ljudi diljem svijeta sve više vode brigu o svome zdravlju, te postaju sve svjesniji zdravstvenih prednosti prirodnih, biljnih, zdravih proizvoda za konzumaciju i za korištenje u kozmetičke svrhe. Ponosni smo što smo dio tog pokreta.

NAŠA PREDANOST KVALITETI
Tržištu nudimo samo vrhunske proizvode od organskih sastojaka koji nisu GMO. Gradeći partnerstvo s našim dobavljačima, poznajemo kvalitetu i izravan izvor naših proizvoda. Svaka pojedina serija sastojaka podvrgava se testiranju od strane laboratorija trećih strana, uključujući testiranje na teške metale, kao što su olovo i živa.

Naši klijenti nam vjeruju jer uporno radimo kako bismo tržištu ponudili najbolje proizvode u skladu s našim standardima.

ŠTO NAS ČINI EKSTRA POSEBNIMA
Naš fokus na zdravo i zdravlje, zajedno s našim dugogodišnjim iskustvom u pronalaženju jedinstvenih proizvoda, osnažio je našu poziciju na tržištu kao dobavljača visokokvalitetnih proizvoda. Uz korisničku uslugu 5 zvjezdica, osobno brinemo o našim klijentima i imamo osobne odnose s puno vas! Uvijek smo željni biti bolji i zato izuzetno cijenimo povratne informacije od naših klijenata.

Naša vizija
Svijet u kojem su ljekovito bilje i prirodni proizvodi lako dostupni, te su prvi izbor kao osnova zdravlja dostupnog svima.

Naša misija
Biti vodeći brend prirodnih proizvoda za zdravlje i ljepotu, istovremeno brinući o okolišu.

Naše vrijednosti
Kvaliteta – Održivost – Učinkovitost

Naša kultura
Strast za zdravim životom
Način razmišljanja o suživotu s prirodom
Razmišljanje izvan okvira, sloboda uma
Integritet i odgovornost
Uvažavanje različitosti
Želja za pozitivnom promjenom
Timski rad u suradnji s klijentima

Naša radna kultura najviše cijeni poštenje, integritet i poštovanje svih ljudi. Uvijek težimo najvišim etičkim standardima.

Name: POOL Total GmbH
Description:
Im Online-Shop von POOL Total finden Sie alles rund um Pools, Whirlpools, Saunen und Infrarotkabinen. Wenn Sie sich Ihren Traum vom Spa@home verwirklichen wollen, bieten wir Ihnen eine professionelle Beratung. Da wir rund 8.000 Produkte ständig auf Lager haben, geht es auch mit der Lieferung sehr schnell.

Entdecken Sie hochwertige Gartenpools und Schwimmbecken als Rund-, Oval- oder Achtformbecken zu günstigen Online-Preisen. Das passende Poolzubehör wie Filteranlagen, Poolleitern, Abdeckplanen und Poolreiniger finden Sie hier ebenso wie alles Notwendige, um Ihr Poolwasser stets sauber und keimfrei zu halten. 

Nutzen Sie zur Wasseranalyse unseren elektronischen PoolLab MultiTest „Pro“, Teststreifen oder ein anderes unserer Wassertestgeräte. Wenn Sie wissen, wie es um den pH-Wert, die Alkalität und den Chlorgehalt Ihres Wassers bestellt ist, bringen Sie Ihr Poolwasser schnell und nachhaltig mit entsprechenden Wasserpflegeprodukten wieder auf den Punkt. Wir haben eine riesige Auswahl an Wasserpflegemitteln von Top-Marken wie BAYROL, hth, Bellaqua und Cristal ständig ab Lager verfügbar. Grünes, trübes Wasser ist damit kein Thema mehr!

Sauna-Fans und Liebhaber von Infrarotkabinen werden ebenfalls bei POOL Total fündig. Ob Außen- oder Innensauna, klassische Sauna oder Fasssauna, Fullspektrum-Infrarotkabinen oder solche mit Flächenstrahlern: stöbern Sie einfach einmal in unserer Auswahl verschiedenster Modelle und dem passenden Zubehör. 

Bestellungen, die bis 12:00 Uhr bei uns eingehen, werden in der Regel noch am selben Tag verpackt und verschickt. Ausnahmen sind hier nur große Artikel wie Pools oder Wärmepumpen, die per Spedition versendet werden müssen.

Als Arbeitgeber achten wir auf ein respekt- und vertrauensvolles Miteinander. Wenn Sie Lust auf ein motiviertes und engagiertes Team haben, finden Sie offene Stellen auf dem Stellenportal unserer Website https://www.pooltotal.com/stellenangebote

SCANWINE invente, développe (France et Europe) et commercialise depuis 2016 des accessoires vin et rangements de bouteille qui s'adressent aux professionnels du vin et aux particuliers qui ont une cave. Leur originalité et leur praticité apportent chaque jour à tous les amoureux du vin un plaisir visuel et une gestion de cave facilitée.

L'entreprise a lancé en 2022 sa gamme MA CAVE INNOVANTE qui regroupe désormais l'ensemble des innovations à destination de la cave ou de la cuisine :

Pour les professionnels (viticulteurs, cavistes, enseignes de magasin dans le bricolage, l'art de la table et des accessoires cuisine, ainsi que le réseau CHR) : 
* CLIPOCOL pour l'affichage infos/prix intelligent à cliper sur vos bouteilles avec 25 modèles d'affichettes interchangeables
* WINE SHOW pour la présentation des bouteilles en magasin sur un support personnalisé à vos couleurs 
* CRAZY WINE RACK pour la réalisation de vos casiers à bouteille muraux sur mesure
* WINE DROP notre égouttoir pour verres à vin repliable pour égoutter et sécher tous les verres en toute tranquilité sans casse

Pour les particuliers comme pour les professionnels  : CLIPOGOULO se fixe sur la bouteille, CLIPOBACK sur le "cul" de bouteille et la barre CLIPETIK sur le casier à bouteilles métallique à 5 emplacements par rangée. Ces 3 supports d'identification des bouteilles permettent d'identifier / visualiser les vins sans les bouger ! 
Des étiquettes réversibles et imputrescibles sont utilisées pour s'adapter aux conditions de conservation.

La particularité de SCANWINE est d'être engagée depuis sa création dans une philosophie d'entreprise tournée vers l'inclusion du handicap par le travail : nous sommes heureux de bénéficier d'un partenariat irréprochable de l'ESAT Sésame Services pour préparer , conditionner et expédier tous nos produits !

Wir lieben es, neue Ideen auszuprobieren, uns weiterzuentwickeln und dabei immer den Kunden im Blick zu haben.

Das Besondere an HAGEL? Bei uns arbeitet niemand allein. Teamarbeit steht bei uns im Mittelpunkt. Egal, ob wir in den 11 modernen Friseurlounges oder in der Zentrale tätig sind, jeder von uns bringt seine Stärken ein und trägt dazu bei, dass HAGEL zu einem der führenden Unternehmen im Beauty-Bereich geworden ist. Name: dok.ua, інтернет-магазин автозапчастин
Description:
dok.ua — автозапчастини без сумнівів.

Ми — інтернет-магазин автозапчастин і автотоварів в Україні. Щодня допомагаємо водіям робити впевнений вибір серед понад 12 мільйонів деталей для всіх марок і моделей авто.

Що нас відрізняє?
Ми були першими, хто поставив сервіс у категорії на перше місце: експертно підбираємо автозапчастини, перевіряємо кожне замовлення і пояснюємо зрозумілою мовою.
Ми одержимі деталями: від підбору до доставки дбаємо, щоб клієнт відчував впевненість на кожному кроці.
Ми щодня вдосконалюємось, бо очікування клієнтів зростають — і ми завжди залишаємося на крок попереду.

Наші цінності — експертність, чесність і турбота.
Наша місія — зробити вибір автозапчастин впевненим.
Наша візія — сервіс, який стає «невидимим»: клієнт навіть не думає про деталі, бо знає — усе вже вирішено.

 dok.ua — лідер, який перетворив покупку автозапчастин на сервіс без сумнівів.

Name: Work Away Box
Description:
Work Away Box | Care Packages for FIFO Life
Perth, Western Australia | Gift Box Service | Supporting Mental Health on Site
About Us
Work Away Box is an Australian-owned subscription box created by a FIFO family for anyone working away from home. Whether you’re in mining, construction, oil and gas, or remote healthcare, our monthly care packages are designed to bring a little comfort, connection, and mental health support to life on site.
Born out of lived experience, we know firsthand the emotional toll of long swings, missing home, disconnection from family and the need for small luxuries that make camp life more bearable. Each box is filled with Aussie-made self-care products, thoughtful treats, and wellness essentials to remind our customers that they’re never far from home.
Our Boxes Include:
• Women in Mining Box – practical comfort and indulgence
• FIFO Family Box – designed to help families reconnect across the distance
• The Bloke Box – packed with no-fuss essentials
Our Mission
To support the FIFO lifestyle with products that prioritise mental health, emotional wellbeing, family connection and the power of feeling seen even when you’re far from home.
Let’s Connect
Looking to collaborate, feature our products in your workplace, or send care to someone on site? Visit www.workawaybox.com or drop us a message. We’d love to hear from you.

Name: Jollibee UK
Description:
Over 1,400 stores and counting…
Jollibee is famous across the world for delicious crispy fried chicken and fast-food classics with a tropical twist. Founded in 1978 by Tony Tan Caktiong in the Philippines, the company was built up from humble ice cream store beginnings, then later on expanded to hot food. Jollibee quickly became the market leader in the Philippines’ fast food industry and by 1998, was a globally successful business. The brand continues to be owned by Jollibee Group with over 1,400 locations across Asia, Europe, the US and the UK.

Jollibee serves up the crispiest, juiciest and tastiest fried chicken around, with a diverse menu including Jollibee Chicken Sandwich, hotdogs, fries, desserts and refreshing drinks. Chickenjoy is our signature dish based on the family’s special recipe, hand-breaded in store for extra crispiness. Another favourite is Jolly Spaghetti, made with a Filipino inspired sweet-style sauce, loaded with layers of cheese and hot dog slices. These unique dishes have earned the brand a cult following around the globe, from Hong Kong to New York and now here in the UK.

Parent company, Jollibee Group, now has over 5,800 stores globally and operates in 33 countries. In the U.S., Jollibee Group owns the major food brands Smashburger and The Coffee Bean & Tea Leaf. The company also owns the Filipino franchise for Burger King. To this day, Jollibee still outperforms both McDonald’s and KFC in the Philippines.

Looking to the future, Jollibee intends to open 50 stores in the UK by 2025, with further plans to expand in Italy, Spain and other European markets.

Name: SAS Flowine
Description:
Flowine est né d’une volonté commune de faire découvrir et partager notre passion pour l’univers des vins. C’est le fruit d’un travail de réflexion et de préparation de près de 18 mois qui nous a permis de concrétiser notre projet de tour du monde des vins au début de l’année 2022.

Durant près de six mois, nous avons eu la chance de découvrir 28 régions viticoles au cœur de sept pays producteurs. Nous avons débuté notre voyage par la découverte du vignoble australien avant de nous rendre en Amérique du Sud pour y visiter les principaux terroirs du Chili, de l’Argentine, de l’Uruguay, de la Bolivie et du Pérou. Enfin, nous avons terminé notre périple par un passage aux Etats-Unis.

Cette expérience hors du commun nous a offert la possibilité de rencontrer plus de 500 acteurs de la filière viticole à travers le monde. Ces instants de partage nous ont permis de mieux comprendre les spécificités de leurs terroirs, la complexité de leurs marchés et les problématiques auxquelles ils doivent faire face au quotidien.

Tout au long de notre voyage, nous avons communiqué sur les réseaux sociaux pour partager notre aventure. Cela nous a donné la possibilité de mettre en avant le travail d’exception réalisé au quotidien par ces hommes et ces femmes pour magnifier leurs terroirs.

Forts de cette expérience, nous avons décidé d’offrir une nouvelle orientation à Flowine en devenant distributeur de vins du monde sur le territoire français. Désormais, nous souhaitons assurer un rôle d’ambassadeur pour les propriétés viticoles qui nous ont le plus marqué au cours de notre voyage.

Name: Macalat
Description:
Macalat is set to redefine and disrupt the chocolate industry with a new category, Organic Sweet Dark Chocolate. The innovative creation introduces a completely new category of bitter-free 70% sweet dark chocolate, offering a delightful superfood-infused experience that transcends the limitations of traditional craft bean-to-bar dark chocolates.

By incorporating a new flavorless Fermented Mushroom Mycelium Extract, developed by mushroom ingredient innovator, MycoTechnology, Macalat successfully eliminates bitterness and astringency, revealing a full spectrum of cacao and superfood flavors that leave no unpleasant mouth feel or aftertaste. This innovative mushroom ingredient revolutionizes the chocolate experience, without the need for sugar, revealing an unparalleled chocolate taste sensation.

Certified Organic sugar-free, Macalat presents a host of impressive features, including 70% Peruvian Cacao, a plant-based superfood composition, zero-net carbs, and finally, freedom from bitterness. With its wholesome superfood attributes, Macalat stands as a testament to the future of chocolate innovation. The benefits of 70% cacao are emerging as the healthiest way of consuming chocolate. The final dark chocolate barrier for most consumers is addressed. Superfoodie consumers may have it both ways, now. The end of bitterness AND the end of sugar. 

Combining the velvety smoothness of perfectly tempered 70% Peruvian Cacao with other plant-based superfood inclusions such as Maca, Lucuma, Vanilla, Monk Fruit, and Cinnamon, Macalat captivates with its gentle and unique caramel-like sweetness. The addition of the remarkable mushroom extract ensures a smooth and sweet finish, devoid of any bitterness or harshness. The mushroom ingredient is not sweet, itself, but works like alchemy on the taste buds. Truly incredible. 

The brand’s fitting battle cry is “Tasting is Believing!"

Fabio Cordella, il fondatore del team è un uomo di sport e discendente di una famiglia storica di viticoltori che sin dal 1911 allevano gli straordinari vigneti salentini.
E’ stato il suo desiderio di unire questi mondi così diversi ma nello stesso tempo così vicini che ha consentito di scrivere la straordinaria storia di The Wine of The Champions.
Ogni vino parla del proprio campione in quanto ognuno di loro ha lavorato accanto agli enologi per realizzare il vino più in linea con il proprio carattere e le proprie aspettative gustative.
E’ iniziata una nuova partita, che non si gioca nel campo da calcio, ma nelle tavole degli appassionati di vino, in tutto il mondo.

Engagés, nous vous proposons des algues fraîches salées, des algues déshydratées en paillettes ou des algues en poudre pour toutes les qualités nutritives et environnementales exceptionnelles qu’elles apportent, autant pour l’Homme que pour la Nature.

Nous créons et imaginons des produits à base d’algues et de plantes sauvages locales, comme le Sel Étoilé, les Pépites (gomasio), thé des sirènes et chocolat pour illuminer et ioder vos papilles. Notre ambition : mettre des algues françaises dans chaque assiette !

Hep Ken est une entreprise éthique qui s'engage auprès de ses producteurs exclusivement bretons. Name: LABEVI
Description:
Sviluppiamo prodotti alimentari a base di frutta e verdura e crioessiccate.

Labevi è un preparato in polvere per frullato a base di sole frutta e verdura. Pronto in meno di un minuto.
Senza conservanti.
Senza zuccheri aggiunti.

Senza scuse.

Senza "Sbatti"

1 persona su 10, in Italia, non consuma abbastanza alimenti vegetali. 
La tendenza del 2021, inoltre, vede una preoccupante diminuzione degli acquisti di ortofrutta. 

Noi abbiamo reinventato frutta e verdura per rendere facile l'aggiunta di 2 porzioni di questi alimenti alla routine giornaliera. 

Siamo sostenitori della crioessiccazione, un processo che permette l'eliminazione dell'acqua dagli alimenti mantenendone pressoché inalterate le proprietà organolettiche e i valori nutrizionali.

Gli alimenti crioessiccati, grazie ad una shelf life che può arrivare fino a due anni senza utilizzo di conservanti, sono un valido mezzo per diminuire gli sprechi individuali. 

Non solo, possono contribuire a recuperare alimenti che andrebbero buttati ancora prima di arrivare al consumatore finale.

Description:

Présent partout en Europe et à travers 15 pays dans le Monde, nous avons trois créneaux de distribution : La vente en gros B2B, la vente en B2C dans nos propres magasins et la vente en ligne.

Fondée en 1979, Concorde Love propose à ses débuts de la vente par correspondance d'articles pour adultes, puis très rapidement se développe en CONCORDE PRO, devenant ainsi le premier grossiste fournisseur des sex-shops européens.

En janvier 1993, l'entreprise se démocratise totalement l'univers adultes en créant un nouveau concept de magasin "Les Supermarchés du Sexe". La clientèle déambule dans les rayons avec un caddie... Le succès est au rendez-vous.

Puis, quelques années après, sous l'impulsion du phénomène "Sex and The City", une mutation profonde de la demande se fait sentir. Les magasins se transforment en boutiques glamour dites CONCORDE LOVE STORE, pour une clientèle devenue décomplexée.

En 2010, Richard FHAL, PDG ouvre un nouvel espace atypique et convivial en proposant une programmation culturelle variée. De nombreux artistes internationaux exposent leurs œuvres ; peintures, sculptures et photographies suggestives ont fait de CONCORDE ART GALLERY une référence dans le monde de l'Art Érotique à Paris.

Name: TheUnderCovers
Description:
Welcome to the most captivating literary revolution of our era!
We extend our warmest invitation to join us in realizing a bookstore dedicated exclusively to self-published authors.
This is not merely a campaign; it's a groundbreaking movement, and your support is the key to making it a reality.


Our Vision
In a world where a handful of publishing giants dominate the literary landscape, many independent authors find themselves silenced, unheard, and overlooked. These authors have deliberately chosen self-publishing to unleash their stories without the constraints imposed by traditional publishing.
We understand the importance of creative freedom and the need to share diverse, unique voices with the world. Our vision is to rewrite the rules, level the playing field, and bestow self-published authors with the recognition they genuinely deserve.

The Dream

Our vision transcends a single bookstore-cafe; we aspire to create a network of self-published author bookstores, commencing in the UK and expanding across the United States. These establishments will serve as beacons for storytellers who might otherwise remain undiscovered and for readers seeking fresh, original narratives.


Cafe at "The Under Covers"
Where Words and Brews Unite
Step into the heart of our bookstore, and you'll discover more than just books. Our cafe is a cozy sanctuary where literary enthusiasts and casual readers come together over exceptional coffee, fine teas, sweets, and a selection of quality wines.
Whether you're delving into a self-published masterpiece, meeting an author, or simply seeking a tranquil space to savor your favorite brew, our cafe is the perfect spot to unwind, connect, and celebrate the power of storytelling. Enjoy a cup of inspiration at "The Under Covers."

Why your Support Matters
By supporting this campaign, you're not merely endorsing a project; you're championing a movement.

You're advocating for creative independence!

Name: ETERNAL
Description:
The Upcoming Revolution in QSRs: E-commerce and the Dawn of "ETERNAL". 

The QSR industry is undergoing a major transformation, driven by evolving consumer expectations and digital innovation. As e-commerce reshapes the traditional model, this shift is more than a trend—it's a revolution redefining how we engage with fast food.  For years, QSRs have focused on optimizing in-store efficiency and drive-through speed. However, the rise of on-demand delivery, personalized digital experiences, and the sheer convenience of online ordering has irrevocably shifted consumer behavior. Today's customers demand seamless integration between the digital and physical worlds, expecting the same level of speed and customization online as they do in person.  

The fusion of QSR and e-commerce unlocks new possibilities. Digital platforms enable restaurants to extend beyond physical locations, offering customized menus, targeted deals, and seamless ordering. Imagine tracking your burger’s preparation in real-time and receiving it exactly when you want—all from your smartphone. This revolution goes beyond convenience—it's about deeper customer connections. E-commerce enables QSRs to analyze preferences, personalize offers, and boost loyalty through AI-driven insights and app-integrated programs.

Leading this transformation is ETERNAL, backed by TBM - The Brand Makers. More than a delivery platform, ETERNAL is a comprehensive ecosystem that helps QSRs seamlessly integrate e-commerce, optimize ordering, streamline logistics, and build a strong digital presence.

ETERNAL is shaping the future of QSRs with a unified, omnichannel experience. By equipping restaurants with cutting-edge technology, ETERNAL is revolutionizing fast food—where convenience, personalization, and seamless integration redefine quick-service dining. 

Join us in leading this new era!

Name: El Patio Foods
Description:
Before Austin was the city many know it as today – long before SXSW and Austin
City Limits, before Farrah Fawcett, Janis Joplin or Matthew McConaughey ever
attended the University of Texas, before Whole Foods was even an idea, and even
before I-35 was built – stood a small diner on the north end of The Drag.

In 1954, the Joseph family began serving traditional Tex Mex dishes to Austin locals. And while over the last 70 years, high-rises and newer, ‘less local’ businesses have taken the place of former Austin establishments, El Patio has remained an Austin staple, still in its original location on The Drag.

So much more than a restaurant, El Patio is a symbol for the community it serves, a place that honors its family history and celebrates generational relationships. It’s a compilation of stories that speak to the warm, inclusive atmosphere and those who’ve made it what it is today.

Looking forward, the El Patio brand has the opportunity to breathe new life into a
70-year-old business, creating a bridge from the past to the present to the future always building upon its rich family legacy and deep Austin roots. The goal is to take what’s been handed down through generations, and create a brand name that goes beyond Austin (and eventually Texas) – to becoming a household food brand name nationwide.

Kjo kompani ka filluar aktivitetin e saj me nje kapanon me 32000 krere pula për prodhim vezësh dhe është rritur e zgjeruar duke ndjekur metodën e përmirësimit konstant dhe të vazhdueshëm në cdo veprim - që nga përparimet në teknikat e proceseve të ndryshme deri tek qëndrimi ndaj konsumatorëve, si dhe nga filozofitë më themelore të manaxhimit e deri tek punësimi i një fuqie punëtore me kualifikim të lartë.

Sot kompania numeron 330,000 krere pula qe mbareshtrohen ne pese kapanone dhe 150,000 krere zogj qe mbareshtrohen ne dy kapanone.

Name: Before All is Said and Done by Pat Miles
Description:
The notion of planning for one’s death is intrinsically at odds with our human instinct to avoid considering our own mortality. Although we may contemplate the grief that our life’s impermanence would cause to our loved ones, we seldom consider the myriad of emotional and legal issues that can arise afterward.

Before All Is Said and Done begins with the experience of author Pat Miles Zimmerman and her husband, Charles “Bucky” Zimmerman. Pat and Bucky were fully set for life but, regrettably, not set for death.

After Bucky’s death from an abrupt and short illness, Pat found herself with a plate full of unanticipated emotions, decisions, and legal problems.

But, as she spoke with other widows, she learned she was not alone in finding herself adrift after losing a spouse. The shock and grief that erupt from the loss of someone dearly beloved do not create a state of mind fit for navigating the numerous challenges that follow an unexpected death.

Before All Is Said and Done dutifully and courageously confronts a challenging topic head-on — planning for one’s death. In helping readers navigate the pitfalls of death and dying, it’s a book that will prepare us for the often ignored problems that run in tandem with somber situations:

The shock of loss and what to expect
Planning for a sudden death or a prolonged illness
Facing a potential cognitive decline
Finding support and healthy grieving during a complex time
Connecting with ethical and morally sound attorneys/lawyers
Family disputes and blended family issues
Caring for yourself after the loss

In addition to Pat’s personal story, the book includes accounts and advice through the lens of widows and widowers, attorneys, doctors, financial advisors, and many other experts.

Although we may initially shirk away from the notion of our life’s transience, it is powerfully beneficial to ready ourselves and our loved ones for every stage of life — and death.

Name: samova GmbH & Co. KG
Description:
Since 2002, samova has stood for a modern tea culture that brings people together.
Born from a passion for exceptional tea and herbal specialties, we unite cultural diversity, sustainability, and design into a holistic experience of enjoyment.

Founded by Esin Rager, who has called Washington D.C., Ankara, Moscow, Vienna, Paris, Amsterdam, and Hamburg home, samova reflects her vision of an open-minded, creative tea culture – inspired by encounters, stories, and taste.

Our teas and herbal blends are created under fair, environmentally responsible conditions and made from the finest organic ingredients. Every component is regularly tested by an independent institute – ensuring uncompromising quality and trust in every cup.

Visually, samova also makes a statement: honored with the red dot Design Award, the Art Directors Club Award, and the Hamburger Designpreis, our packaging embodies the harmony of style and sustainability.

But samova is more than tea – it’s a mindset.
We believe in friendship, mindfulness, and creative diversity. Whether at a dance tea, a workshop, or simply while enjoying a cup together, samova creates moments that warm both heart and mind.

Sustainable. Open-minded. Flavorful.
That’s samova – modern tea culture from Hamburg.

Name: De Witte Zwaan
Description:
De Witte Zwaan brandt koffie sinds 1902, voor iedereen. 
In onze winkel in Eeklo vind je zowel classic blends als specialty coffee. Daarbij kun je in onze bar een heerlijke koffie drinken. In de Roastery in Zomergem wordt de koffie gebrand. Hier verwelkomen we je, na afspraak, om een workshop te volgen of een blik te geven achter de schermen.

ONZE MISSIE
De beste koffie presenteren. Dat is de essentie. Onze klanten helpen dit doel te bereiken is ons streven. Want koffie, daar draait het om bij De Witte Zwaan. Daar zit onze kennis, dát is onze passie. 
We doen wat we graag doen en dat is een luxe. Het geeft ons de vrijheid om echt te zijn. Puur. Op zakelijk en persoonlijk vlak. Zo maken wij het verschil.

COFFEE AS YOU ARE
We luisteren aandachtig naar jou zodat we kunnen meedenken en meeschrijven aan jouw verhaal. Zo maken we de juiste koffiekeuzes. We adviseren niet alleen welk pad geschikt is voor jou, maar ook hoe je op je bestemming geraakt. We helpen je graag groeien en gaan daarvoor tot het uiterste. Ons engagement is groot. We verwachten datzelfde ook van jou. 

ONZE PASSIE
Drive en passie zijn onontbeerlijk om het koffieverhaal te begrijpen. Van specialty koffies, onze signatuur, tot blends van diverse origines en farmers. Niet enkel de inhoud is van belang, maar ook de beleving, de verpakking,... elk detail telt.

WEES WELKOM
We nodigen je graag uit in onze nieuwe branderij. Je komt er thuis, op alle vlakken. Je vindt er producten die bij je passen en de expertise en adviezen die je vooruithelpen. 

De Witte Zwaan is een ontmoetingsplaats waar gelijkgestemde koffieprofessionelen en -liefhebbers samenkomen om ervaringen en momenten te delen Een plaats waar workshops, rondleidingen, teambuildingactiviteiten of individuele ontmoetingen je inspiratie geven. Dat zet deuren open voor nieuwe verhalen. 
Ook al nemen we ons vak heel serieus, er is steeds ruimte voor wat fun met koffie. 

Let's connect!

- économies 
- réduction de l’impact environnemental 
- et satisfaction personnelle ?

Notre entreprise a pour objectif de guider, fournir les ressources et d'accompagner la montée en compétences pour pouvoir fabriquer par soi-même ses biens de consommation.

Trois composantes à prévoir sur notre site (et oui, nous nous lançons) : 

 Des produits, kits et ressources,
 De l'accompagnement, des tutos et des ateliers à réaliser avec des professionnels proches de chez vous, 
 Un forum d'échange sur les alternatives écologiques déployables à nos échelles de particuliers.

Pour donner quelques exemples, vous pourrez trouver des produits faciles d'accès comme des kits pour faire son fromage, mais aussi des produits plus complexes comme un kit pour installer ses propres panneaux solaires jusqu'aux guides pour pour réaliser ses propres Lowtech.

Description:

L’objectif est de réunir en un seul lieu, une cave à vin, une épicerie fine et un restaurant ! Vous l’avez donc compris, vous pouvez venir chez nous déguster un bon plat dans notre restaurant puis partir à la conquête de nos bons produits locaux au cœur de notre épicerie et enfin retrouver vos vins et spiritueux préférés de la région Occitane.
Le Caviste Gourmand propose près de 800 références de vins et spiritueux, ce qui en fait la plus grande cave d’Occitanie.
Un espace est également dédié aux champagnes, spiritueux (rhums, whisky, cognac, etc) et aux bières.
Depuis toujours, la politique de la maison reste la même : présenter nos produits au prix le plus bas du marché.
Côté épicerie, on apprécie la charcuterie et la viande fraîche, les conserves et les plats préparés, les fromages et bien d’autres. Mais toujours issus de producteurs locaux.
Vous trouverez aussi des produits de la mer, des olives, huiles, tapenades et toute une sélection de tartinables.
Pour les plus gourmands, chocolats, gâteaux, confitures et spécialités régionales.
Vous trouverez également des produits de beauté, savons, gels douches et crèmes au lait d’ânesse : bonne mine garantie !

We're shaking up the dessert scene with our unique Halo-Halo preparation, where we freeze and shave milk instead of ice, resulting in a creamier dessert. Our Halo-Halo features only premium ingredients, with our Royal Halo Halo variant even boasting a 24 Karat gold topping.

We've made a name for ourselves with our advanced packaging and delivery system, ensuring our products arrive frozen or we offer a money-back guarantee. Since July 2021, we've become the most viral food brand in Metro Manila, with millions of views on social media platforms like TikTok and Facebook.

Our fully automated ordering system integrates with Facebook Messenger, providing a seamless experience for our customers. With over 200,000 followers on Facebook in less than two years, our strong social media presence speaks volumes about our brand's popularity.

Our customers love us, hailing Bebang HaloHalo as the most delicious and innovative Halo-Halo in the market. We're recognized for our aesthetically pleasing presentation.

With our brand colors of emerald green and gold, we symbolize quality, joyfulness, and authenticity. Our youthful, creative, and high-spirited brand persona resonates well with our primary audience - women aged between 23 and 45.

We're big on content creation. Our success on social media platforms is a testament to our commitment to engaging, fun, and enjoyable content.

From our humble beginnings in Mandaluyong, we're on a mission to make Bebang HaloHalo accessible to every Filipino, both nationally and internationally. Our vision? To make Bebang HaloHalo synonymous with Halo-Halo, becoming the first brand that pops in mind when thinking of this delightful and uniquely Filipino dessert.

JMRS is an open access journal that promotes excellence and collaboration in international medical radiation science through the publication of contemporary and advanced multidisciplinary research that encourages the adoption of the best clinical, scientific and educational practices.

JMRS is the official professional journal of the Australian Society of Medical Imaging and Radiation Therapy (ASMIRT) and NZSMIRT (formerly NZIMRT).

Name: Agora Models
Description:
Agora Models is a partnership to some of the leading businesses in the model building industry.

We have three simple objectives:
1. To produce premium quality models
2. To ensure our customers feel valued
3. To build a valued global modelling community

We 3D scan the original vehicles using cutting-edge laser technology to create intricate computer models. These are then inspected by the source company (e.g. Shelby American, Inc. checked and approved our GT500 Super Snake). It takes us four months of detailed design to get to this stage; another two months to create the precision moulds required (there can be up to 200 moulds per model, some weighing over a ton!). After six months of research and development, plus several hundred thousands of dollars spent, we're ready to start production.

Our market is the whole world and we seek partnerships with the best and most trusted companies in our supply chain. Our distribution operation delivers globally out of five hubs around the globe: Australia, EU, Japan, USA & UK.

We look for innovative ideas and fresh partnership agreements to bring a wide range of museum-quality models to the market.

Agora Models works with leading brands such as James Bond, Transformers, Shelby, Aston Martin, Jaguar and Boeing.

Description:
En Granja, somos una cadena de tiendas innovadoras y comprometidas con ofrecer productos frescos y de calidad, diseñados para satisfacer las necesidades de nuestros clientes. Con más de 5 años de trayectoria en el mercado, nos hemos consolidado como una empresa cercana y confiable para las comunidades donde operamos.

Contamos con una estructura dinámica y funcional, con tiendas diseñadas para garantizar una experiencia de compra ágil y eficiente, desde una rápida entrada y salida hasta la visualización clara de nuestros productos. Nuestros valores se centran en la integridad, el respeto, innovación, alegría, simplicidad y la calidad de servicio, los cuales aplicamos no solo en la atención al cliente, sino también en el desarrollo de nuestros equipos de trabajo.

¿Qué nos hace únicos?

•Portafolio de productos exclusivos: Ofrecemos una línea propia llamada "Granja", que incluye alimentos de alta rotación como granos, harinas y productos frescos, con la mejor relación calidad-precio.

•Innovación en procesos: Nuestros cajeros y equipos operativos están capacitados para garantizar un proceso rápido y eficiente, reflejando nuestro compromiso con la innovación en la experiencia del cliente.

•Presencia en la comunidad: Además de nuestros servicios en tienda, contamos con una línea de atención directa para nuestros vecinos, asegurando una relación cercana y responsable.

Nuestra expansión:

Actualmente operamos 15 sucursales en el estado Carabobo, incluyendo un centro de distribución y un corporativo central. Estamos en un emocionante proceso de crecimiento, lo que nos posiciona como un referente del sector retail en Venezuela.

Por qué trabajar con nosotros:

•Desarrollo profesional: Ofrecemos oportunidades de crecimiento y capacitación para todos nuestros colaboradores.

•Ambiente laboral: En Granja promovemos la colaboración, el respeto y la inclusión como pilares fundamentales de nuestro equipo.

Para Granja, tu talento hace la diferencia!

Name: Yoisho matcha
Description:
OUR JOURNEY
How it al started.... Cecile and Merel met each other over matcha and became best friends. Our matcha dates were our time to catch up and get to know each other even better. We were into matcha, but we didn't know about the different qualities, the rituals and why people choose matcha over coffee. We are both not a big coffee fan but like to take the moment to catch up and explore new places to have the 'coffee' moment. We both feel that after our cup of coffee, we rather feel anxious and not per se higher in energy. That's when we started to look into the different kinds of matcha, different kind of qualities and also the origin. We wanted to create something that will not only help people fall in love with matcha and the taste of it, but also something that is ethically produced in Japan.

That is were Yoisho was born, a high quality, ceremonial grade matcha from Japan. We choose the highest grade and wanted the product to be well made, in the traditional way. Our matcha has a soft taste and has no bitter after taste or what so ever. A matcha you can drink every day, to make you feel good, energized and productive.

Além de tudo isso, ministramos cursos de Hambúrguer, Churrasco Básico e Avançado. Realizamos todo tipo de evento em nossa unidade no Itaim Bibi, mas caso prefira um lugar diferente ou até mesmo a sua casa, levamos a experiência Feed até você!

Name: Octopus Services
Description:
Notre mission est de simplifier le commerce en ligne pour les industriels et les consommateurs en permettant d’accélérer la diversification de l’activation digitale et l’expédition en 48h des marques du quotidien. 

Les changements d’habitudes de consommation (eco-friendly, traçabilité, seconde main, omnicanalité, livraison immédiate, E-commerce …) impliquent une agilité aigue pour les industriels afin de s’adapter à ce marché en perpétuel changement. Nous avons la conviction qu’il est plus efficace pour ces marques d’externaliser ces opérations techniques à des partenaires spécialisés tel Octopus Services. 

En parallèle, le phénomène commercial « marketplace » complexifie cette obligation de transformation digitale. D’un point de vue consommateur, la marketplace devient un canal de destination pesant ainsi 20% du E-commerce en Europe. Les retailers saisissent cette opportunité pour améliorer leur offre et leur coût opérationnel ce qui amène à une transformation de leur modèle digital vers un modèle hybride qui accorde de plus en plus de place aux revendeurs tiers (3P vs 1P) pour accélérer ce changement. 

Face à cette urgence économique, il devient impératif pour les grandes entreprises comme pour les enseignes E-commerce de faire appel à des partenaires extérieurs (3P) capables de leur apporter cette agilité et expertise opérationnelle qui leur fait défaut et ainsi exécuter cette transformation digitale. 

Pour ce faire, Octopus Services (acteur 3P) offre une solution de transformation digitale automatisée pour le développement en ligne des marques avec une spécialisation sur le canal marketplaces.

Priorisant les implantations dans les immeubles neufs tout en restant attentif aux opportunités dans l’existant, Moonshot Distribution souhaite redonner ses lettres de noblesse au commerce alimentaire de quartier.

Name: MyLittleHero
Description:
Il avait 6 ans.
On lui a offert un livre. Il a lu 3 pages. Puis il a dit :

“C’est pas moi ça… c’est toujours les autres les héros.”

Et là, on a compris :
 Les enfants ne lisent pas juste des histoires.
Ils veulent se voir dedans.
Ils veulent devenir les héros de leur propre vie.

 Une étude menée auprès de 2 000 enfants montre :

91 % sont plus engagés quand ils s’identifient au personnage principal.
Mais dans la majorité des livres, ils sont absents. Invisibles.

“Les enfants deviennent ce qu’on leur répète chaque soir.”

Alors on a créé My Little Hero : une collection de livres personnalisés puissants, pour les enfants de 1 à 9 ans.
Des histoires construites pour renforcer l’estime, la confiance, l’intelligence émotionnelle… et l’amour de la lecture.

Chaque livre contient :
 L’enfant en héros
 Son prénom, son apparence, son doudou
 Un message personnalisé des parents
 Une problématique forte : séparation, peur, confiance…
 Des défis simples à faire à la maison
 Une morale claire
 Une comptine personnalisée
 Validé par des psych
Nos livres sont adaptés à chaque tranche d'âge, avec des thématiques et un vocabulaire conçus pour correspondre au développement et aux besoins de chaque enfant.

Notre mission est d'aider les enfants à découvrir leurs forces et à se développer émotionnellement et intellectuellement à travers des aventures ludiques, engageantes et éducatives. 

Nous proposons :

Des Livres de Développement Personnel Personnalisés 
Des Aventures Magiques Adaptées à Votre Enfant 
Des Histoires qui Enseignent des Valeurs comme la Gentillesse, le Courage et la Résilience 

Avec My Little Hero, le nom, les traits et la personnalité de votre enfant sont intégrés dans chaque histoire, faisant de chaque livre un voyage unique et inoubliable. Ensemble, nous aidons les parents à nourrir des héros en herbe confiants, curieux et compatissants. 

Inspirons la prochaine génération de héros, une histoire à la fois !

Description:

Take the Negroni for example. It’s been on the menu of fine dining since the1919s, enjoyed before a meal is brought out. A cocktail that creeps into your heart, a Negroni is equal parts gin, Campari, and sweet vermouth.

Your wardrobe should hold the same qualities, a story of who you are. And we want that for you!

That is why we’ve created a cocktail-inspired brand with a collection of the top-shelf basics you’ll need to mix and match with other pieces, adding a real flair to your entire look.

Name: vectraline.hu
Description:
Mit érdemes rólunk tudni?

A VECTRALINE a hazai irodaellátási piac egyik meghatározó szereplője. Vállalatunk elsősorban irodaszerek és kapcsolódó irodai kellékek értékesítésével foglalkozik nagykereskedelmi viszonteladó partnerein keresztül, valamint igényfelmérésen alapuló egyedi munkahelyi megoldásokkal segíti a vállalkozásokat és fogyasztókat. Működésünk alapja az, hogy a személyes kapcsolattartáson alapuló értékesítési rendszerünket az e-kereskedelemmel ötvözve összehangoltan működtessük.

Telephelyünk Mogyoródon az M3 autópálya lehajtójánál található, ahol 5.000 m2-es telephelyen, 3.300 m2-es modern raktár-iroda bázisból szolgáljuk ki a viszonteladó partnereinket, az irodákat és fogyasztókat. Tevékenységünket az MSZ EN ISO 9001-2015 és az MSZ EN ISO 14001-2015 minőségbiztosítási rendszerek szabályai szerint végezzük. Szigorú belső minősítési rendszerünk biztosítja azt, hogy kizárólag a legjobb beszállítók termékeit forgalmazzuk. Jelenleg több, mint 600+ gyártó 20.000+ féle terméke érhető el, folyamatosan frissített és bővített választékkal. Kiváló minőségű termékeinkkel és komplex szolgáltatásainkkal hozzájáruljunk a több, mint 10.000+ aktív partnerünk üzleti eredményéhez.

Mivel foglalkozunk?

Termékkínálatunkban minden olyan iroda üzemeltetéséhez szükséges termék megtalálható, ami az irodák napi működéséhez teljeskörűen szükségesek. Kínálatunkban több ezer papír-írószer, irodaszer, nyomtatvány, számítás,- és irodatechnikai termék, irodabútor, élelmiszer, tisztítószer és higiéniai termék található meg. Választékunkban egyaránt elérhető a professzionális felső-, valamint a közép- és alacsonyabb árkategóriába tartozó termékek.

We are an online Mediterranean boutique offering a carefully curated collection of products from the sunny Greek island of Crete. Our mission is to bring the authentic sights, sounds, scents, tastes and textures of the Mediterranean to your doorstep, while also highlighting and supporting local artisans and producers in Crete.

At Creta Autentica, we believe that our products reflect this way of life. We have carefully selected each item in our collection to ensure that it meets our high standards for quality and authenticity. Our products are made with care and respect for the environment, celebrating a tradition that has been passed down from generation to generation.

We are proud to share a wide range of products, including Mediterranean nutrition, textiles, and skincare products. Each item is unique and tells a story of the rich cultural heritage of Crete. Our skincare items are made with natural ingredients, such as local olive oil, herbs, and honey, which have been used for centuries for their nourishing and healing properties.  We offer high quality extra virgin olive oil products and herbal teas and honeys harvested responsibly and sustainably, whose freshness and fragrances will help transport you to the sunny Mediterranean Island of Crete no matter where you are in the world.

We believe that our products are more than just items to be bought and sold. They are a way to connect with the Mediterranean and its rich culture and traditions. When you purchase from Creta Autentica, you are not just buying a product, you are supporting a way of life that values quality, tradition, and respect for the environment.

Name: Durham County ABC
Description:
The Durham County ABC Board was organized under the provisions of the Pasqoutank Act in 1937 and implemented by a county wide vote on May 15, 1937, at which time the Durham County Commissioners appointed three individuals to serve on the Board with terms of three years. In 2001, upon authorization by the State Legislature, the County Commissioners appointed two more individuals to serve on the Board bringing the total to five board members. 

As a local Board, authorized and defined by NC General Statutes, Durham County ABC is an independent local political subdivision of the State.

The Board, as provided by North Carolina Alcoholic Beverage Control laws, operates retail liquor stores and, through its law enforcement division, investigates violations of such laws. North Carolina General Statute 18B-805(c) (2) (3) requires that the Board expend at least 5% of profits for law enforcement and at least 7% of the same profits for alcohol education and rehabilitation purposes. NC Statutes also require the Board to distribute its surpluses to the General Fund of Durham County and the City of Durham, which represents a financial benefit to the County and City.

Name: Wristbuddys.com

Welcome to Wristbuddys, your go-to destination for quality watch straps & watch accessories online and through a growing network of authorized retailers. We are a fast-growing watch strap brand based in Stockholm, Sweden founded in 2020. 

We love watches and understand the importance of each timepiece being unique. Therefore, we specialize in creating watch straps that not only complement but elevate your watch's character. Our passion for quality and design permeates every product we craft.

Our range primarily includes rubber straps designed to perfectly fit some of the most prestigious watches on the market. From the Omega X Swatch MoonSwatch to the Rolex Submariner, we aim to offer watch straps that are not just an accessory but an extension of your watch's identity.

We take pride in being among the leading companies globally in rubber band manufacturing. Every detail and material is carefully chosen to ensure the highest quality and durability. We use the finest materials to create products that are not only aesthetically pleasing but also robust enough to withstand your lifestyle.

We strive to make your experience with Wristbuddys as seamless as possible. With fast worldwide delivery within 1-3 days and reliable service from UPS, your satisfaction is our top priority. Our dedicated customer service team is always available to answer your questions and ensure you are completely satisfied with your purchase.

Wristbuddys is more than just a brand; it's a destination for watch enthusiasts seeking the best in watch straps. Explore our range and let us be your companion on the journey to giving your watch a personal touch. Welcome to Wristbuddys, where every watch tells its unique story.

Name: Grow with Iris
Description:
Grow with Iris: Free From plant-based growing up drink.
A fortified milk alternative that's been nutritionally tailored for children aged 12 months - 4 years, it can also be enjoyed by bigger kids too.

Free from 6 major allergens: Milk, gluten, egg, soya, tree nuts & peanuts, and lactose-free. We also choose not to use any of the top 14 allergens in our recipe. 

No stabilisers, preservatives, emulsifiers or weird stuff.

Founded back in 2018 by Amy, allergy Mum to Iris with school friend & Creative Director Sophie. Grow with Iris was developed alongside paediatricians, dietitians, regulatory experts, food scientists and a team of toddler taste testers to bring more choice to families managing diet limitations. 

Made in the UK by two mums on a mission to change the world one sippy cup at a time.

Name: KødRiget.dk
Description:
Fordi Vi elsker mad. 
Med samlet 25 års erfaring inden for slagterfaget fra mindre, private slagter butikker, samt de største supermarkeder i Danmark, har vi valgt at starte KødRiget.dk 
Vi er din personlige slagtermester, som du altid kan komme i kontakt med og få gode råd og vejledning fra.
Vi har nøje udvalgt alle vores produkter ud fra 3 simple parametre: God smag, God dyrevelfærd og God pris. 
Vi tilbyder kvalitetskød fra både Danmark og resten af verden til super skarpe priser. 
Udover at være en online butik med salg til hele Danmark, driver vi også en fysisk slagterforretning i Hjerting. Her har du mulighed for at finde og smage på en helt masse varer fra vores sortiment af både kød, vin og specialiteter. 

Jonas Muff - Stifter af KødRiget.dk 
20 års erfaring inden for salg af kød. Både som slagtermester i landets største dagligvarekoncerner og som konsulent for slagterbutikker i hele landet. 
Jeg elsker at gøre mennesker glade igennem mad. Jeg har siden første gang jeg blev hevet i køkkenet af mine forældre, elsket mad. Nu vil jeg gerne gøre det muligt for den ”almindelige” forbruger at få madoplevelser som er ud over det sædvanlige, men til priser hvor alle kan være med.
Med min store erfaring fra grossist- og detailbranchen har jeg opbygget de relationer, der skal til for at sælge det bedste kød til de bedste priser.

Vi ønsker at være danskernes fortrukne sted at købe bedre kød med god samvittighed.

Vi er uddannede slagtere bag skærmen som altid kan være behjælpelig med tip til tilberedning eller tilbehør. Vi har ikke maskiner til at skære vores kød. 
Derfor er det også din sikkerhed at det kød du modtager har været igennem hænderne på en fagmand som ikke går på kompromis med kvaliteten.

Vi ønsker at du som almindelig forbruger og uden at være en særlig ”mad nørd” eller specialist kan handle kød hos os, og navigere i de forskellige kvaliteter, så du ender med den udskæring som passer til netop dit behov.

Velkommen til et Rige af KØD.

Name: Wino i My
Description:

Łączymy pasję do wina z nowoczesnym podejściem do sprzedaży i relacji.

Pomagamy firmom i klientom indywidualnym odkrywać smaki, historie i emocje, które kryją się w każdej butelce.

Nie jesteśmy zwykłym importerem – jesteśmy towarzyszami codzienności naszych klientów.
Pokazujemy, że wina nie trzeba pić tylko od święta – można nim celebrować codzienność, relacje i chwile.

 Nasze źródła

Importujemy wina z małych, rodzinnych winnic z Włoch, Hiszpanii, Francji, Portugalii, Niemiec i Słowenii.

Twórcy, z którymi współpracujemy, pracują z poszanowaniem natury i tradycji, a każda butelka to opowieść o miejscu i człowieku.

 Co oferujemy

1 Subskrypcja wina – winoimy.com.pl
Regularne zestawy win premium prosto pod drzwi.
Bez błądzenia po półkach, z pewnością trafionego wyboru.

2 Upominki biznesowe – winoimy.eu
Eleganckie zestawy prezentowe z winem i delikatesami.
Personalizacja, branding, wysyłka zbiorcza – pełen serwis dla firm.

3 Sklep online – winoimy.pl
Ponad 400 etykiet z butikowych winnic Europy.
Dla tych, którzy szukają jakości, nie ilości.

4 Degustacje i eventy winiarskie
Spotkania, które łączą edukację, integrację i przyjemność.

5 Dla restauracji i sklepów specjalistycznych (HoReCa & Retail)
Kompleksowa obsługa lokali gastronomicznych i punktów sprzedaży.
• Indywidualna karta win i szkolenia zespołu
• Pewność dostępności i terminowych dostaw
• Materiały POS i degustacje wspierające sprzedaż

 Dlaczego my

 Autentyczne, rzemieślnicze wina — prosto od producentów
 Relacyjne podejście — doradzamy, nie sprzedajemy
 Personalizacja i logistyka — dopasowane do potrzeb firm
 Współpraca B2B i HoReCa — stałe dostawy, szkolenia, wsparcie sprzedaży

Każda butelka to podróż, historia i pretekst do spotkania.

Jeśli szukasz autentyczności w kieliszku – jesteś we właściwym miejscu.

Name: Pal & Leo
Description:
At Pal & Leo, we believe that breakfast and snacking should be both delicious and good for you. Born in Amsterdam, our mission is simple: reinvent everyday classics by cutting out what your body doesn’t need — refined sugar, grains, seed oils — and replacing them with organic, high-quality ingredients that fuel you for real.

Our Granola Chunks are made with nuts, seeds, and whole fruit sweetness from dates. The result? Gluten-free, refined sugar-free, rich in protein and healthy fats — snacks that actually keep you energized.

Enjoy them your way: with yogurt in the morning, on top of a smoothie bowl, or straight from the bag.

What started as small-batch baking in Amsterdam is now on shelves at leading retailers across the Netherlands and the UK — from Planet Organic in London to STACH and Landmarkt in Amsterdam.

We’re here to prove that healthy doesn’t have to be boring. Pal & Leo is for people who love food, care about their health, and refuse to compromise on taste.

Description:
Come nasce Uvarara? Nasce da una mia grande passione per il nettare di Bacco. Non ero ancora maggiorenne, quando il vino ha cominciato a esercitare una prima attrazione su di me, in particolare il rosso. Quante bevute di fiaschi e borracce di novello alle pendici delle mie montagne! Con il passare degli anni si è invece fatto largo l’interesse per i vini pregiati, che mi ha portato a intensificare la ricerca e le visite a numerose cantine. Per lo più prediligevo realtà poco conosciute, che scovavo leggendo pubblicazioni qua e là su giornali e riviste dedicate all’argomento.

In questo modo ho iniziato a scoprire vini rari, spinto dalla curiosità e dallo studio dell’enologia quale autodidatta. Degustando vini di grandi etichette e partecipando a vari eventi del settore, ho costruito la mia conoscenza in materia, assecondando sempre la sensibilità del mio palato. La mia ricerca, dedicata alla scoperta di prodotti vicini alla grande qualità ma dai prezzi contenuti, mi ha portato a fondare Uvarara, la ditta che oggi rappresenta i vini che importo.

Mi sono dedicato prevalentemente al territorio francese, in particolar modo alle regioni di Bordeaux, Bourgone, Alsazia e Chatenauneuf du Pape. Nella regione di Champagne ho invece preso contatto con piccoli produttori, quasi introvabili, ma dalle cantine qualitativamente ineccepibili. Per quanto concerne l’Italia, ho prediletto i vini Toscani e Piemontesi per poi aggiungere Lombardia, Marche, Veneto, Trentino Alto Adige e Friuli Venezia Giulia. La gamma viene completata da una linea di vini Ungheresi e delle collaborazioni con piccoli produttori del Ticino.

Oggi l’azienda rappresenta ben 60 cantine con circa 300 etichette, tutte selezionate per soddisfare anche i palati più esigenti. Un lavoro durato anni, portato avanti con grande amore e passione, che vuole offrire l’opportunità a commercianti, ristoratori e amici di poter assaporare l’altissima qualità a un prezzo giusto.

Brindiamo tutti insieme!

Romolo Nottaris

We reject harmful ingredients like white sugar, white salt, red chili, palm oil, preservatives, and artificial colors. Instead, we use premium-quality, research-backed alternatives, creating products that nourish the body and delight the senses.

We're Dedicated To Providing High Quality Food Products
Our products are crafted with meticulously selected ingredients, combining the best of nature, science and 18th Century Vedic Food Formulations. We prioritize safety, efficacy, and sustainability in every step of our process.

Our philosophy is simple: Food is Medicine. That’s why every product is developed by our food researchers, and skilled artisans—using only toxin-free, plant-based, clean-label ingredients. Name: Jumbo Lange Leemstraat 145
Description:
Jumbo, daar het gebeurt het!

Werken bij Jumbo is meer dan zomaar een baan. Je wordt onderdeel van een bijzondere familie van mensen die samen willen ondernemen en winnen. 
Die durven te dromen en grote stappen nemen zonder vrees. Heb jij het Jumbo DNA in je?

Jumbo zet de klant op nummer één. Zo zijn we groot geworden. Want mensen helpen zit in ons DNA. Dat merk je in elke Jumbo supermarkt. Ook in België maken we boodschappen doen leuker, voordeliger en gemakkelijker. Eind 2019 openden we hier onze eerste winkels. En er is plaats voor nog meer Jumbo in het Belgische supermarktlandschap. Daarom zijn we op zoek naar supergemotiveerde medewerkers. Ben jij een échte mensenhelper? Dan rollen we voor jou de rode loper uit.

Waar staat Jumbo voor? Jumbo staat voor:
- Beste service + grootste assortiment x laagste prijzen waar de klant kan rekenen op de 7 zekerheden.

Door de klant altijd centraal te zetten is Jumbo één van de best gewaardeerde supermarkt ketens.

Niet voor niets is Jumbo al 16x uitgeroepen tot de beste supermarkt van Nederland. We streven ernaar om dit in België ook waar te maken.

Name: GETYOURDETAIL
Description:
Din pasiunea pentru mașini am construit o afacere de succes și un brand de renume în industria de detailing auto. Cu o carieră dedicată atât pasiunii, cât și antreprenoriatului, am evoluat de-a lungul timpului și am acumulat cunoștințe valoroase care m-au adus în poziția de a fi un lider în domeniu.

Cu o abordare bazată pe metodologia Lean Six Sigma, am învățat cum să eficientizăm procesele și să oferim servicii de înaltă calitate. Această metodologie ne-a ajutat să dezvoltăm produse inovatoare și să oferim soluții complete în domeniul detailing-ului auto.

Am fost mereu în căutarea învățării continue și a dezvoltării personale, și am ales să împărtășesc cunoștințele dobândite cu alții. Educația joacă un rol esențial în afacerea noastră, și suntem bucuroși să oferim know-how-ul nostru celor interesați să învețe mai mult despre arta detailing-ului auto.

De asemenea, suntem pasionați de strategii de marketing auto și de modul în care putem ajuta alți antreprenori să-și construiască brandurile într-un mod eficient și captivant. Suntem aici pentru a vă ghida în lumea marketingului auto și pentru a vă oferi soluții personalizate pentru afacerea dumneavoastră.

Vă invit să faceți parte din rețeaua mea și să explorăm împreună posibilitățile nesfârșite pe care le oferă lumea detailing-ului auto. Cu mine, veți găsi nu doar un profesionist pasionat, ci și un mentor dedicat și un partener de afaceri în creștere continuă. Haideți să aducem împreună această pasiune la un alt nivel

Name: Happy Houseplants
Description:
Over the past seven years, we’ve built Happy Houseplants into one of the UK’s most respected houseplant brands—culminating in a proud moment: winning an RHS Chelsea Gold Medal.

We’ve done it without investors or crowdfunding, growing slowly and deliberately. That choice means we can focus on what matters most: quality, sustainability, and the well-being of our customers, clients, and team—without the pressure to scale at all costs.

Our passion goes beyond houseplants. We bring biophilic design into homes, workplaces, and commercial spaces, creating environments where people feel better, work better, and live better. Our installations do more than look good—they help regulate temperature, reduce reliance on artificial systems, and support mental and physical health.

We believe greening urban spaces is essential to achieving more sustainable, carbon-conscious living.

At home, our curated collection of houseplants offers something for every space and style—from lush monsteras to sculptural succulents. Every plant is carefully selected and delivered with care, making it easy to bring nature indoors.

Name: Truynw Nexiq Labs
Description:
Truynw Nexiq Labs is a next-generation market intelligence and analytics firm built for organizations that compete on insight, speed, and precision. With a proprietary knowledge base of 18,000+ in-depth reports, 120+ decision-support tools, and over 50 million curated data points, the firm delivers one of the most comprehensive intelligence ecosystems in the market today.

Backed by a multidisciplinary team of 180+ analysts, economists, data scientists, and industry specialists, Truynw Nexiq Labs brings more than 25 years of combined institutional experience across strategy, technology, and applied research. The firm covers 40+ industries, spanning technology, healthcare, energy, financial services, manufacturing, and consumer markets, with active coverage across North America, Europe, Asia-Pacific, the Middle East, and Latin America.

Trusted by global enterprises, high-growth innovators, and Fortune 500 organizations, Truynw Nexiq Labs is known for turning complex, fragmented market data into clear, actionable intelligence. Clients leverage its insights to identify growth opportunities, optimize pricing and go-to-market strategies, mitigate risk, and accelerate revenue performance. From boardroom strategy to execution-level decisions, the firm’s intelligence directly supports measurable business outcomes.

What sets Truynw Nexiq Labs apart is its ability to combine rigorous analytics with real-world commercial context—transforming data into decisions, and decisions into sustained competitive advantage.
