Name: Viagema - Mapas que Inspiram - Loja Online
Description:
Os Mapas e Produtos Viagema inspiram o mundo! Mapas de alto padrão, presentes criativos e decoração única para sua casa e empresa!

Assim como você, todos na Viagema têm Fome de Viagem!

A equipe Viagema acredita que viajar é muito mais do que conhecer novos destinos e culturas. É também uma forma de autoconhecimento e de abrir a mente para novas possibilidades.

A Viagema nasceu em 2014, criada por três viajantes apaixonados por viagens.

Nossa missão desde o início foi criar produtos que tragam a magia e a alegria que sentimos nas viagens para dentro de nossas casas. Desenhamos produtos que recordem os lugares visitados e inspirem novos horizontes.

Tudo isso buscando um belo design, materiais de alta qualidade, durabilidade e acabamento, considerando a sustentabilidade e a valorização dos fornecedores locais.

Resumindo, criamos produtos que nós, como viajantes, sempre desejamos que existissem.

Nosso sincero desejo é que os Produtos Viagema sejam mais do que simples objetos. Queremos que sejam verdadeiros companheiros da sua jornada pelo mundo, ficando a cada viagem, mais cheios de recordações e histórias para contar.

Se você ama viajar, os Produtos Viagema foram feitos para você!

Obrigado por conhecer um pouco mais sobre a Viagema!

Qualquer dúvida, estamos por aqui!

Viagema - Loja para quem tem Fome de Viagem
www.viagema.com.br

Instagram: @viagema
Facebook: @lojaviagema

Name: Wine and More GmbH
Description:
Frei nach dem Motto "das Leben ist zu kurz, um schlechten Wein zu trinken", finden Sie bei Wine and More eine Sortierung feinster Tropfen.

Wir sind spezialisiert auf Weine aus Italien und Südafrika. Sie finden bei uns vor allem Chardonnay, Sauvignon Blanc und Insolia, aber auch Cabernet Sauvignon, Shiraz und Nero d’Avola, um nur einige zu nennen. Auf den persönlichen Kontakt zu den Winzern dieser individuellen Weinbetriebe legen wir sehr grossen Wert und besuchen daher jedes Jahr die Regionen, um die Weine zu testen.

Und die Preise? Auch da braucht es Geduld und Spürsinn. Dennoch gelingt es uns immer wieder, abseits der üblichen Spekulationsdynamik, vernünftige Erzeuger mit realistischen Preisvorstellungen zu finden. Dort kaufen wir gerne ein. 

Sie können den wechselnden Empfehlungen auch in unserem Shop folgen. Wir bieten Weine für jeden Anspruch an. Vom einfachen, verlässlichen "Gebrauchswein" bis zum erlesenen Tropfen finden Sie für jeden Anlass die richtige Flasche.

Name: مجموعة نظير الساعدي Nadheer Alsaadi Group
Description:
نظير الساعدي من أكبـر شـركات التوزيـع فـي العـراق، لإستيراد المنتجـات الغذائيـة مـن جميـع أنحـاء العالـم.
شـركة عائليـة تأسسـت عـام 1905 وتـم انشـاء فـرع 272 فـي عـام 1987 وكانـت الانطلاقـة الكبـرى فـي عـام 2003 بعـد الانفتـاح الاقتصـادي فـي العـراق وقـد عملـت الشـركة منـذ ذلـك الحيـن فـي اسـتيراد وتوزيـع مختلـف السـلع التجاريـة سـريعة الـدوران وحققنـا نجاحـات كبيـرة فـي التوزيـع جملـة ومفـرد وكان منتجنـا الاول هو رز 272 بسـمتي 1121 حيـث احتـل الصـدارة فـي العـراق لعـدة سـنوات.
قامـت الشـركة بتوسـيع شـبكة التوزيـع الخاصـة بهـا لتشـمل نطاقـات LOB أخـرى مثـل TT، MT، HoReCa، الصيدليـات. عملـت الشـركة علـى توسـيع دائـرة التوزيـع لديهـا حيـث اسسـت فروعـا فـي إقليـم كردسـتان، والمنطقـة الجنوبيـة مـن البصـرة، ومنطقـة الفـرات الاوسط بالاضافـة إلـى المقـر الرئيسـي فـي بغـداد ولدينـا وكلاء فـي جميـع المحافظـات. كنـا وما زلنا قادريـن وكفؤيـن علـى تزويـد السـوق العراقـي بأكثـر مـن 250 منتجـا اسـتهالكيا وتقديـم خدمـات التوزيـع والتسـليم والتوريـد المسـتمر لاحتياجـات السـوق. ولدينـا حوالـي 17000 نقطـة بيـع فـي العـراق / لدينـا فـرع خـاص لبيـع البقوليـات والعطاريـات ومـواد خـام المطاعـم ومعامـل الحلويـات.

Name: MDR Importaciones
Description:
Comercializamos productos innovadores de excelente calidad. Estamos enfocados en brindar a nuestros clientes una grata experiencia de compra.  
 
Todo comenzó en marzo del 2020, cuando el living de nuestras casas se convirtió en home-office y nunca mas dejó de serlo... El daño provocado por las ruedas convencionales de nuestras sillas se empezó a notar en los pisos, así que decidimos importar unas ruedas de silicona que giran mucho mejor y no dañan los pisos, ya que en Uruguay no había. Resultaron buenísimas!!! No solo no dañan los pisos, sino que mejora el confort de la silla notablemente. Luego de recomendarlas a los conocidos, dijimos ¿por que no iniciar la empresa que nosotros (2 hermanos emprendedores) siempre quisimos tener, comercializando este producto? El resto de la historia queremos construirla junto a ustedes.
Contáctanos y con gusto visitaremos tu oficina.

mdrimportaciones@gmail.com

Name: ACC (Active Cooperation Community)
Description:
İşbirliğinin ve ortak mülkiyetin gücüne inanan bireylerin oluşturduğu canlı bir topluluk olan Aktif İşbirliği Topluluğu'na hoş geldiniz. Burada, hepimize fayda sağlayan güçlü ve destekleyici bir topluluk oluşturarak birlikte çalışıyor ve birbirimizi önemsiyoruz. Amacımız, herkesin söz sahibi olduğu ve katkılarından dolayı değer gördüğü ortak bir sorumluluk ve sahiplenme duygusunu teşvik etmektir.
Çeşitli becerilere, deneyimlere ve geçmişlere sahip farklı bir insanız, ancak bizi birleştiren şey, daha büyük iyilik için birlikte çalışma taahhüdümüzdür. Kaynaklarımızı ve bilgimizi bir araya getirerek, kendi başımıza başarabileceğimizden daha fazlasını başarabileceğimize inanıyoruz. Topluluk projeleri, ortak karar verme veya sadece birbirimize yardım etme yoluyla olsun, kapsayıcı, destekleyici ve sürdürülebilir bir topluluk oluşturmaya çalışıyoruz.
Öyleyse bize katılın ve bu heyecan verici hareketin bir parçası olun. Birlikte, işbirliği ve ortak mülkiyet değerlerini gerçekten somutlaştıran bir topluluk oluşturabiliriz. Hepimiz için daha parlak bir gelecek yaratmak için birlikte çalışalım.

Name: Ministry of Oats
Description:
Ministry of Oats is an oat-first kitchen brand reimagining how India eats oats.

We started in a small cloud kitchen in Bangalore with a simple question — can oats be fun? Turns out, yes. From smoothie bowls and overnight oats to oatmilk lattes and desserts, we’re putting oats in places they’ve never been before. And making them taste better than anyone expected.

We're not chasing diet trends or preaching health. Our food is delicious and nourishing — because we think taste and nutrition can co-exist without compromise. Everything on our menu is built from real ingredients, playful combinations, and a healthy dose of curiosity.

In the last year, we’ve gone from one kitchen to multiple outlets across the city. But our real growth is in the community we’re building — people who try a bowl and keep coming back, who tell their friends, and slowly become part of something bigger.

Because once you’ve had oats the MOO way, it’s hard to go back.
If you’ve ever written them off as bland or boring — we’re here to change your mind.

Our business’s mission was and still is: “To build relationships with each of our customers by providing quality products and services at a reasonable cost.” We believe that over the past 50 years, our success can be credited to our desire and ability to do just that.

Let’s learn more about JVR Industries in the modern world. As trends continue to shift from local sales to the highly competitive online marketplace. It was apparent that things needed to change, but how?  We appreciate our loyal distributors that have been the foundation of JVR Industries and have helped us succeed.  We look forward to continually strengthening those relationships by providing enhancements to their programs. These enhancements will include superior education, training, support, and service.  This will enable our distributors to continue to provide quality products and services at reasonable costs. But now, with an even better customer experience and service.

Name: LA BONNE MER
Description:
Au pied de Notre Dame de la Garde à Marseille, la Bonne Mer c’est avant tout une histoire de 4 amis venant d’horizons différents mais tous passionnés par ce que la Méditerranée offre de plus beau - poissons, coquillages et crustacés.
Le concept de la poissonnerie part du postulat suivant : dans ce monde post-covid, les gens sont à la recherche de valeurs refuges et sont en quête d’authenticité, de proximité et de choses simples.
La volonté première était donc de s’implanter dans un quartier emblématique de Marseille auquel nous avons tous une attache particulière, Vauban et sa Bonne Mère.
Dans un second temps, nous souhaitions remettre au coeur du quartier un commerce de proximité qui disparaissait depuis de nombreuses années à Marseille, la poissonnerie ; et de pouvoir déguster les produits de l’enseigne en direct et sur place.

[calm-ket·tle] noun
/*calm + kettle/

We were tired of days hijacked by stress, screens, and endless to-do lists. We craved small moments of pause—rituals to reconnect. But most options were sugar-laden jolts or clinical, joyless “health” products.

So we created what we wanted for ourselves: everyday wellness rituals that feel natural, satisfying, and truly supportive.

Calm Kettle is a modern wellness brand reimagining daily care through thoughtful rituals and adaptogenic blends. We harness time-tested herbs and adaptogens to craft wellness products that fit beautifully into your routine.

Our promise? Clean, balanced, natural wellness that doesn’t demand you change your whole life—but supports you as you live it.

Because calm isn’t a luxury. It’s essential.

Description:
لقد تأسست سلسلة أسواق ميدوي في العام 1962م كأول سوبرماركت حديث في مملكة البحرين ، وهي تعتبر ذراع شركة على راشد الأمين في قطاع البيع بالتجزئة ، وتعد أسواق ميدوي أكثر سلسلة متاجر نمواً في المملكة حيث تضم عشرة فروع منتشرة في جميع ربوع مملكة البحرين ومن المتوقع أن تتوسع وتعزز نشاطاتها في القريب العاجل.

ميدوي هو مفهوم المتجر الراقي التي يركز على تقديم أفضل المنتجات مع ضمان جودة الخدمة بأفضل الأسعار التي تكون في متناول الجميع حتى نتمكن من تلبية احتياجات جميع أنواع المستهلكين ، حيث ترفع أسواق ميدوي عالياً شعار خدمة العملاء عن طريق تقديم مجموعة واسعة من المنتجات بأسعار تنافسية على يد فريق عمل يتمتع بالخبرة والكفاءة التامة في نفس الوقت الذي يتقيد فيه تقيداً صارماً بمعايير مراقبة وضمان الجودة.

يتم دعم فروع متاجر ميدوي ببنية تحتية متطورة للغاية ومجهزة بأحدث ما توصل إليه العلم في مجال المرافق والمنافع كما أنها تقدم خدمات التوصيل لعملاء الكرام لدى جميع فروعها وتفتح على مدى 24 ساعة في بعض فروعها.
Midway Supermarket was established in 1962 as the first modern supermarket in the Kingdom of Bahrain. It is considered the arm of Ali Rashid Al Amin Co. in the retail sector. Midway Supermarket are the fastest growing chain in the Kingdom with 10 retail outlets across the Kingdom, and to expand and strengthen its activities soon.
Midway is an upscale store concept that focuses on delivering the best products while ensuring quality of service at the best prices that are affordable so that we can meet the needs of all types of consumers. Midway raise the customer service logo by offering a wide range of products at competitive prices an experienced and efficient team at the same time as strict adherence to quality control and assurance standards.
Midway stores are supported by a state-of-the-art infrastructure equipped with latest facilities and services. It also provides delivery services to customers at all its branches and is open 24 hours in some of its branches.

 Pełna obsługa kont na marketplace – otwieramy konta, prowadzimy sprzedaż, optymalizujemy oferty, zarządzamy kampaniami reklamowymi.

 Obsługa klientów i logistyka – zapewniamy wsparcie na każdym etapie sprzedaży, dbając o płynność realizacji zamówień, zwroty i reklamacje.

Name: Smiths Chippy
Description:
Smiths Chippy, nestled in the heart of South Shields, is more than just a takeaway destination – it's a culinary journey steeped in tradition and excellence. Renowned for its exceptional fish and chips, Smiths Chippy has been a local institution for years, captivating the taste buds of both residents and visitors alike.

What sets Smiths Chippy apart is its unwavering commitment to quality. Using only the freshest, sustainably sourced fish and locally grown potatoes, every dish is a testament to the art of crafting the perfect fish and chips. The skilled chefs at Smiths Chippy expertly blend time-honored recipes with contemporary cooking techniques, resulting in a harmonious fusion of flavors that transport patrons to a bygone era of seaside indulgence.

The warm and inviting atmosphere of the establishment adds to the experience, as families, friends, and solo diners gather to savor the iconic British meal. With attention to detail evident in every crispy bite and the friendly staff that exudes hospitality, Smiths Chippy creates an environment that fosters cherished memories and cherished connections.

Smiths Chippy isn't just a place to eat; it's a cultural touchstone, an embodiment of South Shields' culinary heritage. Whether you're relishing a classic fish supper or exploring modern twists on the traditional fare, a visit to Smiths Chippy promises to be a gastronomic adventure that leaves an imprint on both your palate and your heart.
Location: Newcastle Upon Tyne, Newcastle Upon Tyne

Name: Kölner Weinkeller - REWE Wein Online GmbH
Description:
The Kölner Weinkeller is one of the best addresses for premium wines in Germany. Our historic wine cellar is located 13 meters beneath the ground and offers more than 4,500 wines on 2,500 square meters. From simple wines for every day to the 100 Parker points bottles in our treasure room. You can also find all wines online in our modern web store.
The Cologne wine cellar not only offers a large selection of top wines, customers can also taste them and learn more about wine. We have more than 50 wines permanently opened at our tasting counter and our certified sommeliers will be happy to give you comprehensive advice. With a circulation of more than 30.000 copies, our WeinBrevier is probably the highest-circulation and most regarded consumer wine magazine in Germany. Here we tell the stories behind the wines and the winemakers. In our wine blog you´ll find more stories from the world of wine, films, news, recipes and much more. At our wine-events in the cellars treasure or in top restaurants in the region, we regularly present discoveries, new wines or even rare 1er Grand Cru from Bordeaux to selected customers.

Name: S & V MILLETS INC.
Description:
S & V MILLETS is dedicated to ensuring that the company and products benefit consumers, farmers, and the environment. We have created a unique business model that will streamline the entire process so that it is beneficial to everyone involved. Every step of the process from seed to plate includes innovative new ideas such as the ones below.

Farming: We collaborate with farmers, agricultural researchers, and government agencies in India to grow and procure quality millets. 

Processing & Packing: We use high quality processing to ensure the purity of our millets and packaging that protects the quality of millets from mill to home.

Transportation & Storage: We work to streamline logistics to minimize cost and maintain the quality of our millets. 
Sales & Customer Service: We strive to educate people about the benefits of millets and increase accessibility through easy online ordering and timely delivery.

Whether you’re seeking that one-of-a-kind bottle or aiming to expand your investment portfolio, DJC Finest takes your experience to the next level.

New stock arrives weekly, and we’re always on the hunt for something exceptional. If you’re after a specific bottle, don’t hesitate to reach out—we’ll do our best to track it down for you.

Name: gsoond
Description:
Willkommen bei Gsoond.com - deinem Zuhause für ganzheitliche Gesundheit und Prävention! 

Als führendes Unternehmen bieten wir hochwertige Workshops und innovative Produkte, um Menschen dabei zu unterstützen, ein gesünderes und erfüllteres Leben zu führen. Unser Fokus liegt darauf, ganzheitliche Ansätze zur Förderung von Wohlbefinden und langfristiger Gesundheit anzubieten.

Unsere Workshops sind einzigartig und interaktiv gestaltet, um Wissen zu vermitteln, Bewusstsein zu schaffen und praktische Werkzeuge für die persönliche Entwicklung zu bieten. Von Stressmanagement über Ernährung bis hin zu mentaler Gesundheit - wir decken eine Vielzahl von Themen ab, die das Wohlbefinden in allen Aspekten des Lebens fördern.

Darüber hinaus sind wir stolz darauf, Produkte aus Österreich anzubieten, die höchste Qualitätsstandards erfüllen. Von natürlichen Nahrungsergänzungsmitteln bis hin zu Bio Ölen - unsere Auswahl unterstützt eine ganzheitliche Gesundheit und ermöglicht es unseren Kunden, das Beste für ihren Körper und Geist zu erreichen.

Wir verstehen, dass Prävention der Schlüssel zu einer langfristigen Gesundheit ist. Deshalb legen wir großen Wert auf die Vermittlung von Wissen und die Schaffung eines Bewusstseins für gesunde Lebensgewohnheiten. Unser Ziel ist es, Menschen zu befähigen, proaktiv für ihre Gesundheit zu sorgen und präventive Maßnahmen zu ergreifen, um Krankheiten vorzubeugen.

Werd Teil unserer LinkedIn-Familie, um über unsere neuesten Workshops, Produkte und Erkenntnisse im Bereich ganzheitliche Gesundheit auf dem Laufenden zu bleiben. Lass uns gemeinsam eine gesündere Welt aufbauen!

#Gsoondcom #GanzheitlicheGesundheit #Prävention #Workshops #Gesundheitsbewusstsein #ProdukteAusÖsterreich #Wohlbefinden #Lebensqualität #GesundeLebensweise #LinkedIn

Name: EL MATHE
Description:
Bienvenue chez EL MATHE une aventure unique au cœur des Alpes suisses où la culture ancestrale du maté rencontre l'innovation.

EL MATHE est une création d’un couple suisso-argentin passionné de maté qui, après des années d'exploration des traditions et des saveurs de l’un de leur pays natal, décide de concrétiser sa vision : créer un maté authentique, innovant, vibrant et moderne. Son voyage commence en Argentine ainsi que dans les vastes plaines uruguayennes, où il est immédiatement captivé par la culture et les arômes uniques de la région. Inspiré par ces découvertes, le couple décide de donner vie à son projet EL MATHE, en s'entourant des conseils des experts en infusions les plus réputés.

Chez EL MATHE, chaque feuille de maté sélectionnée avec amour est le fruit d'un processus méticuleux, garantissant une infusion pure qui conserve toutes les qualités bienfaisantes de cette plante millénaire.

EL MATHE s’efforce également de contribuer à démocratiser et à moderniser la consommation du maté en proposant des outils innovants, où praticité et tradition se rencontrent harmonieusement.

Découvrez les goûts uniques des recettes EL MATHE, élaborées en Suisse avec amour, dévouement, et la conviction que chaque gorgée compte pour votre bien-être global.

Name: Heavy-Tuned GmbH
Description:
Heavy Tuned ist einer der vielseitigsten und führenden Online-Shops in Deutschland für Ersatz- und Tuningteile für Zweiräder, mit Sitz in Uetze-Hänigsen (bei Hannover). Mit über 300.000 Produkten bietet HT heute ein riesiges Sortiment an, das weltweit schnell und unkompliziert geliefert wird. Der Fokus des Unternehmens liegt auf Qualität, Innovation und exzellentem Kundenservice, was bereits mehrfach ausgezeichnet wurde, u. a. von der Computer Bild.

HT zeichnet sich durch eine offene und dynamische Arbeitskultur aus. Bietet moderne Arbeitsplätze, fördert Weiterentwicklung und schafft eine Umgebung, in der innovative Ideen entstehen können. Das Ziel ist es, nicht nur die Welt der Zweiräder mit hochwertigen Produkten zu bereichern, sondern auch den Mitarbeitern die Möglichkeit zu geben, ihr volles Potenzial zu entfalten.

HT verfolgt die Mission, ein einzigartiges Einkaufserlebnis zu schaffen und allen Zweirad-Enthusiasten erstklassige Produkte anzubieten. Mit einem erfahrenen Team, einer starken Marktposition und einem klaren Fokus auf Innovation wird das Unternehmen auch in Zukunft neue Maßstäbe im Bereich Zweirad-Ersatz- und Tuningteile setzen. 

Wer bei HT arbeitet, wird Teil eines dynamischen und leidenschaftlichen Unternehmens, das nicht nur die Welt der Zweiräder bereichert, sondern auch kontinuierlich an neuen Erfolgen arbeitet.

Description:

Patrick startade upp sitt vinföretag, med rådgivning från den gode vännen Magnus. Med värdefull erfarenhet av vin och kunskap om vingårdarnas arbete i Spanien började företaget växa fram.

Den sista pusselbiten blev klar tidigt 2022 när Patina Wine & Deli kunde knyta till sig Torbjörn. Med en gedigen försäljningsbakgrund inom dryckesbranschen, ett stort nätverk och stort driv var nu företagets form på plats och vin fortsätter vara den gemensamma passionen.

Name: minidrinks
Description:
A MiniDrinks foi fundada na cidade de Curitiba em 2014, com o objetivo de se tornar referência nacional no comércio de bebidas em miniatura. Acreditamos que nosso negócio é um ótimo meio de estreitar o laço entre as pessoas, através de presentes criativos, brindes empresariais, kits para casamento, enfim, todo tipo de agrado que qualquer pessoa gostaria de receber por ser lembrada.

Trabalhamos com todos os tipos de bebidas, com volumes de no máximo 375ml. Criamos um site totalmente focado em proporcionar a melhor experiência de compra para nossos clientes, utilizando ferramentas para facilitar a visualização dos produtos, navegação e a efetivação da compra. Nossas bebidas são 100% originais, lacradas de fábrica, nacionais e importadas.

A MiniDrinks conta com Aperitivos, Cachaças, Conhaques, Espumantes e Champagnes, Gins, Licores, Saques, Tequilas, Vinhos, Vodkas, Whiskys e outras bebidas não alcoólicas, além de uma área gourmet com várias opções! Contamos também com uma categoria de kits e presentes que com certeza vai lhe proporcionar ótimas ideias!

Atendemos eventos empresariais, casamentos, lembranças, brindes, aniversários, com a personalização das garrafinhas e montagem de kits de acordo com a necessidade de cada cliente. Estamos constantemente buscando novidades para surpreender nossos clientes, sempre primando pelo melhor atendimento e que possamos proporcionar a melhor experiência de compra possível.

Description:
At Herban Flow, we’re reimagining the social beverage experience. Based in the heart of St. Petersburg, we are Florida’s first dedicated non-alcoholic bottle shop — a curated retail space offering cannabis-infused, mushroom-based, and herbal drinks that help you feel good without the booze.

Whether you’re looking to energize, unwind, focus, or simply vibe out, our selection of THC seltzers, kava tonics, functional mushrooms, and sober social elixirs has something for every mood and moment. We champion conscious consumption and proudly support the growing sober-curious and wellness-focused community.

More than a retail store, Herban Flow is a cultural hub — hosting events, tastings, and festivals like High & Dry to celebrate a new kind of nightlife. Our mission is to make plant-powered drinking mainstream, accessible, and exciting — without the hangover.

Find your flow. Stay SoberAF.

Name: SendinAfrika
Description:
SendinAfrika est une entreprise sociale qui vise à révolutionner la façon dont nous transférons de l'argent à nos amis et à notre famille en Afrique.

C'est une révolution du transfert d'argent traditionnel.

SendinAfrika est une application  en ligne qui offre à la diaspora Africaine la possibilité d'acheter des produits de première nécessité ainsi que les services dans des magasins locaux, qui seront livrés à vos proches au pays dans trois créneaux de votre choix (48H -> livraison standard, 24H-> livraison accélérée, ou 5H-> livraison prime) . La solution SendinAfrika garantie à la diaspora que les fonds envoyés en Afrique seront utilisés à bon escient.

Captain Doregos is more than just a restaurant - it's a community. We're proud to be a part of the neighborhoods we serve, and we're committed to giving back to our community in meaningful ways. Name: Colour My Wheels
Description:
My journey as Founder of Colour My Wheels began with a simple mission: to bring a burst of colour and joy into the lives of wheelchair users. Inspired by my mum's experience in a wheelchair and Aged Care, and now she rolls with colour, turning heads wherever she goes.  I wanted to create bright and cheerful accessories that would not only uplift spirits but also spark conversations   And with that, transforming the experience of a wheelchair user to one of BEING AND FEELING SEEN.

Named 'Rockstar Rookies at Source Kids Brisbane 2024, at Colour My Wheels we believe that their wheelchairs should reflect the vibrant personalities of their users. That's why we've made it our mission to offer a range of colourful wheel covers, or spoke guards,  infused with captivating art and surface design.

We are thrilled to collaborate with incredible Australian artists who share our excitement for this project. Together, we're bringing their captivating artwork to life on wheel covers, adding a touch of creativity and individuality to each wheelchair. But our commitment goes beyond aesthetics.

We've carefully sourced a polypropylene material, proudly made in Australia, that is recyclable and will continue to search for products that are even more sustainable and eco friendly.

And that's not all! We are also offering custom designs, allowing you to upload your chosen artwork and create personalized wheel covers. Imagine the joy of showcasing your favourite image on your wheelchair, turning heads wherever you go!

Join us in celebrating diversity, self-expression, and the power of colour. Let's bring a kaleidoscope of happiness to the world of wheelchairs, one cover at a time.  

Get in touch with me on hello@colourmywheels.com.au.  I can't wait to hear from you.

Name: Let Them Eat
Description:
Let Them Eat specialises in creating tasty, healthy, comforting vegetarian food for busy people.
TASTY
First and foremost, our food is tasty. Like really, really tasty. We know what we’re good at and we do it well. Thanks to our amazing chef (see above) we have perfected the art of making vegetables taste amazing and creating food combinations you won’t find anywhere else. Our customers always come back for more.
HEALTHY
Everything on our menu is free of preservatives and chemicals. It’s cooked from scratch using the best ingredients we can find. Over half of our products are vegan and dairy free. Many are also gluten-free. We focus on non-processed, high-protein food which is tasty and comforting.
LOCAL PRODUCTS
Like you, we want to know where our food comes from. So we work really hard to source as many local ingredients as we can, which we then hand-make into the amazing products you see in our stores. 
CONVENIENT
We know you’re busy, so our food is fast, easily eaten ‘on the go’ and our packaging makes it super transportable to take back to your desk, home or wherever you’re heading. If you’d rather have a quiet space to enjoy our food, relax in our store cafes and take your time. All of our products can be frozen and many enjoy a long shelf-life in the fridge, too.
SUSTAINABILITY
We want to take care of our environment as well as our customers. We do our bit by trying to avoid animal products in our food and using sustainable ingredients wherever possible. Our packaging is minimal and either recyclable or compostable. Even labelling is done with stamps, not stickers. Taking our food home? You’re welcome to bring your own reusable containers, if you like.

Description:
At Honorguard Coffee, every bag of freshly roasted coffee fuels a mission far greater than just a great cup—it's about healing, hope, and honoring those who have served. We’re proud to say that with every purchase, our customers are directly supporting the training and placement of service dogs for veterans, offering life-changing support to the warriors who’ve given so much for us.

Rooted in the belief that business can be a force for immense good, Honorguard Coffee blends humble strength and approachability with a warm, action-oriented approach. We're not just a coffee company; we're a community driven by empathy, connection, and a shared mission to make a meaningful impact.

With our operations based in the Treasure Valley of Idaho, we’re committed to delivering exceptional coffee while supporting small businesses and fostering strong local relationships. Our mission wouldn’t be possible without our incredible customers, who have joined us in this journey to end veteran suicide, one service dog at a time.

Whether you’re a coffee lover, a supporter of veteran causes, or someone seeking a tangible way to make a difference, Honorguard Coffee welcomes you. Together, we’re creating something extraordinary—a future where every veteran can find the healing they need.

Join us in making a real difference, one cup at a time.

Name: Soulmate Spirits Ltd
Description:
Soulmate Spirits... find yours

Welcome to our world of premium award winning spirits.  Our journey started, like many great things, with a walk, a laugh, and a damn good glass of gin. 
We’ve raised glasses through life’s highs and lows - celebrating friendship, love, and everything in between. And somewhere on one of our many yomps through the Kent countryside, we had an idea: What if we could bottle not just flavour, but a feeling?

That spark became Say It With Gin, our first venture into artisan gin in the UK, with a personalised gifting twist. But what started with one bottle soon became a bigger calling — to create a craft spirits brand that speaks with real connection and thoughtful moments.

Today, we’ve evolved into Soulmate Spirits — a female-owned small-batch award winning distillery brand lovingly producing Cornwall gin, Cornwall vodka, and a whole lot of soul. Still just the two of us. Still proudly based in Kent. Still working with makers who share our standards and values.

Whether it’s a party or poured just because, shared with a soulmate or sipped solo - we’re here to make it meaningful.

IWSC 2025, Great Taste & The Gin Guide 2024

Name: Wild Sage Foods
Description:
Wild Sage Foods is an intersection of producers, products, and you – the customer.

In Wild Sage Foods we believe that cooking and sharing food with others form stronger human connections and promote healthier eating habits.

In our organic food store in Amsterdam De Pijp - and in the online store - you will find premium healthy food ingredients that meet our high-quality measures, including local, organic and vegan.

Products are mostly sold loose without packaging in bulk form, including herbs, spices, nuts, seeds, grains, pulses, flour, rice, oil, coffee, tea. We have also vegan cheese and beverages.

You can also enjoy delicious coffee, tea, vegan cakes, and side salads in the deli.
Minimal waste shopping of bulk foods has never been easier!

Bring your own container or use one of ours. You just fill your container with as much as you want and we’ll weigh it at check-out.

You will have instant access to information about the origin of the products while you shop. Each product label has a QR code that can be scanned with your mobile device. There you can read more about our selection criteria and more about each product, including recipes.

We import books from Leading publishers namely Pearson, Taylor & Francis, Springer, Human Kinetics, Harper Collins, and others. We also exhibit at the world's biggest book fair which is the Frankfurt Book Fair and represent the London Book Fair and Book Expo America as well. 

We export Academic Textbooks Books and Sri Lankan books to Germany, Australia, USA and UK. We supply Edexcel, Cambridge and Hodder books to leading International schools in the Middle East.

Name: Ava Security

Notre société AVA SECURITY, spécialiste dans la vente de matériel de sécurité, souhaite se mettre au service des professionnels du secteur de l’électricité, et du bâtiment, afin de leur permettre de diversifier leur offre auprès de leurs clients.

Nous vous proposons des solutions vidéo et intrusion filaires, donc pérennes avec une durée de vie moyenne de 15 à 20 ans et particulièrement avantageuses dans le cadre de constructions neuves ou rénovations.
Vous vendez nos produits et nous vous aidons à établir le schéma de raccordement que vous incluez dans votre offre.

Notre gamme est testée et approuvée, en mode « prêt à poser ». Le principe est simple : nous programmons, vous installez.

N’hésitez pas à nous contacter, nous sommes là pour vous accompagner, avec un appui technique et commercial si nécessaire.
Nous nous adaptons à vos besoins, pour que vous puissiez répondre aux demandes de vos clients.

Si vous souhaitez être recontacté par un responsable technique pour voir avec lui les modalités et services que nous mettons à votre disposition, faites nous le savoir, il saura répondre à vos questions.

Name: Willards Kitchen
Description:
Come on in to Willards Kitchen, where everyone is welcome and simple, delicious, full-flavored food is always ready!

Chef and Owner Will Russell loves to create a fun, relaxing and chill kitchen and entertaining vibe for his guests and family. He brought this approach to his successful catering business and now wants to help you rock it in your kitchen with his three delicious and versatile rubs. 

Will developed his flagship All Purpose Seasoning to make his catering dishes fast, easy and consistently awesome. It became the foundation for his most popular recipes such as chicken, burgers, steak and veggies. Realizing the need for a more delicate touch in seafood and Mediterranean dishes, he created the Seafood Rub & Seasoning. Then, Will went back to his roots of comfort food and bold taste and created a unique rub with a smoky and robust flavor - Smoked BBQ Rub was born! On his recent travels to visit family in New Mexico, he fell in love with the New Mexico chili pepper and said "I HAVE to make a taco seasoning out of these," and BAM - Let us introduce you to the New Mexico inspired Taco Seasoning!

In his free time, you can find Will in his kitchen experimenting with new recipes, connecting with friends over a frosty beer or mixing a spicy jalapeño margarita for his amazing wife Natalie.

شركة "اكوادي فور كارد" تشتهر بتقديم حلول متطورة وموثوقة في مجال توفير البطاقات الرقمية مسبقة الدفع عبر الإنترنت. وتعد من الشركات الرائدة في هذا المجال، حيث توفر مجموعة متنوعة من البطاقات الرقمية لمختلف الاستخدامات والمنتجات، بما في ذلك بطاقات الهدايا الإلكترونية وبطاقات الدفع الإلكتروني، إضافة إلى العديد من الخيارات الأخرى.

تقدم "اكوادي فور كارد" تجربة مميزة للمستخدمين عبر منصتها الإلكترونية، حيث يمكنهم الاستفادة من خدماتها بسهولة وسلاسة، وبأمان عالي المستوى. كما تتميز الشركة بسرعة في تقديم الخدمة، حيث يمكن للمستخدمين شراء البطاقات مباشرة عبر المنصة واستلامها فوراً بعد الدفع، مما يضمن لهم الحصول على القيمة المدفوعة بفعالية وسرعة.

بفضل تنوع منتجاتها وسهولة استخدام منصتها الإلكترونية، تعتبر "اكوادي فور كارد" خياراً شائعاً بين المستخدمين الذين يبحثون عن حلول موثوقة وسهلة لتلبية احتياجاتهم من البطاقات الرقمية مسبقة الدفع.

شركة اكوادي فور كارد تأسست في يونيو عام 2023 في الكويت ومقرها الاساسي في دولة الكويت السجل التجاري رقم : 480389

Name: ilivou
Description:
Dans un supermarché ultramarin, un produit de la vie courante peut coûter trois fois plus qu’en métropole. 
Une autre problématique s’y
ajoute : certains produits de la vie quotidienne ne sont tout simplement pas disponibles en Outre-mer, ce qui pousse les habitants à faire venir ces produits depuis la France métropolitaine, à un prix souvent exorbitant.
 C'est pour pallier à cela que  la plateforme Îlivou a été créée. C'est une plateforme socio-économique et  collaborative. L’idée : -permettre à des voyageurs de vous livrer vos commandes depuis la Métropole de manière simple et sécurisée.
-Donner aux producteurs ultramarins un moyen simple de vendre et d'expédier leurs produits vers la Métropole.
Disponible dans les Outre-mer

Description: Buzzin' Coffee guarantees a 'coffee buzz' with every cup, due to the carefully planned steps in our sourcing process. We understand that you need a little buzz in your cup because we do too! Name: DIRTY JACK
Description:
DIRTY JACK maakt koken nog nog leuker met de unieke dubbeldikke kookdoek. Een stoere, bijna onverwoestbare doek die je niet meer wilt missen achter fornuis of BBQ. 

Waarschijnlijk kook jij altijd met een theedoek aan je broek. En ja die wordt altijd smerig. Dat is nu verleden tijd, want nu is er de kookdoek van DIRTY JACK. Bestemd om mee te koken!

- Hittebestendiger
- Stoer design
- Wasbaar op 95 graden
- Geen lusje dat kapot gaat, maar een handig en oersterk oog om de doek aan op te hangen. 
- Met trots gemaakt in België 

Door de dubbele weving is de doek veiliger om hete pannen, braadsledes of BBQ-roosters mee vast te pakken. Zelfs de Nederlandse Brandwondenstichting heeft DIRTY JACK dankzij de betere warmtewering opgenomen in haar assortiment. 

Net een jaar oud, hebben we ruim 2.500 thuiskoks en BBQ-chefs blij kunnen maken. En die waarderen ons met een 5-star rating op Google!

Je vindt jouw DIRTY JACK op onze website of in een van de 17 kook- en BBQ-winkels in Nederland en België.

Name: Pace’s Fairy
Description:
In the enchanting and imaginative children's book "Pace's Fairy", readers are transported into a fantastical world filled with adventure, magic, and valuable life lessons. At the heart of this captivating tale is Harry the Fairy, a character that quickly captures the hearts of readers young and old.

In Chapter 1, we witness Harry's incredible journey to obtain fairy dust on Fairy Dust Island. Despite his inability to fly like other fairies, Harry's natural talents in driving rockets make him a force to be reckoned with. Throughout this chapter and the rest of the book, we learn an important lesson about the power of self-belief and being true to oneself, no matter how unique we may be.

As the story progresses to Chapter 2th, Harry's journey takes an unexpected turn when he lands in a toilet in a human house, desperately searching for the perfect fuel for his rocket. Enter Phil, a young boy with a loose tooth, and the solution to Harry's problem. Through a clever and magical trade, Harry acquires the tooth and gains a new outlook on the process of growing up and facing new challenges.

With each turn of the page, readers are whisked away on a thrilling and heartwarming adventure, filled with imaginative ideas and valuable life lessons. By the end of the book, readers will undoubtedly fall in love with Harry and his unwavering spirit of courage, determination, and belief in the power of kindness and creativity.

"Pace's Fairy" is a book that will capture the hearts of readers young and old, transporting them to a magical world full of wonder and possibility. Harry's missions are not just exciting and fantastical; they also teach us powerful lessons about friendship, bravery, and believing in oneself.

Name: Gripmode GmbH
Description:
Im Jahr 2018, während eines Sportstipendiums in New York, kam dem Gründer Mike die Idee zu GRIPMODE. Als aktiver Torwart suchte er nach passenden Torwarthandschuhen, doch das vorhandene Angebot entsprach nicht seinen Erwartungen - es war zu teuer, nicht langlebig oder robust genug. Basierend auf seiner langjährigen Erfahrungen als Torwart und dem Wissen, das er durch verschiedener Torwart-Equipments gesammelt hatte, beschloss er, eigene Torwarthandschuhe zu entwickeln.

Nach monatelanger Tüftelei kamen Mitte 2018 die ersten Prototypen der GRIPMODE Torwarthandschuhe auf den Markt. Die enorme Nachfrage führte dazu, dass die erste Auflage innerhalb von 24 Stunden ausverkauft war.

Mike zog mit seinem Torwart-Shop in die Schweiz, um gemeinsam mit seiner Familie das Unternehmen noch gezielter voranzutreiben. Mit der ehrgeizigen Vision, jedem Zugang zu hochwertigem Torwart-Equipment zu ermöglichen, wurde 2021 die GRIPMODE GmbH gegründet. Heute sind über 50.000 Torhüter:innen auf der ganzen Welt stolze Träger der GRIPMODE Torhüter-Ausstattung, und die Idee hat sich rasant zu einer internationalen Marke entwickelt.

Name: Sicilian Food Shop
Description:
Che cos'è Sicilian Food Shop?

Sicilian Food Shop è un negozio online progettato da un team tecnico digitale per presentare il meglio dell’enogastronomia siciliana: una selezione minuziosa di prodotti tipici di alta qualità, ricercando solo il vero gusto autentico in quei prodotti genuini e artigianali quasi introvabili, per soddisfare gli amanti del vero gusto siciliano.
A chi si rivolge

Sicilian Food Shop nasce per tutti gli appassionati di cucina e di enogastronomia siciliana, per coloro che amano sperimentare i piatti tipici della tradizione e che desiderano conoscere più da vicino la provenienza, la storia e le unicità dei prodotti che assaporano.
Come soddisfare tutti questi desideri? 

Ricercando e selezionando solo i migliori prodotti tipici della nostra Sicilia, prodotti che ancora oggi mantengono quell'artigianalità che li rende unici e ovviamente poterli acquistare online.

Da qui nasce l'idea di creare una piattaforma di vendita online sincera e di gestirla nel migliore dei modi, proponendo nel web solo prodotti tipici siciliani veramente eccellenti, attraverso un'attenta selezione di piccoli produttori locali artigiani sparsi per la Sicilia. Con l’aiuto del digitale arricchiamo le pagine del nostro Shop con contenuti audio, video, e foto per raccontare curiosità e storie dei singoli prodotti, valorizzandone le loro origini, il duro lavoro artigianale di chi li produce e molto altro ancora. Tutti questi elementi, uniti alla nostra passione innata per il buon cibo siciliano, contribuiranno a rendere i prodotti Sicilian Food Shop un’esperienza di sapore autentica, multi sensoriale, indimenticabile.
La nostra missione è selezionare con passione e attenzione i migliori produttori di vere eccellenze del gusto siciliano, mostrando le loro eccellenze in fantastici prodotti online, per assicurarti un risultato gustoso, autentico, unico e di qualità.

Description:
HOW TO HACK BACK YOUR MIND  by Multi-Award-Winner Najjar is a little secret book that will revolutionize your life. 

In this groundbreaking guide, Najjar takes readers on a profound exploration of self-discovery and empowerment that goes beyond the boundaries of traditional self-help literature.

This book is not just a collection of theories; it's a practical guide grounded in extensive scientific research and personal insight. 
It delves deep into the complexities of the human mind, offering practical tools that you can start using today to unlock its full potential. 
From understanding the inner workings of your mental landscape to mastering your thoughts, beliefs, and actions, Najjar equips you with the knowledge and skills needed to regain control over your life.

At the core of the book's message is unlocking the hidden potential of the subconscious mind. Through techniques to identify and rewrite harmful scripts, readers can align themselves with their desired outcomes and overcome limiting beliefs that hinder personal growth.

The exploration extends into cognitive processes and patterns, empowering individuals to alter conscious beliefs and behaviors. Techniques for breaking free from negative behaviors and influences are unveiled, alongside strategies for establishing boundaries and cultivating self-regulation.

Najjar's book is not just regular self-help literature; it is about self-empowerment and seizing the opportunity to transform your life. By turning the book into a beacon of inspiration for personal growth and self-empowerment, Najjar motivates you to shape a life filled with purpose, resilience, and fulfillment.

With insightful guidance and practical strategies, HOW TO HACK BACK YOUR MIND  is more than just a regular self-help book—it is a roadmap to unlocking untapped potential and authentic empowerment.

Join us on this transformative path, as this book has enormous self-help potential.

Name: Aphasia Readers, LLC
Description:
Aphasia Readers was created by husband-and-wife team, Ryan and Anna Teal. Ryan had a massive stroke at the age of thirty-four which left him with aphasia and apraxia. Throughout his recovery, the repetition of reading aloud seemed to be a tried-and-true form of speech practice with promising results. However, the only books available to practice on a simple level were children’s books. As an adult, reading these types of books felt a little demeaning. Although Ryan and Anna had many good laughs reading about “a trip to grandma’s house,” they quickly realized a need for simple, short readers with adult-themed content to support those in the aphasia community. After more than a year in the making and extensive collaboration with the renowned University of Michigan Aphasia Program at the University Center for Language and Literacy and input from top neurological teams, they finally wrote their first book of Aphasia Readers for adults. 

Their ultimate hope is to provide accessible and affordable supplementary speech practice tools for others in the aphasia community that will help pave the way for a successful recovery. A portion of the proceeds from each book goes back into supporting aphasia awareness and helps others pay for much-needed intensive speech therapy.

It represents the reason we are there and why we serve, and it was critical to me that this flag be flawless in its appearance.

Concord American Flagpoles are the premier U.S. flagpole manufacturer. We can provide a flagpole made to your specifications - traditional vertical, wall mounted, angled arms, outrigger or nautical.

What Inspired Beau Bronzage?
Victoria has experienced firsthand the difficulty in finding a fake tan brand with both consistent quality and supply for her salons’ spray tanning services. With the mindset of “if it isn’t there already, then make it yourself”, she then decided to take the next step and develop her own brand to tackle the difficulties and disappointments experienced within her own tanning business.

Name: Smokers' Haven
Description: In June of 1940 Smokers' Haven was opened by its founder Joseph Zieve, his wife Ina, and his brother in-law Sid Ritter.  Joe and Sid were pioneers in the Retail market of pipes and tobaccos, and established a real Specialty Tobacco shop.  From 1940 until the late 1970's, Smokers' Haven was one of the largest and most distinguished Pipe and Tobacco shops in the world with an inventory of over 10,000 English pipes and a range of some of the best Pipe Tobacco Blends.  Joe and Sid would take frequent trips to England to develop new tobacco blends and new shapes for GBD pipes so they could offer unique and quality products for their customer base which numbered over 60,000.  In the late 1970's and early 1980's, the pipe market started to dwindle and many of the pipe and tobacco suppliers discontinued their products.  In 1983, Joe Zieve retired and sold Smokers' Haven.  The 2nd owner did not adapt to the market, and Smokers' Haven almost disappeared.  In 1987, my father Arvind Chheda, purchased Smokers' Haven and rescued it from demise.  Throughout the late 1980's and 1990's Cigars were the primary focus for Smokers' Haven.  In 1999, I was passed the torch, and  I have taken an interest in Pipes, and the methods in which Joseph Zieve serviced his customers.  From 2000 to present, Smokers' Haven has re-introduced the Specialty Products it was known for, and I hope to create a similar experience for our customers that Smokers' Haven did in the past.

Name: Pátio Gormet
Description:
Pátio Gourmet
 

Para viver uma vida saudável é preciso inspiração. É preciso de estímulos positivos. Uma atitude única. É preciso encontrar um lugar que combine com toda essa vontade. Para que se possa viver essas sensações todos os dias.

Para fazer parte desse estilo de vida, cada vez mais comum em diversos cantos do planeta, nasceu o Pátio Gourmet, em 2014.

Uma loja especial, que já nasceu saudável, com aquele frescor e aquele jeito gostoso de ser, que nenhum supermercado possuía em Manaus.

Já nasceu inovadora também, com produtos exclusivos, com marcas que fazem sucesso nos mais diversos cantos do mundo. Um cuscuz marroquinho, uma massa italiana. O Pátio trouxe muitas propostas inéditas, harmoniosamente organizadas em estações incríveis para sushi, peixes e carnes. Uma padaria simplesmente deliciosa com fornadas de pães cheirosos e quentinhos saindo a cada hora, uma sessão de dar água na boca com frutas, legumes e verduras absolutamente frescos e de excelente qualidade.

O Pátio Gourmet nasceu para ser mais do que um supermercado gourmet, nasceu para ser a extensão de todas as casas, um pátio mesmo onde se vive com mais qualidade, com respeito a natureza, com um sabor de tudo que é feito na hora, de tudo que deixa a gente feliz.

A loja inaugurou no caminho das avenidas mais movimentadas de Manaus: Constatino Nery e Djalma Batista, por onde passam muitos que vão para casa e de muitos que vem do trabalho. São centenas e centenas de pessoas, que aceitaram o irresistível convite para uma vida mais saudável e saborosa.

E no dia 09 de Agosto de 2019 nasceu o novo Pátio Gourmet Morada do Sol, localizada na Avenida Via Láctea, 825, Aleixo, procurando atender todas as expectativas dos nossos clientes, sendo um ambiente agradável, com um restaurante especial, pensando no paladar dos mais exigentes. Sabemos que viver boas experiências nos conduzem a lidar com o dia a dia de maneira mais leve e feliz, por isso prezamos em servir cada cliente com dedicação e responsabil

𝑪𝒂𝒗𝒊𝒂𝒓 𝒇𝒐𝒔𝒕𝒆𝒓 𝒖𝒏𝒊𝒒𝒖𝒆 𝒎𝒐𝒎𝒆𝒏𝒕𝒔 𝒐𝒇 𝒆𝒙𝒑𝒍𝒐𝒓𝒂𝒕𝒊𝒐𝒏, 𝒖𝒏𝒊𝒕𝒊𝒏𝒈 𝒑𝒆𝒐𝒑𝒍𝒆 𝒊𝒏 𝒕𝒉𝒆 𝒑𝒓𝒆𝒔𝒆𝒏𝒕 𝒎𝒐𝒎𝒆𝒏𝒕."

Founded in Geneva in 2019, Conzept Caviar is born with the desire to create new consumption habits around caviar.  We aspire to introduce this exquisite and lesser-known delicacy to individuals who possess the means to access it but have yet to savor the indulgence of Caviar.

Always considered as a luxury product reserved for a small category of fine connoisseurs, Conzept Caviar intends to change Caviar's upscale image. Our goal is to allow a larger range of consumers to enjoy this fine delicacy, while preserving its prestige and glamour character. 
Selling Caviar in Geneva, Verbier, Zürich to Professionals and Private
individuals since 2019. We are expanding and now exporting Caviar in
whole European Union.

Conzept Caviar is a brand managed by From' Epices SA ( https://www.linkedin.com/in/jean-jacques-tereins-61b5a031 )  based in Geneva. 
https://conzeptcaviar.com/collections/all

Name: BeddyByes Ltd.
Description:
"Made by parents, for parents"
 
BeddyByes was created because existing brands and their products didn't meet our needs and expectations.

As our newborn daughter battled eczema and skin rashes as a result of allergic reactions, we decided to take matters into our own hands. We began with a makeshift crib sheet and a baby hat made out of satin, but quickly realised the synthetic material caused overheating which aggravated our baby's condition.

Driven by the necessity to find an alternative solution, we consulted with dermatologists, and paediatricians and learnt all about natural fabrics and their properties which led us to choose silk due to its natural hypoallergenic composition.

We designed a prototype sheet, made entirely of Mulberry Silk, which not only helped our daughter's skin heal but also prevented loss of hair and the formation of the dreaded bald spot, a common sight among infants.

Wowed by the results we were convinced this product could help other parents too and that's when we decided to form BeddyByes. The rest, as they say, is history!

BeddyByes co-founders, Natasha & Luca

Name: Real Wasabi, LLC
Description:
Real Wasabi, LLC is a trusted leader in the cultivation, sourcing, and distribution of authentic Wasabia japonica—the rare, nutrient-rich plant often misrepresented in the marketplace.

For over 20 years, we’ve worked exclusively promoting the actual 'real' wasabi plant, building long-standing partnerships with skilled growers and developing one of the ONLY independent global supply chains for pure wasabi powder. 

Our commitment to authenticity, quality, and transparency has made us a preferred purveyor for chefs, wellness brands, and ingredient manufacturers worldwide.

Our product offerings include:
 Fresh Wasabi Rhizomes – traditionally grown and hand-harvested
 100% Real Wasabi Powder – made solely from Wasabia japonica with no additives or substitutes
 PureSabi – a concentrated wasabi supplement crafted to support general wellness and vitality
 NutraSabi – a functional wellness line featuring nutraceutical-grade pure wasabi rhizome powder, paired with synergistic botanicals for daily support

Real Wasabi, LLC offers a rare combination of heritage, integrity, and innovation—delivering the true taste and natural properties of Wasabia japonica to culinary professionals, health-conscious consumers, and global product developers alike.

 Connect with us to collaborate, source ingredients, or bring the real wasabi experience to your brand.

Zo proberen we aan alle kanten een steentje bij te dragen aan de maatschappij en het milieu. Ook denken we graag met de wensen van onze klant mee en is maatwerk mogelijk. Name: INDIA KART
Description:
About the Business

IndiaKart is a hyperlocal supply-chain commerce platform empowering Kirana stores with fast delivery of FMCG and grocery products through district-level micro-warehouses. We provide 4–6 hour delivery, better margins, and remove traditional distributor dependency—helping small retailers grow faster.

Diamond Drops, developed under IndiaKart’s FMCG vertical, is a premium smoke-free pooja lamp oil made from a 5-oil purity blend. Each bottle carries a QR code that unlocks “Temple in Every Drop” audio stories, mixing devotion, culture, and premium fragrance science. Pilot batches are complete and launch-ready.

Together, both brands strengthen a Retail + FMCG ecosystem under a single umbrella.


---

USP (Unique Selling Proposition)

IndiaKart

4–6 hour delivery for Kirana stores

Direct manufacturer-to-retailer supply

Better margins + credit support

Micro-warehouse model with local reach

App-based real-time inventory & order tracking


Diamond Drops

5-Oils → 5-Blessings purity blend

Smoke-Free premium lamp oil

Temple Story QR Code (first in India)

Region-wise fragrance variants (TN, KL, KA, AP)

Name: LAMARTINE PARIS
Description:
Créée en 1926 au cœur du 16ème arrondissement, LAMARTINE est l'une des plus anciennes librairie-papeterie indépendante de Paris.
Sa longévité est liée à l'excellence de ses libraires, à leur envie de transmettre leur passion et à  l'énergie qu'ils déploient au quotidien pour créer un lieu de culture et de partage.
A travers les nombreuses dédicaces et rencontres organisées, le public a l'occasion de découvrir des auteurs en devenir ou incontournables lors de moments privilégiés.
En plus de ces événements, LAMARTINE a créé un « PRIX DES LECTEURS » en collaboration avec LE LIVRE DE POCHE et participe à de nombreux salons littéraires et évènements « hors les murs ».
À la librairie, s'ajoutent un espace papeterie ainsi que d'un espace cadeaux consacré aux produits d'exception : beaux stylos, maroquinerie...

Notre passion pour la crème glacée est ancrée dans notre engagement envers la qualité, la créativité et la communauté. Nous nous approvisionnons localement en ingrédients chaque fois que possible, soutenant les agriculteurs et producteurs locaux. Cela nous permet de créer une crème glacée délicieuse et abordable que tout le monde peut apprécier.

Notre équipe innove en permanence, offrant une gamme de saveurs uniques et classiques pour satisfaire tous les goûts. Des rassemblements familiaux aux célébrations spéciales, notre crème glacée est devenue une composante essentielle de nombreux moments mémorables à travers le Cameroun.

Parce que notre volonté est d’élaborer la plus naturelle, la plus onctueuse des glaces et crèmes glacées, des ingrédients de choix, les meilleurs ingrédients, qui donnent à nos glaces un goût d’exception.

Name: Josette Dégustation
Description:
Marre qu’on t’annonce que le vin à déguster sente la pierre mouillée et le cuir (hein ? c’est possible ça ?)
Marre qu’on t’explique que les tannins (quoi ?) sont trop astringents (hein ?)
Toi, tu sais  uniquement dire si tu aimes ou pas, ce vin dans ton verre (et c’est déjà bien !) mais tu aimerais mieux décrire et comprendre tes sensations quand tu dégustes un verre de vin… 

Alors le coffret Josette est fait pour toi !!!
Grâce à lui, tu sauras mettre les bons mots sur ce que tu ressens lors de ta dégustation, tu apprendras de façon ludique et pédagogique à décrire ce que tu sens au nez et en bouche. Tu deviendras progressivement un expert du vin en compagnie de tes proches.

Comment ? Avec un coffret complet qui ne te coûtera pas un bras, parce que chez Josette Dégustation, on veut démocratiser la dégustation de bons vins, et la rendre accessible à tous  !

Alors, pour débuter : 2 bouteilles de vin rouge, des fiches d’initiation fun et pratiques qui te donneront conseils et « trucs » pour assurer une dégustation d’enfer.

Surtout le coffret Josette, c’est LE cadeau idéal : pour toi évidemment, mais aussi pour ce pote qui voudrait participer à une leçon d’initiation à la dégustation mais qui a la flemme de sortir de chez lui, ou celui, tu sais, qui emploie plein de mots compliqués sans savoir vraiment ce qu’il dit.

Name: Ornament Shop
Description:
About Ornament Shop

Ornament Shop has been a trusted name in holiday decorations for decades, originally known as OrnamentShop.com. As part of our recent rebranding, we’ve embraced a fresh new look by dropping the “.com”—a simple yet meaningful change that reflects the evolution of our brand while staying true to what matters most: celebrating life’s special moments through timeless keepsakes.

As a veteran-owned, family-run business, we take pride in delivering high-quality, meaningful ornaments that bring joy to every holiday season. We believe that ornaments are more than decorations—they are storytellers of cherished traditions, milestones, and memories. Whether it’s a baby’s first Christmas, a heartfelt tribute, or a reminder of life’s adventures, our handpicked collection is designed to bring joy and meaning to your celebrations.

Beyond personal keepsakes, we also specialize in B2B corporate orders and custom design work, helping businesses create unique, branded ornaments for employees, clients, and events. From intricate logo designs to personalized holiday gifts, we work closely with our partners to craft memorable, high-quality pieces that leave a lasting impression.

At Ornament Shop, we are dedicated to quality craftsmanship, exceptional service, and creating keepsakes that last for generations. We look forward to continuing our legacy of spreading holiday magic, one ornament at a time.

 New name. Same heart. More memories to cherish.

Mustafa Cinali tarafından kurulan firmamız, e-ticaret sektöründe yenilikçi çözümler sunmaktadır. Yatırımcılar ve girişimcilerle iş birlikleri yaparak uluslararası ticaret olanakları sağlamaktayız. Şirketimiz, müşteri memnuniyeti odaklı bir çalışma prensibine sahip olup, etik değerlere büyük önem vermektedir.
Hizmetlerimiz
Amazon'da Büyük Markalar ile Toptan Satış



Amazon üzerinden büyük markalarla iş birliği yaparak toptan satış hizmeti sunuyoruz. Müşterilerimize geniş bir ürün yelpazesi ve rekabetçi fiyatlar sunarak e-ticarette başarılı olmalarını sağlıyoruz.



Kendi Markalarımız



Collapssi, uluslararası pazarlarda satışa sunulan kendi markalarına sahiptir. Bu markalarımız, kalite ve müşteri memnuniyeti odaklı olarak üretilmekte ve geniş bir kitleye hitap etmektedir.

E-ticaret Yazılım Hizmetimiz



E-ticaret alanında sunduğumuz hizmetler, küçük ölçekli girişimcilerin büyümelerine ve büyük ölçekli girişimcilerle aynı rekabet avantajına sahip olmalarına yardımcı olmaktadır. Geliştirdiğimiz yazılım projeleri ile sektörde fark yaratıyoruz.



İthalat ve İhracat Hizmetlerimiz



Uluslararası ticaret olanakları sunarak, girişimcilerin ürünlerini dünya pazarlarına açmalarına yardımcı oluyoruz. Profesyonel ekibimiz ile ithalat ve ihracat süreçlerini sorunsuz bir şekilde yönetiyoruz.



E-ticaret Danışmanlığı



E-ticaret sektöründe bilgi ve deneyim sahibi ekibimiz, girişimcilere ve şirketlere danışmanlık hizmeti sunarak, stratejik kararlar almalarına ve işlerini büyütmelerine yardımcı olmaktadır.

Name: ONS Biologische Delicatessen
Description:
Welkom bij ONS biologische delicatessenwinkel! Bij ONS draait alles om gezond eten, het milieu, lokale gemeenschappen en hoogwaardige producten.

We geloven in de kracht van biologisch voedsel om zowel ons lichaam als de planeet te voeden. Daarom selecteren we zorgvuldig onze producten van lokale boeren die met liefde en respect voor de natuur verbouwen. Onze verse maaltijden, sappige vleeswaren en ambachtelijke kazen zijn allemaal biologisch, waardoor je geniet van de puurste smaken zonder schadelijke chemicaliën of pesticiden.

Door direct bij boeren in te kopen, verminderen we transport en CO2-uitstoot, waardoor we ons steentje bijdragen aan het verminderen van klimaatverandering. Bovendien ondersteunen we lokale boeren en stimuleren we duurzame landbouwpraktijken. Het is onze missie om een duurzame voedselketen op te bouwen, waarin boeren een eerlijke prijs ontvangen en de gemeenschap wordt versterkt.

In onze winkel hebben we ook onze eigen productieafdeling, waar we met zorg en vakmanschap heerlijke gerechten bereiden. Onze getalenteerde chefs maken gebruik van de beste biologische ingrediënten om smaakvolle maaltijden, ambachtelijke vleeswaren en andere lekkernijen te creëren. Op deze manier kunnen we de kwaliteit en versheid van onze producten garanderen, terwijl we ook de controle hebben over het productieproces.

Kies voor gezond eten, ondersteun lokale boeren, en geniet van biologische lekkernijen van de hoogste kwaliteit. Stap binnen in onze winkel en ervaar de heerlijke smaken die samenkomen in een duurzame en verantwoorde voedingservaring.

Name: MANGiA PiANO!
Description:
La première et unique Epicerie Fine Italienne à Paris spécialisée dans la valorisation et la distribution de produits d'excellence de la région MARCHE en Italie.  
Une épicerie italienne enracinée dans la vie de quartier (Paris 11eme) et engagée à coté des producteurs/partenaires pour favoriser les circuits courts, pour faciliter l'accès aux productions du terroir et offrir aux clients la garantie de consommer des produits gouteux, de qualité et respectueux de l'environnement.  Un nom, MANGiA PiANO! qui synthétise les deux valeurs fondateurs du projet : le bien manger et la lenteur, considérés comme deux aspects essentiels de l'art de vivre à l'Italienne, de la "dolce vita", du "dolce far niente" , en contraposition évidente et voulue avec la vitesse d'un certain style de vie urbain.
Une invitation à la lenteur, à prendre le temps : le temps que il faut aux matières premières et aux produits pour maturer au juste point et donner le plus de saveur;  le temps qui impose l'attention de l'artisan producteur à ce que il fait et à comment il le fait ; le temps que il faut prendre pour déguster un produit ou un bon verre de vin et voyager en Italie, dans la région Marche, le temps d'un repas.

Name: Burn.in Candle Co.
Description:
"In 2016, I made partner at my law firm.  While very exciting, it also required a ridiculous amount of constant grind.  After a couple years, I started experiencing major symptoms of burnout.  I was always tired, I couldn't focus, and my stress and anxiety were through the roof.  I wanted to create something for myself and other professionals that would alleviate some of these symptoms while creating a more sustainable work environment.  And so, Burn.in Candle Co. was created. 

Our candles infuse your space with essential oil blends shown to lessen the symptoms commonly associated with career burnout like stress, fatigue, inattentiveness, carelessness, irritability, lack of concentration, and memory loss.  You deserve a candle created with the same amount of care and intention that you put into your career.  I hope you love Burn.in as much as I do."

-Donna-Marie, Founder


Burn.in Candle Co. features candles and wax melts that are hand-crafted with premium ingredients.  Our candles and wax melts are made with all natural coconut wax.  They're vegan, non-toxic, and provide you with a cleaner burn.  Our wooden wicks are 100% natural, clean burning, domestically sourced, and - the best part - they create a soft soothing crackle as they burn. Burn.in Candles are handmade in microbatches of 20 or less, ensuring that each one is meticulously crafted to meet our quality standards.

Be kind to your mind.
Don't burnout.  Get Burn.in.

Name: SYSTEMKLUG
Description:
Beobachten. Irritieren. Loslegen.
SYSTEMKLUG ist genau das Richtige für dich, wenn du keine Lust mehr auf Businesstheater, aber Sehnsucht nach echter Veränderung hast.

Du bekommst Produkte, die Reflexion, Strukturarbeit und systemische Erkenntnisse nicht nur möglich, sondern alltagstauglich machen. Unsere Tools helfen dir, Muster zu erkennen, Widersprüche zu benennen und kluge Entscheidungen zu treffen – genau da, wo sonst nur Businesstheater stattfindet.

SYSTEMKLUG Produkte bringen Bewegung in Denkprozesse. Mit Struktur. Mit Humor. Unsere SYSTEMKLUG Formate bedeuten: Erlebnisse. Erkenntnisse. SYSTEMKLUGE Entscheidungen. Keine Spielerei. Irritation mit Wirkung.

Sie schaffen Reflexionsräume für Einzelne und Teams – für die Fragen, die sonst lieber umgangen werden. Was bei anderen auf der Hinterbühne bleibt, kommt bei uns auf den Tisch. 

Wir sind Vivien & Benjamin – die Kreativköpfe hinter SYSTEMKLUG powered by INVIBE Organizations.

SYSTEMKLUG ist entstanden, weil uns in der Beratungspraxis etwas gefehlt hat: anfassbare Helferlein, die daran erinnern, dass Reflexion und Strukturarbeit entscheidend sind – für Veränderungsfähigkeit und Führung, die wirkt. 

Nicht theoretisch. Praktisch. Humorvoll. Liebevoll unbequem. Hilfreich.

Denn: Manchmal reicht ein Impuls. Eine kluge Frage. Ein Perspektivwechsel.

Also haben wir angefangen konkrete, anfassbare Produkte für unsere Kunden zu entwickeln. Bis zu der Frage: „Äh, wo kann man denn das coole Zeug von euch kaufen?“

2025. Here we are: www.shop-systemklug.de!

Lust auf mehr?
SYSTEMKLUG ist für dich der Einstieg und du spürst, da geht noch mehr? 
Wir freuen uns über deinen Besuch: https://www.linkedin.com/company/invibe-organizations/

Name: SUNWAVE LIMITED
Description:
SUNWAVE LTD is at the forefront of revolutionizing the food storage and distribution industry by harnessing the power of solar energy. Founded on the principles of sustainability, innovation, and community empowerment. 

SUNWAVE LTD is dedicated to providing cutting-edge, eco-friendly solutions to tackle some of the most pressing challenges of our time: food security, climate change, and the transition to renewable energy.

Our signature solar-powered cold rooms and vending machines represent a leap forward in food preservation technology. Designed to be both efficient and environmentally friendly, these solutions offer an answer to the critical issue of food waste, while also reducing reliance on fossil fuels and lowering operational costs for farmers, fishermen, and retailers alike.

At SUNWAVE LTD, we believe in the power of community and technology to create a better world. Our initiatives are rooted in the principles of the circular economy, aiming not only to innovate within the food industry but also to foster social and economic development in underserved communities. By emphasizing local engagement and sustainable practices, we're working to build resilience in the face of climate change and promote a healthier planet for future generations.

Our mission extends beyond providing solar-powered cooling systems; we're committed to educating and empowering communities, advocating for climate justice through an intersectional lens, and driving radical systemic change towards a more sustainable and equitable global food system.

Join us on our journey as we continue to innovate, inspire, and implement solutions where the sun meets innovation. Together, we can light the path to a sustainable future.

#SUNWAVELTD #Sustainability #RenewableEnergy #FoodSecurity #ClimateAction

Name: Boss Molly Bourbon
Description:
Boss Molly is a bold, small batch, wheated bourbon with an adventurous spirit. Aged 4 years in American Oak, perfected with toasted brandy staves to bring out upfront notes of butterscotch, citrus & vanilla, with hints of leather and spiced brandy on the finish.

Our bourbon has a wonderful complexity of flavor and character with an abundance of detectable flavor notes to delight and wow your senses. Once you taste it, it’s hard to go back to drinking anything else.

We named the brand Boss Molly after an old ranching term for the stubborn female mules that lead the pack (and did it their way!), something we all resonate with. We’re also one of the first to have a woman featured on the label that is meant to honor the women of bourbon’s past, present, and future.

Name: LOVE-MY.EARTH (LME GmbH)
Description:
„wer hier reinkommt, liebt unseren Planeten.“

Spaß und Style „ohne“ Reue, das ist die klare Botschaft von LOVE-MY.EARTH.

Und genau so ist die Idee zum Club entstanden.

Der Kern der Marke ist also das besondere Verhältnis zwischen der Brand, dir und unserem gemeinsamen Planeten. Es sind die Werte Nachhaltigkeit, Transparenz, Fairness und Innovation, die dich und uns zu einer Gemeinschaft machen. Hier geht es um weit mehr als Shopping.

wer steckt eigentlich hinter love-my.earth?

Ist das interessant? Ist nicht viel wichtiger, wer für LOVE-MY.EARTH steht, sich wirklich einsetzt?
Gegründet wurde LOVE-MY.EARTH mit dem Ziel, dir den Zugang zu nachhaltigen Artikeln zu erleichterten. Ob Kaufen oder Mieten, je nach Bedürfnis und Zweck ist beides möglich. Denn du sollst deinen Style, deinen Sport und den Schutz unseres Planeten ganz easy miteinander vereinen können.

Genau für diese Werte stehen wir, als Team, als Freunde, als Partner.


nachhaltigkeit seit 1904

Passend zu unserer Philosophie, haben wir eine alte Bäckerei vor dem Verfall gerettet und diese aufwendig und nachhaltig unter strengen Auflagen des Denkmalschutzes saniert.

Historisch betrachtet, war die alte Bäckerei schon über 100 Jahre die  Anlaufstelle für regionale, handgefertigte Spezialitäten.

lerne uns persönlich kennen

Gerne führen wir dich persönlich in die individuelle Produktwelt von LOVE-MY.EARTH. Zu entdecken gibt es bei uns nur nachhaltig hergestellte Produkte.

Bitte beachte: Unser Store hat nicht immer jedes Produkt, dass du online siehst, auch stationär auf Lager. Du kannst es allerdings kostenfrei und klimaneutral in den Store schicken lassen.

Renting-Option: Du bist nur zu Besuch an der Ostsee oder neu im Board- und Wassersport? Kein Problem. Wir vermieten Produkte! Dank unserem Renting-Modell tastest du dich kostengünstig und ökologisch vernünftig an deinen neuen Sport heran oder genießt in vollen Zügen deinen Urlaub.

Name: Fridge Friend
Description:
Increase the shelf-life of your fresh produce by up to 3 weeks.

Stop throwing your groceries (and money) in the trash. Save money and reduce food waste with a Fridge Friend filter.

Meet Fridge Friend
Are you sick of throwing out food? We have an affordable, simple solution that actually works - and it’s great for the planet too. 

The Fridge Friend filter is a scientifically-backed filter that when placed inside your fridge, keeps your produce fresh (and edible) for longer.

A friend to your fridge, a friend to the planet.

Why do I need a Fridge Friend?
We’re throwing out tonnes of food each year at a great cost to both households, and the environment. In fact, the average household throws out 25% of their groceries, which adds up to over $2,000 per household, per year. That hurts!

But the worst part of all? Food wastage is drastically hurting the planet too, contributing up to 10% of all greenhouse gas emissions. 

But it’s not all bad news…

We can tackle climate change directly from our kitchens. Studies have shown reducing food wastage is the single most powerful thing you can do to impact climate change.

The planet and your grocery bill will thank you.

How does it work?
Simply place it in your fridge and Fridge Friend saves you that extra trip to the grocery store by filtering contaminated air, water and particles through our 100% natural mineral compound.

It’s completely non-toxic and safe to use, with its unique honeycomb structure absorbing 79% of ethylene gas and 85% bacteria and odors - proudly preserving your produce.

Name: De Witte Doos
Description:
Het uitzoeken van een passend geschenk voor iemand, maakt niet alleen de persoon gelukkig aan wie je het geeft, maar ook een beetje jezelf. Dat is meteen ook de reden van het ontstaan van De Witte Doos.

De Witte Doos wil ervoor zorgen dat het zoeken naar dat geschikte cadeau makkelijk is, hartverwarmend ook, en dat je de romantiek van het geven herontdekt. 

De naam komt van de plaats waar het idee is gegroeid: ons prachtig wit huis in een groene wijk in Berlare. Daar wonen we met een samengesteld gezin van zeven: ikzelf, mijn partner Tom en onze 5 kinderen. De massa liefde die hier woont, heeft mij geïnspireerd om wat van die liefde in pakjes te stoppen en zoveel mogelijk mensen daarvan te laten meegenieten.

Name: Queen Bee Honey
Description:
Queen Bee Honey is a purpose-driven natural food brand committed to providing 100% pure, chemical-free honey sourced directly from nature. Established in 2023 as a grassroots initiative, Queen Bee Honey has become a trusted name in region for natural wellness and authentic taste.
We offer over 20 varieties of raw, unprocessed, single-origin honey collected from different floral belts across the country, such as Sidr, Acacia, Himalayan, Jamun, Mustard, Litchi, and Wild Forest. Our honey is never heated or adulterated, preserving all natural enzymes, nutrients, and flavor. Each drop is harvested responsibly, without any use of chemicals, additives, or artificial processes.
Beyond products, Queen Bee Honey stands for people and purpose. We empower women through employment and training, creating livelihood opportunities for rural and underprivileged women. We partner directly with producers across India to ensure ethical sourcing and fair pricing. Our model supports sustainable beekeeping, biodiversity conservation, and rural development.
We also help aspiring entrepreneurs and small resellers start their own businesses by offering affordable bulk rates, customized packaging, and branding support. With us, many first-time business owners have launched successful ventures in natural foods, especially women and retired individuals.
Whether you're a customer seeking real honey, a retailer, or someone looking to start a meaningful business, we’re here for you.

 Pan-India Delivery
 Bulk & B2B Orders
 Business Startup Support
 Queen Bee Honey — Just Honey. Just Pure.

Name: dinkers glazed nuts
Description:
WHY we do what we do


glazed nuts and autism…

come together at dinkers! 

based in southern utah, dinkers specializes in gourmet glazed nuts, including almonds, pecans, and peanuts. owners devon and anna are passionate about more than just delivering delicious nuts—they're committed to fostering an inclusive environment. dinkers mission is to provide meaningful employment opportunities to neurodivergent young adults, empowering them toward greater independence.

with over four years of mentorship experience in the industry, devon and anna, drawing from her personal experience with autism in the family, truly understand the challenges neurodivergent adults face. in fact, the dinkers name and logo have a special connection to their family story. anna’s sister, kathryn, who has autism, created the dinkers brand. kathryn loves drawing animals and writing short stories;  she depicted devon as “dinkers the giraffe” when he joined the family. when devon and anna decided to start their gourmet nut business in st. george, kathryn was given the honor of creating the brand’s logo and name—dinkers glazed nuts.

dinkers isn’t just about delicious snacks; it’s about life lessons. through their work, team members learn essential skills such as time management, conflict resolution, customer service, workplace hygiene, etc. these lessons are designed to help them thrive both within the workplace and in their personal lives, building confidence and independence along the way.

in october 2024, dinkers launched a sister brand along side neurodev called neurodivergent nuts, advancing their mission to “embrace neurodivergence one nut at a time.” check out the website to learn more about the incredible team behind this initiative.

Name: Romancini Supermercados
Description:
Os Supermercados Romancini são uma rede de supermercados que conta com cinco empresas distintas para atender às necessidades dos clientes. Com mais de 23 anos de história, essa rede se tornou uma referência no setor varejista.

O Romancini Vera é reconhecido por sua dedicação em oferecer produtos frescos e de qualidade, como frutas, legumes, carnes e produtos de padaria. Os clientes podem encontrar alimentos saudáveis e de origem confiável nessa empresa.

A Romancini Matriz é a loja principal da rede, que oferece uma experiência completa de compra. Com um amplo espaço e setores organizados, a loja possui uma variedade de produtos, desde itens básicos de mercearia até produtos de cuidados pessoais e limpeza.

O Romancini Super Prático foi projetado com foco na praticidade e conveniência. Com um layout otimizado, os clientes encontram uma seleção de produtos essenciais de forma rápida e eficiente. Essa loja é ideal para compras rápidas.

O Romancini Restaurante é uma extensão dos supermercados, oferecendo refeições prontas e lanches rápidos. Com um cardápio diversificado que inclui pratos quentes, saladas, sanduíches e sobremesas, o restaurante atende tanto aos clientes que buscam uma pausa durante as compras quanto aos que desejam alimentação fora de casa.

Por fim, o Supermercado Verdão é parte integrante dos Supermercados Romancini. Com uma variedade de produtos alimentícios e não alimentícios, essa loja atende a uma clientela diversa. Com preços competitivos e um ambiente agradável, o Supermercado Verdão é uma opção popular para compras em grande escala ou do dia a dia.

Ao longo dos anos, os Supermercados Romancini se destacaram por sua dedicação em oferecer produtos de qualidade, variedade e excelente atendimento aos clientes. Com suas cinco empresas, essa rede se tornou uma escolha confiável para as necessidades de compras dos consumidores.
