Name: Uitwisbaar Notitieboek
Description:
Uitwisbaar notitieboek - Bedrukken met eigen logo

Duurzaam
Met een uitwisbaar notitieboek, ook wel een herbruikbaar schrift of duurzaam notitieboek genoemd, haal je een milieuvriendelijke alternatieve oplossing in huis of op kantoor voor traditionele papieren notitieboeken. Naast dat je kiest voor duurzaamheid met een uitwisbaar notitieboek, bespaar je ook geld doordat je tot wel 500 keer en meer kunt gebruiken. Je hoeft immers geen papieren notitieboekjes meer te kopen.

Branding
Wil je je merk op een slimme en duurzame manier onder de aandacht brengen? Met een uitwisbaar notitieboek zorg je ervoor dat jouw logo dagelijks in beeld is bij klanten en medewerkers. Geen losse blaadjes meer, maar één uitwisbaar notitieboek dat keer op keer gebruikt kan worden.

Voor employer branding is het ook een toffe keuze. Het laat zien dat je als werkgever geeft om slimme, milieuvriendelijke oplossingen en helpt je team georganiseerd te blijven. Plus, het is gewoon leuk om te gebruiken! Een praktisch en origineel relatiegeschenk dat écht wordt gewaardeerd.

#relatiegeschenk #duurzaam #branding

Name: Two Fish Foods
Description:
Two Fish Crab Shack, located in Chicago's Bronzeville neighborhood, quickly gained a cult-like following when it opened in 2016 thanks to its fun-filled seafood boil in a bag experience featuring fine, fresh seafood paired with unique and irresistible sauces.

When the COVID-19 pandemic closed indoor dining across the Chicagoland area, Two Fish founder Yasmin Curtis took to her kitchen to create an at-home solution for her seafood boil devotees. She combined customer-favorite shrimp and crab legs with Two Fish’s 3 The Chi-Way sauce in an easy-to-use, frozen package fans could keep in their freezers and enjoy from the convenience of home and Two Fish Foods was born.

Today, Two Fish Food's seafood boil bags are available in the seafood freezer section at thousands of grocery stores across the country. To find Two Fish Foods near you, visit www.twofishfoods.com.

Name: Puffles
Description:
At Puffles, we are committed to bringing Hong Kong egg waffles to the South Florida community with a modern twist. Not only are we introducing one of Hong Kong’s most famous street snacks to foodies in the States, but we are also injecting our own spin to the cultural phenomenon. Hong Kong egg waffles, also known as "Gai Dan Jai", are crispy on the outside yet soft and sweet on the inside. Individuals are able to customize their own waffle cone with choices from our wide selection of ice cream flavors and toppings. 

To complement these signature waffles, Puffles also serves bubble tea that is made to order using only the best ingredients sourced from Taiwan. Bubble tea was originally created by mixing black tea with milk and adding tapioca balls (bubbles, boba, pearls) to tie the drink together. At Puffles, we are committed to bringing the best and freshest bubble tea in the area. Our teas are brewed daily, using only loose tea leaves to release the full flavor of the leaves. The tapioca pearls are also cooked in our kitchen throughout the day to maintain the quality and texture of the pearls. These tapioca pearls have a shelf life of only four hours to ensure that it has a chewy consistency with the sweet taste of honey. It can be added into your choice of beverage to elevate your drinking experience to the next level. At Puffles, you can choose between milk tea, fruit teas, or slushes to satisfy any craving you might have. Toppings range from tapioca pearls and popping bubbles (an explosion of flavor caused by the burst of the bubbles) to different types of jellies. With all these options, we hope you can find the bubble tea drink that is perfect just for you!

By creating opportunities for military spouses and first responders, we aim to blend exceptional products with a purpose-driven business model that fosters connection, gratitude, and strength.

Bravory (brav•ory): (noun): The unique combination of bravery and valor, defined as the exceptional courage and moral strength to confront challenges with both bold action and noble purpose. It encapsulates the fearless pursuit of what is right and just, often for the benefit of others, reflecting both personal resilience and selfless dedication.

This new word signifies not only acting with boldness but doing so with honor and integrity, blending the spirit of bravery with the principled essence of valor.

Name: Los Gauchitos Guatemala

Los Gauchitos: Tradición y Sabor en Cada Mordisco

Desde su fundación en 1985, Los Gauchitos se ha convertido en un ícono de la gastronomía guatemalteca. Conocidos por nuestros deliciosos choripanes y sándwiches uruguayos, hemos dejado una huella imborrable en el corazón de los chapines. 
Nuestros productos se disfrutan en carretas, locales en centros comerciales y restaurantes propios, ofreciendo una experiencia culinaria auténtica y accesible para todos.

En Los Gauchitos, nos enorgullece llevar la tradición a la mesa, combinando ingredientes frescos y recetas familiares que han sido perfeccionadas a lo largo de los años. Nuestro compromiso con la calidad y el servicio al cliente nos ha permitido crecer y expandirnos.

Únete a nosotros y sé parte de una marca que celebra la cultura y el sabor guatemalteco. En Los Gauchitos, cada mordisco cuenta una historia.

Name: Journext
Description:
Willkommen bei Journext – Dein Sprungbrett in die Welt des Backpackings und Outdoor-Abenteuers!

 Bei uns dreht sich alles um die Freiheit, die Welt zu entdecken. Wir sind hier, um Dich auf Deinen Reisen zu begleiten, mit Ausrüstung, die nicht nur funktioniert, sondern Dich inspiriert. Dein nächstes großes Abenteuer beginnt mit einem Rucksack voller Träume und der richtigen Ausrüstung in der Hand.

Leidenschaft fürs Reisen: Wir sind selbst Backpacker und Abenteurer, genau wie Du. Wir wissen, was unterwegs zählt: Qualität, Funktionalität und genau die Features, die du auf deiner Reise brauchst. Deshalb findest Du bei uns nur Produkte, die wir selbst auf Herz und Nieren geprüft haben. 

Nachhaltig unterwegs: Wir lieben unseren Planeten und wollen ihn bewahren – für heutige Entdecker und kommende Generationen. Unsere Produkte sind nicht nur langlebig, sondern auch nachhaltig hergestellt. Dein Fußabdruck in der Welt soll positiv sein!

Unsere Mission: Wir sind hier, um die Backpacking-Community zu stärken und zu inspirieren. Unsere Mission ist es, Dir das beste Equipment an die Hand zu geben, damit Du die Welt auf Deine Art erkunden kannst.

Innovation und Inspiration: Wir glauben an die Kraft der Neugier und des Entdeckens. Daher bringen wir ständig neue Ideen und Innovationen in unser Sortiment ein, damit Deine Reise noch aufregender wird.

 Sei Teil unserer Community: Bei Journext bist Du mehr als nur ein Kunde – Du bist Teil einer leidenschaftlichen Gruppe von Weltentdeckern. Folge uns, tausche Dich aus und lass Dich von unglaublichen Reisegeschichten inspirieren.
Mach Dich bereit!: Dein nächstes Abenteuer wartet. Sei mutig, sei neugierig und entdecke die Welt mit Journext.

Name: Woodberg GmbH
Description:
Woodberg wurde von zwei Freunden gegründet und ist durch Begeisterung für natürliche, gut-ausgesuchte und qualitativ hochwertige Pflegeprodukte, Kosmetik und Nischenparfums aus allen Teilen der Welt entstanden.
“Der Umgang mit und die Begeisterung für ausgewählte, natürliche Pflegeprodukte und Nischendüfte, die einen sofort in ihren Bann ziehen können, dabei aber nicht an jeder Ecke zu bekommen sind, war schon lange etwas, dass sich in unserer täglichen Routine etabliert und viel unserer Zeit eingenommen hatte.
Gesunde Ernährung, Sport, biologisch angebaute Produkte, die Fokussierung auf Nachhaltigkeit und ein natürliches Lebensgefühl passen aus unserer Sicht nicht zu Kosmetik-Massenwaren, die mit Synthetik sowie einfachen Füll- und Konservierungsstoffen hergestellt werden und dabei meist noch das Wohl von Tieren missachten. Genauso wenig zu Parfums, die unter Qualen extrahierte tierische Duftstoffe enthalten, welche man seit Jahrzehnten natürlich synthetisieren und somit sogar besser riechend alternativ gewinnen kann. Woodberg ist mit unserer Hintergrundmotivation entstanden, diese gesunde Denkweise mit den richtigen, wirksamen, nachhaltigen Produkten zu komplettieren und dieses spezielle Gefühl auch anderen zugänglich zu machen. Wir sehen uns dabei als eine Online-Plattform, die übersichtlich sowie leicht verständlich ist und das nötige Hintergrundwissen zu allen Produkten liefert, um zu verstehen wie etwas wirkt und warum man es vielleicht für sich in Betracht ziehen sollte.”

Name: P.P.S / Prev.Protec.Solution
Description:
Nous sommes une entreprise passionnée par la sécurité et le santé de vos travailleurs, nous sommes disposés à vous accompagner dans la sélection et la fourniture de solutions et d'équipements les plus adaptés à vos besoins.
Nous comprenons à quel point la gestion des risques au sein de votre entreprise est essentielle pour assurer un environnement de travail sûr et serein. C'est pourquoi nous mettons un point d'honneur à vous fournir des solutions qui sont à la fois pratiques et raisonnables dans la maîtrise des risques.
Notre approche est centrée sur la compréhension approfondie de vos besoins spécifiques. Nous prenons le temps de vous écouter, d'analyser vos environnements de travail et de considérer les tâches accomplies par vos collaborateurs. Cela nous permet de vous conseiller efficacement sur les équipements et les solutions qui sont adaptés à votre secteur d'activité, tout en respectant vos différentes contraintes.
Nous ne croyons pas en une approche "taille unique". Chaque entreprise est unique, et c'est pourquoi nous nous engageons à vous proposer des solutions sur mesure, conçues pour répondre spécifiquement à vos défis en matière de santé et de sécurité. Notre large gamme de produits de qualité vous permettra de trouver ce qui correspond le mieux à vos besoins, tout en veillant à ce que chaque solution soit efficace et facilement intégrable à votre entreprise.
Notre expérience est là pour vous accompagner à chaque étape du processus, de la sélection initiale à la mise en place des équipements. Nous sommes fiers de notre capacité à fournir un service client exceptionnel et à établir des relations de confiance à long terme avec nos clients.

Name: Herbal Cacao
Description:
We are Herbal Cacao, Europe’s leading ceremonial cacao brand for powerful herbal blends rooted in Indigenous wisdom and modern holistic wellness.

Created in sacred partnership with Indigenous Maya communities in Guatemala and Belize, our ceremonial cacao is more than a drink, it’s a sacred medicine. Each blend is infused with functional mushrooms, adaptogenic herbs, and ancestral intention to support self-love, daily ritual, and spiritual connection.

From lion’s mane for mental clarity, to chaga for immune resilience, and blue lotus for inner calm. Whether you seek emotional clarity, heart-opening presence, or nervous system balance,  our cacao guides you home to yourself, every cup invites you to slow down, tune in, and feel, 1-sacred sip at-a-time.

We are on a mission to help people across Europe return to ritual, heart-centered living, and embodied holistic wellness — one heart-opening sip at a time.

 Discover the blends: www.herbalcacao.com
 Join our free online community: https://herbal-cacao-community.mn.co/spaces/10308003?utm_source=manual

Our mission is to empower holistic wellness through our medicinal ceremonial cacao blends, created for daily rituals that cultivate a deeper sense of self-love.

Through our unique, powerful blends, we invite you to join us on this transformative path toward a conscious and healthy lifestyle. 

Together, we are co-creating a conscious new world of heart-centered living, empowering self-love one sip at a time.

Name: Fitek Gear
Description:
Fitek Gear designs ergonomic harnesses for drones, tablets and field tech.  Our gear is built for surveyors, construction crews, environmental teams, and training programs where long shifts and tough conditions are the norm.

Every harness is engineered to reduce fatigue, protect equipment, and improve safety—without slowing teams down. We test in real-world conditions and refine with crew feedback to make sure every detail holds up under pressure. 

Founded by a builder with firsthand field experience, Fitek exists to solve problems gear creators overlooked for years. If your crew is still using neck straps or improvised rigs, there’s a better way. 

You can order direct, book a demo, or see the gear in action at fitekgear.com. 

Formerly Tablet EX Gear. We rebranded to reflects how our product line has grown from just tablets to supporting drone operators, and crews who need custom, secure, ergonomic carry in the field.

They poured their hearts and souls into crafting the perfect shawarma for you! So Get ready to unveil our delectable twist on this middle eastern delight. 

Get your taste buds ready for an explosion because something truly extraordinary is waiting for you!

Name: La nostra Italia.nl
Description:
Zullen we ons even voorstellen?
Wij zijn Yvonne en Marloes uit Boxmeer en al jaren groot fan van ItaIië. 

Uit onze liefde voor ItaIië, is onze passie voor het mooiste van ItaIië geboren. Daarom hebben we samen La nostra Italia opgericht. 
Onder het mooiste van ItaIië verstaan we onze heerlijke delicatessen, maar ook de streek waar onze mooie producten vandaan komen. Onze producten zijn uniek en puur Italiaans, sommige zelfs rechtstreeks uit de ‘laars’.

We zijn gespecialiseerd in het samenstellen van op maat gemaakte pakketten.
- Olijfolie extra vierge, pasta, pesto of wijn
- In een doos, op een houten plateau of in een mand
Alle combinaties zijn mogelijk, dit is slechts een kleine greep uit ons assortiment.

Our physical warehouse and store is located at 649 Monroe St, Jackson, MS 39202. We offer local pick up, worldwide shipment, and local deliveries.

Name: CHOC·O·PAIN French Bakery & Café
Description:
CHOC·O·PAIN (www.chocopainbakery.com) is a French bakery that offers typically French products.

With its quality know-how, the bakery promises its customers a trip to France thanks to an old-fashioned setting and traditional French delicacies: baguette, croissant, pain au chocolat...

All made with quality products sometimes imported directly from France or from local producers. From the real butter croissant to the real molded baguette, to the real traditional loaf, CHOC·O·PAIN is developing a wide range of products to delight the taste buds of its customers.

The company currently owns 5 stores in New Jersey: 3 in Jersey City, and 2 in Hoboken.

Name: Lamperouge
Description:
Il y a de cela plusieurs années… deux amis qui tombaient tout petits dans l’univers japonais et qui n’en sont jamais sorti ! Et ces deux amis : ces deux nakamas, c’est nous !

Deux nakamas, qui sont aussi de grands passionnés de mode. Ça vous dit quelque chose ? Vous l’avez surement vu dès que vous avez atterri sur nos différents réseaux sociaux… ce n’est autre que notre philosophie : la mode et le manga, c’est compatible.
Le voici, le facteur décisionnel qui a permis la création de Lamperouge.

En 2021, ce fut le moment de lancer notre marque  de streetwear.
pour répondre à une demande de plus en plus croissante : proposer des vêtements issus de l'univers japonais qui puisse se porter et s'assumer.
Ainsi, nous tenons à coeur de proposer une marque qui puisse être porté par tous sans pour autant tomber dans l'exagération. 

Voici l'essence même de notre mission : démocratiser la mode manga.

Description: Our group philosophy centers around living in harmony with Mother Nature. We view organic not just as a product, but as a way of life. Name: Espressissimo.de
Description:
Espressissimo - unser Herz schlägt für Kaffee
Wir, das sind meine Frau Petra und ich, Oliver Pflüger. Gemeinsam führen wir unseren Espresso Onlinehandel seit 2003, also schon eine kleine Ewigkeit. Damit zählen wir zu den Vorreitern des heute boomenden Onlinehandels mit Kaffee, Espresso und Espresso Equipment. Wir beschäftigen uns mittlerweile Vollzeit mit dem Thema Kaffee - neben unseren 3 Kindern:-)

Die Logistik, also das doch etwas zeitaufwändige Packen Ihrer Bestellungen, den Warenzugang und die Lagerführung, haben wir mittlerweile an einen externen Logistiker übertragen, so dass wir uns mehr dem Kundenservice, neuen und bestehenden Röstern sowie den zahlreichen Marketingaktionen widmen können.

Unsere Kaffeeleidenschaft
Im Jahre 1999 haben wir in Freising eine italienische Espressobar namens "Espresso Bar" übernommen und 8 Jahre lang geführt. Dort haben wir das harte Gastronomendasein erlebt - mit allen seinen Höhen und Tiefen. Daher können wir unsere Kunden wirklich aus der Praxis heraus beraten und speziell Gastronomen vor Fehlern bewahren und Empfehlungen aussprechen, die in einer Bar funktionieren.

Danesi war unser erster Lieblingsespresso
In dieser besagten Espresso Bar haben wir von Anfang an mit Danesi Caffè gerabeitet. Dem Danesi Oro und Danesi Doppio, also mit zwei Mühlen. Das war damals schon wegweisend. Den Danesi Oro haben wir für Cappuccino und den Danesi Doppio für Espresso und Latte Macchiato eingesetzt. Danesi ist somit für uns ein langer Wegbegleiter und bis heute einer der besten Caffes in unserem Sortiment.

Name: NG-PHÖNIX
Description:
Die eingetragene Marke NG-Phönix entstand im Jahr 2018, 
Markeninhaber ist die ETM.

RUM
Phönix steht für Qualität, Eleganz und Geschmack.
Durch unsere Handarbeit ein handverlesenes Geschenk das Ihre Wertschätzung auf einzigartige Weise zeigt und sicherlich einen bleibenden Eindruck hiterlässt.

*  Phönix Rum Caribbean Dream 23
Wir präsentieren Ihnen den Phönix Rum Caribbean Dream 23, ein Blend aus 7  bis zu 23-jährigen Rumsorten durch Soleraverfahren, aus verschiedenen Inseln der Karibik. Diese einzigartige Kombination wird Sie mit ihrem unvergleichlichen Aroma und Geschmack verzaubern. Jeder Schluck ist ein Erlebnis für die Sinne. Genießen Sie diesen edlen Tropfen pur und lassen Sie sich von der perfekten Harmonie und Balance der verschiedenen Rumsorten beeindrucken. Ein Rum mit vollem, runden, milden Geschmack.

*  Phönix Rum Caribbean 12
Vereint in einem Blend finden Sie eine Auswahl einiger bis zu 12 jährigen Rumsorten aus der Karibik.
Auch bei diesem Blend ergibt die Vielfalt der Geschmacksrichtungen der einzelnen hochqualitativen Rumsorten einen einzigartige Geschmack. Das Ergebnis kann sich sehen lassen: Ein lieblicher runder Rum mit einer leicht rauchigen Note und einer gewissen Schärfe.

* VODKA
Phönix White, Chocolate & Spiced 
Flavored Vodka aus Zuckerrohr 

*  AUSTRIAN PREMIUM VODKA
Ein österreichischer VODKA in Premium Qualität, 
der mit seinem weichen und milden Geschmack überzeugt. 
Hergestellt aus Weizen, mehrfach destilliert. 
PHÖNIX  PREMIUM VODKA – EIN STÜCK ÖSTERREICH

Als Vertriebsweg wurde die Direktvermarktung gewählt um preislich attraktiv für unsere Kunden zu sein.
Der Verkauf erfolgt nur direkt über unseren Online-Shop sowie über  Vertriebspartner und im ausgewählten Fachhandel.

Die Phönix Getränke sind in Österreich, Deutschland und der Schweiz erhältlich.

Name: FELICINA
Description:
Une équipe d’épicuriens passionnés. 
Passionnés par quoi ? Par le bon de la vie ! 
Les bons plats, les moments de partage entre amis et en famille, les voyages, les découvertes, les papilles qui explosent, les ventres bien remplis... les plaisirs simples mais qui apportent beaucoup. 
Une folle envie de vous partager nos coups de cœur, de mettre ce brin d’Italie dans vos assiettes et sur vos tables, de voir les sourires sur vos lèvres et de ravir vos papilles… C’est comme ça que nous sommes partis, sourcer pour vous, et aussi pour nous il faut bien l’avouer, le meilleur de l’Italie.

Name: Altitude Training
Description:
ALTITUDE TRAINING build, sell and rent hypoxic training systems. Theses systems simulate altitude for your own usage at home.

If you're looking to enhance your performance or planning to climb the Everest, our Altitude Training systems are what you need and meant to be easy to use, comfortable and at the best price.
Our Altitude Training systems are also working for horses as we're creating an altitude environment for them to improve performances in the safest way.

Our Altitude Training tents and generators have a plug & play philosophy, and doesn't require any training for the installation.

Altitude tents come in different sizes, from head tent to full size bed frame. We also custom build inflatable tents to your needs.

We also build custom high altitude chamber, room or gym. This is the ultimate system, as it allows you to move freely and in the most comfortable way.
With minor interventions, we can simulate altitude between 300 and 8.000 meters altitude. 

Rental sets can be shipped in : Belgium, France, Luxembourg, Germany, Switzerland, United Kingdom and USA.

Name: Honeth
Description:
Honeth recycle vos bijoux cassés ou démodés pour en faire ceux d'après.

POURQUOI HONETH?

Parce que comme moi, vous connaissez le syndrome de la boite à bijoux immettables et pleine à craquer. J'avais le choix : arrêter d'acheter, me mentir à moi-même sans rien changer ou créer une vraie solution.
Chez Honeth, on vous propose des bijoux fabriqués en France à partir des métaux précieux recyclés. En réutilisant les chutes de fabrication et vos anciens bijoux, nous produisons nos collections en minimisant notre impact sur les exploitations minières. Et ce n'est pas tout...

NOS VALEURS

L'écoresponsabilité est notre priorité dans une industrie de la mode qui a complètement déraillé. Au-delà d'avoir une démarche éthique, nous essayons d'aller bien plus loin, en supprimant les emballages inutiles, et en suggérant à nos clients une option de commande contenant que l'essentiel. Il va sans dire que tous nos emballages sont 100% recyclables.
Enfin, la qualité est fondamentale dans une démarche responsable, c'est pour cette raison que nous travaillons uniquement avec des métaux précieux. Nos collections sont intemporelles et produites en quantité mesurée, ainsi, nous ne pratiquons aucune solde de fin saison.

Name: You Are The Plant
Description:
You Are The Plant is more than a tea company — it’s a return. A return to the Earth, to traditional plant knowledge, and to the simple act of reconnecting with ourselves through nature.

We create herbal infusions and earth-based remedies that support balance, vitality, and everyday wellbeing. Our blends are crafted with care, using thoughtfully selected herbs, roots, flowers, and spices known for their traditional uses and subtle, energetic properties. Where possible, we choose organic and sustainably sourced ingredients, and we are continuously working toward increasing this commitment.

Whether you’re sipping a calming infusion as part of your evening ritual or seeking grounding support through the rhythm of the seasons, every blend is a gentle invitation: to slow down, to listen, and to remember that you, too, are part of the natural world.

Our inspiration is drawn from a rich tapestry of herbal traditions across cultures — from folk remedies to ancient practices — always approached with deep respect and curiosity.

At You Are The Plant, we don’t offer quick fixes. We offer connection. We believe in conscious choices, gentle nourishment, and the quiet strength that comes from living in rhythm with the Earth.

Because when we return to nature, we remember who we truly are.

Description:

É pelas encostas do Parque Natural da Serra de Aire e Candeeiros que queremos mostrar que a tradição se serve à mesa.

A nossa tarefa é simples: levar até si os melhores produtos, cheiros, sabores e texturas, originários de pequenos produtores em formato cabaz ou abertos e disponíveis em caixa ou mesa piquenique.
Alguns, ainda elaborados de forma artesanal, transportam-nos para o nosso passado.

Sediada em Porto de Mós e criada em 2021 a MADE IN Serra de Aire e Candeeiros certifica-se de assegurar a origem de produtos da área geográfica da serra e conselhos inseridos na mesma. A preservação da natureza e a sustentabilidade são os valores da nossa empresa. Estes produtos são nossos, estes produtos somos nós, leve-nos na sua bagagem e no seu coração.

Chez Aura Casta, je sélectionne pour vous des produits artisanaux et gourmands qui célèbrent les saveurs, le savoir-faire et le bien-être. Mon objectif est de créer des expériences uniques et mémorables, adaptées à toutes les occasions.

Ce que je propose :

	•	Paniers garnis sur mesure : Idéaux pour les particuliers et les entreprises, ces paniers sont conçus avec soin pour offrir des cadeaux gourmands, alliant authenticité et raffinement.
	•	Produits d’épicerie fine : Une sélection de produits locaux et artisanaux, allant des douceurs sucrées aux délices salés.
	•	Cadeaux d’affaires personnalisés : Offrez des attentions uniques à vos clients ou collaborateurs, qui marquent par leur originalité et leur qualité.
	•	Moments de bien-être : Je mets également à disposition des produits naturels, comme les huiles essentielles, pour accompagner des ateliers ou des événements axés sur la détente et l’équilibre.

Pour qui ?

	•	Particuliers : Pour se faire plaisir ou offrir un cadeau unique.
	•	Entreprises : Idéal pour les cadeaux d’affaires, les fêtes de fin d’année ou des événements spéciaux.

Pourquoi choisir Aura Casta ?

Parce que chaque produit raconte une histoire. Je travaille main dans la main avec des artisans passionnés pour garantir des produits de qualité, authentiques et respectueux de l’environnement.

Contactez-moi :

 chacha@auracasta.be
 0496/16.18.15

Découvrez Aura Casta, une invitation au partage et au plaisir gourmand !

Name: Pattison's Patisserie
Description:
Founded in 1995 by entrepreneurial Pastry Chef Peter Pattison, our journey began with a vision to redefine patisserie experiences in Australia.

Visionary Leadership:
Under Peter's visionary leadership, Pattison's Patisserie has evolved from a single storefront in 1995 to a thriving network of stores across Greater Sydney. With a relentless pursuit of perfection, Peter's goal is clear - to be Australia's leading boulangerie, delivering artisanal delights that captivate the senses.

Franchise Expansion:
In 2020, Pattison's Patisserie embraced a franchise model, opening new horizons for aspiring entrepreneurs to join our culinary family. This strategic move marked the beginning of an exciting growth phase, enabling us to share our passion for exceptional pastries and service with even more communities.

Upcoming Growth:
2023 marks a milestone of 20 stores, yet the journey is far from over. Pattison's Patisserie is poised for significant growth in the coming years. Our expansion plans include bringing the artistry of our patisserie to new locations, both within New South Wales and potentially beyond.

Join Our Culinary Family:
At Pattison's Patisserie, we invite you to be a part of our culinary family, whether as a valued customer, a pastry chef or a potential franchise partner. Immerse yourself in the irresistible taste of our artisanal delights and join us on a journey where every pastry tells a story of dedication, passion, and the pursuit of culinary perfection.

Name: Vintage Paperworks
Description:
Vintage Paperworks preserves the past one page at a time. We specialize in curating and selling rare books, collectible magazines, historic advertisements, photographs, artwork, and distinctive paper ephemera that appeal to collectors, decorators, researchers, and enthusiasts.

A major part of our business is our high-trust consignment service, helping individuals, collectors, estates, and small businesses sell unique or high-value printed materials. We handle the entire process, including:

Professional photography of rare books and paper collectibles

Detailed condition documentation and item-specific notes

Accurate, research-driven descriptions with historical context

Smart pricing strategies based on real market trends

Archival-quality packaging and secure shipping

Transparent reporting and prompt payouts

Consignors value our ability to transform rare books and paper collections into meaningful revenue, while buyers trust the quality, accuracy, and care behind every listing.

Whether you want to consign unique printed materials or you’re searching for authentic vintage pieces, Vintage Paperworks offers a curated, trustworthy way to explore—and share—history through original books and paper collectibles.

Name: Verdure Foods Limited
Description:
Verdure Foods Limited is a wholly Zambian owned and managed company that was incorporated in July, 2015.

Verdure Foods Limited provides Plant-Based Food options to individuals and families who desire to live healthier lives by eating clean. We exist to promote the health and happiness of individuals and families by increasing access to Plant-Based Nutrition options.

Verdure Foods Limited was born out of the personal experiences of its founders / directors who have been on a largely Plant Based Diet for over 2 decades now. They had a myriad of challenges finding non-meat food alternatives after completely eliminating animal-based foods from their diet. Over the years, many of those they knew to be on some form of special diet either gave up entirely or compromised often due to lack of readily available Plant-Based Food options. The realization that a lot of people struggled and got discouraged when attempting to live on a Plant Based Diet, whether as a personal lifestyle choice or for medical reasons, led to the birth of Verdure Foods Limited.

Highways are more than roads — they are journeys of people, produce, and purpose.
KrushiAharam is designed as a new-age rural stop, where agriculture, refreshment, wellness, and experiences come together naturally.

At KrushiAharam, travelers don’t just stop to eat — they pause, refresh, and reconnect. From clean, hygienic facilities and refreshing rest areas to farm-fresh food, medicinal and aromatic leafy soups, and thoughtfully curated rural experiences, every element is inspired by the land that feeds us.

Our spaces celebrate farm-to-plate food, showcase authentic agricultural produce through KhetiCorner, and open doors to agri-tourism experiences that help people understand where their food truly comes from. Whether you’re a traveler seeking a meaningful break, a family exploring nature, or a citizen curious about agriculture — KrushiAharam welcomes you.

Food • Farms • Wellness • Experiences
Not just a stop. A connection to the soil.

Name: Exit Zero Company
Description: Exit Zero was established on July 4, 2003 as a black-and-white weekly magazine in Cape May. The name was inspired by Cape May’s placement at the end of the 172-exit Garden State Parkway and the mission is to promote and celebrate Cape May with a fresh, relevant voice. In 2005, Exit Zero began the expansion of its brand beyond newsprint, opening a tiny retail store, selling Exit Zero-branded apparel and Cape May artwork. The store later moved to a larger location on the island and when the restaurant next door became available in 2015, the company knocked through the wall and created Exit Zero Cookhouse, offering Indian and Thai curries. The Cookhouse was ranked number one restaurant in Cape May by TripAdvisor that summer. In 2018, the restaurant moved across the street into a purpose-built new HQ and became Exit Zero Filling Station – a restaurant, retail store, gas station and publishing office. The gas pumps were removed in 2021 as Exit Zero focused on a new outdoor dining space complete with vintage private dining trailers.

Name: Pahhni Premium Alkaline Water
Description:
Pahhni was founded by Dr. Satinder Bharaj and Erik Loomis.
Pahhni  is a private startup company located in Hamilton, Ohio. Pahhni was founded in January 2021 by Dr. Satinder S. Bharaj and Erik D. Loomis, both highly experienced professionals who have fortune 50 experience in manufacturing, quality, regulatory and marketing of CPG products.  They have lived in the Greater Cincinnati area for the last 40+ years with their families and are happy to call it home

What makes Pahhni unique from other bottle waters?
In addition to the benefits of drinking alkaline water, Pahhni starts with the best tasting water in the world and makes it a little better. Natural limestone filtration provides a different, and better, process than many competitors in the alkaline water industry which use artificial means such as electrolysis and/or ionization. This natural process is a huge part of the award-winning great taste.

Pahhni is also committed to giving back and supporting the communities in which we live and work, the families who support the business, and the environment. In addition to the great natural taste, a portion of our profits are donated to OceanConservancey.org on behalf of CH4 Global, two organizations who are dedicated to preserving – and ultimately saving – our planet. Buying our water helps YOU – and helps the planet.

Our Core values sets us apart from other bottled water companies.
Quality – we will provide the highest quality GMP products at all times. No shortcuts, no exceptions.
Integrity – doing the right thing, in all aspects of the business, is our #1 priority.
Family/Community First – being a family-owned business, we want to make sure that our employees and surrounding communities are taken care of. We have laid the groundwork to be anything but a traditional company.
Environmental Responsibility – in addition to having 100% recyclable bottles, we are always looking out for better solutions for environmentally friendly materials.

Name: NS홈쇼핑
Description:
NS홈쇼핑은 
'신뢰받는 상품과 서비스, 브랜드를 기반으로
고객의 삶에 도움이 되는 세상의 모든 가치를 연결한다'를 사명으로
고객의 건강과 행복, 나아가 국가와 사회 발전에 공헌하기 위한 
기업의 사회적 책임을 성실히 이행하는 명문기업입니다.

NS홈쇼핑은 2001년 창립 이후
우리나라 홈쇼핑 산업의 새로운 가능성을 제시하며 뿌리 깊은 나무로 성장해왔습니다.
고객의 신뢰를 최우선으로 하는 ‘고객중심경영’과 
고객이 지불한 가치보다 더 높은 가치를 제공하기 위해 힘써온 노력이 
오늘날의 NS홈쇼핑을 만들었다고 생각합니다.
 
종합 통회사로서 생활에 ‘건강한 아이디어’를 더하고,
더 나아가 TV홈쇼핑에서뿐만 아니라 인터넷쇼핑몰, 모바일 등 
차세대 모바일 플랫폼에서도 “언제 어디서나 쉽고 간편하게 즐길 수 있는 쇼핑 문화”를 만들기 위해 노력하겠습니다.

항상 현실에 안주하지 않는 마음가짐으로 
‘어제와 다른 오늘, 오늘과 다른 내일’을 만들어갈 NS홈쇼핑과 함께 해주십시오.
감사합니다.

Name: Hometown Grocers, Inc.
Description:
Taking care of our communities comes naturally to us because we live in them, too. Hometown Grocers, Inc. (HGI) is a privately held, Wisconsin-based company with seven locations throughout the state. We are proud to serve our neighbors with exceptional service, quality products and clean stores. Above all, HGI means local, and our knowledgeable associates care for you like family. Expect a smile and a friendly associate always available to help you.

We opened our first HGI location in 2021, but our roots in Wisconsin’s grocery industry run deep. In over 70 years of business, we’ve crafted a people-first culture, and we know how to win in Wisconsin business. We’ve learned what shoppers want and need, and that there’s a difference between the two. Many of the extra services common to larger grocery stores, such as full-service meat and deli departments, require lots of square footage. They simply wouldn’t fit in our smaller-footprint HGI stores.

That’s why we offer you the best of the basics. When you walk into our stores, you’ll find just what you need in your community grocery store – a solid core of products and services along with highly trained service professionals who are always happy to welcome you.

What’s more, our network of stores provides a built-in backup system of inter-store support, so when one store needs extra staffing or stock is running low, a “sister” store can send reinforcements of people or product. It’s the best of both worlds – the feel of a neighborhood store and strength in numbers.
We hope you’ll visit us soon and experience HGI for yourself.

Name: WINEAWAY
Description:
Founded in 2000, Wineaway is Queensland's largest and most popular private wine storage and retail business. We run a purpose-built, temperature-controlled storage facility to allow collectors to store their wine collection, with detailed cataloguing and retrieval services provided. We also have an extensive retail offering of exclusive and highly rated fine wines. Wineaway is a destination and community for fine wine lovers and collectors to buy, share and celebrate the world’s best wines. 

In essence, we are your sommelier, anytime anywhere.

We became Australia's first wine storage facility to offer online access to cellar records and to this day remain as Brisbane's only storage business dedicated solely to wine.

Our service is fully managed. Wines can be delivered to us in person or you can instruct retailers and/or wineries to deliver directly to us. We also provide a pick up service. Upon receipt we catalogue the wines, inspecting each bottle (where appropriate) and transferring relevant data to our online database. Collections are then physically placed within the cellar in compartments dedicated solely to each individual client.

We also offer an extensive collection of exclusive and highly rated wines at competitive prices. If your passion is for aged wines, Wineaway's exclusive Museum List offers the opportunity to purchase wines and vintages of provenance that are seldom seen in even the best of wine stores. 

At the heart of Wineaway is a close-knit team that is passionate about bringing you the most exciting and sought after local and international wines, from new releases and new labels to rare and exotic vintages.

Write to us at email@wineaway.com.au or visit us at our facility.

Opening Hours:
Monday to Friday - 8:30am to 5:30pm
Saturday - 10:00am - 2:00pm
Outside hours - by appointment only

Discover more at www.wineaway.com.au.

Description:

For more than 50 years we've grown and packed our own pears and cherries in the fertile lands along the River Deltas of Northern California's Sacramento Valley, perfecting our fruit and taking pride in our harvests. We created Golden State Fruit in 2009 to bring the best of our handpicked fruit of our orchards direct to doorsteps. And thus began our delicious journey into the gourmet-gifting world. In 2013, we opened Farmstead Gourmet, located in the heart of Pennsylvania farm country, expanding our line of delicious handmade cheeses, candies, and sweet and savory accompaniments used throughout our brand's offerings. As our passion for real premium chocolate grew, we purchased a small artisan chocolate company and developed CY Chocolates to handcraft many of our chocolate offerings using real premium chocolates. In 2015, we combined the collective vision and experience of each of these gourmet brands together to bring an incredible variety and improved gourmet gift-shopping experience to you as "A Gift Inside". Name: Club des Amateurs de Vins Exquis
Description:
L’histoire du CAVE commence en 1984 par un groupe de passionnés qui ouvre l’un des premiers bars à vins de Genève, le Ballon Rouge. Celui-ci connaît très vite le succès. 

Dans la foulée, un Club d’oenophiles est créé. Il est placé sous la responsabilité de Jacques Perrin, alors jeune professeur de philosophie. De l’enseignement de la sagesse à la saveur, il n’y a qu’un pas : le Ballon Rouge ferme après trois ans d’activité et le Club des Amateurs de Vins Exquis prend son essor dans un milieu – celui du négoce des vins – plutôt conformiste et cloisonné. Les rencontres, les nécessités intérieures, l’intérêt d’une clientèle nouvelle, éprise de découvertes, vont très vite confirmer la pertinence de la voie choisie.

Trente-cinq ans plus tard, le CAVE regroupe une dizaine de milliers d’adhérents. S’il est devenu une référence incontournable dans le monde des amateurs de vins et jouit d’une très grande réputation, le Club garde la philosophie qui a fait son succès depuis les débuts : placer la relation client au centre de toutes ses actions et défendre une idée du vin qui, à l’écart des modes et des courants, privilégie les vins de lieu et de terroir ainsi qu’une esthétique du vin dont les vertus cardinales sont finesse, précision, pureté d’expression et harmonie.

Both a family business and an international award winner, Olio Piro is a testimony to respect of traditions, commitment to innovation and sustainability and devotion to quality at every level. The epitome of luxury in the Extra Virgin Olive Oil industry. 

Produced in Tuscany from the early harvest of 100% premium Italian olives, Olio Piro was awarded Best in the World in the blended, medium fruitiness category by the 2021 editions of the prestigious FlosOlei Guide. Piro.'s health benefits were bestowed by the never-awarded-before 2018 Health Claim Platinum Honor at the London IOOC and Gold Quality Award in 2020. Piro. also received Gold Awards at the 2019 and 2020 Japan World Competition and at the 2019, 2020, 2021 and 2022 New York International Olive Oil Competition.

Piro. will surprise you with its neat peppery finish, typical of elevated antioxidant polyphenol content. It is a robust oil that is truly elegant and harmonious with a remarkable fluidity that compliments the sophistication of its flavors. Every bottle of Piro. bears a handwritten harvest date, lot number and “best by” date – guaranteeing our commitment to quality and freshness so that consumers get their table the same perfectly fresh taste that could otherwise only be experienced in Tuscany.

Name: DIME
Description:
For decades, MSG was unfairly labeled as “bad,” because of a 1968 letter where a doctor speculated he felt "off" after eating Chinese food. The media ran with it, coining “Chinese Restaurant Syndrome” and fueling fear and xenophobia. But science proves MSG is completely safe.

MSG (monosodium glutamate) is simply glutamic acid, naturally found in foods like tomatoes and mushrooms. While the modern process of making MSG started in Japan, it’s now produced worldwide using fermented starches native to each region, like cassava in Latin America. Think of MSG like sugar in fruit: naturally occurring but also made in a concentrated form like table sugar.

The real issue was never MSG – it was the false narrative surrounding it. We’re here to shut down the myths and put MSG back where it belongs with bold everyday seasonings.

1 - Nous agissons comme 𝗰𝘂𝗿𝗮𝘁𝗲𝘂𝗿 pour sélectionner le meilleur de l’activewear en répondant aux besoins de 𝗰𝗼𝗻𝗳𝗼𝗿𝘁, 𝗽𝗿𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗰𝗶𝘁𝗲́ 𝗲𝘁 𝗱𝗲 𝘁𝗲𝗰𝗵𝗻𝗶𝗰𝗶𝘁𝗲́ afin de sublimer la femme dans son vêtement grâce à des coupes, couleurs et matières flatteuses intemporelles et toujours à la pointe des tendances actuelles.

2 - Nous 𝗳𝗲́𝗱𝗲́𝗿𝗼𝗻𝘀 𝗱𝗲𝘀 𝗺𝗮𝗿𝗾𝘂𝗲𝘀 qui sont toutes fondées autour du mouvement et qui partagent notre vision: celle d’une femme moderne dont la vie est en constante mutation et qui ne souhaite plus faire de compromis entre mode, performance et confort. Nous collaborons avec des 𝗺𝗮𝗿𝗾𝘂𝗲𝘀 𝗶𝗻𝗱𝗲́𝗽𝗲𝗻𝗱𝗮𝗻𝘁𝗲𝘀 𝗳𝗼𝗻𝗱𝗲́𝗲𝘀 𝗮̀ 𝟵𝟬% 𝗽𝗮𝗿 𝗱𝗲𝘀 𝗳𝗲𝗺𝗺𝗲𝘀 𝗲𝘁 𝗽𝗼𝘂𝗿 𝗹𝗲𝘀 𝗳𝗲𝗺𝗺𝗲𝘀 qui ont au centre de leur fondation la volonté de faciliter le mouvement au quotidien. Des marques à l’ADN unique mais toutes engagées à leur manière.

3 - Nous sommes convaincus que l’activewear a  𝘀𝗮 𝗽𝗹𝗮𝗰𝗲 𝗮𝘂𝘀𝘀𝗶 𝗯𝗶𝗲𝗻 𝗱𝗮𝗻𝘀 𝗹𝗲𝘀 𝘀𝗮𝗹𝗹𝗲𝘀 𝗱𝗲 𝘀𝗽𝗼𝗿𝘁 𝗾𝘂'𝗲𝗻 𝗱𝗲𝗵𝗼𝗿𝘀 et nous vous accompagnons dans la transition vers une garde robe plus fonctionnelle, confortable et moderne à travers le conseil, l’expertise et la création de contenus inspirants.
Dans un contexte où nous achetons davantage de vêtements mais où nous les portons de moins en moins, 𝗹𝗮 𝘃𝗲𝗿𝘀𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗹𝗶𝘁𝗲́ 𝗱’𝘂𝗻 𝘃𝗲̂𝘁𝗲𝗺𝗲𝗻𝘁 est pour nous primordiale.

Name: Go Eat Micromarkets
Description:
Go Eat provides workplaces with modern style vending that offers fresh, healthy meals. No need for employees to leave the office, no waiting for couriers, and no dealing with lunchtime congestion and queues. We understand that time is precious, and convenience is key.

Our micromarkets bring a variety of nutritious options directly to your office. With seamless technology and 24/7 availability, employees can grab a meal or snack whenever they need it, without interrupting their workflow. It’s not just about convenience; it’s about creating a workplace that values efficiency and wellbeing.

At Go Eat, we believe that a happy, well-nourished team is more productive and engaged. Our goal is to make it easier for companies to take care of their employees by providing easy access to quality food, helping to foster a positive and healthy work environment.
